pli-tv-kd1:40.2.7
Pali: Atha kho te yodhā bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāciṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.2.8
Pali: Te bhikkhū pabbājesuṁ, upasampādesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.1
Pali: Senānāyakā mahāmattā rājabhaṭe pucchiṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.2
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho, bhaṇe, itthannāmo ca itthannāmo ca yodhā na dissantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.3
Pali: “Itthannāmo ca itthannāmo ca, sāmi, yodhā bhikkhūsu pabbajitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.4
Pali: Senānāyakā mahāmattā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā rājabhaṭaṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.6
Pali: Senānāyakā mahāmattā rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.7
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro vohārike mahāmatte pucchi—

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.8
Pali: “yo, bhaṇe, rājabhaṭaṁ pabbājeti, kiṁ so pasavatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:40.3.9
Pali: “Upajjhāyassa, deva, sīsaṁ chetabbaṁ, anussāvakassa jivhā uddharitabbā, gaṇassa upaḍḍhaphāsukā bhañjitabbā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.1
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.3
Pali: “santi, bhante, rājāno assaddhā appasannā. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.4
Pali: Te appamattakenapi bhikkhū viheṭheyyuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.5
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, ayyā rājabhaṭaṁ na pabbājeyyun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.7
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.8
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.9
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, rājabhaṭo pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:40.4.10
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.0
Pali: 28. Aṅgulimālacoravatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena coro aṅgulimālo bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.2
Pali: Manussā passitvā ubbijjantipi, uttasantipi, palāyantipi, aññenapi gacchanti, aññenapi mukhaṁ karonti, dvārampi thakenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dhajabandhaṁ coraṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.7
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, dhajabandho coro pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:41.1.8
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.0
Pali: 29. Kārabhedakacoravatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena anuññātaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.2
Pali: “ye samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajanti, na te labbhā kiñci kātuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.3
Pali: svākkhāto dhammo, carantu brahmacariyaṁ sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso corikaṁ katvā kārāya baddho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.1.5
Pali: So kāraṁ bhinditvā palāyitvā bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.1
Pali: Manussā passitvā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.2
Pali: “ayaṁ so kārabhedako coro. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.3
Pali: Handa naṁ nemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.4
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.5
Pali: “māyyo, evaṁ avacuttha. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.6
Pali: Anuññātaṁ raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena—

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.7
Pali: ‘ye samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajanti, na te labbhā kiñci kātuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.8
Pali: svākkhāto dhammo, carantu brahmacariyaṁ sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.9
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.10
Pali: “abhayūvarā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā, nayime labbhā kiñci kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.11
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā kārabhedakaṁ coraṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.12
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.13
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, kārabhedako coro pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:42.2.14
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.0
Pali: 30. Likhitakacoravatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso corikaṁ katvā palāyitvā bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.2
Pali: So ca rañño antepure likhito hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.3
Pali: yattha passati, tattha hantabboti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.4
Pali: Manussā passitvā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.5
Pali: “ayaṁ so likhitako coro. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.6
Pali: Handa naṁ hanāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.7
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.8
Pali: “māyyo, evaṁ avacuttha. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.9
Pali: Anuññātaṁ raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena ‘ye samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajanti, na te labbhā kiñci kātuṁ, svākkhāto dhammo, carantu brahmacariyaṁ sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.10
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.11
Pali: “abhayūvarā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā, nayime labbhā kiñci kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.12
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā likhitakaṁ coraṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.14
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, likhitako coro pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:43.1.15
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:44.1.0
Pali: 31. Kasāhatavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:44.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso kasāhato katadaṇḍakammo bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti.

Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, kasāhato katadaṇḍakammo pabbājetabbo.

Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:45.1.0

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.0
Pali: 33. Iṇāyikavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro puriso iṇāyiko palāyitvā bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.2
Pali: Dhaniyā passitvā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.3
Pali: “ayaṁ so amhākaṁ iṇāyiko. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.4
Pali: Handa naṁ nemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.5
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.6
Pali: “māyyo, evaṁ avacuttha. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.7
Pali: Anuññātaṁ raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena—

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.8
Pali: ‘ye samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajanti, na te labbhā kiñci kātuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.9
Pali: svākkhāto dhammo, carantu brahmacariyaṁ sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.10
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.11
Pali: “abhayūvarā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā.

Pali: Nayime labbhā kiñci kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.13
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā iṇāyikaṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.15
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, iṇāyiko pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:46.1.16
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.0
Pali: 34. Dāsavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro dāso palāyitvā bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.2
Pali: Ayyakā passitvā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.3
Pali: “ayaṁ so amhākaṁ dāso. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.4
Pali: Handa naṁ nemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.5
Pali: Ekacce evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.6
Pali: “māyyo, evaṁ avacuttha, anuññātaṁ raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena ‘ye samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajanti, na te labbhā kiñci kātuṁ, svākkhāto dhammo, carantu brahmacariyaṁ sammā dukkhassa antakiriyāyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.7
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.8
Pali: “abhayūvarā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā, nayime labbhā kiñci kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.9
Pali: Kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dāsaṁ pabbājessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, dāso pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:47.1.12
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.0
Pali: 35. Kammārabhaṇḍuvatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro kammārabhaṇḍu mātāpitūhi saddhiṁ bhaṇḍitvā ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.2
Pali: Atha kho tassa kammārabhaṇḍussa mātāpitaro taṁ kammārabhaṇḍuṁ vicinantā ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhū pucchiṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.3
Pali: “api, bhante, evarūpaṁ dārakaṁ passeyyāthā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū ajānaṁyeva āhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.5
Pali: “na jānāmā”ti, apassaṁyeva āhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:48.1.6
Pali: “na passāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.1
Pali: Atha kho tassa kammārabhaṇḍussa mātāpitaro taṁ kammārabhaṇḍuṁ vicinantā bhikkhūsu pabbajitaṁ disvā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.2
Pali: “alajjino ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā, dussīlā musāvādino. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.3
Pali: Jānaṁyeva āhaṁsu—‘na jānāmā’ti, passaṁyeva āhaṁsu—‘na passāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.4
Pali: Ayaṁ dārako bhikkhūsu pabbajito”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tassa kammārabhaṇḍussa mātāpitūnaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:48.2.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, saṅghaṁ apaloketuṁ bhaṇḍukammāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.0
Pali: 36. Upālidārakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahe sattarasavaggiyā dārakā sahāyakā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.2
Pali: Upālidārako tesaṁ pāmokkho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.3
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.4
Pali: “kena nu kho upāyena upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.5
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.6
Pali: “sace kho upāli lekhaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.7
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.8
Pali: “sace kho upāli lekhaṁ sikkhissati, aṅguliyo dukkhā bhavissanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.9
Pali: Sace kho upāli gaṇanaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.1.10
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.1
Pali: “sace kho upāli gaṇanaṁ sikkhissati, urassa dukkho bhavissati. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.2
Pali: Sace kho upāli rūpaṁ sikkheyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.3
Pali: Atha kho upālissa mātāpitūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.4
Pali: “sace kho upāli rūpaṁ sikkhissati, akkhīni dukkhā bhavissanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.5
Pali: Ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā sukhasīlā sukhasamācārā, subhojanāni bhuñjitvā nivātesu sayanesu sayanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.2.6
Pali: Sace kho upāli samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajeyya, evaṁ kho upāli amhākaṁ accayena sukhañca jīveyya, na ca kilameyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.1
Pali: Assosi kho upālidārako mātāpitūnaṁ imaṁ kathāsallāpaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.2
Pali: Atha kho upālidārako yena te dārakā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā te dārake etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.3
Pali: “etha mayaṁ, ayyā, samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.4
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, ayya, pabbajissasi, evaṁ mayampi pabbajissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.5
Pali: Atha kho te dārakā ekamekassa mātāpitaro upasaṅkamitvā etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.6
Pali: “anujānātha maṁ agārasmā anāgāriyaṁ pabbajjāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.7
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ dārakānaṁ mātāpitaro—

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.8
Pali: “sabbepime dārakā samānacchandā kalyāṇādhippāyā”ti—

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.9
Pali: anujāniṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.10
Pali: Te bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāciṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.3.11
Pali: Te bhikkhū pabbājesuṁ upasampādesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.1
Pali: Te rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya rodanti—

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.2
Pali: “yāguṁ detha, bhattaṁ detha, khādanīyaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.3
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.4
Pali: “āgametha, āvuso, yāva ratti vibhāyati. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.5
Pali: Sace yāgu bhavissati pivissatha, sace bhattaṁ bhavissati bhuñjissatha, sace khādanīyaṁ bhavissati khādissatha; 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.6
Pali: no ce bhavissati yāgu vā bhattaṁ vā khādanīyaṁ vā, piṇḍāya caritvā bhuñjissathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.7
Pali: Evampi kho te bhikkhū bhikkhūhi vuccamānā rodantiyeva “yāguṁ detha, bhattaṁ detha, khādanīyaṁ dethā”ti; 

pli-tv-kd1:49.4.8
Pali: senāsanaṁ uhadantipi ummihantipi. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.1
Pali: Assosi kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya dārakasaddaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.2
Pali: Sutvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.3
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so, ānanda, dārakasaddo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, bhikkhū jānaṁ ūnavīsativassaṁ puggalaṁ upasampādentī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:49.5.8
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā jānaṁ ūnavīsativassaṁ puggalaṁ upasampādessanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.1
Pali: Ūnavīsativasso, bhikkhave, puggalo akkhamo hoti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ uppannānaṁ sārīrikānaṁ vedanānaṁ dukkhānaṁ tibbānaṁ kharānaṁ kaṭukānaṁ asātānaṁ amanāpānaṁ pāṇaharānaṁ anadhivāsakajātiko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.2
Pali: Vīsativassova kho, bhikkhave, puggalo khamo hoti sītassa uṇhassa jighacchāya pipāsāya ḍaṁsamakasavātātapasarīsapasamphassānaṁ duruttānaṁ durāgatānaṁ vacanapathānaṁ, uppannānaṁ sārīrikānaṁ vedanānaṁ dukkhānaṁ tibbānaṁ kharānaṁ kaṭukānaṁ asātānaṁ amanāpānaṁ pāṇaharānaṁ adhivāsakajātiko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.3
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya, pasannānaṁ vā bhiyyobhāvāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.4
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.5
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.6
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, jānaṁ ūnavīsativasso puggalo upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:49.6.7
Pali: Yo upasampādeyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.0
Pali: 37. Ahivātakarogavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataraṁ kulaṁ ahivātakarogena kālaṅkataṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.2
Pali: Tassa pitāputtakā sesā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.3
Pali: Te bhikkhūsu pabbajitvā ekatova piṇḍāya caranti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.4
Pali: Atha kho so dārako pituno bhikkhāya dinnāya upadhāvitvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.5
Pali: “mayhampi, tāta, dehi; 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.6
Pali: mayhampi, tāta, dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.7
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.8
Pali: “abrahmacārino ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.9
Pali: Ayampi dārako bhikkhuniyā jāto”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.10
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.11
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.12
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ūnapannarasavasso dārako pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:50.1.13
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato ānandassa upaṭṭhākakulaṁ saddhaṁ pasannaṁ ahivātakarogena kālaṅkataṁ hoti, dve ca dārakā sesā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.2
Pali: Te porāṇakena āciṇṇakappena bhikkhū passitvā upadhāvanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū apasādenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.4
Pali: Te bhikkhūhi apasādiyamānā rodanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato ānandassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.6
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.7
Pali: ‘na ūnapannarasavasso dārako pabbājetabbo’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.8
Pali: Ime ca dārakā ūnapannarasavassā. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.9
Pali: Kena nu kho upāyena ime dārakā na vinasseyyun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.10
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.11
Pali: “Ussahanti pana te, ānanda, dārakā kāke uḍḍāpetun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.12
Pali: “Ussahanti, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:51.1.14
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ūnapannarasavassaṁ dārakaṁ kākuḍḍepakaṁ pabbājetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.0
Pali: 38. Kaṇṭakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato upanandassa sakyaputtassa dve sāmaṇerā honti—

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.2
Pali: kaṇṭako ca mahako ca. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.3
Pali: Te aññamaññaṁ dūsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma sāmaṇerā evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācarissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.7
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ekena dve sāmaṇerā upaṭṭhāpetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd1:52.1.8
Pali: Yo upaṭṭhāpeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.0
Pali: 39. Āhundarikavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā tattheva rājagahe vassaṁ vasi, tattha hemantaṁ, tattha gimhaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.3
Pali: “āhundarikā samaṇānaṁ sakyaputtiyānaṁ disā andhakārā, na imesaṁ disā pakkhāyantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.2
Pali: “gacchānanda, avāpuraṇaṁ ādāya anupariveṇiyaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ārocehi—

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.3
Pali: ‘icchatāvuso bhagavā dakkhiṇāgiriṁ cārikaṁ pakkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.4
Pali: Yassāyasmato attho, so āgacchatū’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.5
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā avāpuraṇaṁ ādāya anupariveṇiyaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.6
Pali: “icchatāvuso, bhagavā dakkhiṇāgiriṁ cārikaṁ pakkamituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.2.7
Pali: Yassāyasmato attho, so āgacchatū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.2
Pali: “bhagavatā, āvuso ānanda, paññattaṁ dasavassāni nissāya vatthuṁ, dasavassena nissayaṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.3
Pali: Tattha ca no gantabbaṁ bhavissati, nissayo ca gahetabbo bhavissati, ittaro ca vāso bhavissati, puna ca paccāgantabbaṁ bhavissati, puna ca nissayo gahetabbo bhavissati. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.4
Pali: Sace amhākaṁ ācariyupajjhāyā gamissanti, mayampi gamissāma; 

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.5
Pali: no ce amhākaṁ ācariyupajjhāyā gamissanti, mayampi na gamissāma. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.3.6
Pali: Lahucittakatā no, āvuso ānanda, paññāyissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā ogaṇena bhikkhusaṅghena dakkhiṇāgiriṁ cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.2.0
Pali: 40. Nissayamuccanakakathā 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā dakkhiṇāgirismiṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā punadeva rājagahaṁ paccāgacchi. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.4
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho, ānanda, tathāgato ogaṇena bhikkhusaṅghena dakkhiṇāgiriṁ cārikaṁ pakkanto”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:53.4.7
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena pañcavassāni nissāya vatthuṁ, abyattena yāvajīvaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.2
Pali: Na asekkhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti na asekkhena samādhikkhandhena, na asekkhena paññākkhandhena na asekkhena vimuttikkhandhena na asekkhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.4
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.5
Pali: Asekkhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti asekkhena samādhikkhandhena. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.6
Pali: Asekkhena paññākkhandhena … 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.7
Pali: asekkhena vimuttikkhandhena … 

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.8
Pali: asekkhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.5.9
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.2
Pali: Assaddho hoti, ahiriko hoti, anottappī hoti, kusīto hoti, muṭṭhassati hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.4
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.5
Pali: Saddho hoti, hirimā hoti, ottappī hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, upaṭṭhitassati hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.6.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.2
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti, appassuto hoti, duppañño hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.4
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.5
Pali: Na adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, na ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, na atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti, bahussuto hoti, paññavā hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.7.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.2
Pali: Āpattiṁ na jānāti, anāpattiṁ na jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena na svāgatāni honti na suvibhattāni na suppavattīni na suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso—

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.4
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.5
Pali: Āpattiṁ jānāti, anāpattiṁ jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena svāgatāni honti suvibhattāni suppavattīni suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso—

pli-tv-kd1:53.8.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.2
Pali: Āpattiṁ na jānāti, anāpattiṁ na jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, ūnapañcavasso hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.4
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.5
Pali: Āpattiṁ jānāti, anāpattiṁ jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, pañcavasso vā hoti atirekapañcavasso vā—

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.9.7
Pali: Pañcakadasavāro niṭṭhito. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.1
Pali: Chahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.2
Pali: Na asekkhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti, na asekkhena samādhikkhandhena, na asekkhena paññākkhandhena, na asekkhena vimuttikkhandhena, na asekkhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti, ūnapañcavasso hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.4
Pali: Chahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.5
Pali: Asekkhena sīlakkhandhena samannāgato hoti, asekkhena samādhikkhandhena, asekkhena paññākkhandhena, asekkhena vimuttikkhandhena, asekkhena vimuttiñāṇadassanakkhandhena samannāgato hoti, pañcavasso vā hoti atirekapañcavasso vā—

pli-tv-kd1:53.10.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.2
Pali: Assaddho hoti, ahiriko hoti, anottappī hoti, kusīto hoti, muṭṭhassati hoti, ūnapañcavasso hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.4
Pali: Chahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.5
Pali: Saddho hoti, hirimā hoti, ottappī hoti, āraddhavīriyo hoti, upaṭṭhitassati hoti, pañcavasso vā hoti atirekapañcavasso vā—

pli-tv-kd1:53.11.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.2
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti, appassuto hoti, duppañño hoti, ūnapañcavasso hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.4
Pali: Chahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.5
Pali: Na adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, na ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, na atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti, bahussuto hoti, paññavā hoti, pañcavasso vā hoti atirekapañcavasso vā—

pli-tv-kd1:53.12.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.1
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.2
Pali: Āpattiṁ na jānāti, anāpattiṁ na jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti, ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena na svāgatāni honti na suvibhattāni na suppavattīni na suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso, ūnapañcavasso hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā na anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.4
Pali: Chahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.5
Pali: Āpattiṁ jānāti, anāpattiṁ jānāti, lahukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, garukaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena svāgatāni honti suvibhattāni suppavattīni suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso, pañcavasso vā hoti atirekapañcavasso vā—

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahaṅgehi samannāgatena bhikkhunā anissitena vatthabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:53.13.7
Pali: Abhayūvarabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito aṭṭhamo. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.0
Pali: 41. Rāhulavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājagahe yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena kapilavatthu tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena kapilavatthu tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā sakkesu viharati kapilavatthusmiṁ nigrodhārāme. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena suddhodanassa sakkassa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.5
Pali: Atha kho rāhulamātā devī rāhulaṁ kumāraṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.6
Pali: “eso te, rāhula, pitā. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.1.7
Pali: Gacchassu, dāyajjaṁ yācāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.1
Pali: Atha kho rāhulo kumāro yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato purato, aṭṭhāsi—

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.2
Pali: “sukhā te, samaṇa, chāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.4
Pali: Atha kho rāhulo kumāro bhagavantaṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhi—

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.5
Pali: “dāyajjaṁ me, samaṇa, dehi; 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.6
Pali: dāyajjaṁ me, samaṇa, dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ sāriputtaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.8
Pali: “tena hi tvaṁ, sāriputta, rāhulaṁ kumāraṁ pabbājehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.2.9
Pali: “Kathāhaṁ, bhante, rāhulaṁ kumāraṁ pabbājemī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.2
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tīhi saraṇagamanehi sāmaṇerapabbajjaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.3
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, pabbājetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.4
Pali: paṭhamaṁ kesamassuṁ ohārāpetvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādāpetvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ kārāpetvā bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vandāpetvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīdāpetvā añjaliṁ paggaṇhāpetvā ‘evaṁ vadehī’ti vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.5
Pali: ‘Buddhaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.6
Pali: Dhammaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.7
Pali: Saṅghaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.8
Pali: Dutiyampi buddhaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.9
Pali: Dutiyampi dhammaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.10
Pali: Dutiyampi saṅghaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.11
Pali: Tatiyampi buddhaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.12
Pali: Tatiyampi dhammaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi, 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.13
Pali: Tatiyampi saṅghaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.3.14
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi tīhi saraṇagamanehi sāmaṇerapabbajjan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāriputto rāhulaṁ kumāraṁ pabbājesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.2
Pali: Atha kho suddhodano sakko yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho suddhodano sakko bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.4
Pali: “ekāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavantaṁ varaṁ yācāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.5
Pali: “Atikkantavarā kho, gotama, tathāgatā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.6
Pali: “Yañca, bhante, kappati, yañca anavajjan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.4.7
Pali: “Vadehi, gotamā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.5.1
Pali: “Bhagavati me, bhante, pabbajite anappakaṁ dukkhaṁ ahosi, tathā nande, adhimattaṁ rāhule. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.5.2
Pali: Puttapemaṁ, bhante, chaviṁ chindati, chaviṁ chetvā cammaṁ chindati, cammaṁ chetvā maṁsaṁ chindati, maṁsaṁ chetvā nhāruṁ chindati, nhāruṁ chetvā aṭṭhiṁ chindati, aṭṭhiṁ chetvā aṭṭhimiñjaṁ āhacca tiṭṭhati. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.5.3
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, ayyā ananuññātaṁ mātāpitūhi puttaṁ na pabbājeyyun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā suddhodanaṁ sakkaṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.6.2
Pali: Atha kho suddhodano sakko bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.6.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:54.6.4
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, ananuññāto mātāpitūhi putto pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:54.6.5
Pali: Yo pabbājeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā kapilavatthusmiṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena sāvatthi tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena sāvatthi tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato sāriputtassa upaṭṭhākakulaṁ āyasmato sāriputtassa santike dārakaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.5
Pali: “imaṁ dārakaṁ thero pabbājetū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.6
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato sāriputtassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.7
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.8
Pali: ‘na ekena dve sāmaṇerā upaṭṭhāpetabbā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.9
Pali: Ayañca me rāhulo sāmaṇero. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.10
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:55.1.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena ekena dve sāmaṇere upaṭṭhāpetuṁ, yāvatake vā pana ussahati ovadituṁ anusāsituṁ tāvatake upaṭṭhāpetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.0
Pali: 42. Sikkhāpadakathā 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.1
Pali: Atha kho sāmaṇerānaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.2
Pali: “kati nu kho amhākaṁ sikkhāpadāni, kattha ca amhehi sikkhitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sāmaṇerānaṁ dasa sikkhāpadāni, tesu ca sāmaṇerehi sikkhituṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.5
Pali: pāṇātipātā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.6
Pali: adinnādānā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.7
Pali: abrahmacariyā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.8
Pali: musāvādā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.9
Pali: surāmerayamajjapamādaṭṭhānā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.10
Pali: vikālabhojanā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.11
Pali: naccagītavāditavisūkadassanā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.12
Pali: mālāgandhavilepanadhāraṇamaṇḍanavibhūsanaṭṭhānā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.13
Pali: uccāsayanamahāsayanā veramaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.14
Pali: jātarūparajatapaṭiggahaṇā veramaṇī. 

pli-tv-kd1:56.1.15
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sāmaṇerānaṁ imāni dasa sikkhāpadāni, imesu ca sāmaṇerehi sikkhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.0
Pali: 43. Daṇḍakammavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāmaṇerā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.2
Pali: Bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma sāmaṇerā bhikkhūsu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā viharissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.5
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa sāmaṇerassa daṇḍakammaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.6
Pali: Bhikkhūnaṁ alābhāya parisakkati, 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.7
Pali: bhikkhūnaṁ anatthāya parisakkati, 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.8
Pali: bhikkhūnaṁ avāsāya parisakkati, 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.9
Pali: bhikkhū akkosati paribhāsati, 

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.10
Pali: bhikkhū bhikkhūhi bhedeti—

pli-tv-kd1:57.1.11
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa sāmaṇerassa daṇḍakammaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.2
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho daṇḍakammaṁ kātabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, āvaraṇaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū sāmaṇerānaṁ sabbaṁ saṅghārāmaṁ āvaraṇaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.6
Pali: Sāmaṇerā ārāmaṁ pavisituṁ alabhamānā pakkamantipi, vibbhamantipi, titthiyesupi saṅkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.8
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, sabbo saṅghārāmo āvaraṇaṁ kātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.9
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.2.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yattha vā vasati, yattha vā paṭikkamati, tattha āvaraṇaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū sāmaṇerānaṁ mukhadvārikaṁ āhāraṁ āvaraṇaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.2
Pali: Manussā yāgupānampi saṅghabhattampi karontā sāmaṇere evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.3
Pali: “etha, bhante, yāguṁ pivatha; 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.4
Pali: etha, bhante, bhattaṁ bhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.5
Pali: Sāmaṇerā evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.6
Pali: “nāvuso, labbhā. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.7
Pali: Bhikkhūhi āvaraṇaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.8
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.9
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā sāmaṇerānaṁ mukhadvārikaṁ āhāraṁ āvaraṇaṁ karissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, mukhadvāriko āhāro āvaraṇaṁ kātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.12
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:57.3.13
Pali: Daṇḍakammavatthu niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.0
Pali: 44. Anāpucchāvaraṇavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū upajjhāye anāpucchā sāmaṇerānaṁ āvaraṇaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.2
Pali: Upajjhāyā gavesanti—

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.3
Pali: “kathaṁ nu kho amhākaṁ sāmaṇerā na dissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.5
Pali: “chabbaggiyehi, āvuso, bhikkhūhi āvaraṇaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.6
Pali: Upajjhāyā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū amhe anāpucchā amhākaṁ sāmaṇerānaṁ āvaraṇaṁ karissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.9
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, upajjhāye anāpucchā āvaraṇaṁ kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:58.1.10
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.0
Pali: 45. Apalāḷanavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ sāmaṇere apalāḷenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.2
Pali: Therā sāmaṁ dantakaṭṭhampi mukhodakampi gaṇhantā kilamanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.4
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, aññassa parisā apalāḷetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd1:59.1.5
Pali: Yo apalāḷeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.0
Pali: 46. Kaṇṭakasāmaṇeravatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato upanandassa sakyaputtassa kaṇṭako nāma sāmaṇero kaṇṭakiṁ nāma bhikkhuniṁ dūsesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.2
Pali: Bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma sāmaṇero evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācarissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.5
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dasahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ sāmaṇeraṁ nāsetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.6
Pali: Pāṇātipātī hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.7
Pali: adinnādāyī hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.8
Pali: abrahmacārī hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.9
Pali: musāvādī hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.10
Pali: majjapāyī hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.11
Pali: buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.12
Pali: dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.13
Pali: saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.14
Pali: micchādiṭṭhiko hoti, 

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.15
Pali: bhikkhunidūsako hoti—

pli-tv-kd1:60.1.16
Pali: anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi dasahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ sāmaṇeraṁ nāsetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.0
Pali: 47. Paṇḍakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro paṇḍako bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.2
Pali: So dahare dahare bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.3
Pali: “etha, maṁ āyasmanto dūsethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū apasādenti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.5
Pali: “nassa, paṇḍaka, vinassa, paṇḍaka, ko tayā attho”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.6
Pali: So bhikkhūhi apasādito mahante mahante moḷigalle sāmaṇere upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.7
Pali: “etha, maṁ āvuso dūsethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.8
Pali: Sāmaṇerā apasādenti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.9
Pali: “nassa, paṇḍaka, vinassa, paṇḍaka, ko tayā attho”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.10
Pali: So sāmaṇerehi apasādito hatthibhaṇḍe assabhaṇḍe upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.11
Pali: “etha, maṁ āvuso dūsethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.12
Pali: Hatthibhaṇḍā assabhaṇḍā dūsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.13
Pali: Te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.14
Pali: “paṇḍakā ime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.15
Pali: Yepi imesaṁ na paṇḍakā, tepi ime paṇḍake dūsenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.16
Pali: Evaṁ ime sabbeva abrahmacārino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.17
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ hatthibhaṇḍānaṁ assabhaṇḍānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.18
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:61.1.19
Pali: “Paṇḍako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.0
Pali: 48. Theyyasaṁvāsakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro purāṇakulaputto khīṇakolañño sukhumālo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.2
Pali: Atha kho tassa purāṇakulaputtassa khīṇakolaññassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ kho sukhumālo, na paṭibalo anadhigataṁ vā bhogaṁ adhigantuṁ, adhigataṁ vā bhogaṁ phātiṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.4
Pali: Kena nu kho ahaṁ upāyena sukhañca jīveyyaṁ, na ca kilameyyan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.5
Pali: Atha kho tassa purāṇakulaputtassa khīṇakolaññassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.6
Pali: “ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā sukhasīlā sukhasamācārā, subhojanāni bhuñjitvā nivātesu sayanesu sayanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.1.7
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ sāmaṁ pattacīvaraṁ paṭiyādetvā kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ saṁvaseyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.1
Pali: Atha kho so purāṇakulaputto khīṇakolañño sāmaṁ pattacīvaraṁ paṭiyādetvā kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhū abhivādeti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.2
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.3
Pali: “kativassosi tvaṁ, āvuso”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.4
Pali: “Kiṁ etaṁ, āvuso, kativasso nāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.5
Pali: “Ko pana te, āvuso, upajjhāyo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.6
Pali: “Kiṁ etaṁ, āvuso, upajjhāyo nāmā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.7
Pali: Bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ upāliṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:62.2.8
Pali: “iṅghāvuso upāli, imaṁ pabbajitaṁ anuyuñjāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.3.1
Pali: Atha kho so purāṇakulaputto khīṇakolañño āyasmatā upālinā anuyuñjīyamāno etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.3.2
Pali: Āyasmā upāli bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.3.3
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.3.4
Pali: “Theyyasaṁvāsako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd1:62.3.5
Pali: Titthiyapakkantako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.0
Pali: 49. Tiracchānagatavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro nāgo nāgayoniyā aṭṭīyati harāyati jigucchati. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.2
Pali: Atha kho tassa nāgassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.3
Pali: “kena nu kho ahaṁ upāyena nāgayoniyā ca parimucceyyaṁ khippañca manussattaṁ paṭilabheyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.4
Pali: Atha kho tassa nāgassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.5
Pali: “ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dhammacārino samacārino brahmacārino saccavādino sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.1.6
Pali: Sace kho ahaṁ samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajeyyaṁ, evāhaṁ nāgayoniyā ca parimucceyyaṁ, khippañca manussattaṁ paṭilabheyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.1
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo māṇavakavaṇṇena bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.2
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū pabbājesuṁ, upasampādesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena so nāgo aññatarena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ paccantime vihāre paṭivasati. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.4
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya ajjhokāse caṅkamati. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.5
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo tassa bhikkhuno nikkhante vissaṭṭho niddaṁ okkami. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.2.6
Pali: Sabbo vihāro ahinā puṇṇo, vātapānehi bhogā nikkhantā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.1
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu vihāraṁ pavisissāmīti kavāṭaṁ paṇāmento addasa sabbaṁ vihāraṁ ahinā puṇṇaṁ, vātapānehi bhoge nikkhante, disvāna bhīto vissaramakāsi. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.2
Pali: Bhikkhū upadhāvitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.3
Pali: “kissa tvaṁ, āvuso, vissaramakāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.4
Pali: “Ayaṁ, āvuso, sabbo vihāro ahinā puṇṇo, vātapānehi bhogā nikkhantā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.5
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo tena saddena paṭibujjhitvā sake āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.6
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.7
Pali: “kosi tvaṁ, āvuso”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.8
Pali: “Ahaṁ, bhante, nāgo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.9
Pali: “Kissa pana tvaṁ, āvuso, evarūpaṁ akāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.10
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.3.11
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.4.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā taṁ nāgaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd1:63.4.2
Pali: “tumhe khottha nāgā aviruḷhidhammā imasmiṁ dhammavinaye. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.4.3
Pali: Gaccha tvaṁ, nāga, tattheva cātuddase pannarase aṭṭhamiyā ca pakkhassa uposathaṁ upavasa, evaṁ tvaṁ nāgayoniyā ca parimuccissasi, khippañca manussattaṁ paṭilabhissasī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.4.4
Pali: Atha kho so nāgo aviruḷhidhammo kirāhaṁ imasmiṁ dhammavinayeti dukkhī dummano assūni pavattayamāno vissaraṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.5.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd1:63.5.2
Pali: “dveme, bhikkhave, paccayā nāgassa sabhāvapātukammāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.5.3
Pali: Yadā ca sajātiyā methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevati, yadā ca vissaṭṭho niddaṁ okkamati—

pli-tv-kd1:63.5.4
Pali: ime kho, bhikkhave, dve paccayā nāgassa sabhāvapātukammāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:63.5.5
Pali: Tiracchānagato, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.0
Pali: 50. Mātughātakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro māṇavako mātaraṁ jīvitā voropesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.2
Pali: So tena pāpakena kammena aṭṭīyati harāyati jigucchati. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.3
Pali: Atha kho tassa māṇavakassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.4
Pali: “kena nu kho ahaṁ upāyena imassa pāpakassa kammassa nikkhantiṁ kareyyan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.5
Pali: Atha kho tassa māṇavakassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.6
Pali: “ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dhammacārino samacārino brahmacārino saccavādino sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.1.7
Pali: Sace kho ahaṁ samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajeyyaṁ, evāhaṁ imassa pāpakassa kammassa nikkhantiṁ kareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.1
Pali: Atha kho so māṇavako bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.2
Pali: Bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ upāliṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.3
Pali: “pubbepi kho, āvuso upāli, nāgo māṇavakavaṇṇena bhikkhūsu pabbajito. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.4
Pali: Iṅghāvuso upāli, imaṁ māṇavakaṁ anuyuñjāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.5
Pali: Atha kho so māṇavako āyasmatā upālinā anuyuñjīyamāno etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.6
Pali: Āyasmā upāli bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.7
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd1:64.2.8
Pali: “mātughātako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.0
Pali: 51. Pitughātakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro māṇavako pitaraṁ jīvitā voropesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.2
Pali: So tena pāpakena kammena aṭṭīyati harāyati jigucchati. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.3
Pali: Atha kho tassa māṇavakassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.4
Pali: “kena nu kho ahaṁ upāyena imassa pāpakassa kammassa nikkhantiṁ kareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.5
Pali: Atha kho tassa māṇavakassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.6
Pali: “ime kho samaṇā sakyaputtiyā dhammacārino samacārino brahmacārino saccavādino sīlavanto kalyāṇadhammā, sace kho ahaṁ samaṇesu sakyaputtiyesu pabbajeyyaṁ, evāhaṁ imassa pāpakassa kammassa nikkhantiṁ kareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.7
Pali: Atha kho so māṇavako bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā pabbajjaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.8
Pali: Bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ upāliṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.9
Pali: “pubbepi kho, āvuso upāli, nāgo māṇavakavaṇṇena bhikkhūsu pabbajito. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.10
Pali: Iṅghāvuso, upāli, imaṁ māṇavakaṁ anuyuñjāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.11
Pali: Atha kho so māṇavako āyasmatā upālinā anuyuñjīyamāno etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.12
Pali: Āyasmā upāli bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.13
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:65.1.14
Pali: “Pitughātako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.1.0
Pali: 52. Arahantaghātakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:66.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhū sāketā sāvatthiṁ addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.1.2
Pali: Antarāmagge corā nikkhamitvā ekacce bhikkhū acchindiṁsu, ekacce bhikkhū haniṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.1.3
Pali: Sāvatthiyā rājabhaṭā nikkhamitvā ekacce core aggahesuṁ, ekacce corā palāyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.1.4
Pali: Ye te palāyiṁsu te bhikkhūsu pabbajiṁsu, ye te gahitā te vadhāya oniyyanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.1
Pali: Addasaṁsu kho te palāyitvā pabbajitā te core vadhāya oniyyamāne, disvāna evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.2
Pali: “sādhu kho mayaṁ palāyimhā, sacā ca mayaṁ gayheyyāma, mayampi evameva haññeyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.3
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.4
Pali: “kiṁ pana tumhe, āvuso, akatthā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.5
Pali: Atha kho te pabbajitā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.6
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.7
Pali: “Arahanto ete, bhikkhave, bhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd1:66.2.8
Pali: Arahantaghātako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.0
Pali: 53. Bhikkhunidūsakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhuniyo sāketā sāvatthiṁ addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.2
Pali: Antarāmagge corā nikkhamitvā ekaccā bhikkhuniyo acchindiṁsu, ekaccā bhikkhuniyo dūsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.3
Pali: Sāvatthiyā rājabhaṭā nikkhamitvā ekacce core aggahesuṁ, ekacce corā palāyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.4
Pali: Ye te palāyiṁsu, te bhikkhūsu pabbajiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.5
Pali: Ye te gahitā, te vadhāya oniyyanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.6
Pali: Addasaṁsu kho te palāyitvā pabbajitā te core vadhāya oniyyamāne, disvāna evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.7
Pali: “sādhu kho mayaṁ palāyimhā, sacā ca mayaṁ gayheyyāma, mayampi evameva haññeyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.8
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.9
Pali: “kiṁ pana tumhe, āvuso, akatthā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.10
Pali: Atha kho te pabbajitā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.11
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.12
Pali: “Bhikkhunidūsako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.13
Pali: Saṅghabhedako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd1:67.1.14
Pali: Lohituppādako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:68.1.0
Pali: 54. Ubhatobyañjanakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:68.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro ubhatobyañjanako bhikkhūsu pabbajito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:68.1.2
Pali: So karotipi kārāpetipi. 

pli-tv-kd1:68.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:68.1.4
Pali: “Ubhatobyañjanako, bhikkhave, anupasampanno na upasampādetabbo, upasampanno nāsetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:69.1.0
Pali: 55. Anupajjhāyakādivatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:69.1.1

pli-tv-kd1:69.1.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, anupajjhāyako upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:69.1.4
Pali: Yo upasampādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:69.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū saṅghena upajjhāyena upasampādenti.

pli-tv-kd1:69.2.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, saṅghena upajjhāyena upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:69.2.4
Pali: Yo upasampādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:69.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū gaṇena upajjhāyena upasampādenti.

pli-tv-kd1:69.3.3

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.0
Pali: 56. Apattakādivatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū apattakaṁ upasampādenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.2
Pali: Hatthesu piṇḍāya caranti. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi titthiyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, apattako upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.1.7
Pali: Yo upasampādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū acīvarakaṁ upasampādenti. 

pli-tv-kd1:70.2.2
Pali: Naggā piṇḍāya caranti.

pli-tv-kd1:70.2.7
Pali: Yo upasampādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti.

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.0
Pali: 58. Alajjīnissayavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū alajjīnaṁ nissayaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, alajjīnaṁ nissayo dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.4
Pali: Yo dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū alajjīnaṁ nissāya vasanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.6
Pali: Tepi nacirasseva alajjino honti pāpakā. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.8
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, alajjīnaṁ nissāya vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.9
Pali: Yo vaseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.10
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.11
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.12
Pali: ‘na alajjīnaṁ nissayo dātabbo, na alajjīnaṁ nissāya vatthabban’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.13
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayaṁ jāneyyāma lajjiṁ vā alajjiṁ vā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:72.1.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, catūhapañcāhaṁ āgametuṁ yāva bhikkhusabhāgataṁ jānāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.0
Pali: 59. Gamikādinissayavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kosalesu janapade addhānamaggappaṭipanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.2
Pali: Atha kho tassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.3
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.4
Pali: ‘na anissitena vatthabban’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.5
Pali: Ahañcamhi nissayakaraṇīyo addhānamaggappaṭipanno, kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.1.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, addhānamaggappaṭipannena bhikkhunā nissayaṁ alabhamānena anissitena vatthun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena dve bhikkhū kosalesu janapade addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.2
Pali: Te aññataraṁ āvāsaṁ upagacchiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.3
Pali: Tattha eko bhikkhu gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.4
Pali: Atha kho tassa gilānassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.5
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.6
Pali: ‘na anissitena vatthabban’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.7
Pali: Ahañcamhi nissayakaraṇīyo gilāno, kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.2.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā nissayaṁ alabhamānena anissitena vatthun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.1
Pali: Atha kho tassa gilānupaṭṭhākassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.2
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.3
Pali: ‘na anissitena vatthabban’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.4
Pali: Ahañcamhi nissayakaraṇīyo, ayañca bhikkhu gilāno, kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.3.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānupaṭṭhākena bhikkhunā nissayaṁ alabhamānena yāciyamānena anissitena vatthun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu araññe viharati. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.2
Pali: Tassa ca tasmiṁ senāsane phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.3
Pali: Atha kho tassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.4
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.5
Pali: ‘na anissitena vatthabban’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.6
Pali: Ahañcamhi nissayakaraṇīyo araññe viharāmi, mayhañca imasmiṁ senāsane phāsu hoti, kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, āraññikena bhikkhunā phāsuvihāraṁ sallakkhentena nissayaṁ alabhamānena anissitena vatthuṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:73.4.9
Pali: yadā patirūpo nissayadāyako āgacchissati, tadā tassa nissāya vasissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.0
Pali: 60. Gottenaanussāvanānujānana 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato mahākassapassa upasampadāpekkho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.2
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākassapo āyasmato ānandassa santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.3
Pali: “āgacchatu ānando imaṁ anussāvessatū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.4
Pali: Āyasmā ānando evamāha—

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.5
Pali: “nāhaṁ ussahāmi therassa nāmaṁ gahetuṁ, garu me thero”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.1.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gottenapi anussāvetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.0
Pali: 61. Dveupasampadāpekkhādivatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato mahākassapassa dve upasampadāpekkhā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.2
Pali: Te vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.3
Pali: “ahaṁ paṭhamaṁ upasampajjissāmi, ahaṁ paṭhamaṁ upasampajjissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.2.5
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve ekānussāvane kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulānaṁ therānaṁ upasampadāpekkhā honti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.2
Pali: Te vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.3
Pali: “ahaṁ paṭhamaṁ upasampajjissāmi, ahaṁ paṭhamaṁ upasampajjissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.4
Pali: Therā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.5
Pali: “handa mayaṁ, āvuso, sabbeva ekānussāvane karomā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:74.3.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve tayo ekānussāvane kātuṁ, tañca kho ekena upajjhāyena, na tveva nānupajjhāyenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.0
Pali: 62. Gabbhavīsūpasampadānujānana 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā kumārakassapo gabbhavīso upasampanno ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.2
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato kumārakassapassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.3
Pali: “bhagavatā paññattaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.4
Pali: ‘na ūnavīsativasso puggalo upasampādetabbo’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.5
Pali: Ahañcamhi gabbhavīso upasampanno. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.6
Pali: Upasampanno nu khomhi, nanu kho upasampanno”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.8
Pali: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, mātukucchismiṁ paṭhamaṁ cittaṁ uppannaṁ, paṭhamaṁ viññāṇaṁ pātubhūtaṁ, tadupādāya sāvassa jāti. 

pli-tv-kd1:75.1.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gabbhavīsaṁ upasampādetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.0
Pali: 63. Upasampadāvidhi 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena upasampannā dissanti kuṭṭhikāpi gaṇḍikāpi kilāsikāpi sosikāpi apamārikāpi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, upasampādentena terasa antarāyike dhamme pucchituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.4
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, pucchitabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.5
Pali: ‘santi te evarūpā ābādhā—

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.6
Pali: kuṭṭhaṁ, gaṇḍo, kilāso, soso, apamāro? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.7
Pali: Manussosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.8
Pali: Purisosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.9
Pali: Bhujissosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.10
Pali: Aṇaṇosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.11
Pali: Nasi rājabhaṭo? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.12
Pali: Anuññātosi mātāpitūhi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.13
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.14
Pali: Paripuṇṇaṁ te pattacīvaraṁ? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.15
Pali: Kiṁnāmosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.1.16
Pali: Konāmo te upajjhāyo’”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū ananusiṭṭhe upasampadāpekkhe antarāyike dhamme pucchanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.2.2
Pali: Upasampadāpekkhā vitthāyanti, maṅkū honti, na sakkonti vissajjetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.2.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paṭhamaṁ anusāsitvā pacchā antarāyike dhamme pucchitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.1
Pali: Tattheva saṅghamajjhe anusāsanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.2
Pali: Upasampadāpekkhā tatheva vitthāyanti, maṅkū honti, na sakkonti vissajjetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ekamantaṁ anusāsitvā saṅghamajjhe antarāyike dhamme pucchituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, anusāsitabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.6
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ upajjhaṁ gāhāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.7
Pali: Upajjhaṁ gāhāpetvā pattacīvaraṁ ācikkhitabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.8
Pali: ‘ayaṁ te patto, ayaṁ saṅghāṭi, ayaṁ uttarāsaṅgo, ayaṁ antaravāsako. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.3.9
Pali: Gaccha, amumhi okāse tiṭṭhāhī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.1
Pali: Bālā abyattā anusāsanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.2
Pali: Duranusiṭṭhā upasampadāpekkhā vitthāyanti, maṅkū honti, na sakkonti vissajjetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.4
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, bālena abyattena anusāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.5
Pali: Yo anusāseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.4.6
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena anusāsitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.1
Pali: Asammatā anusāsanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, asammatena anusāsitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.4
Pali: Yo anusāseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sammatena anusāsituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.6
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.7
Pali: attanā vā attānaṁ sammannitabbaṁ, parena vā paro sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.8
Pali: Kathañca attanāva attānaṁ sammannitabbaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.9
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.10
Pali: ‘suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.11
Pali: Itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.12
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ itthannāmaṁ anusāseyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.5.13
Pali: Evaṁ attanāva attānaṁ sammannitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.1
Pali: Kathañca pana parena paro sammannitabbo? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.2
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.3
Pali: ‘suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.4
Pali: Itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, itthannāmo itthannāmaṁ anusāseyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.6.6
Pali: Evaṁ parena paro sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.1
Pali: Tena sammatena bhikkhunā upasampadāpekkho upasaṅkamitvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.2
Pali: ‘suṇasi, itthannāma, ayaṁ te saccakālo bhūtakālo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.3
Pali: Yaṁ jātaṁ taṁ saṅghamajjhe pucchante santaṁ atthīti vattabbaṁ, asantaṁ natthīti vattabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.4
Pali: Mā kho vitthāyi, mā kho maṅku ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.5
Pali: Evaṁ taṁ pucchissanti—

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.6
Pali: santi te evarūpā ābādhā—

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.7
Pali: kuṭṭhaṁ, gaṇḍo, kilāso, soso, apamāro? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.8
Pali: Manussosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.9
Pali: Purisosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.10
Pali: Bhujissosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.11
Pali: Aṇaṇosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.12
Pali: Nasi rājabhaṭo? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.13
Pali: Anuññātosi mātāpitūhi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.14
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.15
Pali: Paripuṇṇaṁ te pattacīvaraṁ? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.16
Pali: Kiṁnāmosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.7.17
Pali: Konāmo te upajjhāyo’”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.1
Pali: Ekato āgacchanti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.2
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ekato āgantabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.3
Pali: Anusāsakena paṭhamataraṁ āgantvā saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.4
Pali: ‘suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.5
Pali: Itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.6
Pali: Anusiṭṭho so mayā. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, itthannāmo āgaccheyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.8
Pali: ‘Āgacchāhī’ti vattabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.9
Pali: Ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ kārāpetvā bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vandāpetvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīdāpetvā añjaliṁ paggaṇhāpetvā upasampadaṁ yācāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.10
Pali: ‘saṅghaṁ, bhante, upasampadaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.11
Pali: Ullumpatu maṁ, bhante, saṅgho anukampaṁ upādāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.12
Pali: Dutiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.13
Pali: Ullumpatu maṁ, bhante, saṅgho anukampaṁ upādāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.14
Pali: Tatiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.8.15
Pali: Ullumpatu maṁ, bhante, saṅgho anukampaṁ upādāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.4
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ itthannāmaṁ antarāyike dhamme puccheyyanti? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.5
Pali: Suṇasi, itthannāma, ayaṁ te saccakālo bhūtakālo. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.6
Pali: Yaṁ jātaṁ taṁ pucchāmi. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.7
Pali: Santaṁ atthīti vattabbaṁ, asantaṁ natthīti vattabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.8
Pali: Santi te evarūpā ābādhā—

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.9
Pali: kuṭṭhaṁ gaṇḍo kilāso soso apamāro? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.10
Pali: Manussosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.11
Pali: Purisosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.12
Pali: Bhujissosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.13
Pali: Aṇaṇosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.14
Pali: Nasi rājabhaṭo? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.15
Pali: Anuññātosi mātāpitūhi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.16
Pali: Paripuṇṇavīsativassosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.17
Pali: Paripuṇṇaṁ te pattacīvaraṁ? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.18
Pali: Kiṁnāmosi? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.9.19
Pali: Konāmo te upajjhāyo’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho, parisuddho antarāyikehi dhammehi, paripuṇṇassa pattacīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.4
Pali: Itthannāmo saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācati itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ upasampādeyya itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.10.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.1
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.2
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho, parisuddho antarāyikehi dhammehi, paripuṇṇassa pattacīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.3
Pali: Itthannāmo saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācati itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.4
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ upasampādeti itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.5
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa upasampadā itthannāmena upajjhāyena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd1:76.11.6
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.1
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.2
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho, parisuddho antarāyikehi dhammehi, paripuṇṇassa pattacīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.4
Pali: Itthannāmo saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācati itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.5
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ upasampādeti itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.6
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa upasampadā itthannāmena upajjhāyena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.7
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.8
Pali: Tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.9
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.10
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo itthannāmassa āyasmato upasampadāpekkho, parisuddho antarāyikehi dhammehi, paripuṇṇassa pattacīvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.11
Pali: Itthannāmo saṅghaṁ upasampadaṁ yācati itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.12
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ upasampādeti itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.13
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa upasampadā itthannāmena upajjhāyena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.14
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.15
Pali: Upasampanno saṅghena itthannāmo itthannāmena upajjhāyena. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.16
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:76.12.17
Pali: Upasampadākammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.0
Pali: 64. Cattāronissaya 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.1
Pali: “Tāvadeva chāyā metabbā, utuppamāṇaṁ ācikkhitabbaṁ, divasabhāgo ācikkhitabbo, saṅgīti ācikkhitabbā, cattāro nissayā ācikkhitabbā—

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.2
Pali: Piṇḍiyālopabhojanaṁ nissāya pabbajjā. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.3
Pali: Tattha te yāvajīvaṁ ussāho karaṇīyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.4
Pali: Atirekalābho—

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.5
Pali: saṅghabhattaṁ, uddesabhattaṁ, nimantanaṁ, salākabhattaṁ, pakkhikaṁ, uposathikaṁ, pāṭipadikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.6
Pali: Paṁsukūlacīvaraṁ nissāya pabbajjā. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.7
Pali: Tattha te yāvajīvaṁ ussāho karaṇīyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.8
Pali: Atirekalābho—

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.9
Pali: khomaṁ, kappāsikaṁ, koseyyaṁ, kambalaṁ, sāṇaṁ, bhaṅgaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.10
Pali: Rukkhamūlasenāsanaṁ nissāya pabbajjā. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.11
Pali: Tattha te yāvajīvaṁ ussāho karaṇīyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.12
Pali: Atirekalābho—

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.13
Pali: vihāro, aḍḍhayogo, pāsādo, hammiyaṁ, guhā. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.14
Pali: Pūtimuttabhesajjaṁ nissāya pabbajjā. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.15
Pali: Tattha te yāvajīvaṁ ussāho karaṇīyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.16
Pali: Atirekalābho—

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.17
Pali: sappi, navanītaṁ, telaṁ, madhu, phāṇitan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:77.1.18
Pali: Cattāro nissayā niṭṭhitā. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.0
Pali: 65. Cattāriakaraṇīya 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū aññataraṁ bhikkhuṁ upasampādetvā ekakaṁ ohāya pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.2
Pali: So pacchā ekakova āgacchanto antarāmagge purāṇadutiyikāya samāgañchi. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.3
Pali: Sā evamāha—

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.4
Pali: “kiṁ dāni pabbajitosī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.5
Pali: “Āma pabbajitomhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.6
Pali: “Dullabho kho pabbajitānaṁ methuno dhammo; 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.7
Pali: ehi, methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.8
Pali: So tassā methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevitvā cirena agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.9
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd1:78.1.10
Pali: “kissa tvaṁ, āvuso, evaṁ ciraṁ akāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.1
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.2
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, upasampādetvā dutiyaṁ dātuṁ, cattāri ca akaraṇīyāni ācikkhituṁ—

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.4
Pali: Upasampannena bhikkhunā methuno dhammo na paṭisevitabbo, antamaso tiracchānagatāyapi. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.5
Pali: Yo bhikkhu methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevati, assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.6
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma puriso sīsacchinno abhabbo tena sarīrabandhanena jīvituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.7
Pali: evameva bhikkhu methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevitvā assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.2.8
Pali: Taṁ te yāvajīvaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.3.1
Pali: Upasampannena bhikkhunā adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ na ādātabbaṁ, antamaso tiṇasalākaṁ upādāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.3.2
Pali: Yo bhikkhu pādaṁ vā pādārahaṁ vā atirekapādaṁ vā adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ ādiyati, assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.3.3
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma paṇḍupalāso bandhanā pavutto abhabbo haritatthāya; 

pli-tv-kd1:78.3.4
Pali: evameva bhikkhu pādaṁ vā pādārahaṁ vā atirekapādaṁ vā adinnaṁ theyyasaṅkhātaṁ ādiyitvā assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.3.5
Pali: Taṁ te yāvajīvaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.4.1
Pali: Upasampannena bhikkhunā sañcicca pāṇo jīvitā na voropetabbo, antamaso kunthakipillikaṁ upādāya. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.4.2
Pali: Yo bhikkhu sañcicca manussaviggahaṁ jīvitā voropeti, antamaso gabbhapātanaṁ upādāya, assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.4.3
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma puthusilā dvedhā bhinnā appaṭisandhikā hoti; 

pli-tv-kd1:78.4.4
Pali: evameva bhikkhu sañcicca manussaviggahaṁ jīvitā voropetvā assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.4.5
Pali: Taṁ te yāvajīvaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.1
Pali: Upasampannena bhikkhunā uttarimanussadhammo na ullapitabbo, antamaso ‘suññāgāre abhiramāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.2
Pali: Yo bhikkhu pāpiccho icchāpakato asantaṁ abhūtaṁ uttarimanussadhammaṁ ullapati jhānaṁ vā vimokkhaṁ vā samādhiṁ vā samāpattiṁ vā maggaṁ vā phalaṁ vā, assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.3
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma tālo matthakacchinno abhabbo puna viruḷhiyā; 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.4
Pali: evameva bhikkhu pāpiccho icchāpakato asantaṁ abhūtaṁ uttarimanussadhammaṁ ullapitvā assamaṇo hoti asakyaputtiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.5
Pali: Taṁ te yāvajīvaṁ akaraṇīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:78.5.6
Pali: Cattāri akaraṇīyāni niṭṭhitāni. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.0
Pali: 66. Āpattiyāadassaneukkhittakavatthu 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu āpattiyā adassane ukkhittako vibbhami. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.2
Pali: So puna paccāgantvā bhikkhū upasampadaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.4
Pali: “Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āpattiyā adassane ukkhittako vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.5
Pali: So puna paccāgantvā bhikkhū upasampadaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.6
Pali: So evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.7
Pali: ‘passissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.8
Pali: Sacāhaṁ passissāmīti, pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.9
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na passissāmīti, na pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.10
Pali: Pabbājetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.11
Pali: ‘passissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.12
Pali: Sacāhaṁ passissāmīti, upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.1.13
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na passissāmīti, na upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.1
Pali: Upasampādetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.2
Pali: ‘passissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.3
Pali: Sacāhaṁ passissāmīti, osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.4
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na passissāmīti, na osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.5
Pali: Osāretvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.6
Pali: ‘passasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.7
Pali: Sace passati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.8
Pali: No ce passati, labbhamānāya sāmaggiyā puna ukkhipitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.2.9
Pali: Alabbhamānāya sāmaggiyā anāpatti sambhoge saṁvāse. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittako vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.2
Pali: So puna paccāgantvā bhikkhū upasampadaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.3
Pali: So evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.4
Pali: ‘paṭikarissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.5
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭikarissāmīti, pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.6
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭikarissāmīti, na pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.7
Pali: Pabbājetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.8
Pali: ‘paṭikarissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.9
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭikarissāmīti, upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.10
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭikarissāmīti, na upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.11
Pali: Upasampādetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.12
Pali: ‘paṭikarissasi taṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.13
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭikarissāmīti, osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.14
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭikarissāmīti, na osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.15
Pali: Osāretvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.16
Pali: ‘paṭikarohi taṁ āpattin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.17
Pali: Sace paṭikaroti, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.18
Pali: No ce paṭikaroti labbhamānāya sāmaggiyā puna ukkhipitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.3.19
Pali: Alabbhamānāya sāmaggiyā anāpatti sambhoge saṁvāse. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittako vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.2
Pali: So puna paccāgantvā bhikkhū upasampadaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.3
Pali: So evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.4
Pali: ‘paṭinissajjissasi taṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.5
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭinissajjissāmīti, pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.6
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭinissajjissāmīti, na pabbājetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.7
Pali: Pabbājetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.8
Pali: ‘paṭinissajjissasi taṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.9
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭinissajjissāmīti, upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.10
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭinissajjissāmīti, na upasampādetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.11
Pali: Upasampādetvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.12
Pali: ‘paṭinissajjissasi taṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.13
Pali: Sacāhaṁ paṭinissajjissāmīti, osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.14
Pali: Sacāhaṁ na paṭinissajjissāmīti, na osāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.15
Pali: Osāretvā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.16
Pali: ‘paṭinissajjehi taṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.17
Pali: Sace paṭinissajjati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.18
Pali: No ce paṭinissajjati, labbhamānāya sāmaggiyā puna ukkhipitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.19
Pali: Alabbhamānāya sāmaggiyā anāpatti sambhoge saṁvāse”ti. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.20
Pali: Mahākhandhako paṭhamo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.21
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.22
Pali: Vinayamhi mahatthesu, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.23
Pali: pesalānaṁ sukhāvahe; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.24
Pali: Niggahānañca pāpicche, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.25
Pali: lajjīnaṁ paggahesu ca. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.26
Pali: Sāsanādhāraṇe ceva, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.27
Pali: sabbaññujinagocare; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.28
Pali: Anaññavisaye kheme, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.29
Pali: supaññatte asaṁsaye. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.30
Pali: Khandhake vinaye ceva, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.31
Pali: parivāre ca mātike; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.32
Pali: Yathātthakārī kusalo, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.33
Pali: paṭipajjati yoniso. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.34
Pali: Yo gavaṁ na vijānāti, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.35
Pali: na so rakkhati gogaṇaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.36
Pali: Evaṁ sīlaṁ ajānanto, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.37
Pali: kiṁ so rakkheyya saṁvaraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.38
Pali: Pamuṭṭhamhi ca suttante, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.39
Pali: abhidhamme ca tāvade; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.40
Pali: Vinaye avinaṭṭhamhi, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.41
Pali: puna tiṭṭhati sāsanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.42
Pali: Tasmā saṅgāhaṇāhetuṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.43
Pali: uddānaṁ anupubbaso; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.44
Pali: Pavakkhāmi yathāñāyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.45
Pali: suṇātha mama bhāsato. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.46
Pali: Vatthu nidānaṁ āpatti, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.47
Pali: nayā peyyālameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.48
Pali: Dukkaraṁ taṁ asesetuṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.49
Pali: nayato taṁ vijānathāti. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.50
Pali: Bodhi rājāyatanañca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.51
Pali: ajapālo sahampati; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.52
Pali: Brahmā āḷāro udako, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.53
Pali: bhikkhu ca upako isi. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.54
Pali: Koṇḍañño vappo bhaddiyo, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.55
Pali: mahānāmo ca assaji; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.56
Pali: Yaso cattāro paññāsa, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.57
Pali: sabbe pesesi so disā. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.58
Pali: Vatthu mārehi tiṁsā ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.59
Pali: uruvelaṁ tayo jaṭī; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.60
Pali: Agyāgāraṁ mahārājā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.61
Pali: sakko brahmā ca kevalā. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.62
Pali: Paṁsukūlaṁ pokkharaṇī, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.63
Pali: silā ca kakudho silā; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.64
Pali: Jambu ambo ca āmalo, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.65
Pali: pāripupphañca āhari. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.66
Pali: Phāliyantu ujjalantu, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.67
Pali: vijjhāyantu ca kassapa; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.68
Pali: Nimujjanti mukhī megho, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.69
Pali: gayā laṭṭhi ca māgadho. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.70
Pali: Upatisso kolito ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.71
Pali: abhiññātā ca pabbajuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.72
Pali: Dunnivatthā paṇāmanā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.73
Pali: kiso lūkho ca brāhmaṇo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.74
Pali: Anācāraṁ ācarati, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.75
Pali: udaraṁ māṇavo gaṇo; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.76
Pali: Vassaṁ bālehi pakkanto, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.77
Pali: dasa vassāni nissayo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.78
Pali: Na vattanti paṇāmetuṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.79
Pali: bālā passaddhi pañca cha; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.80
Pali: Yo so añño ca naggo ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.81
Pali: acchinnajaṭilasākiyo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.82
Pali: Magadhesu pañcābādhā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.83
Pali: eko rājā ca aṅguli; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.84
Pali: Māgadho ca anuññāsi, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.85
Pali: kārā likhi kasāhato. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.86
Pali: Lakkhaṇā iṇā dāso ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.87
Pali: bhaṇḍuko upāli ahi; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.88
Pali: Saddhaṁ kulaṁ kaṇṭako ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.89
Pali: āhundarikameva ca. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.90
Pali: Vatthumhi dārako sikkhā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.91
Pali: viharanti ca kiṁ nu kho; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.92
Pali: Sabbaṁ mukhaṁ upajjhāye, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.93
Pali: apalāḷana kaṇṭako. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.94
Pali: Paṇḍako theyyapakkanto, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.95
Pali: ahi ca mātarī pitā; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.96
Pali: Arahantabhikkhunībhedā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.97
Pali: ruhirena ca byañjanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.98
Pali: Anupajjhāyasaṅghena, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.99
Pali: gaṇapaṇḍakapattako; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.100
Pali: Acīvaraṁ tadubhayaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.101
Pali: yācitenapi ye tayo. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.102
Pali: Hatthā pādā hatthapādā, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.103
Pali: kaṇṇā nāsā tadūbhayaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.104
Pali: Aṅguliaḷakaṇḍaraṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.105
Pali: phaṇaṁ khujjañca vāmanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.106
Pali: Galagaṇḍī lakkhaṇā ceva, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.107
Pali: kasā likhitasīpadī; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.108
Pali: Pāpaparisadūsī ca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.109
Pali: kāṇaṁ kuṇi tatheva ca. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.110
Pali: Khañjaṁ pakkhahatañceva, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.111
Pali: sacchinnairiyāpathaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.112
Pali: Jarāndhamūgabadhiraṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.113
Pali: andhamūgañca yaṁ tahiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.114
Pali: Andhabadhiraṁ yaṁ vuttaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.115
Pali: mūgabadhirameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.116
Pali: Andhamūgabadhirañca, 

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.117
Pali: alajjīnañca nissayaṁ.

pli-tv-kd1:79.4.119
Pali: yācamānena lakkhaṇā;
