Pali segments

pli-tv-kd5:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka 

pli-tv-kd5:0.2
Pali: Mahāvagga 

pli-tv-kd5:0.3
Pali: 5. Cammakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd5:0.4
Pali: 1. Soṇakoḷivisavatthu 

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati gijjhakūṭe pabbate. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro asītiyā gāmasahassesu issariyādhipaccaṁ rajjaṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena campāyaṁ soṇo nāma koḷiviso seṭṭhiputto sukhumālo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.4
Pali: Tassa pādatalesu lomāni jātāni honti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni sannipātāpetvā kenacideva karaṇīyena soṇassa koḷivisassa santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.1.6
Pali: “āgacchatu soṇo, icchāmi soṇassa āgatan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho soṇassa koḷivisassa mātāpitaro soṇaṁ koḷivisaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.2
Pali: “rājā te, tāta soṇa, pāde dakkhitukāmo. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.3
Pali: Mā kho tvaṁ, tāta soṇa, yena rājā tena pāde abhippasāreyyāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.4
Pali: Rañño purato pallaṅkena nisīda. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.5
Pali: Nisinnassa te rājā pāde dakkhissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.6
Pali: Atha kho soṇaṁ koḷivisaṁ sivikāya ānesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.7
Pali: Atha kho soṇo koḷiviso yena rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ abhivādetvā rañño purato pallaṅkena nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.2.8
Pali: Addasā kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro soṇassa koḷivisassa pādatalesu lomāni jātāni. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni diṭṭhadhammike atthe anusāsitvā uyyojesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.3.2
Pali: “tumhe khvattha, bhaṇe, mayā diṭṭhadhammike atthe anusāsitā; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.3.3
Pali: gacchatha, taṁ bhagavantaṁ payirupāsatha; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.3.4
Pali: so no bhagavā samparāyike atthe anusāsissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.3.5
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni yena gijjhakūṭo pabbato tenupasaṅkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā sāgato bhagavato upaṭṭhāko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.4.2
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni yenāyasmā sāgato tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:1.4.3
Pali: “imāni, bhante, asīti gāmikasahassāni idhūpasaṅkantāni bhagavantaṁ dassanāya; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.4.4
Pali: sādhu mayaṁ, bhante, labheyyāma bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.4.5
Pali: “Tena hi tumhe āyasmanto muhuttaṁ idheva tāva hotha, yāvāhaṁ bhagavantaṁ paṭivedemī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.5.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato tesaṁ asītiyā gāmikasahassānaṁ purato pekkhamānānaṁ pāṭikāya nimujjitvā bhagavato purato ummujjitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:1.5.2
Pali: “imāni, bhante, asīti gāmikasahassāni idhūpasaṅkantāni bhagavantaṁ dassanāya; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.5.3
Pali: yassadāni, bhante, bhagavā kālaṁ maññatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.5.4
Pali: “Tena hi tvaṁ, sāgata, vihārapacchāyāyaṁ āsanaṁ paññapehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.6.1
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti 

pli-tv-kd5:1.6.2
Pali: kho āyasmā sāgato bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā pīṭhaṁ gahetvā bhagavato purato nimujjitvā tesaṁ asītiyā gāmikasahassānaṁ purato pekkhamānānaṁ pāṭikāya ummujjitvā vihārapacchāyāyaṁ āsanaṁ paññapeti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.6.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vihārā nikkhamitvā vihārapacchāyāyaṁ paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.7.1
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.7.2
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni āyasmantaṁyeva sāgataṁ samannāharanti, no tathā bhagavantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.7.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tesaṁ asītiyā gāmikasahassānaṁ cetasā cetoparivitakkamaññāya āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.7.4
Pali: “tena hi tvaṁ, sāgata, bhiyyoso mattāya uttari manussadhammaṁ iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ dassehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.7.5
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā sāgato bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā vehāsaṁ abbhuggantvā ākāse antalikkhe caṅkamatipi, tiṭṭhatipi, nisīdatipi, seyyampi kappeti, dhūmāyatipi pajjalatipi, antaradhāyatipi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sāgato ākāse antalikkhe anekavihitaṁ uttari manussadhammaṁ iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ dassetvā bhagavato pādesu sirasā nipatitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.2
Pali: “satthā me, bhante, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.3
Pali: sāvakohamasmi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.4
Pali: Satthā me, bhante, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.5
Pali: sāvakohamasmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.6
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni “acchariyaṁ vata bho, abbhutaṁ vata bho. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.8.7
Pali: Sāvakopi nāma evaṁ mahiddhiko bhavissati, evaṁ mahānubhāvo, aho nūna satthā”ti bhagavantaṁyeva samannāharanti, no tathā āyasmantaṁ sāgataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā tesaṁ asītiyā gāmikasahassānaṁ cetasā cetoparivitakkamaññāya anupubbiṁ kathaṁ kathesi, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.2
Pali: dānakathaṁ sīlakathaṁ saggakathaṁ, kāmānaṁ ādīnavaṁ okāraṁ saṅkilesaṁ, nekkhamme ānisaṁsaṁ pakāsesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.3
Pali: Yadā te bhagavā aññāsi kallacitte, muducitte, vinīvaraṇacitte, udaggacitte, pasannacitte, atha yā buddhānaṁ sāmukkaṁsikā dhammadesanā, taṁ pakāsesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.4
Pali: dukkhaṁ, samudayaṁ, nirodhaṁ, maggaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.5
Pali: Seyyathāpi nāma suddhaṁ vatthaṁ apagatakāḷakaṁ sammadeva rajanaṁ paṭiggaṇheyya; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.6
Pali: evamevaṁ tesaṁ asītiyā gāmikasahassānaṁ tasmiṁyeva āsane virajaṁ vītamalaṁ dhammacakkhuṁ udapādi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.9.7
Pali: “yaṁ kiñci samudayadhammaṁ sabbaṁ taṁ nirodhadhamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.1
Pali: Te diṭṭhadhammā pattadhammā viditadhammā pariyogāḷhadhammā tiṇṇavicikicchā vigatakathaṅkathā vesārajjappattā aparappaccayā satthusāsane bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.2
Pali: “abhikkantaṁ, bhante, abhikkantaṁ, bhante. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.3
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, nikkujjitaṁ vā ukkujjeyya, paṭicchannaṁ vā vivareyya, mūḷhassa vā maggaṁ ācikkheyya, andhakāre vā telapajjotaṁ dhāreyya—

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.4
Pali: ‘cakkhumanto rūpāni dakkhantī’ti; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.5
Pali: evamevaṁ bhagavatā anekapariyāyena dhammo pakāsito. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.6
Pali: Ete mayaṁ, bhante, bhagavantaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāma. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.7
Pali: Dhammañca, bhikkhusaṅghañca. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.10.8
Pali: Upāsake no bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupete saraṇaṁ gate”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.11.0
Pali: 1.1. Soṇassapabbajjā 

pli-tv-kd5:1.11.1
Pali: Atha kho soṇassa koḷivisassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.11.2
Pali: “yathā yathā kho ahaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, nayidaṁ sukaraṁ agāraṁ ajjhāvasatā ekantaparipuṇṇaṁ ekantaparisuddhaṁ saṅkhalikhitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ carituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.11.3
Pali: yannūnāhaṁ kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.11.4
Pali: Atha kho tāni asīti gāmikasahassāni bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinanditvā anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.1
Pali: Atha kho soṇo koḷiviso acirapakkantesu tesu asītiyā gāmikasahassesu yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho soṇo koḷiviso bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.3
Pali: “yathā yathāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, nayidaṁ sukaraṁ agāraṁ ajjhāvasatā ekantaparipuṇṇaṁ ekantaparisuddhaṁ saṅkhalikhitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ carituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.4
Pali: Icchāmahaṁ, bhante, kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.5
Pali: Pabbājetu maṁ, bhante, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.6
Pali: Alattha kho soṇo koḷiviso bhagavato santike pabbajjaṁ, alattha upasampadaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.12.7
Pali: Acirupasampanno ca panāyasmā soṇo sītavane viharati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.1
Pali: Tassa accāraddhavīriyassa caṅkamato pādā bhijjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.2
Pali: Caṅkamo lohitena phuṭo hoti, seyyathāpi gavāghātanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato soṇassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.4
Pali: “ye kho keci bhagavato sāvakā āraddhavīriyā viharanti, ahaṁ tesaṁ aññataro. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.5
Pali: Atha ca pana me nānupādāya āsavehi cittaṁ vimuccati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.6
Pali: Saṁvijjanti kho pana me kule bhogā; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.7
Pali: sakkā bhoge ca bhuñjituṁ, puññāni ca kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.13.8
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ hīnāyāvattitvā bhoge ca bhuñjeyyaṁ, puññāni ca kareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmato soṇassa cetasā cetoparivitakkamaññāya—

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.2
Pali: seyyathāpi nāma balavā puriso samiñjitaṁ vā bāhaṁ pasāreyya, pasāritaṁ vā bāhaṁ samiñjeyya; evameva—gijjhakūṭe pabbate antarahito sītavane pāturahosi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sambahulehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ senāsanacārikaṁ āhiṇḍanto yenāyasmato soṇassa caṅkamo tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.4
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā āyasmato soṇassa caṅkamaṁ lohitena phuṭaṁ, disvāna bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.5
Pali: “kassa nvāyaṁ, bhikkhave, caṅkamo lohitena phuṭo, seyyathāpi gavāghātanan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.6
Pali: “Āyasmato, bhante, soṇassa accāraddhavīriyassa caṅkamato pādā bhijjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.14.7
Pali: Tassāyaṁ caṅkamo lohitena phuṭo, seyyathāpi gavāghātanan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā yenāyasmato soṇassa vihāro tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.2
Pali: Āyasmāpi kho soṇo bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho āyasmantaṁ soṇaṁ bhagavā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.4
Pali: “nanu te, soṇa, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.5
Pali: ‘ye kho keci bhagavato sāvakā āraddhavīriyā viharanti, ahaṁ tesaṁ aññataro. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.6
Pali: Atha ca pana me nānupādāya āsavehi cittaṁ vimuccati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.7
Pali: Saṁvijjanti kho pana me kule bhogā; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.8
Pali: sakkā bhoge ca bhuñjituṁ, puññāni ca kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.9
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ hīnāyāvattitvā bhoge ca bhuñjeyyaṁ, puññāni ca kareyyan’”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.10
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.11
Pali: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, soṇa, kusalo tvaṁ pubbe agārikabhūto vīṇāya tantissare”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.12
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.13
Pali: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, soṇa, yadā te vīṇāya tantiyo accāyatā honti, api nu te vīṇā tasmiṁ samaye saravatī vā hoti, kammaññā vā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.15.14
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.16.1
Pali: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, soṇa, yadā te vīṇāya tantiyo atisithilā honti, api nu te vīṇā tasmiṁ samaye saravatī vā hoti, kammaññā vā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.16.2
Pali: “No hetaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.16.3
Pali: “Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, soṇa, yadā te vīṇāya tantiyo neva accāyatā honti nātisithilā, same guṇe patiṭṭhitā, api nu te vīṇā tasmiṁ samaye saravatī vā hoti, kammaññā vā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:1.16.4
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.16.5
Pali: “Evameva kho, soṇa, accāraddhavīriyaṁ uddhaccāya saṁvattati, atilīnavīriyaṁ kosajjāya saṁvattati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.17.1
Pali: Tasmātiha tvaṁ, soṇa, vīriyasamataṁ adhiṭṭhaha, indriyānañca samataṁ paṭivijjha, tattha ca nimittaṁ gaṇhāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.17.2
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā soṇo bhagavato paccassosi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.17.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ soṇaṁ iminā ovādena ovaditvā—seyyathāpi nāma balavā puriso samiñjitaṁ vā bāhaṁ pasāreyya, pasāritaṁ vā bāhaṁ samiñjeyya; evameva—sītavane āyasmato soṇassa sammukhe antarahito gijjhakūṭe pabbate pāturahosi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.18.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā soṇo aparena samayena vīriyasamataṁ adhiṭṭhāsi, indriyānañca samataṁ paṭivijjhi, tattha ca nimittaṁ aggahesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.18.2
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā soṇo, eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto viharanto, na cirasseva—yassatthāya kulaputtā sammadeva agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajanti, tadanuttaraṁ—brahmacariyapariyosānaṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.18.3
Pali: “Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā”ti abhiññāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.18.4
Pali: Aññataro ca panāyasmā soṇo arahataṁ ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.19.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato soṇassa arahattappattassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.19.2
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ bhagavato santike aññaṁ byākareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.19.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā soṇo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.19.4
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā soṇo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:1.20.1
Pali: “yo so, bhante, bhikkhu arahaṁ khīṇāsavo vusitavā katakaraṇīyo ohitabhāro anuppattasadattho parikkhīṇabhavasaṁyojano sammadaññāvimutto, so chaṭṭhānāni adhimutto hoti—

pli-tv-kd5:1.20.2
Pali: nekkhammādhimutto hoti, pavivekādhimutto hoti, abyāpajjādhimutto hoti, upādānakkhayādhimutto hoti, taṇhakkhayādhimutto hoti, asammohādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.21.1
Pali: Siyā kho pana, bhante, idhekaccassa āyasmato evamassa—

pli-tv-kd5:1.21.2
Pali: ‘kevalaṁ saddhāmattakaṁ nūna ayamāyasmā nissāya nekkhammādhimutto’ti, na kho panetaṁ, bhante, evaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.21.3
Pali: Khīṇāsavo, bhante, bhikkhu, vusitavā, katakaraṇīyo, karaṇīyamattānaṁ asamanupassanto katassa vā paṭicayaṁ khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā nekkhammādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā nekkhammādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā nekkhammādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.22.1
Pali: Siyā kho pana, bhante, idhekaccassa āyasmato evamassa—

pli-tv-kd5:1.22.2
Pali: ‘lābhasakkārasilokaṁ nūna ayamāyasmā nikāmayamāno pavivekādhimutto’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.22.3
Pali: Na kho panetaṁ, bhante, evaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.22.4
Pali: Khīṇāsavo, bhante, bhikkhu, vusitavā, katakaraṇīyo, karaṇīyamattānaṁ asamanupassanto katassa vā paṭicayaṁ, khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā pavivekādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā pavivekādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā pavivekādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.23.1
Pali: Siyā kho pana, bhante, idhekaccassa āyasmato evamassa—

pli-tv-kd5:1.23.2
Pali: ‘sīlabbataparāmāsaṁ nūna ayamāyasmā sārato paccāgacchanto abyāpajjādhimutto’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.23.3
Pali: Na kho panetaṁ, bhante, evaṁ daṭṭhabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.23.4
Pali: Khīṇāsavo, bhante, bhikkhu, vusitavā, katakaraṇīyo, karaṇīyamattānaṁ asamanupassanto katassa vā paṭicayaṁ, khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā abyāpajjādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā abyāpajjādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā abyāpajjādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.24.1
Pali: Khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā upādānakkhayādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā upādānakkhayādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā upādānakkhayādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.24.2
Pali: Khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā taṇhakkhayādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā taṇhakkhayādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā taṇhakkhayādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.24.3
Pali: Khayā rāgassa vītarāgattā asammohādhimutto hoti, khayā dosassa vītadosattā asammohādhimutto hoti, khayā mohassa vītamohattā asammohādhimutto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.1
Pali: Evaṁ sammā vimuttacittassa, bhante, bhikkhuno bhusā cepi cakkhuviññeyyā rūpā cakkhussa āpāthaṁ āgacchanti, nevassa cittaṁ pariyādiyanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.2
Pali: Amissīkatamevassa cittaṁ hoti, ṭhitaṁ āneñjappattaṁ, vayañcassānupassati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.3
Pali: Bhusā cepi sotaviññeyyā saddā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.4
Pali: ghānaviññeyyā gandhā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.5
Pali: jivhāviññeyyā rasā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.6
Pali: kāyaviññeyyā phoṭṭhabbā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.7
Pali: manoviññeyyā dhammā manassa āpāthaṁ āgacchanti, nevassa cittaṁ pariyādiyanti; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.25.8
Pali: amissīkatamevassa cittaṁ hoti, ṭhitaṁ āneñjappattaṁ, vayañcassānupassati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.1
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, selo pabbato acchiddo asusiro ekagghano, puratthimāya cepi disāya āgaccheyya bhusā vātavuṭṭhi, neva naṁ saṅkampeyya na sampakampeyya na sampavedheyya; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.2
Pali: pacchimāya cepi disāya āgaccheyya bhusā vātavuṭṭhi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.3
Pali: uttarāya cepi disāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.4
Pali: dakkhiṇāya cepi disāya āgaccheyya bhusā vātavuṭṭhi, neva naṁ saṅkampeyya na sampakampeyya na sampavedheyya; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.5
Pali: evameva kho, bhante, evaṁ sammā vimuttacittassa bhikkhuno bhusā cepi cakkhuviññeyyā rūpā cakkhussa āpāthaṁ āgacchanti, nevassa cittaṁ pariyādiyanti; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.6
Pali: amissīkatamevassa cittaṁ hoti, ṭhitaṁ āneñjappattaṁ, vayañcassānupassati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.7
Pali: Bhusā cepi sotaviññeyyā saddā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.8
Pali: ghānaviññeyyā gandhā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.9
Pali: jivhāviññeyyā rasā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.10
Pali: kāyaviññeyyā phoṭṭhabbā … 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.11
Pali: manoviññeyyā dhammā manassa āpāthaṁ āgacchanti, nevassa cittaṁ pariyādiyanti; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.26.12
Pali: amissīkatamevassa cittaṁ hoti, ṭhitaṁ āneñjappattaṁ, vayañcassānupassatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.1
Pali: Nekkhammaṁ adhimuttassa, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.2
Pali: pavivekañca cetaso; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.3
Pali: Abyāpajjādhimuttassa, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.4
Pali: upādānakkhayassa ca. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.5
Pali: Taṇhakkhayādhimuttassa, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.6
Pali: asammohañca cetaso; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.7
Pali: Disvā āyatanuppādaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.8
Pali: sammā cittaṁ vimuccati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.9
Pali: Tassa sammāvimuttassa, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.10
Pali: santacittassa bhikkhuno; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.11
Pali: Katassa paṭicayo natthi, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.12
Pali: karaṇīyaṁ na vijjati. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.13
Pali: Selo yathā ekagghano, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.14
Pali: vātena na samīrati; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.15
Pali: Evaṁ rūpā rasā saddā, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.16
Pali: gandhā phassā ca kevalā. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.17
Pali: Iṭṭhā dhammā aniṭṭhā ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.18
Pali: na pavedhenti tādino; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.19
Pali: Ṭhitaṁ cittaṁ vippamuttaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd5:1.27.20
Pali: vayañcassānupassatīti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.28.0
Pali: 2. Diguṇādiupāhanapaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:1.28.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.28.2
Pali: “evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, kulaputtā aññaṁ byākaronti, attho ca vutto, attā ca anupanīto. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.28.3
Pali: Atha ca panidhekacce moghapurisā hasamānakaṁ maññe aññaṁ byākaronti, te pacchā vighātaṁ āpajjantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ soṇaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.2
Pali: “tvaṁ khosi, soṇa, sukhumālo. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.3
Pali: Anujānāmi te, soṇa, ekapalāsikaṁ upāhanan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.4
Pali: “Ahaṁ kho, bhante, asītisakaṭavāhe hiraññaṁ ohāya agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajito, sattahatthikañca anīkaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.5
Pali: Athāhaṁ, bhante, ekapalāsikañce upāhanaṁ pariharissāmi, tassa me bhavissanti vattāro ‘soṇo koḷiviso asītisakaṭavāhe hiraññaṁ ohāya agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajito, sattahatthikañca anīkaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.29.6
Pali: So dānāyaṁ ekapalāsikāsu upāhanāsu satto’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.1
Pali: Sace bhagavā bhikkhusaṅghassa anujānissati ahampi paribhuñjissāmi; 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.2
Pali: no ce bhagavā bhikkhusaṅghassa anujānissati, ahampi na paribhuñjissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ekapalāsikaṁ upāhanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.5
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, diguṇā upāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.6
Pali: Na tiguṇā upāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.7
Pali: Na guṇaṅguṇūpāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:1.30.8
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.0
Pali: 3. Sabbanīlikādipaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sabbanīlikā upāhanāyo dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.2
Pali: sabbapītikā upāhanāyo dhārenti … 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.3
Pali: sabbalohitikā upāhanāyo dhārenti … 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.4
Pali: sabbamañjiṭṭhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti … 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.5
Pali: sabbakaṇhā upāhanāyo dhārenti … 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.6
Pali: sabbamahāraṅgarattā upāhanāyo dhārenti … 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.7
Pali: sabbamahānāmarattā upāhanāyo dhārenti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.8
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.9
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, sabbanīlikā upāhanā dhāretabbā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.12
Pali: na sabbapītikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na sabbalohitikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na sabbamañjiṭṭhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na sabbakaṇhā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na sabbamahāraṅgarattā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na sabbamahānāmarattā upāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.1.13
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nīlakavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:2.2.2
Pali: pītakavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, lohitakavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, mañjiṭṭhikavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, kaṇhavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, mahāraṅgarattavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, mahānāmarattavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti.

Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.2.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.2.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, nīlakavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā …pe… na pītakavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na lohitakavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na mañjiṭṭhikavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na kaṇhavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na mahāraṅgarattavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā, na mahānāmarattavaddhikā upāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.2.7
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:2.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū khallakabaddhā upāhanāyo dhārenti …pe… puṭabaddhā upāhanāyo dhārenti, pāliguṇṭhimā upāhanāyo dhārenti, tūlapuṇṇikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, tittirapattikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, meṇḍavisāṇavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, ajavisāṇavaddhikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, vicchikāḷikā upāhanāyo dhārenti, morapiñchaparisibbitā upāhanāyo dhārenti, citrā upāhanāyo dhārenti.

pli-tv-kd5:2.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū sīhacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti …pe… byagghacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, dīpicammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, ajinacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, uddacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, majjāracammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, kāḷakacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti, luvakacammaparikkhaṭā upāhanāyo dhārenti.

pli-tv-kd5:2.4.7

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.0
Pali: 4. Omukkaguṇaṅguṇūpāhanānujānana 

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya rājagahaṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi, aññatarena bhikkhunā pacchāsamaṇena. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.2
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu khañjamāno bhagavantaṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhi. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.3
Pali: Addasā kho aññataro upāsako guṇaṅguṇūpāhanā ārohitvā bhagavantaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.4
Pali: disvā upāhanā ārohitvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā yena so bhikkhu tenupasaṅkami; 

pli-tv-kd5:3.1.5
Pali: upasaṅkamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.1
Pali: “kissa, bhante, ayyo khañjatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.2
Pali: “Pādā me, āvuso, phalitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.3
Pali: “Handa, bhante, upāhanāyo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.4
Pali: “Alaṁ, āvuso, paṭikkhittā bhagavatā guṇaṅguṇūpāhanā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.5
Pali: “Gaṇhāhetā, bhikkhu, upāhanāyo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.7
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, omukkaṁ guṇaṅguṇūpāhanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.8
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, navā guṇaṅguṇūpāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:3.2.9
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.0
Pali: 5. Ajjhārāmeupāhanapaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhagavā ajjhokāse anupāhano caṅkamati. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.2
Pali: “Satthā anupāhano caṅkamatī”ti—

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.3
Pali: therāpi bhikkhū anupāhanā caṅkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.4
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū, satthari anupāhane caṅkamamāne, theresupi bhikkhūsu anupāhanesu caṅkamamānesu, saupāhanā caṅkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.5
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:4.1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū, satthari anupāhane caṅkamamāne, theresupi bhikkhūsu anupāhanesu caṅkamamānesu, saupāhanā caṅkamissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.1
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.2
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū, satthari anupāhane caṅkamamāne, theresupi bhikkhūsu anupāhanesu caṅkamamānesu, saupāhanā caṅkamantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.3
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.4
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.5
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā, satthari anupāhane caṅkamamāne, theresupi bhikkhūsu anupāhanesu caṅkamamānesu, saupāhanā caṅkamissanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.2.6
Pali: Ime hi nāma, bhikkhave, gihī odātavatthavasanakā abhijīvanikassa sippassa kāraṇā ācariyesu sagāravā sappatissā sabhāgavuttikā viharissanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.1
Pali: Idha kho taṁ, bhikkhave, sobhetha, yaṁ tumhe evaṁ svākkhāte dhammavinaye pabbajitā samānā ācariyesu ācariyamattesu upajjhāyesu upajjhāyamattesu agāravā appatissā asabhāgavuttikā vihareyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.2
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.3
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.4
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.5
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, ācariyesu ācariyamattesu upajjhāyesu upajjhāyamattesu anupāhanesu caṅkamamānesu saupāhanena caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.6
Pali: Yo caṅkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.7
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, ajjhārāme upāhanā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:4.3.8
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno pādakhilābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:5.1.2
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmenti. 

pli-tv-kd5:5.1.3
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā senāsanacārikaṁ āhiṇḍanto te bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmente, disvāna yena te bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā te bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:5.2.1
Pali: “kiṁ imassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno ābādho”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:5.2.2
Pali: “Imassa, bhante, āyasmato pādakhilābādho; 

pli-tv-kd5:5.2.3
Pali: imaṁ mayaṁ pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:5.2.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:5.2.5
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yassa pādā vā dukkhā, pādā vā phalitā, pādakhilo vā ābādho upāhanaṁ dhāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū adhotehi pādehi mañcampi pīṭhampi abhiruhanti; 

pli-tv-kd5:6.1.2
Pali: cīvarampi senāsanampi dussati. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.1.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ‘idāni mañcaṁ vā pīṭhaṁ vā abhiruhissāmī’ti upāhanaṁ dhāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū rattiyā uposathaggampi sannisajjampi gacchantā andhakāre khāṇumpi kaṇṭakampi akkamanti; pādā dukkhā honti. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ajjhārāme upāhanaṁ dhāretuṁ, ukkaṁ, padīpaṁ, kattaradaṇḍan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.3.0
Pali: 6. Kaṭṭhapādukādipaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:6.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya kaṭṭhapādukāyo abhiruhitvā ajjhokāse caṅkamanti, uccāsaddā mahāsaddā khaṭakhaṭasaddā, anekavihitaṁ tiracchānakathaṁ kathentā, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:6.3.2
Pali: rājakathaṁ, corakathaṁ, mahāmattakathaṁ, senākathaṁ, bhayakathaṁ, yuddhakathaṁ, annakathaṁ, pānakathaṁ, vatthakathaṁ, sayanakathaṁ, mālākathaṁ, gandhakathaṁ, ñātikathaṁ, yānakathaṁ, gāmakathaṁ, nigamakathaṁ, nagarakathaṁ, janapadakathaṁ, itthikathaṁ, sūrakathaṁ, visikhākathaṁ, kumbhaṭṭhānakathaṁ, pubbapetakathaṁ, nānattakathaṁ, lokakkhāyikaṁ, samuddakkhāyikaṁ, itibhavābhavakathaṁ iti vā; 

pli-tv-kd5:6.3.3
Pali: kīṭakampi akkamitvā mārenti, bhikkhūpi samādhimhā cāventi. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.1
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.2
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya kaṭṭhapādukāyo abhiruhitvā ajjhokāse caṅkamissanti, uccāsaddā mahāsaddā khaṭakhaṭasaddā anekavihitaṁ tiracchānakathaṁ kathentā, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.3
Pali: rājakathaṁ, corakathaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.4
Pali: itibhavābhavakathaṁ iti vā, kīṭakampi akkamitvā māressanti, bhikkhūpi samādhimhā cāvessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya kaṭṭhapādukāyo abhiruhitvā ajjhokāse caṅkamanti, uccāsaddā mahāsaddā khaṭakhaṭasaddā, anekavihitaṁ tiracchānakathaṁ kathentā, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.7

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.8

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.9

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.10

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.12

pli-tv-kd5:6.4.13

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rājagahe yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena bārāṇasī tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena bārāṇasī tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṁ viharati isipatane migadāye. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.5
Pali: “bhagavatā kaṭṭhapādukā paṭikkhittā”ti—

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.6
Pali: tālataruṇe chedāpetvā tālapattapādukāyo dhārenti; 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.7
Pali: tāni tālataruṇāni chinnāni milāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.8

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.9

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.10
Pali: tāni tālataruṇāni chinnāni milāyanti; 

pli-tv-kd5:7.1.11
Pali: ekindriyaṁ samaṇā sakyaputtiyā jīvaṁ viheṭhentī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.1
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.2

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.4
Pali: tāni tālataruṇāni chinnāni milāyantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.5
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.6
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.7

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.10

pli-tv-kd5:7.2.14

pli-tv-kd5:7.3.1

pli-tv-kd5:8.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bārāṇasiyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena bhaddiyaṁ tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena bhaddiyaṁ tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā bhaddiye viharati jātiyā vane. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhaddiyā bhikkhū anekavihitaṁ pādukamaṇḍanānuyogamanuyuttā viharanti, tiṇapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, muñjapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, pabbajapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, hintālapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, kamalapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, kambalapādukaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, riñcanti uddesaṁ paripucchaṁ adhisīlaṁ adhicittaṁ adhipaññaṁ.

pli-tv-kd5:8.2.9
Pali: riñcissanti uddesaṁ paripucchaṁ adhisīlaṁ adhicittaṁ adhipaññaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.1

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.2

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.3

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.4
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, tiṇapādukā dhāretabbā, na muñjapādukā dhāretabbā, na pabbajapādukā dhāretabbā, na hintālapādukā dhāretabbā, na kamalapādukā dhāretabbā, na kambalapādukā dhāretabbā, na sovaṇṇamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na rūpiyamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na maṇimayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na veḷuriyamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na phalikamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na kaṁsamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na kācamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na tipumayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na sīsamayā pādukā dhāretabbā, na tambalohamayā pādukā dhāretabbā.

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.6
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, kāci saṅkamaniyā pādukā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.7
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.8
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tisso pādukā dhuvaṭṭhāniyā asaṅkamaniyāyo—

pli-tv-kd5:8.3.9
Pali: vaccapādukaṁ, passāvapādukaṁ, ācamanapādukan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhaddiye yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena sāvatthi tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena sāvatthi tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū aciravatiyā nadiyā gāvīnaṁ tarantīnaṁ visāṇesupi gaṇhanti, kaṇṇesupi gaṇhanti, gīvāyapi gaṇhanti, cheppāpi gaṇhanti, piṭṭhimpi abhiruhanti, rattacittāpi aṅgajātaṁ chupanti, vacchatarimpi ogāhetvā mārenti. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.1
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.2
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā gāvīnaṁ tarantīnaṁ visāṇesupi gahessanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.3
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:9.2.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.1
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.2
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.3
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.4
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, gāvīnaṁ visāṇesu gahetabbaṁ, na kaṇṇesu gahetabbaṁ, na gīvāya gahetabbaṁ, na cheppāya gahetabbaṁ, na piṭṭhi abhiruhitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.5
Pali: Yo abhiruheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.6
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, rattacittena aṅgajātaṁ chupitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.7
Pali: Yo chupeyya, āpatti thullaccayassa. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.8
Pali: Na vacchatarī māretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.3.9
Pali: Yo māreyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.0
Pali: 7. Yānādipaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū yānena yāyanti, itthiyuttenapi purisantarena, purisayuttenapi itthantarena. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gaṅgāmahiyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, yānena yāyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:9.4.6
Pali: Yo yāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kosalesu janapade sāvatthiṁ gacchanto bhagavantaṁ dassanāya antarāmagge gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.1.2
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu maggā okkamma aññatarasmiṁ rukkhamūle nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.1.3
Pali: Manussā taṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:10.1.4
Pali: “kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.1.5
Pali: “Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, āvuso, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.1
Pali: “Ehi, bhante, gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.2
Pali: “Nāhaṁ, āvuso, sakkomi, gilānomhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.3
Pali: “Ehi, bhante, yānaṁ abhiruhā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.4
Pali: “Alaṁ, āvuso, paṭikkhittaṁ bhagavatā yānan”ti kukkuccāyanto yānaṁ nābhiruhi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.5
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.6
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.2.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa yānan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.2
Pali: “itthiyuttaṁ nu kho purisayuttaṁ nu kho”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, purisayuttaṁ hatthavaṭṭakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno yānugghātena bāḷhataraṁ aphāsu ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.3.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sivikaṁ pāṭaṅkin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.0
Pali: 8. Uccāsayanamahāsayanapaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāsayanamahāsayanāni dhārenti, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.2
Pali: āsandiṁ, pallaṅkaṁ, gonakaṁ, cittakaṁ, paṭikaṁ, paṭalikaṁ, tūlikaṁ, vikatikaṁ, uddhalomiṁ, ekantalomiṁ, kaṭṭissaṁ, koseyyaṁ, kuttakaṁ, hatthattharaṁ, assattharaṁ, rathattharaṁ, ajinapaveṇiṁ, kadalimigapavarapaccattharaṇaṁ, sauttaracchadaṁ, ubhatolohitakūpadhānanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.3
Pali: Manussā vihāracārikaṁ āhiṇḍantā passitvā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.4.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.5.1
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāsayanamahāsayanāni dhāretabbāni, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd5:10.5.2
Pali: āsandi, pallaṅko, gonako, cittako, paṭikā, paṭalikā, tūlikā, vikatikā, uddhalomi, ekantalomi, kaṭṭissaṁ, koseyyaṁ, kuttakaṁ, hatthattharaṁ, assattharaṁ, rathattharaṁ, ajinapaveṇi, kadalimigapavarapaccattharaṇaṁ, sauttaracchadaṁ, ubhatolohitakūpadhānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.5.3
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.0
Pali: 9. Sabbacammapaṭikkhepa 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.2
Pali: “bhagavatā uccāsayanamahāsayanāni paṭikkhittānīti—

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.3
Pali: mahācammāni dhārenti, sīhacammaṁ byagghacammaṁ dīpicammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.4
Pali: Tāni mañcappamāṇenapi chinnāni honti, pīṭhappamāṇenapi chinnāni honti, antopi mañce paññattāni honti, bahipi mañce paññattāni honti, antopi pīṭhe paññattāni honti, bahipi pīṭhe paññattāni honti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.5
Pali: Manussā vihāracārikaṁ āhiṇḍantā passitvā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.6
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.8
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, mahācammāni dhāretabbāni, sīhacammaṁ byagghacammaṁ dīpicammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.6.9
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.2
Pali: “bhagavatā mahācammāni paṭikkhittānī”ti—

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.3
Pali: gocammāni dhārenti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.4
Pali: Tāni mañcappamāṇenapi chinnāni honti, pīṭhappamāṇenapi chinnāni honti, antopi mañce paññattāni honti, bahipi mañce paññattāni honti, antopi pīṭhe paññattāni honti, bahipi pīṭhe paññattāni honti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.5
Pali: Aññataropi pāpabhikkhu aññatarassa pāpupāsakassa kulūpako hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.6
Pali: Atha kho so pāpabhikkhu pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena tassa pāpupāsakassa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.7.7
Pali: Atha kho so pāpupāsako yena so pāpabhikkhu tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṁ pāpabhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena tassa pāpupāsakassa vacchako hoti taruṇako abhirūpo dassanīyo pāsādiko citro, seyyathāpi dīpicchāpo. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.2
Pali: Atha kho so pāpabhikkhu taṁ vacchakaṁ sakkaccaṁ upanijjhāyati. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.3
Pali: Atha kho so pāpupāsako taṁ pāpabhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.4
Pali: “kissa, bhante, ayyo imaṁ vacchakaṁ sakkaccaṁ upanijjhāyatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.5
Pali: “Attho me, āvuso, imassa vacchakassa cammenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.6
Pali: Atha kho so pāpupāsako taṁ vacchakaṁ vadhitvā cammaṁ vidhunitvā tassa pāpabhikkhuno pādāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.8.7
Pali: Atha kho so pāpabhikkhu taṁ cammaṁ saṅghāṭiyā paṭicchādetvā agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.1
Pali: Atha kho sā gāvī vacchagiddhinī taṁ pāpabhikkhuṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.2
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.3
Pali: “kissa tyāyaṁ, āvuso, gāvī piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.4
Pali: “Ahampi kho, āvuso, na jānāmi kena myāyaṁ gāvī piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena tassa pāpabhikkhuno saṅghāṭi lohitena makkhitā hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.6
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.7
Pali: “ayaṁ pana te, āvuso, saṅghāṭi kiṁ katā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.8
Pali: Atha kho so pāpabhikkhu bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.9
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso, pāṇātipāte samādapesī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.10
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.11
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu pāṇātipāte samādapessati, nanu bhagavatā anekapariyāyena pāṇātipāto garahito, pāṇātipātā veramaṇī pasatthā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.9.13
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā taṁ pāpabhikkhuṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.2
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, pāṇātipāte samādapesī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.3
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.4
Pali: kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, pāṇātipāte samādapessasi, nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena pāṇātipāto garahito, pāṇātipātā veramaṇī pasatthā. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.5
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.6
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.7
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, pāṇātipāte samādapetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.8
Pali: Yo samādapeyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.9
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, gocammaṁ dhāretabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.10
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.11
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, kiñci cammaṁ dhāretabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:10.10.12
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.0
Pali: 10. Gihivikatānuññātādi 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena manussānaṁ mañcampi pīṭhampi cammonaddhāni honti, cammavinaddhāni. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.2
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nābhinisīdanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gihivikataṁ abhinisīdituṁ, na tveva abhinipajjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena vihārā cammavaddhehi ogumphiyanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.6
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nābhinisīdanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:11.1.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, bandhanamattaṁ abhinisīditun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū saupāhanā gāmaṁ pavisanti. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, saupāhanena gāmo pavisitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.6
Pali: Yo paviseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti, na sakkoti vinā upāhanena gāmaṁ pavisituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:12.1.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānena bhikkhunā saupāhanena gāmaṁ pavisitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.0
Pali: 11. Soṇakuṭikaṇṇavatthu 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā mahākaccāno avantīsu viharati kuraraghare papatake pabbate. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo āyasmato mahākaccānassa upaṭṭhāko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.3
Pali: Atha kho soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo yenāyasmā mahākaccāno tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.4
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.5
Pali: “yathā yathāhaṁ, bhante, ayyena mahākaccānena dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, nayidaṁ sukaraṁ agāraṁ ajjhāvasatā ekantaparipuṇṇaṁ ekantaparisuddhaṁ saṅkhalikhitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ carituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.6
Pali: Icchāmahaṁ, bhante, kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.1.7
Pali: Pabbājetu maṁ, bhante, ayyo mahākaccāno”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.1
Pali: (…) “Dukkaraṁ kho, soṇa, yāvajīvaṁ ekaseyyaṁ ekabhattaṁ brahmacariyaṁ carituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.2
Pali: Iṅgha tvaṁ, soṇa, tattheva agārikabhūto buddhānaṁ sāsanaṁ anuyuñja, kālayuttaṁ ekaseyyaṁ ekabhattaṁ brahmacariyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.3
Pali: Atha kho soṇassa upāsakassa kuṭikaṇṇassa yo ahosi pabbajjābhisaṅkhāro so paṭippassambhi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.4
Pali: Dutiyampi kho soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.5
Pali: tatiyampi kho soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo yenāyasmā mahākaccāno tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.6
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho soṇo upāsako kuṭikaṇṇo āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.7
Pali: “yathā yathāhaṁ, bhante, ayyena mahākaccānena dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, nayidaṁ sukaraṁ agāraṁ ajjhāvasatā ekantaparipuṇṇaṁ ekantaparisuddhaṁ saṅkhalikhitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ carituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.8
Pali: Icchāmahaṁ, bhante, kesamassuṁ ohāretvā kāsāyāni vatthāni acchādetvā agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.9
Pali: Pabbājetu maṁ, bhante, ayyo mahākaccāno”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.10
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākaccāno soṇaṁ upāsakaṁ kuṭikaṇṇaṁ pabbājesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena avantidakkhiṇāpatho appabhikkhuko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.2.12
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā mahākaccāno tiṇṇaṁ vassānaṁ accayena kicchena kasirena tato tato dasavaggaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ soṇaṁ upasampādesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.3.0
Pali: 12. Mahākaccānassapañcavaraparidassana 

pli-tv-kd5:13.3.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato soṇassa vassaṁvuṭṭhassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.3.2
Pali: “sutoyeva kho me so bhagavā ediso ca ediso cāti, na ca mayā sammukhā diṭṭho, gaccheyyāhaṁ taṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya arahantaṁ sammāsambuddhaṁ, sace maṁ upajjhāyo anujāneyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.3.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā soṇo sāyanhasamayaṁ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito yenāyasmā mahākaccāno tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.1
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā soṇo āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.2
Pali: “idha mayhaṁ, bhante, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.3
Pali: ‘sutoyeva kho me so bhagavā ediso ca ediso cāti, na ca mayā sammukhā diṭṭho, gaccheyyāhaṁ taṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya arahantaṁ sammāsambuddhaṁ, sace maṁ upajjhāyo anujāneyyā’ti; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.4
Pali: gaccheyyāhaṁ, bhante, taṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya arahantaṁ sammāsambuddhaṁ, sace maṁ upajjhāyo anujānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.5
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, soṇa. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.4.6
Pali: Gaccha tvaṁ, soṇa, taṁ bhagavantaṁ dassanāya arahantaṁ sammāsambuddhaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.1
Pali: Dakkhissasi tvaṁ, soṇa, taṁ bhagavantaṁ pāsādikaṁ pasādanīyaṁ santindriyaṁ santamānasaṁ uttamadamathasamathaṁ anuppattaṁ dantaṁ guttaṁ yatindriyaṁ nāgaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.2
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, soṇa, mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda—

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.3
Pali: ‘upajjhāyo me, bhante, āyasmā mahākaccāno bhagavato pāde sirasā vandatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.4
Pali: Evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.5
Pali: ‘avantidakkhiṇāpatho, bhante, appabhikkhuko, tiṇṇaṁ me vassānaṁ accayena kicchena kasirena tato tato dasavaggaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā upasampadaṁ alatthaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.5.6
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe appatarena gaṇena upasampadaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.1
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, kaṇhuttarā bhūmi kharā gokaṇṭakahatā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.2
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe guṇaṅguṇūpāhanaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.3
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, nahānagarukā manussā udakasuddhikā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.4
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe dhuvanahānaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.5
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.6
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, majjhimesu janapadesu eragū moragū majjārū jantū; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.7
Pali: evameva kho, bhante, avantidakkhiṇāpathe cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.6.8
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe cammāni attharaṇāni anujāneyya, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.1
Pali: Etarahi, bhante, manussā nissīmagatānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ cīvaraṁ denti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.2
Pali: “imaṁ cīvaraṁ itthannāmassa demā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.3
Pali: Te āgantvā ārocenti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.4
Pali: “itthannāmehi te, āvuso, manussehi cīvaraṁ dinnan”ti te kukkuccāyantā na sādiyanti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.5
Pali: “mā no nissaggiyaṁ ahosī”ti; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.6
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā cīvare pariyāyaṁ ācikkheyyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.7
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti 

pli-tv-kd5:13.7.8
Pali: kho āyasmā soṇo āyasmato mahākaccānassa paṭissutvā uṭṭhāyāsanā āyasmantaṁ mahākaccānaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā senāsanaṁ saṁsāmetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena sāvatthi tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.1
Pali: Anupubbena yena sāvatthi jetavanaṁ anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāmo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.3
Pali: “imassa, ānanda, āgantukassa bhikkhuno senāsanaṁ paññāpehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando—

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.5
Pali: “yassa kho maṁ bhagavā āṇāpeti, ‘imassa, ānanda, āgantukassa bhikkhuno senāsanaṁ paññāpehī’ti, icchati bhagavā tena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekavihāre vatthuṁ, icchati bhagavā āyasmatā soṇena saddhiṁ ekavihāre vatthun”ti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.8.6
Pali: yasmiṁ vihāre bhagavā viharati tasmiṁ vihāre āyasmato soṇassa senāsanaṁ paññāpesi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bahudeva rattiṁ ajjhokāse vītināmetvā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.2
Pali: Āyasmāpi kho soṇo bahudeva rattiṁ ajjhokāse vītināmetvā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya āyasmantaṁ soṇaṁ ajjhesi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.4
Pali: “paṭibhātu taṁ, bhikkhu, dhammo bhāsitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.5
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā soṇo bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā sabbāneva aṭṭhakavaggikāni sarena abhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmato soṇassa sarabhaññapariyosāne abbhānumodi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.7
Pali: “sādhu sādhu, bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.8
Pali: Suggahitāni kho te, bhikkhu, aṭṭhakavaggikāni, sumanasikatāni sūpadhāritāni. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.9
Pali: Kalyāṇiyāpi vācāya samannāgato, vissaṭṭhāya, anelagalāya, atthassa viññāpaniyā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.10
Pali: Kativassosi tvaṁ, bhikkhū”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:13.9.11
Pali: “Ekavassohaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.1
Pali: “Kissa pana tvaṁ, bhikkhu, evaṁ ciraṁ akāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.2
Pali: “Ciraṁ diṭṭho me, bhante, kāmesu ādīnavo, api ca sambādhā gharāvāsā bahukiccā bahukaraṇīyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etamatthaṁ viditvā tāyaṁ velāyaṁ imaṁ udānaṁ udānesi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.4
Pali: “Disvā ādīnavaṁ loke, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.5
Pali: ñatvā dhammaṁ nirūpadhiṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.6
Pali: Ariyo na ramatī pāpe, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.10.7
Pali: pāpe na ramatī sucī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā soṇo—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.2
Pali: “paṭisammodati kho maṁ bhagavā, ayaṁ khvassa kālo yaṁ me upajjhāyo paridassī”ti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.3
Pali: uṭṭhāyāsanā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhagavato pādesu sirasā nipatitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.4
Pali: “upajjhāyo me, bhante, āyasmā mahākaccāno bhagavato pāde sirasā vandati, evañca vadeti avantidakkhiṇāpatho, bhante, appabhikkhuko. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.5
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ me vassānaṁ accayena kicchena kasirena tato tato dasavaggaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā upasampadaṁ alatthaṁ, appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe appatarena gaṇena upasampadaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.6
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, kaṇhuttarā bhūmi kharā gokaṇṭakahatā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.7
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe guṇaṅguṇūpāhanaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.8
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, nahānagarukā manussā udakasuddhikā, appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe dhuvanahānaṁ anujāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.9
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhante, cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.10
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhante, majjhimesu janapadesu eragū moragū majjārū jantū; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.11
Pali: evameva kho, bhante, avantidakkhiṇāpathe cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.12
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā avantidakkhiṇāpathe cammāni attharaṇāni anujāneyya, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.13
Pali: Etarahi, bhante, manussā nissīmagatānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ cīvaraṁ denti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.14
Pali: ‘imaṁ cīvaraṁ itthannāmassa demā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.15
Pali: Te āgantvā ārocenti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.16
Pali: ‘itthannāmehi te, āvuso, manussehi cīvaraṁ dinnan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.17
Pali: Te kukkuccāyantā na sādiyanti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.18
Pali: ‘mā no nissaggiyaṁ ahosī’ti; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.19
Pali: appeva nāma bhagavā cīvare pariyāyaṁ ācikkheyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.20
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.21
Pali: “avantidakkhiṇāpatho, bhikkhave, appabhikkhuko. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.11.22
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbapaccantimesu janapadesu vinayadharapañcamena gaṇena upasampadaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.1
Pali: Tatrime paccantimā janapadā—

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.2
Pali: puratthimāya disāya gajaṅgalaṁ nāma nigamo, tassa parena mahāsālā, tato parā paccantimā janapadā, orato majjhe; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.3
Pali: puratthimadakkhiṇāya disāya sallavatī nāma nadī, tato parā paccantimā janapadā, orato majjhe; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.4
Pali: dakkhiṇāya disāya setakaṇṇikaṁ nāma nigamo, tato parā paccantimā janapadā, orato majjhe; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.5
Pali: pacchimāya disāya thūṇaṁ nāma brāhmaṇagāmo, tato parā paccantimā janapadā, orato majjhe; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.6
Pali: uttarāya disāya usīraddhajo nāma pabbato, tato parā paccantimā janapadā, orato majjhe. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.12.7
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpesu paccantimesu janapadesu vinayadharapañcamena gaṇena upasampadaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.1
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhikkhave, kaṇhuttarā bhūmi kharā gokaṇṭakahatā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.2
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbapaccantimesu janapadesu guṇaṅguṇūpāhanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.3
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhikkhave, nahānagarukā manussā udakasuddhikā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.4
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbapaccantimesu janapadesu dhuvanahānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.5
Pali: Avantidakkhiṇāpathe, bhikkhave, cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.6
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhikkhave, majjhimesu janapadesu eragū moragū majjārū jantū; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.7
Pali: evameva kho, bhikkhave, avantidakkhiṇāpathe cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.8
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbapaccantimesu janapadesu cammāni attharaṇāni, eḷakacammaṁ ajacammaṁ migacammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, manussā nissīmagatānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ cīvaraṁ denti—

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.10
Pali: ‘imaṁ cīvaraṁ itthannāmassa demā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.11
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sādituṁ, na tāva taṁ gaṇanūpagaṁ yāva na hatthaṁ gacchatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.12
Pali: Cammakkhandhako pañcamo. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.13
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.14
Pali: Rājā ca māgadho soṇo, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.15
Pali: asītisahassissaro; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.16
Pali: Sāgato gijjhakūṭasmiṁ, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.17
Pali: bahuṁ dasseti uttariṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.18
Pali: Pabbajjāraddhabhijjiṁsu, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.19
Pali: vīṇaṁ ekapalāsikaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.20
Pali: Nīlā pītā lohitikā, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.21
Pali: mañjiṭṭhā kaṇhameva ca. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.22
Pali: Mahāraṅgamahānāmā, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.23
Pali: vaddhikā ca paṭikkhipi; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.24
Pali: Khallakā puṭapāli ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.25
Pali: tūlatittirameṇḍajā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.26
Pali: Vicchikā moracitrā ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.27
Pali: sīhabyagghā ca dīpikā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.28
Pali: Ajinuddā majjārī ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.29
Pali: kāḷaluvakaparikkhaṭā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.30
Pali: Phalitupāhanā khilā, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.31
Pali: dhotakhāṇukhaṭakhaṭā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.32
Pali: Tālaveḷutiṇaṁ ceva, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.33
Pali: muñjapabbajahintālā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.34
Pali: Kamalakambalasovaṇṇā, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.35
Pali: rūpikā maṇiveḷuriyā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.36
Pali: Phalikā kaṁsakācā ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.37
Pali: tipusīsañca tambakā. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.38
Pali: Gāvī yānaṁ gilāno ca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.39
Pali: purisāyuttasivikā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.40
Pali: Sayanāni mahācammā, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.41
Pali: gocammehi ca pāpako. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.42
Pali: Gihīnaṁ cammavaddhehi, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.43
Pali: pavisanti gilāyano; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.44
Pali: Mahākaccāyano soṇo, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.45
Pali: sarena aṭṭhakavaggikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.46
Pali: Upasampadaṁ pañcahi, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.47
Pali: guṇaṅguṇā dhuvasinā; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.48
Pali: Cammattharaṇānuññāsi, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.49
Pali: na tāva gaṇanūpagaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.50
Pali: Adāsi me vare pañca, 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.51
Pali: soṇattherassa nāyakoti. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.52
Pali: Imamhi khandhake vatthūni tesaṭṭhi. 

pli-tv-kd5:13.13.53
Pali: Cammakkhandhako niṭṭhito.

Pali segments

pli-tv-kd6:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka 

pli-tv-kd6:0.2
Pali: Mahāvagga 

pli-tv-kd6:0.3
Pali: 6. Bhesajjakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd6:0.4
Pali: 1. Pañcabhesajjakathā 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūnaṁ sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhānaṁ yāgupi pītā uggacchati, bhattampi bhuttaṁ uggacchati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.3
Pali: Te tena kisā honti, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.4
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā te bhikkhū kise lūkhe dubbaṇṇe uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāte dhamanisanthatagatte, disvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.5
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho, ānanda, etarahi bhikkhū kisā, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.6
Pali: “Etarahi, bhante, bhikkhūnaṁ sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhānaṁ yāgupi pītā uggacchati, bhattampi bhuttaṁ uggacchati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.1.7
Pali: Te tena kisā honti, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavato rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.2
Pali: “etarahi kho bhikkhūnaṁ sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhānaṁ yāgupi pītā uggacchati, bhattampi bhuttaṁ uggacchati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.3
Pali: Te tena kisā honti, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.4
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ bhesajjaṁ anujāneyyaṁ, yaṁ bhesajjañceva assa bhesajjasammatañca lokassa, āhāratthañca phareyya, na ca oḷāriko āhāro paññāyeyyā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavato etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.6
Pali: “imāni kho pañca bhesajjāni, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.7
Pali: sappi, navanītaṁ, telaṁ, madhu, phāṇitaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.8
Pali: bhesajjāni ceva bhesajjasammatāni ca lokassa, āhāratthañca pharanti, na ca oḷāriko āhāro paññāyati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.2.9
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ imāni pañca bhesajjāni anujāneyyaṁ, kāle paṭiggahetvā kāle paribhuñjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sāyanhasamayaṁ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.2
Pali: “idha mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.3
Pali: ‘etarahi kho bhikkhūnaṁ sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhānaṁ yāgupi pītā uggacchati, bhattampi bhuttaṁ uggacchati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.4
Pali: Te tena kisā honti, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.5
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ bhesajjaṁ anujāneyyaṁ, yaṁ bhesajjañceva assa bhesajjasammatañca lokassa, āhāratthañca phareyya, na ca oḷāriko āhāro paññāyeyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.6
Pali: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhikkhave, etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.7
Pali: ‘imāni kho pañca bhesajjāni, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.8
Pali: sappi, navanītaṁ, telaṁ, madhu, phāṇitaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.9
Pali: bhesajjāni ceva bhesajjasammatāni ca lokassa, āhāratthañca pharanti, na ca oḷāriko āhāro paññāyati. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.10
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ imāni pañca bhesajjāni anujāneyyaṁ, kāle paṭiggahetvā kāle paribhuñjitun’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.3.11
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tāni pañca bhesajjāni kāle paṭiggahetvā kāle paribhuñjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū tāni pañca bhesajjāni kāle paṭiggahetvā kāle paribhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.4.2
Pali: Tesaṁ yānipi tāni pākatikāni lūkhāni bhojanāni tānipi nacchādenti, pageva senesitāni. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.4.3
Pali: Te tena ceva sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhā, iminā ca bhattācchādakena, tadubhayena bhiyyoso mattāya kisā honti, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.4.4
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā te bhikkhū bhiyyoso mattāya kise lūkhe dubbaṇṇe uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajāte dhamanisanthatagatte, disvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.4.5
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho, ānanda, etarahi bhikkhū bhiyyoso mattāya kisā, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:1.5.1
Pali: “Etarahi, bhante, bhikkhū tāni ca pañca bhesajjāni kāle paṭiggahetvā kāle paribhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.5.2
Pali: Tesaṁ yānipi tāni pākatikāni lūkhāni bhojanāni tānipi nacchādenti, pageva senesitāni. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.5.3
Pali: Te tena ceva sāradikena ābādhena phuṭṭhā, iminā ca bhattācchādakena, tadubhayena bhiyyoso mattāya kisā, lūkhā, dubbaṇṇā, uppaṇḍuppaṇḍukajātā, dhamanisanthatagattā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:1.5.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:1.5.5
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tāni pañca bhesajjāni paṭiggahetvā kālepi vikālepi paribhuñjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ vasehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vasāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:2.1.4
Pali: acchavasaṁ, macchavasaṁ, susukāvasaṁ, sūkaravasaṁ, gadrabhavasaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:2.1.5
Pali: kāle paṭiggahitaṁ kāle nippakkaṁ kāle saṁsaṭṭhaṁ telaparibhogena paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.2.1
Pali: Vikāle ce, bhikkhave, paṭiggahitaṁ vikāle nippakkaṁ vikāle saṁsaṭṭhaṁ, tañce paribhuñjeyya, āpatti tiṇṇaṁ dukkaṭānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.2.2
Pali: Kāle ce, bhikkhave, paṭiggahitaṁ vikāle nippakkaṁ vikāle saṁsaṭṭhaṁ, tañce paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dvinnaṁ dukkaṭānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.2.3
Pali: Kāle ce, bhikkhave, paṭiggahitaṁ kāle nippakkaṁ vikāle saṁsaṭṭhaṁ, tañce paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:2.2.4
Pali: Kāle ce, bhikkhave, paṭiggahitaṁ kāle nippakkaṁ kāle saṁsaṭṭhaṁ, tañce paribhuñjeyya, anāpattī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.0
Pali: 2. Mūlādibhesajjakathā 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mūlehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mūlāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.4
Pali: haliddiṁ, siṅgiveraṁ, vacaṁ, vacattaṁ, ativisaṁ, kaṭukarohiṇiṁ, usīraṁ, bhaddamuttakaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi mūlāni bhesajjāni, neva khādanīye khādanīyatthaṁ pharanti, na bhojanīye bhojanīyatthaṁ pharanti, tāni—

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.5
Pali: paṭiggahetvā yāvajīvaṁ pariharituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.6
Pali: sati paccaye paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.1.7
Pali: Asati paccaye paribhuñjantassa āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mūlehi bhesajjehi piṭṭhehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:3.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, nisadaṁ nisadapotakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kasāvehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kasāvāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.4
Pali: nimbakasāvaṁ, kuṭajakasāvaṁ, paṭolakasāvaṁ, phaggavakasāvaṁ, nattamālakasāvaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi kasāvāni bhesajjāni neva khādanīye khādanīyatthaṁ pharanti, na bhojanīye bhojanīyatthaṁ pharanti, tāni—

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.5
Pali: paṭiggahetvā yāvajīvaṁ pariharituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.6
Pali: sati paccaye paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:4.1.7
Pali: Asati paccaye paribhuñjantassa āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṇṇehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:5.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:5.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paṇṇāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:5.1.4
Pali: nimbapaṇṇaṁ, kuṭajapaṇṇaṁ, paṭolapaṇṇaṁ, sulasipaṇṇaṁ, kappāsapaṇṇaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi paṇṇāni bhesajjāni, neva khādanīye khādanīyatthaṁ pharanti, na bhojanīye bhojanīyatthaṁ pharanti … 

pli-tv-kd6:5.1.5
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd6:6.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ phalehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:6.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:6.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, phalāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:6.1.4
Pali: bilaṅgaṁ, pippaliṁ, maricaṁ, harītakaṁ, vibhītakaṁ, āmalakaṁ, goṭṭhaphalaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi phalāni bhesajjāni, neva khādanīye khādanīyatthaṁ pharanti, na bhojanīye bhojanīyatthaṁ pharanti … 

pli-tv-kd6:6.1.5
Pali: pe….

pli-tv-kd6:7.1.5
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd6:8.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ loṇehi bhesajjehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:8.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:8.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, loṇāni bhesajjāni—

pli-tv-kd6:8.1.4
Pali: sāmuddaṁ, kāḷaloṇaṁ, sindhavaṁ, ubbhidaṁ, bilaṁ, yāni vā panaññānipi atthi loṇāni bhesajjāni, neva khādanīye khādanīyatthaṁ pharanti, na bhojanīye bhojanīyatthaṁ pharanti, tāni—

pli-tv-kd6:8.1.7
Pali: Asati paccaye paribhuñjantassa āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:9.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato ānandassa upajjhāyassa āyasmato belaṭṭhasīsassa thullakacchābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:9.1.2
Pali: Tassa lasikāya cīvarāni kāye lagganti, tāni bhikkhū udakena temetvā temetvā apakaḍḍhanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:9.1.3
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā senāsanacārikaṁ āhiṇḍanto te bhikkhū tāni cīvarāni udakena temetvā temetvā apakaḍḍhante, disvāna yena te bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā te bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:9.1.4
Pali: “kiṁ imassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno ābādho”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:9.1.5
Pali: “Imassa, bhante, āyasmato thullakacchābādho, lasikāya cīvarāni kāye lagganti, tāni mayaṁ udakena temetvā temetvā apakaḍḍhāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:9.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:9.2.2
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yassa kaṇḍu vā, piḷakā vā, assāvo vā, thullakacchu vā ābādho, kāyo vā duggandho, cuṇṇāni bhesajjāni; 

pli-tv-kd6:9.2.3
Pali: agilānassa chakaṇaṁ mattikaṁ rajananippakkaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:9.2.4
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, udukkhalaṁ musalan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gilānānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ cuṇṇehi bhesajjehi cālitehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, cuṇṇacālinin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.4
Pali: Saṇhehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.1.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dussacālinin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno amanussikābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.2
Pali: Taṁ ācariyupajjhāyā upaṭṭhahantā nāsakkhiṁsu arogaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.3
Pali: So sūkarasūnaṁ gantvā āmakamaṁsaṁ khādi, āmakalohitaṁ pivi. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.4
Pali: Tassa so amanussikābādho paṭippassambhi. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:10.2.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, amanussikābādhe āmakamaṁsaṁ āmakalohitan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno cakkhurogābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.1.2
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmenti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.1.3
Pali: Addasā kho bhagavā senāsanacārikaṁ āhiṇḍanto te bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmente, disvāna yena te bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā te bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:11.1.4
Pali: “kiṁ imassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno ābādho”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.1
Pali: “Imassa, bhante, āyasmato cakkhurogābādho. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.2
Pali: Imaṁ mayaṁ pariggahetvā uccārampi passāvampi nikkhāmemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, añjanaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.5
Pali: kāḷañjanaṁ, rasañjanaṁ, sotañjanaṁ, gerukaṁ, kapallan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.6
Pali: Añjanūpapisanehi attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:11.2.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, candanaṁ, tagaraṁ, kāḷānusāriyaṁ, tālīsaṁ, bhaddamuttakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū piṭṭhāni añjanāni carukesupi sarāvakesupi nikkhipanti; 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.2
Pali: tiṇacuṇṇehipi paṁsukehipi okiriyanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, añjanin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvacā añjaniyo dhārenti—

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.6
Pali: sovaṇṇamayaṁ, rūpiyamayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.7
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.8
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.10
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāvacā añjanī dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.11
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.1.12
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhimayaṁ, dantamayaṁ, visāṇamayaṁ, naḷamayaṁ, veḷumayaṁ, kaṭṭhamayaṁ, jatumayaṁ, phalamayaṁ, lohamayaṁ, saṅkhanābhimayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena añjaniyo apārutā honti, tiṇacuṇṇehipi paṁsukehipi okiriyanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, apidhānanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.4
Pali: Apidhānaṁ nipatati. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, suttakena bandhitvā añjaniyā bandhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.7
Pali: Añjanī phalati. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.2.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, suttakena sibbetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū aṅguliyā añjanti, akkhīni dukkhāni honti. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.3.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.3.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, añjanisalākan”ti.

Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:12.3.11
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhimayaṁ …pe… saṅkhanābhimayan”ti.

Pali: Tena kho pana samayena añjanisalākā bhūmiyaṁ patitā pharusā hoti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, salākaṭhāniyan”ti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

pli-tv-kd6:13.1.1

pli-tv-kd6:13.2.1
Pali: Natthuṁ visamaṁ āsiñcanti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṁsabaddhakaṁ bandhanasuttakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato pilindavacchassa vātābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.2
Pali: Vejjā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.3
Pali: “telaṁ pacitabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.5
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, telapākan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.6
Pali: Tasmiṁ kho pana telapāke majjaṁ pakkhipitabbaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, telapāke majjaṁ pakkhipitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.9
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū atipakkhittamajjāni telāni pacanti, tāni pivitvā majjanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, atipakkhittamajjaṁ telaṁ pātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.12
Pali: Yo piveyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.1.13
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yasmiṁ telapāke majjassa na vaṇṇo na gandho na raso paññāyati, evarūpaṁ majjapakkhittaṁ telaṁ pātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūnaṁ bahuṁ atipakkhittamajjaṁ telaṁ pakkaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.2
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—“kathaṁ nu kho atipakkhittamajje tele paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, abbhañjanaṁ adhiṭṭhātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato pilindavacchassa bahutaraṁ telaṁ pakkaṁ hoti, telabhājanaṁ na vijjati. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tīṇi tumbāni—

pli-tv-kd6:14.2.8
Pali: lohatumbaṁ, kaṭṭhatumbaṁ, phalatumban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato pilindavacchassa aṅgavāto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sedakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.4
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sambhārasedan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.7
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.9

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.10
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, bhaṅgodakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.13
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.3.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, udakakoṭṭhakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato pilindavacchassa pabbavāto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, lohitaṁ mocetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.4
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, lohitaṁ mocetvā visāṇena gāhetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmato pilindavacchassa pādā phalitā honti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pādabbhañjanan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.10
Pali: Nakkhamaniyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pajjaṁ abhisaṅkharitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno gaṇḍābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, satthakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.16
Pali: Kasāvodakena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.17
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.18
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kasāvodakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.19
Pali: Tilakakkena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.20
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.4.21
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tilakakkan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.1
Pali: Kabaḷikāya attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kabaḷikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.4
Pali: Vaṇabandhanacoḷena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vaṇabandhanacoḷan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.7
Pali: Vaṇo kaṇḍuvati. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sāsapakuṭṭena phositun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.10
Pali: Vaṇo kilijjittha. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dhūmaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.13
Pali: Vaḍḍhamaṁsaṁ vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, loṇasakkharikāya chinditun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.16
Pali: Vaṇo na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.17
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.18
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vaṇatelan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.19
Pali: Telaṁ galati. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.20
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.5.21
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vikāsikaṁ sabbaṁ vaṇapaṭikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu ahinā daṭṭho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, cattāri mahāvikaṭāni dātuṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.4
Pali: gūthaṁ, muttaṁ, chārikaṁ, mattikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.5
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.6
Pali: “appaṭiggahitāni nu kho udāhu paṭiggahetabbānī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sati kappiyakārake paṭiggahāpetuṁ, asati kappiyakārake sāmaṁ gahetvā paribhuñjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.9
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarena bhikkhunā visaṁ pītaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.11
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gūthaṁ pāyetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.12
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.13
Pali: “appaṭiggahitaṁ nu kho udāhu paṭiggahetabbo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.6.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yaṁ karonto paṭiggaṇhāti, sveva paṭiggaho kato, na puna paṭiggahetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno gharadinnakābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sītāloḷiṁ pāyetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu duṭṭhagahaṇiko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, āmisakhāraṁ pāyetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno paṇḍurogābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, muttaharītakaṁ pāyetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.10
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno chavidosābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gandhālepaṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu abhisannakāyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, virecanaṁ pātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.16
Pali: Acchakañjiyā attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.17
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.18
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, acchakañjin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.19
Pali: Akaṭayūsena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.20
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.21
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, akaṭayūsan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.22
Pali: Kaṭākaṭena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.23
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.24
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kaṭākaṭan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.25
Pali: Paṭicchādanīyena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.26
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:14.7.27
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paṭicchādanīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.0
Pali: 3. Pilindavacchavatthu 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā pilindavaccho rājagahe pabbhāraṁ sodhāpeti leṇaṁ kattukāmo. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.2
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro yenāyasmā pilindavaccho tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ pilindavacchaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro āyasmantaṁ pilindavacchaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.4
Pali: “kiṁ, bhante, thero kārāpetī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.5
Pali: “Pabbhāraṁ, mahārāja, sodhāpemi, leṇaṁ kattukāmo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.6
Pali: “Attho, bhante, ayyassa ārāmikenā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.7
Pali: “Na kho, mahārāja, bhagavatā ārāmiko anuññāto”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.8
Pali: “Tena hi, bhante, bhagavantaṁ paṭipucchitvā mama āroceyyāthā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.1.9
Pali: “Evaṁ, mahārājā”ti kho āyasmā pilindavaccho rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa paccassosi. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.2.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā pilindavaccho rājānaṁ māgadhaṁ seniyaṁ bimbisāraṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi, samādapesi, samuttejesi, sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.2.2
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro āyasmatā pilindavacchena dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito uṭṭhāyāsanā āyasmantaṁ pilindavacchaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.2.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā pilindavaccho bhagavato santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-kd6:15.2.4
Pali: “rājā, bhante, māgadho seniyo bimbisāro ārāmikaṁ dātukāmo. 

pli-tv-kd6:15.2.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho, bhante, mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti?
