Pali: Ayaṁ kho, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.6
Pali: venayiko samaṇo gotamo, vinayāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.7
Pali: Katamo ca, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.8
Pali: tapassī samaṇo gotamo, tapassitāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti? 

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.9
Pali: Tapanīyāhaṁ, sīha, pāpake akusale dhamme vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.10
Pali: kāyaduccaritaṁ vacīduccaritaṁ manoduccaritaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.11
Pali: Yassa kho, sīha, tapanīyā pāpakā akusalā dhammā pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṅkatā āyatiṁ anuppādadhammā, tamahaṁ tapassīti vadāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.12
Pali: Tathāgatassa kho, sīha, tapanīyā pāpakā akusalā dhammā pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṅkatā āyatiṁ anuppādadhammā. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.8.13
Pali: Ayaṁ kho, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya tapassī samaṇo gotamo tapassitāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.1
Pali: Katamo ca, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.2
Pali: apagabbho samaṇo gotamo apagabbhatāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti? 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.3
Pali: Yassa kho, sīha, āyatiṁ gabbhaseyyā punabbhavābhinibbatti pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṅkatā āyatiṁ anuppādadhammā, tamahaṁ apagabbhoti vadāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.4
Pali: Tathāgatassa kho, sīha, āyatiṁ gabbhaseyyā punabbhavābhinibbatti pahīnā ucchinnamūlā tālāvatthukatā anabhāvaṅkatā āyatiṁ anuppādadhammā. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.5
Pali: Ayaṁ kho, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.6
Pali: apagabbho samaṇo gotamo, apagabbhatāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.7
Pali: Katamo ca, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.8
Pali: assattho samaṇo gotamo assāsāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetīti? 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.9
Pali: Ahañhi, sīha, assattho paramena assāsena, assāsāya dhammaṁ desemi, tena ca sāvake vinemi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.10
Pali: Ayaṁ kho, sīha, pariyāyo, yena maṁ pariyāyena sammā vadamāno vadeyya—

pli-tv-kd6:31.9.11
Pali: assattho samaṇo gotamo assāsāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.1
Pali: Evaṁ vutte sīho senāpati bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.2
Pali: “abhikkantaṁ, bhante …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.3
Pali: upāsakaṁ maṁ bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.4
Pali: “Anuviccakāraṁ kho, sīha, karohi; anuviccakāro tumhādisānaṁ ñātamanussānaṁ sādhu hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.5
Pali: “Imināpāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavato bhiyyoso mattāya attamano abhiraddho, yaṁ maṁ bhagavā evamāha—

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.6
Pali: ‘anuviccakāraṁ kho, sīha, karohi; anuviccakāro tumhādisānaṁ ñātamanussānaṁ sādhu hotī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.7
Pali: Mamañhi, bhante, aññatitthiyā sāvakaṁ labhitvā kevalakappaṁ vesāliṁ paṭākaṁ parihareyyuṁ—‘sīho kho amhākaṁ senāpati sāvakattaṁ upagato’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.8
Pali: Atha ca pana maṁ bhagavā evamāha—

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.9
Pali: ‘anuviccakāraṁ kho, sīha, karohi; anuviccakāro tumhādisānaṁ ñātamanussānaṁ sādhu hotī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.10
Pali: Esāhaṁ, bhante, dutiyampi bhagavantaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi dhammañca bhikkhusaṅghañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.10.11
Pali: Upāsakaṁ maṁ bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.1
Pali: “Dīgharattaṁ kho te, sīha, nigaṇṭhānaṁ opānabhūtaṁ kulaṁ, yena nesaṁ upagatānaṁ piṇḍakaṁ dātabbaṁ maññeyyāsī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.2
Pali: “Imināpāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavato bhiyyoso mattāya attamano abhiraddho, yaṁ maṁ bhagavā evamāha—

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.3
Pali: ‘dīgharattaṁ kho te, sīha, nigaṇṭhānaṁ opānabhūtaṁ kulaṁ, yena nesaṁ upagatānaṁ piṇḍakaṁ dātabbaṁ maññeyyāsī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.4
Pali: Sutaṁ me taṁ, bhante, samaṇo gotamo evamāha—

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.5
Pali: ‘mayhameva dānaṁ dātabbaṁ, na aññesaṁ dānaṁ dātabbaṁ; mayhameva sāvakānaṁ dānaṁ dātabbaṁ, na aññesaṁ sāvakānaṁ dānaṁ dātabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.6
Pali: mayhameva dinnaṁ mahapphalaṁ, na aññesaṁ dinnaṁ mahapphalaṁ; mayhameva sāvakānaṁ dinnaṁ mahapphalaṁ, na aññesaṁ sāvakānaṁ dinnaṁ mahapphalan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.7
Pali: Atha ca pana maṁ bhagavā nigaṇṭhesupi dāne samādapeti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.8
Pali: Api ca, bhante, mayamettha kālaṁ jānissāma. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.9
Pali: Esāhaṁ, bhante, tatiyampi bhagavantaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāmi dhammañca bhikkhusaṅghañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.11.10
Pali: Upāsakaṁ maṁ bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gatan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sīhassa senāpatissa anupubbiṁ kathaṁ kathesi, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.2
Pali: dānakathaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.3
Pali: aparappaccayo satthusāsane bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.4
Pali: “adhivāsetu me, bhante, bhagavā svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.5
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.6
Pali: Atha kho sīho senāpati bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.7
Pali: Atha kho sīho senāpati aññataraṁ purisaṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.8
Pali: “gaccha, bhaṇe, pavattamaṁsaṁ jānāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.9
Pali: Atha kho sīho senāpati tassā rattiyā accayena paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocāpesi—“kālo, bhante, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.12.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena sīhassa senāpatissa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā nigaṇṭhā vesāliyaṁ rathikāya rathikaṁ siṅghāṭakena siṅghāṭakaṁ bāhā paggayha kandanti—

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.2
Pali: “ajja sīhena senāpatinā thūlaṁ pasuṁ vadhitvā samaṇassa gotamassa bhattaṁ kataṁ, taṁ samaṇo gotamo jānaṁ uddissakataṁ maṁsaṁ paribhuñjati paṭiccakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.3
Pali: Atha kho aññataro puriso yena sīho senāpati tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā sīhassa senāpatissa upakaṇṇake ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.4
Pali: “yagghe, bhante, jāneyyāsi, ete sambahulā nigaṇṭhā vesāliyaṁ rathikāya rathikaṁ siṅghāṭakena siṅghāṭakaṁ bāhā paggayha kandanti—

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.5
Pali: ‘ajja sīhena senāpatinā thūlaṁ pasuṁ vadhitvā samaṇassa gotamassa bhattaṁ kataṁ, taṁ samaṇo gotamo jānaṁ uddissakataṁ maṁsaṁ paribhuñjati paṭiccakamman’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.6
Pali: “Alaṁ, ayyo, dīgharattampi te āyasmantā avaṇṇakāmā buddhassa, avaṇṇakāmā dhammassa, avaṇṇakāmā saṅghassa; 

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.7
Pali: na ca pana te āyasmantā jiridanti taṁ bhagavantaṁ asatā tucchā musā abhūtena abbhācikkhantā; 

pli-tv-kd6:31.13.8
Pali: na ca mayaṁ jīvitahetupi sañcicca pāṇaṁ jīvitā voropeyyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.1
Pali: Atha kho sīho senāpati buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho sīhaṁ senāpatiṁ bhagavā dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.4
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, jānaṁ uddissakataṁ maṁsaṁ paribhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.5
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:31.14.6
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tikoṭiparisuddhaṁ macchamaṁsaṁ—adiṭṭhaṁ assutaṁ aparisaṅkitan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.0
Pali: 20. Kappiyabhūmianujānana 

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena vesālī subhikkhā hoti susassā sulabhapiṇḍā, sukarā uñchena paggahena yāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavato rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.3
Pali: “yāni tāni mayā bhikkhūnaṁ anuññātāni dubbhikkhe dussasse dullabhapiṇḍe anto vuṭṭhaṁ anto pakkaṁ sāmaṁ pakkaṁ uggahitapaṭiggahitakaṁ tato nīhaṭaṁ purebhattaṁ paṭiggahitaṁ vanaṭṭhaṁ pokkharaṭṭhaṁ, ajjāpi nu kho tāni bhikkhū paribhuñjantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā sāyanhasamayaṁ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.5
Pali: “yāni tāni, ānanda, mayā bhikkhūnaṁ anuññātāni dubbhikkhe dussasse dullabhapiṇḍe anto vuṭṭhaṁ anto pakkaṁ sāmaṁ pakkaṁ uggahitapaṭiggahitakaṁ tato nīhaṭaṁ purebhattaṁ paṭiggahitaṁ vanaṭṭhaṁ pokkharaṭṭhaṁ, ajjāpi nu kho tāni bhikkhū paribhuñjantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:32.1.6
Pali: “Paribhuñjanti, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.2
Pali: “yāni tāni, bhikkhave, mayā bhikkhūnaṁ anuññātāni dubbhikkhe dussasse dullabhapiṇḍe anto vuṭṭhaṁ anto pakkaṁ sāmaṁ pakkaṁ uggahitapaṭiggahitakaṁ tato nīhaṭaṁ purebhattaṁ paṭiggahitaṁ vanaṭṭhaṁ pokkharaṭṭhaṁ, tānāhaṁ ajjatagge paṭikkhipāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.3
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, anto vuṭṭhaṁ anto pakkaṁ sāmaṁ pakkaṁ uggahitapaṭiggahitakaṁ paribhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.4
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.5
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, tato nīhaṭaṁ purebhattaṁ paṭiggahitaṁ vanaṭṭhaṁ pokkharaṭṭhaṁ bhuttāvinā pavāritena anatirittaṁ paribhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:32.2.6
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena jānapadā manussā bahuṁ loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi sakaṭesu āropetvā bahārāmakoṭṭhake sakaṭaparivaṭṭaṁ karitvā acchanti—“yadā paṭipāṭiṁ labhissāma, tadā bhattaṁ karissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.1.2
Pali: Mahā ca megho uggato hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.1.3
Pali: Atha kho te manussā yenāyasmā ānando tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ etadavocuṁ—“idha, bhante ānanda, bahuṁ loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi sakaṭesu āropitā tiṭṭhanti, mahā ca megho uggato; kathaṁ nu kho, bhante ānanda, paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:33.1.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.1
Pali: “Tena hānanda, saṅgho paccantimaṁ vihāraṁ kappiyabhūmiṁ sammannitvā tattha vāsetu, yaṁ saṅgho ākaṅkhati vihāraṁ vā aḍḍhayogaṁ vā pāsādaṁ vā hammiyaṁ vā guhaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.2
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.3
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.4
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ vihāraṁ kappiyabhūmiṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.8
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ vihāraṁ kappiyabhūmiṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.9
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa vihārassa kappiyabhūmiyā sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.10
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.11
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo vihāro kappiyabhūmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.2.12
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena manussā tattheva sammutiyā kappiyabhūmiyā yāguyo pacanti, bhattāni pacanti, sūpāni sampādenti, maṁsāni koṭṭenti, kaṭṭhāni phālenti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.3.2
Pali: Assosi kho bhagavā rattiyā paccūsasamayaṁ paccuṭṭhāya uccāsaddaṁ mahāsaddaṁ kākoravasaddaṁ, sutvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:33.3.3
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so, ānanda, uccāsaddo mahāsaddo kākoravasaddo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.1
Pali: “Etarahi, bhante, manussā tattheva sammutiyā kappiyabhūmiyā yāguyo pacanti, bhattāni pacanti, sūpāni sampādenti, maṁsāni koṭṭenti, kaṭṭhāni phālenti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.2
Pali: So eso, bhagavā, uccāsaddo mahāsaddo kākoravasaddo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.4
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, sammuti kappiyabhūmi paribhuñjitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.5
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.6
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tisso kappiyabhūmiyo—

pli-tv-kd6:33.4.7
Pali: ussāvanantikaṁ gonisādikaṁ gahapatin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā yasojo gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.2
Pali: Tassatthāya bhesajjāni āhariyanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.3
Pali: Tāni bhikkhū bahi vāsenti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.4
Pali: Ukkapiṇḍakāpi khādanti, corāpi haranti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sammutiṁ kappiyabhūmiṁ paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.7
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, catasso kappiyabhūmiyo—

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.8
Pali: ussāvanantikaṁ gonisādikaṁ gahapatiṁ sammutin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:33.5.9
Pali: Sīhabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito catuttho. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.0
Pali: 21. Meṇḍakagahapativatthu 

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhaddiyanagare meṇḍako gahapati paṭivasati. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.2
Pali: Tassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.3
Pali: sīsaṁ nahāyitvā dhaññāgāraṁ sammajjāpetvā bahidvāre nisīdati, antalikkhā dhaññassa dhārā opatitvā dhaññāgāraṁ pūreti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.4
Pali: Bhariyāya evarūpo iddhānubhāvo hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.5
Pali: ekaṁyeva āḷhakathālikaṁ upanisīditvā ekañca sūpabhiñjanakaṁ dāsakammakaraporisaṁ bhattena parivisati, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.6
Pali: Puttassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.1.7
Pali: ekaṁyeva sahassathavikaṁ gahetvā dāsakammakaraporisassa chamāsikaṁ vetanaṁ deti, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāvassa hatthagatā. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.2.1
Pali: Suṇisāya evarūpo iddhānubhāvo hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.2.2
Pali: ekaṁyeva catudoṇikaṁ piṭakaṁ upanisīditvā dāsakammakaraporisassa chamāsikaṁ bhattaṁ deti, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.2.3
Pali: Dāsassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.2.4
Pali: ekena naṅgalena kasantassa satta sītāyo gacchanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.1
Pali: Assosi kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro—

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.2
Pali: “amhākaṁ kira vijite bhaddiyanagare meṇḍako gahapati paṭivasati. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.3
Pali: Tassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.4
Pali: sīsaṁ nahāyitvā dhaññāgāraṁ sammajjāpetvā bahidvāre nisīdati, antalikkhā dhaññassa dhārā opatitvā dhaññāgāraṁ pūreti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.5
Pali: Bhariyāya evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.6
Pali: ekaṁyeva āḷhakathālikaṁ upanisīditvā ekañca sūpabhiñjanakaṁ dāsakammakaraporisaṁ bhattena parivisati, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.7
Pali: Puttassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.3.8
Pali: ekaṁyeva sahassathavikaṁ gahetvā dāsakammakaraporisassa chamāsikaṁ vetanaṁ deti, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāvassa hatthagatā. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.4.1
Pali: Suṇisāya evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.4.2
Pali: ekaṁyeva catudoṇikaṁ piṭakaṁ upanisīditvā dāsakammakaraporisassa chamāsikaṁ bhattaṁ deti, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.4.3
Pali: Dāsassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.4.4
Pali: ekena naṅgalena kasantassa satta sītāyo gacchantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.1
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro aññataraṁ sabbatthakaṁ mahāmattaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.2
Pali: “amhākaṁ kira, bhaṇe, vijite bhaddiyanagare meṇḍako gahapati paṭivasati. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.3
Pali: Tassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo—

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.4
Pali: sīsaṁ nahāyitvā dhaññāgāraṁ sammajjāpetvā bahidvāre nisīdati, antalikkhā dhaññassa dhārā opatitvā dhaññāgāraṁ pūreti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.5
Pali: Bhariyāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.6
Pali: puttassa … 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.7
Pali: suṇisāya … 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.8
Pali: dāsassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo, ekena naṅgalena kasantassa satta sītāyo gacchantīti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.9
Pali: Gaccha, bhaṇe, jānāhi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.10
Pali: Yathā mayā sāmaṁ diṭṭho, evaṁ tava diṭṭho bhavissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.5.11
Pali: “Evaṁ, devā”ti kho so mahāmatto rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa paṭissuṇitvā caturaṅginiyā senāya yena bhaddiyaṁ tena pāyāsi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.1
Pali: Anupubbena yena bhaddiyaṁ yena meṇḍako gahapati tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.2
Pali: “ahañhi, gahapati, raññā āṇatto—

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.3
Pali: ‘amhākaṁ kira, bhaṇe, vijite bhaddiyanagare meṇḍako gahapati paṭivasati, tassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo, sīsaṁ nahāyitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.4
Pali: bhariyāya … 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.5
Pali: puttassa … 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.6
Pali: suṇisāya … 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.7
Pali: dāsassa evarūpo iddhānubhāvo, ekena naṅgalena kasantassa satta sītāyo gacchantīti, gaccha, bhaṇe, jānāhi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.8
Pali: Yathā mayā sāmaṁ diṭṭho, evaṁ tava diṭṭho bhavissatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.9
Pali: Passāma te, gahapati, iddhānubhāvan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.10
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati sīsaṁ nahāyitvā dhaññāgāraṁ sammajjāpetvā bahidvāre nisīdi, antalikkhā dhaññassa dhārā opatitvā dhaññāgāraṁ pūresi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.11
Pali: “Diṭṭho te, gahapati, iddhānubhāvo. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.6.12
Pali: Bhariyāya te iddhānubhāvaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.7.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati bhariyaṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.7.2
Pali: “tena hi caturaṅginiṁ senaṁ bhattena parivisā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.7.3
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa bhariyā ekaṁyeva āḷhakathālikaṁ upanisīditvā ekañca sūpabhiñjanakaṁ caturaṅginiṁ senaṁ bhattena parivisi, na tāva taṁ khiyyati, yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.7.4
Pali: “Diṭṭho te, gahapati, bhariyāyapi iddhānubhāvo. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.7.5
Pali: Puttassa te iddhānubhāvaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.8.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati puttaṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.8.2
Pali: “tena hi caturaṅginiyā senāya chamāsikaṁ vetanaṁ dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.8.3
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa putto ekaṁyeva sahassathavikaṁ gahetvā caturaṅginiyā senāya chamāsikaṁ vetanaṁ adāsi, na tāva taṁ khiyyati, yāvassa hatthagatā. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.8.4
Pali: “Diṭṭho te, gahapati, puttassapi iddhānubhāvo. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.8.5
Pali: Suṇisāya te iddhānubhāvaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati suṇisaṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.2
Pali: “tena hi caturaṅginiyā senāya chamāsikaṁ bhattaṁ dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.3
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa suṇisā ekaṁyeva catudoṇikaṁ piṭakaṁ upanisīditvā caturaṅginiyā senāya chamāsikaṁ bhattaṁ adāsi, na tāva taṁ khiyyati yāva sā na vuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.4
Pali: “Diṭṭho te, gahapati, suṇisāyapi iddhānubhāvo. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.5
Pali: Dāsassa te iddhānubhāvaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.6
Pali: “Mayhaṁ kho, sāmi, dāsassa iddhānubhāvo khette passitabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.7
Pali: “Alaṁ, gahapati, diṭṭho te dāsassapi iddhānubhāvo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.8
Pali: Atha kho so mahāmatto caturaṅginiyā senāya punadeva rājagahaṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.9.9
Pali: Yena rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.10.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vesāliyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena bhaddiyaṁ tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.10.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena bhaddiyaṁ tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.10.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā bhaddiye viharati jātiyā vane. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.1
Pali: Assosi kho meṇḍako gahapati—

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.2
Pali: “samaṇo khalu bho gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito bhaddiyaṁ anuppatto bhaddiye viharati jātiyā vane. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.3
Pali: Taṁ kho pana bhagavantaṁ gotamaṁ evaṁ kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggato—

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.4
Pali: ‘itipi so bhagavā arahaṁ sammāsambuddho vijjācaraṇasampanno sugato lokavidū anuttaro purisadammasārathi satthā devamanussānaṁ buddho bhagavā’. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.5
Pali: So imaṁ lokaṁ sadevakaṁ samārakaṁ sabrahmakaṁ sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiṁ pajaṁ sadevamanussaṁ sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā pavedeti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.6
Pali: So dhammaṁ deseti ādikalyāṇaṁ majjhekalyāṇaṁ pariyosānakalyāṇaṁ sātthaṁ sabyañjanaṁ kevalaparipuṇṇaṁ parisuddhaṁ brahmacariyaṁ pakāseti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.11.7
Pali: Sādhu kho pana tathārūpānaṁ arahataṁ dassanaṁ hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati bhadrāni bhadrāni yānāni yojāpetvā bhadraṁ bhadraṁ yānaṁ abhiruhitvā bhadrehi bhadrehi yānehi bhaddiyā niyyāsi bhagavantaṁ dassanāya. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.2
Pali: Addasaṁsu kho sambahulā titthiyā meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ, disvāna meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.3
Pali: “kahaṁ tvaṁ, gahapati, gacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.4
Pali: “Gacchāmahaṁ, bhante, bhagavantaṁ samaṇaṁ gotamaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.5
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, gahapati, kiriyavādo samāno akiriyavādaṁ samaṇaṁ gotamaṁ dassanāya upasaṅkamissasi? 

pli-tv-kd6:34.12.6
Pali: Samaṇo hi, gahapati, gotamo akiriyavādo akiriyāya dhammaṁ deseti, tena ca sāvake vinetī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.2
Pali: “nissaṁsayaṁ kho so bhagavā arahaṁ sammāsambuddho bhavissati, yathayime titthiyā usūyantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.3
Pali: Yāvatikā yānassa bhūmi, yānena gantvā yānā paccorohitvā pattikova yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.4
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnassa kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa bhagavā anupubbiṁ kathaṁ kathesi, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.5
Pali: dānakathaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.6
Pali: aparappaccayo satthusāsane bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.7
Pali: “abhikkantaṁ, bhante …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.8
Pali: upāsakaṁ maṁ bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupetaṁ saraṇaṁ gataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.9
Pali: Adhivāsetu ca me, bhante, bhagavā svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.13.10
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.14.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.14.2
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati tassā rattiyā accayena paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocāpesi—“kālo, bhante, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.14.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena meṇḍakassa gahapatissa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍakassa gahapatissa bhariyā ca putto ca suṇisā ca dāso ca yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.2
Pali: Tesaṁ bhagavā anupubbiṁ kathaṁ kathesi, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.3
Pali: dānakathaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.4
Pali: aparappaccayā satthusāsane bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.5
Pali: “abhikkantaṁ, bhante …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.6
Pali: ete mayaṁ, bhante, bhagavantaṁ saraṇaṁ gacchāma dhammañca bhikkhusaṅghañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.15.7
Pali: Upāsake no bhagavā dhāretu ajjatagge pāṇupete saraṇaṁ gate”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.16.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:34.16.2
Pali: “yāva, bhante, bhagavā bhaddiye viharati tāva ahaṁ buddhappamukhassa bhikkhusaṅghassa dhuvabhattenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.16.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.0
Pali: 22. Pañcagorasādianujānana 

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhaddiye yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ anāpucchā yena aṅguttarāpo tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.2
Pali: Assosi kho meṇḍako gahapati—

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.3
Pali: “bhagavā kira yena aṅguttarāpo tena cārikaṁ pakkanto mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.4
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati dāse ca kammakare ca āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.17.5
Pali: “tena hi, bhaṇe, bahuṁ loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi sakaṭesu āropetvā āgacchatha, aḍḍhatelasāni ca gopālakasatāni aḍḍhatelasāni ca dhenusatāni ādāya āgacchantu, yattha bhagavantaṁ passissāma tattha taruṇena khīrena bhojessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavantaṁ antarāmagge kantāre sambhāvesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.2
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.4
Pali: “adhivāsetu me, bhante, bhagavā svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.5
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.6
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.18.7
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati tassā rattiyā accayena paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocāpesi—“kālo, bhante, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena meṇḍakassa gahapatissa parivesanā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.2
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati aḍḍhatelasāni gopālakasatāni āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.3
Pali: “tena hi, bhaṇe, ekamekaṁ dhenuṁ gahetvā ekamekassa bhikkhuno upatiṭṭhatha taruṇena khīrena bhojessāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.4
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappesi sampavāresi, taruṇena ca khīrena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.5
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā khīraṁ na paṭiggaṇhanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.19.6
Pali: “Paṭiggaṇhatha, bhikkhave, paribhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.20.1
Pali: Atha kho meṇḍako gahapati buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā taruṇena ca khīrena bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.20.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho meṇḍako gahapati bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:34.20.3
Pali: “santi, bhante, maggā kantārā, appodakā appabhakkhā, na sukarā apātheyyena gantuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.20.4
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā bhikkhūnaṁ pātheyyaṁ anujānātū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.20.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā meṇḍakaṁ gahapatiṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.2
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañca gorase—

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.3
Pali: khīraṁ, dadhiṁ, takkaṁ, navanītaṁ, sappiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.4
Pali: Santi, bhikkhave, maggā kantārā appodakā appabhakkhā, na sukarā apātheyyena gantuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pātheyyaṁ pariyesituṁ taṇḍulo taṇḍulatthikena, muggo muggatthikena, māso māsatthikena, loṇaṁ loṇatthikena, guḷo guḷatthikena, telaṁ telatthikena, sappi sappitthikena. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.6
Pali: Santi, bhikkhave, manussā, saddhā pasannā, te kappiyakārakānaṁ hatthe hiraññaṁ upanikkhipanti—

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.7
Pali: ‘iminā ayyassa yaṁ kappiyaṁ taṁ dethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.8
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yaṁ tato kappiyaṁ taṁ sādituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:34.21.9
Pali: na tvevāhaṁ, bhikkhave, kenaci pariyāyena jātarūparajataṁ sāditabbaṁ pariyesitabbanti vadāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.0
Pali: 23. Keṇiyajaṭilavatthu 

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena āpaṇaṁ tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.2
Pali: Assosi kho keṇiyo jaṭilo—

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.3
Pali: “samaṇo khalu bho gotamo sakyaputto sakyakulā pabbajito āpaṇaṁ anuppatto, taṁ kho pana bhavantaṁ gotamaṁ evaṁ kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggato …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.4
Pali: sādhu kho pana tathārūpānaṁ arahataṁ dassanaṁ hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.5
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyassa jaṭilassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:35.1.6
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ samaṇassa gotamassa harāpeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.2.1
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyassa jaṭilassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:35.2.2
Pali: “yepi kho te brāhmaṇānaṁ pubbakā isayo mantānaṁ kattāro mantānaṁ pavattāro, yesamidaṁ etarahi brāhmaṇā porāṇaṁ mantapadaṁ gītaṁ pavuttaṁ samihitaṁ, tadanugāyanti tadanubhāsanti, bhāsitamanubhāsanti, vācitamanuvācenti, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:35.2.3
Pali: aṭṭhako vāmako vāmadevo vessāmitto yamataggi aṅgīraso bhāradvājo vāseṭṭho kassapo bhagu, rattūparatā viratā vikālabhojanā, te evarūpāni pānāni sādiyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.1
Pali: Samaṇopi gotamo rattūparato virato vikālabhojanā, arahati samaṇopi gotamo evarūpāni pānāni sādiyitun”ti 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.2
Pali: pahūtaṁ pānaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā kājehi gāhāpetvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi; 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.3
Pali: sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.4
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.5
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhātu me bhavaṁ gotamo pānan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.6
Pali: “Tena hi, keṇiya, bhikkhūnaṁ dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.7
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhikkhūnaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.8
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā na paṭiggaṇhanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.3.9
Pali: “Paṭiggaṇhatha, bhikkhave, paribhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.4.1
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ pahūtehi pānehi sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā bhagavantaṁ dhotahatthaṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.4.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho keṇiyaṁ jaṭilaṁ bhagavā dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.4.3
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:35.4.4
Pali: “adhivāsetu me bhavaṁ gotamo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.1
Pali: “Mahā kho, keṇiya, bhikkhusaṅgho aḍḍhatelasāni bhikkhusatāni, tvañca brāhmaṇesu abhippasanno”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.2
Pali: Dutiyampi kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.3
Pali: “kiñcāpi kho, bho gotama, mahā bhikkhusaṅgho aḍḍhatelasāni bhikkhusatāni, ahañca brāhmaṇesu abhippasanno, adhivāsetu me bhavaṁ gotamo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.4
Pali: “Mahā kho, keṇiya, bhikkhusaṅgho aḍḍhatelasāni bhikkhusatāni, tvañca brāhmaṇesu abhippasanno”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.5
Pali: Tatiyampi kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.6
Pali: “kiñcāpi kho, bho gotama, mahā bhikkhusaṅgho aḍḍhatelasāni bhikkhusatāni, ahañca brāhmaṇesu abhippasanno, adhivāsetu bhavaṁ gotamo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.7
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.5.8
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.2
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭha pānāni—

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.3
Pali: ambapānaṁ jambupānaṁ cocapānaṁ mocapānaṁ madhūkapānaṁ muddikapānaṁ sālūkapānaṁ phārusakapānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.4
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbaṁ phalarasaṁ ṭhapetvā dhaññaphalarasaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbaṁ pattarasaṁ ṭhapetvā ḍākarasaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.6
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbaṁ puppharasaṁ ṭhapetvā madhūkapuppharasaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.6.7
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ucchurasan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.7.1
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo tassā rattiyā accayena sake assame paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocāpesi—“kālo, bho gotama, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.7.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena keṇiyassa jaṭilassa assamo tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.7.3
Pali: Atha kho keṇiyo jaṭilo buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.1
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho keṇiyaṁ jaṭilaṁ bhagavā imāhi gāthāhi anumodi—

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.2
Pali: “Aggihuttamukhā yaññā, 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.3
Pali: sāvittī chandaso mukhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.4
Pali: Rājā mukhaṁ manussānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.5
Pali: nadīnaṁ sāgaro mukhaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.6
Pali: Nakkhattānaṁ mukhaṁ cando, 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.7
Pali: ādicco tapataṁ mukhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.8
Pali: Puññaṁ ākaṅkhamānānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.9
Pali: saṅgho ve yajataṁ mukhan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:35.8.10
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā keṇiyaṁ jaṭilaṁ imāhi gāthāhi anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.0
Pali: 24. Rojamallavatthu 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āpaṇe yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena kusinārā tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.2
Pali: Assosuṁ kho kosinārakā mallā—“bhagavā kira kusināraṁ āgacchati mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.3
Pali: Te saṅgaraṁ akaṁsu—“yo bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ na karissati, pañcasatānissa daṇḍo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rojo mallo āyasmato ānandassa sahāyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.1.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena kusinārā tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.1
Pali: Atha kho kosinārakā mallā bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ akaṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.2
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ karitvā yenāyasmā ānando tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitaṁ kho rojaṁ mallaṁ āyasmā ānando etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.4
Pali: “uḷāraṁ kho te idaṁ, āvuso roja, yaṁ tvaṁ bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ akāsī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.5
Pali: “Nāhaṁ, bhante ānanda, bahukato buddhe vā dhamme vā saṅghe vā; 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.6
Pali: api ca ñātīhi saṅgaro kato—‘yo bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ na karissati, pañcasatānissa daṇḍo’ti; 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.7
Pali: so kho ahaṁ, bhante ānanda, ñātīnaṁ daṇḍabhayā evāhaṁ bhagavato paccuggamanaṁ akāsin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.2.8
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando anattamano ahosi “kathañhi nāma rojo mallo evaṁ vakkhatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.3
Pali: “ayaṁ, bhante, rojo mallo abhiññāto ñātamanusso. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.4
Pali: Mahatthiko kho pana evarūpānaṁ ñātamanussānaṁ imasmiṁ dhammavinaye pasādo. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.5
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā tathā karotu, yathā rojo mallo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye pasīdeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.3.6
Pali: “Na kho taṁ, ānanda, dukkaraṁ tathāgatena, yathā rojo mallo imasmiṁ dhammavinaye pasīdeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.4.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā rojaṁ mallaṁ mettena cittena pharitvā uṭṭhāyāsanā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.4.2
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo bhagavato mettena cittena phuṭṭho, seyyathāpi nāma gāviṁ taruṇavaccho; 

pli-tv-kd6:36.4.3
Pali: evameva vihārena vihāraṁ pariveṇena pariveṇaṁ upasaṅkamitvā bhikkhū pucchati—

pli-tv-kd6:36.4.4
Pali: “kahaṁ nu kho, bhante, etarahi so bhagavā viharati arahaṁ sammāsambuddho, dassanakāmā hi mayaṁ taṁ bhagavantaṁ arahantaṁ sammāsambuddhan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.4.5
Pali: “Esāvuso roja, vihāro saṁvutadvāro, tena appasaddo upasaṅkamitvā ataramāno āḷindaṁ pavisitvā ukkāsitvā aggaḷaṁ ākoṭehi, vivarissati te bhagavā dvāran”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.1
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo yena so vihāro saṁvutadvāro, tena appasaddo upasaṅkamitvā ataramāno āḷindaṁ pavisitvā ukkāsitvā aggaḷaṁ ākoṭesi. Vivari bhagavā dvāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.2
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo vihāraṁ pavisitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnassa kho rojassa mallassa bhagavā anupubbiṁ kathaṁ kathesi, seyyathidaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.4
Pali: dānakathaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.5
Pali: aparappaccayo satthusāsane bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.6
Pali: “sādhu, bhante, ayyā mamaññeva paṭiggaṇheyyuṁ cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṁ, no aññesan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.7
Pali: “Yesaṁ kho, roja, sekkhena ñāṇena sekkhena dassanena dhammo diṭṭho seyyathāpi tayā, tesampi evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.8
Pali: ‘aho nūna ayyā amhākaññeva paṭiggaṇheyyuṁ cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhāraṁ, no aññesan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.5.9
Pali: Tena hi, roja, tava ceva paṭiggahissanti aññesañcā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kusinārāyaṁ paṇītānaṁ bhattānaṁ bhattapaṭipāṭi aṭṭhitā hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.2
Pali: Atha kho rojassa mallassa paṭipāṭiṁ alabhantassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.3
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ bhattaggaṁ olokeyyaṁ, yaṁ bhattagge nāssa, taṁ paṭiyādeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.4
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo bhattaggaṁ olokento dve nāddasa—

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.5
Pali: ḍākañca piṭṭhakhādanīyañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.6
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo yenāyasmā ānando tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.7
Pali: “idha me, bhante ānanda, paṭipāṭiṁ alabhantassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.8
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ bhattaggaṁ olokeyyaṁ, yaṁ bhattagge nāssa, taṁ paṭiyādeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.9
Pali: So kho ahaṁ, bhante ānanda, bhattaggaṁ olokento dve nāddasaṁ—

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.10
Pali: ḍākañca piṭṭhakhādanīyañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.11
Pali: Sacāhaṁ, bhante ānanda, paṭiyādeyyaṁ ḍākañca piṭṭhakhādanīyañca, paṭiggaṇheyya me bhagavā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:36.6.12
Pali: “Tena hi, roja, bhagavantaṁ paṭipucchissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.2
Pali: “Tena hānanda, paṭiyādetū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.3
Pali: “Tena hi, roja, paṭiyādehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.4
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo tassā rattiyā accayena pahūtaṁ ḍākañca piṭṭhakhādanīyañca paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato upanāmesi—

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.5
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhātu me, bhante, bhagavā ḍākañca piṭṭhakhādanīyañcā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.6
Pali: “Tena hi, roja, bhikkhūnaṁ dehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.7
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo bhikkhūnaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.8
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā na paṭiggaṇhanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.7.9
Pali: “Paṭiggaṇhatha, bhikkhave, paribhuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.8.1
Pali: Atha kho rojo mallo buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ pahūtehi ḍākehi ca piṭṭhakhādanīyehi ca sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā bhagavantaṁ dhotahatthaṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.8.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho rojaṁ mallaṁ bhagavā dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:36.8.3
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:36.8.4
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbañca ḍākaṁ sabbañca piṭṭhakhādanīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.1.0
Pali: 25. Vuḍḍhapabbajitavatthu 

pli-tv-kd6:37.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā kusinārāyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena ātumā tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro vuḍḍhapabbajito ātumāyaṁ paṭivasati nahāpitapubbo. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.1.3
Pali: Tassa dve dārakā honti, mañjukā paṭibhāneyyakā, dakkhā pariyodātasippā sake ācariyake nahāpitakamme. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.2.1
Pali: Assosi kho so vuḍḍhapabbajito—“bhagavā kira ātumaṁ āgacchati mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.2.2
Pali: Atha kho so vuḍḍhapabbajito te dārake etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:37.2.3
Pali: “bhagavā kira, tātā, ātumaṁ āgacchati mahatā bhikkhusaṅghena saddhiṁ aḍḍhatelasehi bhikkhusatehi. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.2.4
Pali: Gacchatha tumhe, tātā, khurabhaṇḍaṁ ādāya nāḷiyāvāpakena anugharakaṁ anugharakaṁ āhiṇḍatha, loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi saṁharatha, bhagavato āgatassa yāgupānaṁ karissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.3.1
Pali: “Evaṁ, tātā”ti kho te dārakā tassa vuḍḍhapabbajitassa paṭissuṇitvā khurabhaṇḍaṁ ādāya nāḷiyāvāpakena anugharakaṁ anugharakaṁ āhiṇḍanti, loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi saṁharantā. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.3.2
Pali: Manussā te dārake mañjuke paṭibhāneyyake passitvā yepi na kārāpetukāmā tepi kārāpenti, kārāpetvāpi bahuṁ denti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.3.3
Pali: Atha kho te dārakā bahuṁ loṇampi, telampi, taṇḍulampi, khādanīyampi saṁhariṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena ātumā tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.2
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā ātumāyaṁ viharati bhusāgāre. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.3
Pali: Atha kho so vuḍḍhapabbajito tassā rattiyā accayena pahūtaṁ yāguṁ paṭiyādāpetvā bhagavato upanāmesi—

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.4
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhātu me, bhante, bhagavā yāgun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.5
Pali: Jānantāpi tathāgatā pucchanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.6
Pali: sāvakānaṁ vā sikkhāpadaṁ paññapessāmāti. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā taṁ vuḍḍhapabbajitaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.8
Pali: “kutāyaṁ, bhikkhu, yāgū”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:37.4.9
Pali: Atha kho so vuḍḍhapabbajito bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.1
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.2
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.3
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, pabbajito akappiye samādapessasi. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.4
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.5
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.6
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, pabbajitena akappiye samādapetabbaṁ, yo samādapeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.7
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, nahāpitapubbena khurabhaṇḍaṁ pariharitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:37.5.8
Pali: Yo parihareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā ātumāyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena sāvatthi tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena sāvatthi tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyaṁ bahuṁ phalakhādanīyaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.5
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.6
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho bhagavatā phalakhādanīyaṁ anuññātaṁ, kiṁ ananuññātan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:38.1.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sabbaṁ phalakhādanīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:39.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghikāni bījāni puggalikāya bhūmiyā ropiyanti, puggalikāni bījāni saṅghikāya bhūmiyā ropiyanti. 

pli-tv-kd6:39.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:39.1.3
Pali: “Saṅghikāni, bhikkhave, bījāni puggalikāya bhūmiyā ropitāni bhāgaṁ datvā paribhuñjitabbāni. 

pli-tv-kd6:39.1.4
Pali: Puggalikāni bījāni saṅghikāya bhūmiyā ropitāni bhāgaṁ datvā paribhuñjitabbānī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.0
Pali: 26. Catumahāpadesakathā 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūnaṁ kismiñci kismiñci ṭhāne kukkuccaṁ uppajjati—

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.2
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho bhagavatā anuññātaṁ, kiṁ ananuññātan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.4
Pali: “Yaṁ, bhikkhave, mayā ‘idaṁ na kappatī’ti appaṭikkhittaṁ tañce akappiyaṁ anulometi, kappiyaṁ paṭibāhati, taṁ vo na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.5
Pali: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, mayā ‘idaṁ na kappatī’ti appaṭikkhittaṁ tañce kappiyaṁ anulometi, akappiyaṁ paṭibāhati, taṁ vo kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.6
Pali: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, mayā ‘idaṁ kappatī’ti ananuññātaṁ tañce akappiyaṁ anulometi, kappiyaṁ paṭibāhati, taṁ vo na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.1.7
Pali: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, mayā ‘idaṁ kappatī’ti ananuññātaṁ, tañce kappiyaṁ anulometi, akappiyaṁ paṭibāhati, taṁ vo kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.1
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.2
Pali: “kappati nu kho yāvakālikena yāmakālikaṁ, na nu kho kappati? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.3
Pali: Kappati nu kho yāvakālikena sattāhakālikaṁ, na nu kho kappati? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.4
Pali: Kappati nu kho yāvakālikena yāvajīvikaṁ, na nu kho kappati? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.5
Pali: Kappati nu kho yāmakālikena sattāhakālikaṁ, na nu kho kappati? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.6
Pali: Kappati nu kho yāmakālikena yāvajīvikaṁ, na nu kho kappati? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.7
Pali: Kappati nu kho sattāhakālikena yāvajīvikaṁ, na nu kho kappatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd6:40.2.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.1
Pali: “Yāvakālikena, bhikkhave, yāmakālikaṁ, tadahu paṭiggahitaṁ kāle kappati, vikāle na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.2
Pali: Yāvakālikena, bhikkhave, sattāhakālikaṁ, tadahu paṭiggahitaṁ kāle kappati, vikāle na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.3
Pali: Yāvakālikena, bhikkhave, yāvajīvikaṁ, tadahu paṭiggahitaṁ kāle kappati, vikāle na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.4
Pali: Yāmakālikena, bhikkhave, sattāhakālikaṁ, tadahu paṭiggahitaṁ yāme kappati, yāmātikkante na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.5
Pali: Yāmakālikena, bhikkhave, yāvajīvikaṁ, tadahu paṭiggahitaṁ yāme kappati, yāmātikkante na kappati. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.6
Pali: Sattāhakālikena, bhikkhave, yāvajīvikaṁ paṭiggahitaṁ, sattāhaṁ kappati, sattāhātikkante na kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.7
Pali: Bhesajjakkhandhako chaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.8
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.9
Pali: Sāradike vikālepi, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.10
Pali: vasaṁ mūle piṭṭhehi ca; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.11
Pali: Kasāvehi paṇṇaṁ phalaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.12
Pali: jatu loṇaṁ chakaṇañca. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.13
Pali: Cuṇṇaṁ cālini maṁsañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.14
Pali: añjanaṁ upapisanī; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.15
Pali: Añjanī uccāpārutā, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.16
Pali: salākā salākaṭhāniṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.17
Pali: Thavikaṁsabaddhakaṁ suttaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.18
Pali: Muddhanitelanatthu ca; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.19
Pali: Natthukaraṇī dhūmañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.20
Pali: Nettañcāpidhanatthavi. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.21
Pali: Telapākesu majjañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.22
Pali: atikkhittaṁ abbhañjanaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.23
Pali: Tumbaṁ sedaṁ sambhārañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.24
Pali: mahā bhaṅgodakaṁ tathā. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.25
Pali: Dakakoṭṭhaṁ lohitañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.26
Pali: visāṇaṁ pādabbhañjanaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.27
Pali: Pajjaṁ satthaṁ kasāvañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.28
Pali: tilakakkaṁ kabaḷikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.29
Pali: Coḷaṁ sāsapakuṭṭañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.30
Pali: dhūma sakkharikāya ca; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.31
Pali: Vaṇatelaṁ vikāsikaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.32
Pali: vikaṭañca paṭiggahaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.33
Pali: Gūthaṁ karonto loḷiñca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.34
Pali: khāraṁ muttaharītakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.35
Pali: Gandhā virecanañceva, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.36
Pali: acchākaṭaṁ kaṭākaṭaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.37
Pali: Paṭicchādani pabbhārā, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.38
Pali: ārāma sattāhena ca; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.39
Pali: Guḷaṁ muggaṁ sovīrañca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.40
Pali: sāmaṁpākā punāpace. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.41
Pali: Punānuññāsi dubbhikkhe, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.42
Pali: phalañca tilakhādanī; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.43
Pali: Purebhattaṁ kāyaḍāho, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.44
Pali: nibbattañca bhagandalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.45
Pali: Vatthikammañca suppiñca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.46
Pali: manussamaṁsameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.47
Pali: Hatthiassā sunakho ca, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.48
Pali: ahi sīhañca dīpikaṁ.

Pali: Acchataracchamaṁsañca,

Pali: paṭipāṭi ca yāgu ca;

Pali: Taruṇaṁ aññatra guḷaṁ,

Pali: sunidhāvasathāgāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.53
Pali: Gaṅgā koṭisaccakathā, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.54
Pali: ambapālī ca licchavī; 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.55
Pali: Uddissa kataṁ subhikkhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.56
Pali: punadeva paṭikkhipi. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.57
Pali: Megho yaso meṇḍako ca,

Pali: Gorasaṁ pātheyyakena ca;

Pali: Keṇi ambo jambu coca,

Pali: Mocamadhumuddikasālukaṁ.

Pali: Phārusakā ḍākapiṭṭhaṁ,

Pali: ātumāyaṁ nahāpito;

Pali: Sāvatthiyaṁ phalaṁ bījaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.64
Pali: kismiṁ ṭhāne ca kāliketi. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.65
Pali: Imamhi khandhake vatthū ekasataṁ chavatthu. 

pli-tv-kd6:40.3.66
Pali: Bhesajjakkhandhako niṭṭhito.

pli-tv-kd7:0.3
Pali: 7. Kathinakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd7:0.4
Pali: 1. Kathinānujānana 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena tiṁsamattā pāveyyakā bhikkhū, sabbe āraññikā sabbe piṇḍapātikā sabbe paṁsukūlikā sabbe tecīvarikā sāvatthiṁ āgacchantā bhagavantaṁ dassanāya upakaṭṭhāya vassūpanāyikāya nāsakkhiṁsu sāvatthiyaṁ vassūpanāyikaṁ sambhāvetuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.3
Pali: antarāmagge sākete vassaṁ upagacchiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.4
Pali: Te ukkaṇṭhitarūpā vassaṁ vasiṁsu—āsanneva no bhagavā viharati ito chasu yojanesu, na ca mayaṁ labhāma bhagavantaṁ dassanāyāti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū vassaṁvuṭṭhā, temāsaccayena katāya pavāraṇāya, deve vassante, udakasaṅgahe udakacikkhalle okapuṇṇehi cīvarehi kilantarūpā 

pli-tv-kd7:1.1.6
Pali: yena sāvatthi jetavanaṁ anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāmo, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.1
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā te bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.3
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhave, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.4
Pali: kacci samaggā sammodamānā avivadamānā phāsukaṁ vassaṁ vasittha, na ca piṇḍakena kilamitthā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.5
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.6
Pali: samaggā ca mayaṁ, bhante, sammodamānā avivadamānā vassaṁ vasimhā, na ca piṇḍakena kilamimhā. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.7
Pali: Idha mayaṁ, bhante, tiṁsamattā pāveyyakā bhikkhū sāvatthiṁ āgacchantā bhagavantaṁ dassanāya upakaṭṭhāya vassūpanāyikāya nāsakkhimhā sāvatthiyaṁ vassūpanāyikaṁ sambhāvetuṁ, antarāmagge sākete vassaṁ upagacchimhā. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.8
Pali: Te mayaṁ, bhante, ukkaṇṭhitarūpā vassaṁ vasimhā—

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.9
Pali: ‘āsanneva no bhagavā viharati ito chasu yojanesu, na ca mayaṁ labhāma bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.2.10
Pali: Atha kho mayaṁ, bhante, vassaṁvuṭṭhā, temāsaccayena katāya pavāraṇāya, deve vassante, udakasaṅgahe udakacikkhalle okapuṇṇehi cīvarehi kilantarūpā addhānaṁ āgatā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.2
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vassaṁvuṭṭhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kathinaṁ attharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.3
Pali: Atthatakathinānaṁ vo, bhikkhave, pañca kappissanti—

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.4
Pali: anāmantacāro, asamādānacāro, gaṇabhojanaṁ, yāvadatthacīvaraṁ, yo ca tattha cīvaruppādo so nesaṁ bhavissatīti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.5
Pali: Atthatakathinānaṁ vo, bhikkhave, imāni pañca kappissanti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.3.6
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kathinaṁ attharitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.3
Pali: Idaṁ saṅghassa kathinadussaṁ uppannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.4
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho imaṁ kathinadussaṁ itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dadeyya kathinaṁ attharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.5
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.6
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.7
Pali: Idaṁ saṅghassa kathinadussaṁ uppannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.8
Pali: Saṅgho imaṁ kathinadussaṁ itthannāmassa bhikkhuno deti kathinaṁ attharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.9
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati imassa kathinadussassa itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dānaṁ kathinaṁ attharituṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.10
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.11
Pali: Dinnaṁ idaṁ saṅghena kathinadussaṁ itthannāmassa bhikkhuno kathinaṁ attharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.4.12
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.5.1
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, evaṁ anatthataṁ.

Pali: Kathañca pana, bhikkhave, anatthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ?

pli-tv-kd7:1.5.25
Pali: na aññatra puggalassa atthārā atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd7:1.5.26
Pali: sammā ce atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, tañce nissīmaṭṭho anumodati, evampi anatthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.5.27
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, anatthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.6.1
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd7:1.6.2
Pali: Ahatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, ahatakappena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, pilotikāya atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, paṁsukūlena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, pāpaṇikena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, animittakatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, aparikathākatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, akukkukatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, asannidhikatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, anissaggiyena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, kappakatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, saṅghāṭiyā atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, uttarāsaṅgena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, antaravāsakena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, pañcakena vā atirekapañcakena vā tadaheva sañchinnena samaṇḍalīkatena atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, puggalassa atthārā atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ; sammā ce atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ, tañce sīmaṭṭho anumodati, evampi atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.6.3
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, atthataṁ hoti kathinaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:1.7.1
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, ubbhataṁ hoti kathinaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd7:1.7.2
Pali: Aṭṭhimā, bhikkhave, mātikā kathinassa ubbhārāya—

pli-tv-kd7:1.7.3
Pali: pakkamanantikā, niṭṭhānantikā, sanniṭṭhānantikā, nāsanantikā, savanantikā, āsāvacchedikā, sīmātikkantikā, sahubbhārā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.0
Pali: 2. Ādāyasattaka 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino katacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati—“na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.2
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno pakkamanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.4
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.8
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.9
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.10
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.11
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.12
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.1.13
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.3
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti “ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.6
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.7
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.8
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.9
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.10
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.11
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.12
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:2.2.13
Pali: Ādāyasattakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.0
Pali: 3. Samādāyasattaka 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino katacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.2
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno pakkamanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.4
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.8
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.9
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.10
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.11
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.12
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.1.13
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.3
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.6
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.7
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.8
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.9
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati—“paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.10
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.11
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.12
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:3.2.13
Pali: Samādāyasattakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.0
Pali: 4. Ādāyachakka 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.6
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.11
Pali: Tassaṁ taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.12
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.13
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.14
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.15
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti—

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.16
Pali: “ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.17
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.18
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.19
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.20
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.21
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.22
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.23
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.24
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.25
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:4.1.26
Pali: Ādāyachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:5.1.0

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.0
Pali: 6. Ādāyapannarasaka 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.6
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.1.12
Pali: Tikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.6
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.2.12
Pali: Tikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti “paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti “paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.6
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti “paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.3.12
Pali: Tikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro.

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.13
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.14
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.15
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.16
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.17
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.18
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.19
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.20
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.21
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.22
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.23
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:6.4.24
Pali: Chakkaṁ. Ādāyapannarasakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.0
Pali: 7. Samādāyapannarasakādi 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.2
Pali: (Ādāyavārasadisaṁ evaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.) 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ ādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.4
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.7
Pali: (Samādāyavārasadisaṁ evaṁ vitthāretabbaṁ.) 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.8.0
Pali: 8. Vippakatasamādāyapannarasaka 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.8.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.9
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.10
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.13
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.14
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.15
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.16
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.17
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.18
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.19
Pali: Tikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.20
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.21
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.22
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.23
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.24
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti.

Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.26
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.27
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.28
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.29
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.30
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.31
Pali: Tikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.32
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti—“paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti—“na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.33

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.34

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.46
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.47

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.50
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.51
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.52
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.53
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.54
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.55
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.56
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.57
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.58
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.59
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.60
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.61
Pali: So katacīvaro—“paccessaṁ paccessan”ti bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.62
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.63
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino vippakatacīvaraṁ samādāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.64
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.65
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.66
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.67
Pali: Chakkaṁ. Samādāyapannarasakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:7.1.68
Pali: Ādāyabhāṇavāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.0
Pali: 9. Anāsādoḷasaka 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.3
Pali: Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.4
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.8
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.9
Pali: Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.13
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.14
Pali: Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.15
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.16
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.17
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.18
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.19
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.20
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Tassa sā cīvarāsā upacchijjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.1.21
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.3
Pali: Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.4
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.8
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.9
Pali: Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.12

Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati.

Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “na paccessan”ti.

pli-tv-kd7:8.2.21

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti—“paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti—“na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.2

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.7

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.19

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.20

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.21

pli-tv-kd7:8.3.22
Pali: Anāsādoḷasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.0
Pali: 10. Āsādoḷasaka 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.3
Pali: Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.4
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.8
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.9
Pali: Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.13
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.14
Pali: Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.15
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.16
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.17
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.18
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.19
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.20
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Tassa sā cīvarāsā upacchijjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.1.21
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.3
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“yato tasmiṁ āvāse ubbhataṁ kathinaṁ, idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.4
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.5
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.6
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.7
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.8
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.9
Pali: So bahisīmagato suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“yato tasmiṁ āvāse ubbhataṁ kathinaṁ, idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.11
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.12
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.13
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.14
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.15
Pali: So bahisīmagato suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.16
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“yato tasmiṁ āvāse ubbhataṁ kathinaṁ, idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.17
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.18
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.19
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.20
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.21
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.22
Pali: So bahisīmagato suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.23
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“yato tasmiṁ āvāse ubbhataṁ kathinaṁ, idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.24
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Tassa sā cīvarāsā upacchijjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.2.25
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.2
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.3
Pali: So katacīvaro suṇāti—“ubbhataṁ kira tasmiṁ āvāse kathinan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.4
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno savanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.5
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.6
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.7
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Tassa sā cīvarāsā upacchijjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.8
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.9
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.10
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.11
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.12
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—bahiddhā kathinuddhāraṁ vītināmeti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.13
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sīmātikkantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.14
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino cīvarāsāya pakkamati “paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.15
Pali: So bahisīmagato taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Āsāya labhati, anāsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.16
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.17
Pali: So katacīvaro “paccessaṁ paccessan”ti—sambhuṇāti kathinuddhāraṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.18
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno saha bhikkhūhi kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:9.3.19
Pali: Āsādoḷasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.0
Pali: 11. Karaṇīyadoḷasaka 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.2
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa cīvarāsā uppajjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.3
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.4
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.8
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa cīvarāsā uppajjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.9
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“nevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.13
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa cīvarāsā uppajjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.14
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Anāsāya labhati, āsāya na labhati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.15
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvaraṁ kāressaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.16
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. Tassa taṁ cīvaraṁ kayiramānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.17
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno nāsanantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.18
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.19
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa cīvarāsā uppajjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.20
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissaṁ, na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.21

pli-tv-kd7:10.1.22
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.1

Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.7

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.18
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati “na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.19
Pali: Tassa bahisīmagatassa cīvarāsā uppajjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.20
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—“idhevimaṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsissan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.21
Pali: So taṁ cīvarāsaṁ payirupāsati. Tassa sā cīvarāsā upacchijjati. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.2.22
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno āsāvacchediko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.1
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti—“paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti—“na paccessan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.2

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.5
Pali: So taṁ cīvaraṁ kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.6
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno niṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro.

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.11
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno sanniṭṭhānantiko kathinuddhāro. 

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.12
Pali: Bhikkhu atthatakathino kenacideva karaṇīyena pakkamati anadhiṭṭhitena; nevassa hoti—“paccessan”ti, na panassa hoti—“na paccessan”ti.

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.14

pli-tv-kd7:10.3.18
