pli-tv-kd9
Root: root/pli/ms/vinaya/pli-tv-kd/pli-tv-kd9_root-pli-ms.json

Chinese translations: 0

Pali segments

pli-tv-kd9:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka 

pli-tv-kd9:0.2
Pali: Mahāvagga 

pli-tv-kd9:0.3
Pali: 9. Campeyyakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd9:0.4
Pali: 1. Kassapagottabhikkhuvatthu 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā campāyaṁ viharati gaggarāya pokkharaṇiyā tīre. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kāsīsu janapade vāsabhagāmo nāma hoti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.3
Pali: Tattha kassapagotto nāma bhikkhu āvāsiko hoti tantibaddho ussukkaṁ āpanno—

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.4
Pali: “kinti anāgatā ca pesalā bhikkhū āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca pesalā bhikkhū phāsu vihareyyuṁ, ayañca āvāso vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā bhikkhū kāsīsu cārikaṁ caramānā yena vāsabhagāmo tadavasaruṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.6
Pali: Addasā kho kassapagotto bhikkhu te bhikkhū dūratova āgacchante, disvāna āsanaṁ paññapesi, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ pādakathalikaṁ upanikkhipi, paccuggantvā pattacīvaraṁ paṭiggahesi, pānīyena āpucchi, nahāne ussukkaṁ akāsi, ussukkampi akāsi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.7
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.8
Pali: “bhaddako kho ayaṁ, āvuso, āvāsiko bhikkhu nahāne ussukkaṁ karoti, ussukkampi karoti yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.9
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, idheva vāsabhagāme nivāsaṁ kappemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.1.10
Pali: Atha kho te āgantukā bhikkhū tattheva vāsabhagāme nivāsaṁ kappesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.1
Pali: Atha kho kassapagottassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.2
Pali: “yo kho imesaṁ āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ āgantukakilamatho so paṭippassaddho. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.3
Pali: Yepime gocare appakataññuno tedānime gocare pakataññuno. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.4
Pali: Dukkaraṁ kho pana parakulesu yāvajīvaṁ ussukkaṁ kātuṁ, viññatti ca manussānaṁ amanāpā. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.5
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ na ussukkaṁ kareyyaṁ yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.6
Pali: So na ussukkaṁ akāsi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.7
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.8
Pali: “pubbe khvāyaṁ, āvuso, āvāsiko bhikkhu nahāne ussukkaṁ akāsi, ussukkampi akāsi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.9
Pali: Sodānāyaṁ na ussukkaṁ karoti yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.10
Pali: Duṭṭhodānāyaṁ, āvuso, āvāsiko bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.2.11
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, āvāsikaṁ bhikkhuṁ ukkhipāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho te āgantukā bhikkhū sannipatitvā kassapagottaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.2
Pali: “pubbe kho tvaṁ, āvuso, nahāne ussukkaṁ karosi, ussukkampi karosi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.3
Pali: Sodāni tvaṁ na ussukkaṁ karosi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.4
Pali: Āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.5
Pali: Passasetaṁ āpattin”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.6
Pali: “Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.7
Pali: Atha kho te āgantukā bhikkhū kassapagottaṁ bhikkhuṁ āpattiyā adassane ukkhipiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.8
Pali: Atha kho kassapagottassa bhikkhuno etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.9
Pali: “ahaṁ kho etaṁ na jānāmi ‘āpatti vā esā anāpatti vā, āpanno camhi anāpanno vā, ukkhitto camhi anukkhitto vā, dhammikena vā adhammikena vā, kuppena vā akuppena vā, ṭhānārahena vā aṭṭhānārahena vā’. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.3.10
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ campaṁ gantvā bhagavantaṁ etamatthaṁ puccheyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.1
Pali: Atha kho kassapagotto bhikkhu senāsanaṁ saṁsāmetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena campā tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.2
Pali: Anupubbena yena campā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.3
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā kassapagottaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.5
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhu, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.6
Pali: kacci appakilamathena addhānaṁ āgato, 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.7
Pali: kuto ca tvaṁ, bhikkhu, āgacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.8
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd9:1.4.9
Pali: appakilamathena cāhaṁ, bhante, addhānaṁ āgato. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.1
Pali: Atthi, bhante, kāsīsu janapade vāsabhagāmo nāma. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.2
Pali: Tatthāhaṁ, bhagavā, āvāsiko tantibaddho ussukkaṁ āpanno—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.3
Pali: ‘kinti anāgatā ca pesalā bhikkhū āgaccheyyuṁ, āgatā ca pesalā bhikkhū phāsu vihareyyuṁ, ayañca āvāso vuddhiṁ viruḷhiṁ vepullaṁ āpajjeyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.4
Pali: Atha kho, bhante, sambahulā bhikkhū kāsīsu cārikaṁ caramānā yena vāsabhagāmo tadavasaruṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.5
Pali: Addasaṁ kho ahaṁ, bhante, te bhikkhū dūratova āgacchante, disvāna āsanaṁ paññapesiṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ pādakathalikaṁ upanikkhipiṁ, paccuggantvā pattacīvaraṁ paṭiggahesiṁ, pānīyena apucchiṁ, nahāne ussukkaṁ akāsiṁ, ussukkampi akāsiṁ yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.6
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ, bhante, āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.7
Pali: ‘bhaddako kho ayaṁ āvuso āvāsiko bhikkhu nahāne ussukkaṁ karoti, ussukkampi karoti yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.8
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, idheva vāsabhagāme nivāsaṁ kappemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.9
Pali: Atha kho te, bhante, āgantukā bhikkhū tattheva vāsabhagāme nivāsaṁ kappesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.10
Pali: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhante, etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.11
Pali: ‘yo kho imesaṁ āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ āgantukakilamatho so paṭippassaddho. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.12
Pali: Yepime gocare appakataññuno tedānime gocare pakataññuno. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.13
Pali: Dukkaraṁ kho pana parakulesu yāvajīvaṁ ussukkaṁ kātuṁ, viññatti ca manussānaṁ amanāpā. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.14
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ na ussukkaṁ kareyyaṁ yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.15
Pali: So kho ahaṁ, bhante, na ussukkaṁ akāsiṁ yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.16
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ, bhante, āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.17
Pali: ‘pubbe khvāyaṁ, āvuso, āvāsiko bhikkhu nahāne ussukkaṁ karoti, ussukkampi karoti yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.18
Pali: Sodānāyaṁ na ussukkaṁ karoti yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.19
Pali: Duṭṭhodānāyaṁ, āvuso, āvāsiko bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.20
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, āvāsikaṁ bhikkhuṁ ukkhipāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.21
Pali: Atha kho te, bhante, āgantukā bhikkhū sannipatitvā maṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.22
Pali: ‘pubbe kho tvaṁ, āvuso, nahāne ussukkaṁ karosi, ussukkampi karosi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.23
Pali: Sodāni tvaṁ na ussukkaṁ karosi yāguyā khādanīye bhattasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.24
Pali: Āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.25
Pali: Passasetaṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.26
Pali: ‘Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti yamahaṁ passeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.27
Pali: Atha kho te, bhante, āgantukā bhikkhū maṁ āpattiyā adassane ukkhipiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.28
Pali: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhante, etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.29
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho etaṁ na jānāmi “āpatti vā esā anāpatti vā, āpanno camhi anāpanno vā, ukkhitto camhi anukkhitto vā, dhammikena vā adhammikena vā, kuppena vā akuppena vā, ṭhānārahena vā aṭṭhānārahena vā”. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.30
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ campaṁ gantvā bhagavantaṁ etamatthaṁ puccheyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.5.31
Pali: Tato ahaṁ, bhagavā, āgacchāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.1
Pali: “Anāpatti esā, bhikkhu, nesā āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.2
Pali: Anāpannosi, nasi āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.3
Pali: Anukkhittosi, nasi ukkhitto. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.4
Pali: Adhammikenāsi kammena ukkhitto kuppena aṭṭhānārahena. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.5
Pali: Gaccha tvaṁ, bhikkhu, tattheva vāsabhagāme nivāsaṁ kappehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.6.6
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho kassapagotto bhikkhu bhagavato paṭissuṇitvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā yena vāsabhagāmo tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.1
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ āgantukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ahudeva kukkuccaṁ, ahu vippaṭisāro—

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.2
Pali: “alābhā vata no, na vata no lābhā; 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.3
Pali: dulladdhaṁ vata no, na vata no suladdhaṁ, ye mayaṁ suddhaṁ bhikkhuṁ anāpattikaṁ avatthusmiṁ akāraṇe ukkhipimhā. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.4
Pali: Handa mayaṁ, āvuso, campaṁ gantvā bhagavato santike accayaṁ accayato desemā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.5
Pali: Atha kho te āgantukā bhikkhū senāsanaṁ saṁsāmetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena campā tena pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.6
Pali: Anupubbena yena campā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.7
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.8
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā te bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.9
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhave, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.10
Pali: kaccittha appakilamathena addhānaṁ āgatā, 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.11
Pali: kuto ca tumhe, bhikkhave, āgacchathā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.12
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.13
Pali: appakilamathena ca mayaṁ, bhante, addhānaṁ āgatā. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.14
Pali: Atthi, bhante, kāsīsu janapade vāsabhagāmo nāma. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.7.15
Pali: Tato mayaṁ, bhagavā, āgacchāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.1
Pali: “Tumhe, bhikkhave, āvāsikaṁ bhikkhuṁ ukkhipitthā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.2
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.3
Pali: “Kismiṁ, bhikkhave, vatthusmiṁ kāraṇe”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.4
Pali: “Avatthusmiṁ, bhagavā, akāraṇe”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.5
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.6
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisā, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.7
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tumhe, moghapurisā, suddhaṁ bhikkhuṁ anāpattikaṁ avatthusmiṁ akāraṇe ukkhipissatha. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.8
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisā, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.9
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.10
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, suddho bhikkhu anāpattiko avatthusmiṁ akāraṇe ukkhipitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.8.11
Pali: Yo ukkhipeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.1
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū uṭṭhāyāsanā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhagavato pādesu sirasā nipatitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.2
Pali: “accayo no, bhante, accagamā yathābāle yathāmūḷhe yathāakusale, ye mayaṁ suddhaṁ bhikkhuṁ anāpattikaṁ avatthusmiṁ akāraṇe ukkhipimhā. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.3
Pali: Tesaṁ no, bhante, bhagavā accayaṁ accayato paṭiggaṇhātu āyatiṁ saṁvarāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.4
Pali: “Taggha tumhe, bhikkhave, accayo accagamā yathābāle yathāmūḷhe yathāakusale, ye tumhe suddhaṁ bhikkhuṁ anāpattikaṁ avatthusmiṁ akāraṇe ukkhipittha. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.5
Pali: Yato ca kho tumhe, bhikkhave, accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikarotha, taṁ vo mayaṁ paṭiggaṇhāma. 

pli-tv-kd9:1.9.6
Pali: Vuddhihesā, bhikkhave, ariyassa vinaye yo accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikaroti, āyatiṁ saṁvaraṁ āpajjatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.0
Pali: 2. Adhammenavaggādikammakathā 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena campāyaṁ bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.2
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti, adhammena samaggakammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.3
Pali: dhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.4
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.5
Pali: ekopi ekaṁ ukkhipati, ekopi dve ukkhipati, ekopi sambahule ukkhipati, ekopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipati; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.6
Pali: dvepi ekaṁ ukkhipanti, dvepi dve ukkhipanti, dvepi sambahule ukkhipanti, dvepi saṅghaṁ ukkhipanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.7
Pali: sambahulāpi ekaṁ ukkhipanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.8
Pali: sambahulāpi dve ukkhipanti, sambahulāpi sambahule ukkhipanti, sambahulāpi saṅghaṁ ukkhipanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.1.9
Pali: saṅghopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipati. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.1
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.2
Pali: “kathañhi nāma campāyaṁ bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.3
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, adhammena samaggakammaṁ karissanti, dhammena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ karissanti, ekopi ekaṁ ukkhipissati, ekopi dve ukkhipissati, ekopi sambahule ukkhipissati, ekopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipissati, dvepi ekaṁ ukkhipissanti, dvepi dve ukkhipissanti, dvepi sambahule ukkhipissanti, dvepi saṅghaṁ ukkhipissanti, sambahulāpi ekaṁ ukkhipissanti, sambahulāpi dve ukkhipissanti, sambahulāpi sambahule ukkhipissanti, sambahulāpi saṅghaṁ ukkhipissanti, saṅghopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, campāyaṁ bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.6
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.7
Pali: saṅghopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, bhikkhave, tesaṁ moghapurisānaṁ ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.11
Pali: Kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā evarūpāni kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.12
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karissanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.13
Pali: saṅghopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipissati. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.14
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.15
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:2.2.16
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.1
Pali: “Adhammena ce, bhikkhave, vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.2
Pali: adhammena samaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.3
Pali: dhammena vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.4
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.5
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.6
Pali: ekopi ekaṁ ukkhipati akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.7
Pali: ekopi dve ukkhipati akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.8
Pali: ekopi sambahule ukkhipati akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.9
Pali: ekopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipati akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ;, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.10
Pali: dvepi ekaṁ ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.11
Pali: dvepi dve ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.12
Pali: dvepi sambahule ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.13
Pali: dvepi saṅghaṁ ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ;, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.14
Pali: sambahulāpi ekaṁ ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.15
Pali: sambahulāpi dve ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.16
Pali: sambahulāpi sambahule ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.17
Pali: sambahulāpi saṅghaṁ ukkhipanti akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ;, 

pli-tv-kd9:2.3.18
Pali: saṅghopi saṅghaṁ ukkhipati akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.1
Pali: Cattārimāni, bhikkhave, kammāni—

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.2
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.3
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yadidaṁ adhammena vaggakammaṁ, idaṁ, bhikkhave, kammaṁ adhammattā vaggattā kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.4
Pali: na, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ kammaṁ kātabbaṁ, na ca mayā evarūpaṁ kammaṁ anuññātaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.5
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yadidaṁ adhammena samaggakammaṁ, idaṁ, bhikkhave, kammaṁ adhammattā kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.6
Pali: na, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ kammaṁ kātabbaṁ, na ca mayā evarūpaṁ kammaṁ anuññātaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.7
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yadidaṁ dhammena vaggakammaṁ, idaṁ, bhikkhave, kammaṁ vaggattā kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.8
Pali: na, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ kammaṁ kātabbaṁ, na ca mayā evarūpaṁ kammaṁ anuññātaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.9
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yadidaṁ dhammena samaggakammaṁ, idaṁ, bhikkhave, kammaṁ dhammattā samaggattā akuppaṁ ṭhānārahaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.10
Pali: evarūpaṁ, bhikkhave, kammaṁ kātabbaṁ, evarūpañca mayā kammaṁ anuññātaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.11
Pali: Tasmātiha, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ kammaṁ karissāma yadidaṁ dhammena samagganti—

pli-tv-kd9:2.4.12
Pali: evañhi vo, bhikkhave, sikkhitabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.0
Pali: 3. Ñattivipannakammādikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.2
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti, adhammena samaggakammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.3
Pali: dhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ karonti, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.4
Pali: ñattivipannampi kammaṁ karonti anussāvanasampannaṁ, anussāvanavipannampi kammaṁ karonti ñattisampannaṁ, ñattivipannampi anussāvanavipannampi kammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.5
Pali: aññatrāpi dhammā kammaṁ karonti, aññatrāpi vinayā kammaṁ karonti, aññatrāpi satthusāsanā kammaṁ karonti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.6
Pali: paṭikuṭṭhakatampi kammaṁ karonti adhammikaṁ kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.9
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, adhammena samaggakammaṁ karissanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.10
Pali: dhammena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ karissanti, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ karissanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.11
Pali: ñattivipannampi kammaṁ karissanti anussāvanasampannaṁ, anussāvanavipannampi kammaṁ karissanti ñattisampannaṁ, ñattivipannampi anussāvanavipannampi kammaṁ karissanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.12
Pali: aññatrāpi dhammā kammaṁ karissanti, aññatrāpi vinayā kammaṁ karissanti, aññatrāpi satthusāsanā kammaṁ karissanti; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.13
Pali: paṭikuṭṭhakatampi kammaṁ karissanti adhammikaṁ kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.14
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.15
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū evarūpāni kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.16
Pali: adhammena vaggakammaṁ karonti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.17
Pali: paṭikuṭṭhakatampi kammaṁ karonti adhammikaṁ kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.18
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.19
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:3.1.20
Pali: vigarahitvā dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.1
Pali: “Adhammena ce, bhikkhave, vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.2
Pali: adhammena samaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.3
Pali: dhammena vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.4
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.5
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.6
Pali: Ñattivipannañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ anussāvanasampannaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.7
Pali: anussāvanavipannañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ ñattisampannaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.8
Pali: ñattivipannañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ anussāvanavipannaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.9
Pali: aññatrāpi dhammā kammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.10
Pali: aññatrāpi vinayā kammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.11
Pali: aññatrāpi satthusāsanā kammaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:3.2.12
Pali: paṭikuṭṭhakatañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ adhammikaṁ kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahaṁ akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.1
Pali: Chayimāni, bhikkhave, kammāni—

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.2
Pali: adhammakammaṁ, vaggakammaṁ, samaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.3
Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, adhammakammaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.4
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme ekāya ñattiyā kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.5
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme dvīhi ñattīhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.6
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme ekāya kammavācāya kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.3.7
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme dvīhi kammavācāhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.1
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme ekāya ñattiyā kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.2
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.3
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme dvīhi ñattīhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.4
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme tīhi ñattīhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.5
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme catūhi ñattīhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca kammavācaṁ anussāveti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.6
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme ekāya kammavācāya kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.7
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme dvīhi kammavācāhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.8
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme tīhi kammavācāhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.9
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme catūhi kammavācāhi kammaṁ karoti, na ca ñattiṁ ṭhapeti—adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.4.10
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.1
Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, vaggakammaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.2
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te anāgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.3
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.4
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.5
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te anāgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.6
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.7
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.5.8
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.6.1
Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, samaggakammaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.6.2
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā, te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.6.3
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā, te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.6.4
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.1
Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.2
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ kammavācaṁ anussāveti, pacchā ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te anāgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.3
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ kammavācaṁ anussāveti, pacchā ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.4
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ kammavācaṁ anussāveti, pacchā ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.5
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ kammavācaṁ anussāveti, pacchā ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te anāgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando anāhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ.

pli-tv-kd9:3.7.7
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ kammavācaṁ anussāveti, pacchā ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā paṭikkosanti—dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ.

Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ?

pli-tv-kd9:3.8.3

pli-tv-kd9:3.8.4
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.9.1
Pali: Katamañca, bhikkhave, dhammena samaggakammaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:3.9.2
Pali: Ñattidutiye ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, pacchā ekāya kammavācāya kammaṁ karoti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—dhammena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.9.3
Pali: Ñatticatutthe ce, bhikkhave, kamme paṭhamaṁ ñattiṁ ṭhapeti, pacchā tīhi kammavācāhi kammaṁ karoti, yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā, te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti, dhammena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:3.9.4
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, dhammena samaggakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.0
Pali: 4. Catuvaggakaraṇādikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.1
Pali: Pañca saṅghā—

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.2
Pali: catuvaggo bhikkhusaṅgho pañcavaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, dasavaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, vīsativaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, atirekavīsativaggo bhikkhusaṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.3
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṁ catuvaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, ṭhapetvā tīṇi kammāni—

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.4
Pali: upasampadaṁ pavāraṇaṁ abbhānaṁ, dhammena samaggo sabbakammesu kammappatto. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.5
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṁ pañcavaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, ṭhapetvā dve kammāni—

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.6
Pali: majjhimesu janapadesu upasampadaṁ abbhānaṁ, dhammena samaggo sabbakammesu kammappatto. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.7
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṁ dasavaggo bhikkhusaṅgho, ṭhapetvā ekaṁ kammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.8
Pali: abbhānaṁ, dhammena samaggo sabbakammesu kammappatto. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.9
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṁ vīsativaggo bhikkhusaṅgho dhammena samaggo sabbakammesu kammappatto. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.1.10
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, yvāyaṁ atirekavīsativaggo bhikkhusaṅgho dhammena samaggo sabbakammesu kammappatto. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.1
Pali: Catuvaggakaraṇañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ bhikkhunicatuttho kammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.2
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.3
Pali: Catuvaggakaraṇañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ sikkhamānacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.4
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.5
Pali: Sāmaṇeracatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.6
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.7
Pali: Sāmaṇericatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.8
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.9
Pali: Sikkhaṁ paccakkhātakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.10
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.11
Pali: Antimavatthuṁ ajjhāpannakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.12
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.13
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhittakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.14
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.15
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.16
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.17
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.18
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.19
Pali: Paṇḍakacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya …

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.44
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.45
Pali: Iddhiyā vehāse ṭhitacatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.46
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.47
Pali: Yassa saṅgho kammaṁ karoti, taṁcatuttho kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.2.48
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.3.1
Pali: Catuvaggakaraṇaṁ.

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.1
Pali: Pañcavaggakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.2
Pali: Dasavaggakaraṇañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ bhikkhunidasamo kammaṁ kareyya, akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.3
Pali: Dasavaggakaraṇañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ sikkhamānadasamo kammaṁ kareyya, akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.4
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.5
Pali: Dasavaggakaraṇañce, bhikkhave, kammaṁ yassa saṅgho kammaṁ karoti, taṁdasamo kammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.4.6
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.5.1

Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ.

Pali: nānāsaṁvāsakavīso kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.5.24
Pali: nānāsīmāya ṭhitavīso kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.5.25
Pali: iddhiyā vehāse ṭhitavīso kammaṁ kareyya … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.5.26
Pali: yassa saṅgho kammaṁ karoti, taṁvīso kammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.5.27
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.1
Pali: Vīsativaggakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.2.0
Pali: 5. Pārivāsikādikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.2.1
Pali: Pārivāsikacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, mūlāya paṭikasseyya, mānattaṁ dadeyya, taṁvīso abbheyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.3
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.4
Pali: Mūlāyapaṭikassanārahacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, mūlāya paṭikasseyya, mānattaṁ dadeyya, taṁvīso abbheyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.5
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.6
Pali: Mānattārahacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, mūlāya paṭikasseyya, mānattaṁ dadeyya, taṁvīso abbheyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.7
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.8
Pali: Mānattacārikacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, mūlāya paṭikasseyya, mānattaṁ dadeyya, taṁvīso abbheyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.9
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.10
Pali: Abbhānārahacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, mūlāya paṭikasseyya, mānattaṁ dadeyya, taṁvīso abbheyya—

pli-tv-kd9:4.6.11
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.1
Pali: Ekaccassa, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā ruhati, ekaccassa na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.2
Pali: Kassa ca, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā na ruhati? 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.3
Pali: Bhikkhuniyā, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.4
Pali: Sikkhamānāya, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.5
Pali: sāmaṇerassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.6
Pali: sāmaṇeriyā, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.7
Pali: sikkhāpaccakkhātakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.8
Pali: antimavatthuṁ ajjhāpannakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.9
Pali: ummattakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.10
Pali: khittacittassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.11
Pali: vedanāṭṭassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.12
Pali: āpattiyā adassane ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.13
Pali: āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.14
Pali: pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.15
Pali: paṇḍakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.16
Pali: theyyasaṁvāsakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.17
Pali: titthiyapakkantakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.18
Pali: tiracchānagatassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.19
Pali: mātughātakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.20
Pali: pitughātakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.21
Pali: arahantaghātakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.22
Pali: bhikkhunidūsakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.23
Pali: saṅghabhedakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.24
Pali: lohituppādakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.25
Pali: ubhatobyañjanakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.26
Pali: nānāsaṁvāsakassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.27
Pali: nānāsīmāya ṭhitassa, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.28
Pali: iddhiyā vehāse ṭhitassa, bhikkhave, yassa saṅgho kammaṁ karoti, tassa ca, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.7.29
Pali: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.8.1
Pali: Kassa ca, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā ruhati? 

pli-tv-kd9:4.8.2
Pali: Bhikkhussa, bhikkhave, pakatattassa samānasaṁvāsakassa samānasīmāya ṭhitassa antamaso ānantarikassāpi bhikkhuno viññāpentassa saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.8.3
Pali: Imassa, bhikkhave, saṅghamajjhe paṭikkosanā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.0
Pali: 6. Dvenissāraṇādikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.1
Pali: Dvemā, bhikkhave, nissāraṇā. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.2
Pali: Atthi, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto nissāraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.3
Pali: Tañce saṅgho nissāreti, ekacco sunissārito, ekacco dunnissārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.4
Pali: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto nissāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho nissāreti—dunnissārito? 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.5
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu suddho hoti anāpattiko. Tañce saṅgho nissāreti—dunnissārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.6
Pali: Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto nissāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho nissāreti—dunnissārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.7
Pali: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto nissāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho nissāreti—sunissārito? 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi, tañce saṅgho nissāreti—sunissārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.9.9
Pali: Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto nissāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho nissāreti—sunissārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.1
Pali: Dvemā, bhikkhave, osāraṇā. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.2
Pali: Atthi, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto osāraṇaṁ tañce saṅgho osāreti, ekacco sosārito, ekacco dosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.3
Pali: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—dosārito? 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.4
Pali: Paṇḍako, bhikkhave, appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—dosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.5
Pali: Theyyasaṁvāsako, bhikkhave, appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—dosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.6
Pali: Titthiyapakkantako, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.7
Pali: tiracchānagato, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.8
Pali: mātughātako, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.9
Pali: pitughātako, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.10
Pali: arahantaghātako, bhikkhave …

Pali: bhikkhunidūsako, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.12
Pali: saṅghabhedako, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.13
Pali: lohituppādako, bhikkhave … 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.14
Pali: ubhatobyañjanako, bhikkhave, appatto, osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—dosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.15
Pali: Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—dosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.10.16
Pali: Ime vuccanti, bhikkhave, puggalā appattā osāraṇaṁ, te ce saṅgho osāreti—dosāritā. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.11.1
Pali: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—sosārito?

Pali: Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, puggalo appatto osāraṇaṁ, tañce saṅgho osāreti—sosārito. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.11.35
Pali: Ime vuccanti, bhikkhave, puggalā appattā osāraṇaṁ, te ce saṅgho osāreti—sosāritā. 

pli-tv-kd9:4.11.36
Pali: Vāsabhagāmabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito paṭhamo. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.0
Pali: 7. Adhammakammādikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.4
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.5
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.6
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho āpattiyā adassane ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.7
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.9
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.10
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, paṭikarohi taṁ āpattin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.11
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.12
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ paṭikareyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.13
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.14
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.15
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.16
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.17
Pali: ‘pāpikā te, āvuso, diṭṭhi, paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.18
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.19
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, pāpikā diṭṭhi, yamahaṁ paṭinissajjeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.20
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.1.21
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, na hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.4
Pali: Paṭikarohi taṁ āpattin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.5
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.6
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.7
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ paṭikareyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.8
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho adassane vā appaṭikamme vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.2.9
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, na hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.4
Pali: Pāpikā te diṭṭhi, paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.5
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.6
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.7
Pali: natthi me, āvuso, pāpikā diṭṭhi, yamahaṁ paṭinissajjeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.8
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho adassane vā appaṭinissagge vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.3.9
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā, na hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, paṭikarohi taṁ āpattiṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.4
Pali: pāpikā te diṭṭhi, paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.5
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.6
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ paṭikareyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.7
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, pāpikā diṭṭhi, yamahaṁ paṭinissajjeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.8
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho appaṭikamme vā appaṭinissagge vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.4.9
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa na hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, na hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā, na hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.4
Pali: Paṭikarohi taṁ āpattiṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.5
Pali: pāpikā te diṭṭhi, paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.7
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.8
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ paṭikareyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.9
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, pāpikā diṭṭhi, yamahaṁ paṭinissajjeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.10
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho adassane vā appaṭikamme vā appaṭinissagge vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.5.11
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.4
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.5
Pali: ‘āmāvuso, passāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.6
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho āpattiyā adassane ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.7
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.9
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.10
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, paṭikarohi taṁ āpattin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.11
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.12
Pali: ‘āmāvuso, paṭikarissāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.13
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.14
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.15
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.16
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.17
Pali: ‘pāpikā te, āvuso, diṭṭhi; 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.18
Pali: paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.19
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.20
Pali: ‘āmāvuso, paṭinissajjissāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.21
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.6.22
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.2
Pali: hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.3
Pali: hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā, hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.4
Pali: hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā, hoti pāpikā diṭṭhi paṭinissajjetā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.5
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.6
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.7
Pali: Paṭikarohi taṁ āpattiṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.8
Pali: pāpikā te diṭṭhi, paṭinissajjetaṁ pāpikaṁ diṭṭhin’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.9
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.10
Pali: ‘āmāvuso, passāmi, āma paṭikarissāmi, āma paṭinissajjissāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.11
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho adassane vā appaṭikamme vā appaṭinissagge vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.7.12
Pali: adhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.2
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā sambahulā vā ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.3
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.4
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.5
Pali: ‘natthi me, āvuso, āpatti, yamahaṁ passeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.6
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho āpattiyā adassane ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.7

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.19

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.20
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.8.21
Pali: dhammakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhussa hoti āpatti daṭṭhabbā, hoti āpatti paṭikātabbā …pe…

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.10

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.11
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti yamahaṁ paṭikareyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.12
Pali: Natthi me, āvuso, pāpikā diṭṭhi, yamahaṁ paṭinissajjeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.13
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho adassane vā appaṭikamme vā appaṭinissagge vā ukkhipati—

pli-tv-kd9:5.9.14
Pali: dhammakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.1.0
Pali: 8. Upālipucchākathā 

pli-tv-kd9:6.1.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā upāli yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.1.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā upāli bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd9:6.1.3
Pali: “yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho sammukhākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ asammukhā karoti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.1.4
Pali: “Adhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, avinayakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.1
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho paṭipucchākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ appaṭipucchā karoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.2
Pali: paṭiññāyakaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ appaṭiññāya karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.3
Pali: sativinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.4
Pali: amūḷhavinayārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.5
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.6
Pali: tajjanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.7
Pali: niyassakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.8
Pali: pabbājanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.9
Pali: paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.10
Pali: ukkhepanīyakammārahassa parivāsaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.11
Pali: parivāsārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.12
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa mānattaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.13
Pali: mānattārahaṁ abbheti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.2.14
Pali: abbhānārahaṁ upasampādeti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.1
Pali: “Adhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, avinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.2
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho sammukhākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ asammukhā karoti, evaṁ kho, upāli, adhammakammaṁ hoti avinayakammaṁ, evañca pana saṅgho sātisāro hoti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.3
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho paṭipucchākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ appaṭipucchā karoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.4
Pali: paṭiññāyakaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ appaṭiññāya karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.5
Pali: sativinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.6
Pali: amūḷhavinayārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.7
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.8
Pali: tajjanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.9
Pali: niyassakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.10
Pali: pabbājanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.11
Pali: paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.12
Pali: ukkhepanīyakammārahassa parivāsaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.13
Pali: parivāsārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.14
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa mānattaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.15
Pali: mānattārahaṁ abbheti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.16
Pali: abbhānārahaṁ upasampādeti, evaṁ kho, upāli, adhammakammaṁ hoti avinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.3.17
Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho sātisāro hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.1
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho sammukhākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ sammukhā karoti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.2

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.12

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.17
Pali: upasampadārahaṁ upasampādeti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.18
Pali: “Dhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, vinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.19
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho sammukhākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ sammukhā karoti, evaṁ kho, upāli, dhammakammaṁ hoti vinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.20
Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho anatisāro hoti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.21
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho paṭipucchākaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ paṭipucchā karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.22
Pali: paṭiññāyakaraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ paṭiññāya karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.23
Pali: sativinayārahassa sativinayaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.24
Pali: amūḷhavinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.25
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.26
Pali: tajjanīyakammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.27
Pali: niyassakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.28
Pali: pabbājanīyakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti …

pli-tv-kd9:6.4.36
Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho anatisāro hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.1
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho sativinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti, amūḷhavinayārahassa sativinayaṁ deti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.2
Pali: “Adhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, avinayakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.3
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinayārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti, tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.4
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti, tajjanīyakammārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.5
Pali: tajjanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti, niyassakammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.6
Pali: niyassakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti, pabbājanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.7
Pali: pabbājanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti, paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.8
Pali: paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti, ukkhepanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.9
Pali: ukkhepanīyakammārahassa parivāsaṁ deti, parivāsārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.10
Pali: parivāsārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa parivāsaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.11
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa mānattaṁ deti, mānattārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.12
Pali: mānattārahaṁ abbheti, abbhānārahassa mānattaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.5.13
Pali: abbhānārahaṁ upasampādeti, upasampadārahaṁ abbheti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.1
Pali: “Adhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, avinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.2
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho sativinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti, amūḷhavinayārahassa sativinayaṁ deti, evaṁ kho, upāli, adhammakammaṁ hoti avinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.3
Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho sātisāro hoti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.4
Pali: Yo kho, upāli, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinayārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti, tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.5
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti, tajjanīyakammārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.6
Pali: tajjanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti, niyassakammārahassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.7
Pali: niyassakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti, pabbājanīyakammārahassa niyassakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.8
Pali: pabbājanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti, paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.9
Pali: paṭisāraṇīyakammārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti, ukkhepanīyakammārahassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.10
Pali: ukkhepanīyakammārahassa parivāsaṁ deti, parivāsārahassa ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.11
Pali: parivāsārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa parivāsaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.12
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahassa mānattaṁ deti, mānattārahaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati—

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.13
Pali: mānattārahaṁ abbheti, abbhānārahassa mānattaṁ deti … 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.14
Pali: abbhānārahaṁ upasampādeti, upasampadārahaṁ abbheti, evaṁ kho, upāli, adhammakammaṁ hoti avinayakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.6.15
Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho sātisāro hotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.7.1
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho sativinayārahassa sativinayaṁ deti, amūḷhavinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti, dhammakammaṁ nu kho taṁ, bhante, vinayakamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd9:6.7.2
Pali: “Dhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, vinayakamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:6.7.3
Pali: “Yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinayārahassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.7.4
Pali: tassapāpiyasikākammārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:6.7.5

Pali: “Dhammakammaṁ taṁ, upāli, vinayakammaṁ.

Pali: Evañca pana saṅgho anatisāro hotī”ti.

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.0
Pali: 9. Tajjanīyakammakathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.1
Pali: “Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.2
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.3
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu bhaṇḍanakārako kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.4
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.5
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.6
Pali: adhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.7
Pali: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.8
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.9
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato adhammena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.10
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.11
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.12
Pali: adhammena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.13
Pali: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.14
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.15
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato adhammena samaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.16
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.17
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.18
Pali: dhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.19
Pali: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.20
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.21
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato dhammena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.22
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.23
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.24
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.25
Pali: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.26
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.27
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato dhammapatirūpakena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.28
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.29
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.1.30
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā.

Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.3.27
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato adhammena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.3.28
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.3.29
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.3.30
Pali: adhammena samaggā.

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.0
Pali: 16. Tajjanīyakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.2
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.3
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena tajjanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.4
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.5
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.6
Pali: adhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.7
Pali: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.8
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.9
Pali: ‘imassa kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassaddhaṁ adhammena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.10
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.11
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.12
Pali: adhammena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.13
Pali: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.14
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.15
Pali: ‘imassa kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassaddhaṁ adhammena samaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.16
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.17

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.18
Pali: dhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.12.19
Pali: So tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.0
Pali: 17. Niyassakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.2
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.3
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.4
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.5
Pali: Te tassa niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.6
Pali: adhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.7
Pali: So tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.8
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.9
Pali: ‘imassa kho, āvuso, bhikkhuno saṅghena niyassakammaṁ paṭippassaddhaṁ adhammena vaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.10
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.11
Pali: Te tassa niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.12
Pali: adhammena samaggā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.13
Pali: dhammena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.14
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.15
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.16
Pali: Cakkaṁ kātabbaṁ.

Pali: 19. Paṭisāraṇīyakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.33.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.34

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.35
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.37
Pali: Te tassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.38
Pali: adhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.14.39

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.0
Pali: 23. Tajjanīyakammavivādakathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.2
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.3
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu bhaṇḍanakārako …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.4
Pali: saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.5
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.6
Pali: Te tassa tajjanīyakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.7
Pali: adhammena vaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.8
Pali: Tatraṭṭho saṅgho vivadati—

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.9
Pali: ‘adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.10
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, ye te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.11
Pali: ‘adhammena vaggakamman’ti, ye ca te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.15.12
Pali: ‘akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti, ime tattha bhikkhū dhammavādino.

Pali: 24. Niyassakammavivādakathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno, gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.2
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.3

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.4
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ niyassakammaṁ karomā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.5
Pali: Te tassa niyassakammaṁ karonti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.6
Pali: adhammena vaggā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.7
Pali: adhammena samaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.8
Pali: dhammena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.9

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.10
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.11
Pali: Tatraṭṭho saṅgho vivadati—

pli-tv-kd9:7.17.12
Pali: ‘adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti.

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.17.0
Pali: 32. Pabbājanīyakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.17.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.18
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.19
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.20
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.21
Pali: Te tassa pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.22
Pali: adhammena vaggā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.23
Pali: adhammena samaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.24
Pali: dhammena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.25
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.26
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.27
Pali: Tatraṭṭho saṅgho vivadati—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.28
Pali: ‘adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.29
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, ye te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.30
Pali: ‘dhammapatirūpakena samaggakamman’ti, ye ca te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.31
Pali: ‘akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti, ime tattha bhikkhū dhammavādino. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.32
Pali: Imepi pañca vārā saṅkhittā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.33.0
Pali: 33. Paṭisāraṇīyakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.33.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.34
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.35
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.36
Pali: Handassa mayaṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.37
Pali: Te tassa paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.38
Pali: adhammena vaggā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.39
Pali: adhammena samaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.40
Pali: dhammena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.41
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.42
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.43
Pali: Tatraṭṭho saṅgho vivadati—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.44
Pali: ‘adhammena vaggakammaṁ, adhammena samaggakammaṁ, dhammena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena vaggakammaṁ, dhammapatirūpakena samaggakammaṁ, akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.45
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, ye te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.46
Pali: ‘dhammapatirūpakena samaggakamman’ti, ye ca te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.47
Pali: ‘akataṁ kammaṁ dukkaṭaṁ kammaṁ puna kātabbaṁ kamman’ti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.48
Pali: Ime tattha bhikkhū dhammavādino. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.49
Pali: Imepi pañca vārā saṅkhittā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.50.0
Pali: 34. Adassaneukkhepanīyakammapaṭippassaddhikathā 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.50.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.51

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.52
Pali: ‘ayaṁ kho, āvuso, bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.53

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.54
Pali: Te tassa āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhenti—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.55
Pali: adhammena vaggā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.56
Pali: adhammena samaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.57
Pali: dhammena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.58
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena vaggā … 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.59
Pali: dhammapatirūpakena samaggā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.60
Pali: Tatraṭṭho saṅgho vivadati—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.61

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.62
Pali: Tatra, bhikkhave, ye te bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.65
Pali: Imepi pañca vārā saṅkhittā.

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.82.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati.

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.86

Pali: Imepi pañca vārā saṅkhittā”. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.98
Pali: Campeyyakkhandhako navamo. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.99
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.100
Pali: Campāyaṁ bhagavā āsi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.101
Pali: vatthu vāsabhagāmake; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.102
Pali: Āgantukānamussukkaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.103
Pali: akāsi icchitabbake. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.104
Pali: Pakataññunoti ñatvā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.105
Pali: ussukkaṁ na karī tadā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.106
Pali: Ukkhitto na karotīti, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.107
Pali: sāgamā jinasantike. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.108
Pali: Adhammena vaggakammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.109
Pali: samaggaṁ adhammena ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.110
Pali: Dhammena vaggakammañca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.111
Pali: patirūpakena vaggikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.112
Pali: Patirūpakena samaggaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.113
Pali: eko ukkhipatekakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.114
Pali: Eko ca dve sambahule, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.115
Pali: saṅghaṁ ukkhipatekako. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.116
Pali: Duvepi sambahulāpi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.117
Pali: saṅgho saṅghañca ukkhipi; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.118
Pali: Sabbaññupavaro sutvā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.119
Pali: adhammanti paṭikkhipi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.120
Pali: Ñattivipannaṁ yaṁ kammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.121
Pali: sampannaṁ anusāvanaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.122
Pali: Anussāvanavipannaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.123
Pali: sampannaṁ ñattiyā ca yaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.124
Pali: Ubhayena vipannañca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.125
Pali: aññatra dhammameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.126
Pali: Vinayā satthu paṭikuṭṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.127
Pali: kuppaṁ aṭṭhānārahikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.128
Pali: Adhammavaggaṁ samaggaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.129
Pali: Dhamma patirūpāni ye duve; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.130
Pali: Dhammeneva ca sāmaggiṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.131
Pali: Anuññāsi tathāgato. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.132
Pali: Catuvaggo pañcavaggo, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.133
Pali: dasavaggo ca vīsati; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.134
Pali: Parovīsativaggo ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.135
Pali: saṅgho pañcavidho tathā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.136
Pali: Ṭhapetvā upasampadaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.137
Pali: yañca kammaṁ pavāraṇaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.138
Pali: Abbhānakammena saha, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.139
Pali: catuvaggehi kammiko. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.140
Pali: Duve kamme ṭhapetvāna, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.141
Pali: majjhadesūpasampadaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.142
Pali: Abbhānaṁ pañcavaggiko, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.143
Pali: sabbakammesu kammiko. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.144
Pali: Abbhānekaṁ ṭhapetvāna, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.145
Pali: ye bhikkhū dasavaggikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.146
Pali: Sabbakammakaro saṅgho, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.147
Pali: vīso sabbattha kammiko. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.148
Pali: Bhikkhunī sikkhamānā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.149
Pali: sāmaṇero sāmaṇerī; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.150
Pali: Paccakkhātantimavatthū, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.151
Pali: ukkhittāpattidassane. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.152
Pali: Appaṭikamme diṭṭhiyā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.153
Pali: paṇḍako theyyasaṁvāsakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.154
Pali: Titthiyā tiracchānagataṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.155
Pali: mātu pitu ca ghātakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.156
Pali: Arahaṁ bhikkhunīdūsi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.157
Pali: bhedakaṁ lohituppādaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.158
Pali: Byañjanaṁ nānāsaṁvāsaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.159
Pali: nānāsīmāya iddhiyā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.160
Pali: Yassa saṅgho kare kammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.161
Pali: hontete catuvīsati; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.162
Pali: Sambuddhena paṭikkhittā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.163
Pali: na hete gaṇapūrakā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.164
Pali: Pārivāsikacatuttho, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.165
Pali: parivāsaṁ dadeyya vā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.166
Pali: Mūlā mānattamabbheyya, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.167
Pali: akammaṁ na ca karaṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.168
Pali: Mūlā arahamānattā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.169
Pali: abbhānārahameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.170
Pali: Na kammakārakā pañca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.171
Pali: sambuddhena pakāsitā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.172
Pali: Bhikkhunī sikkhamānā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.173
Pali: sāmaṇero sāmaṇerikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.174
Pali: Paccakkhantimaummattā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.175
Pali: khittāvedanadassane. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.176
Pali: Appaṭikamme diṭṭhiyā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.177
Pali: paṇḍakāpi ca byañjanā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.178
Pali: Nānāsaṁvāsakā sīmā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.179
Pali: vehāsaṁ yassa kamma ca. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.180
Pali: Aṭṭhārasannametesaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.181
Pali: paṭikkosaṁ na ruhati; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.182
Pali: Bhikkhussa pakatattassa, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.183
Pali: ruhati paṭikkosanā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.184
Pali: Suddhassa dunnisārito, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.185
Pali: bālo hi sunissārito; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.186
Pali: Paṇḍako theyyasaṁvāso, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.187
Pali: pakkanto tiracchānagato. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.188
Pali: Mātu pitu arahanta, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.189
Pali: dūsako saṅghabhedako; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.190
Pali: Lohituppādako ceva, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.191
Pali: ubhatobyañjano ca yo. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.192
Pali: Ekādasannaṁ etesaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.193
Pali: osāraṇaṁ na yujjati; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.194
Pali: Hatthapādaṁ tadubhayaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.195
Pali: kaṇṇanāsaṁ tadūbhayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.196
Pali: Aṅguli aḷakaṇḍaraṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.197
Pali: phaṇaṁ khujjo ca vāmano; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.198
Pali: Gaṇḍī lakkhaṇakasā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.199
Pali: likhitako ca sīpadī. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.200
Pali: Pāpā parisakāṇo ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.201
Pali: kuṇī khañjo hatopi ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.202
Pali: Iriyāpathadubbalo, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.203
Pali: andho mūgo ca badhiro. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.204
Pali: Andhamūgandhabadhiro, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.205
Pali: mūgabadhirameva ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.206
Pali: Andhamūgabadhiro ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.207
Pali: dvattiṁsete anūnakā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.208
Pali: Tesaṁ osāraṇaṁ hoti, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.209
Pali: sambuddhena pakāsitaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.210
Pali: Daṭṭhabbā paṭikātabbā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.211
Pali: nissajjetā na vijjati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.212
Pali: Tassa ukkhepanā kammā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.213
Pali: satta honti adhammikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.214
Pali: Āpannaṁ anuvattantaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.215
Pali: satta tepi adhammikā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.216
Pali: Āpannaṁ nānuvattantaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.217
Pali: satta kammā sudhammikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.218
Pali: Sammukhā paṭipucchā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.219
Pali: paṭiññāya ca kāraṇā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.220
Pali: Sati amūḷhapāpikā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.221
Pali: tajjanīniyassena ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.222
Pali: Pabbājanīya paṭisāro, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.223
Pali: ukkhepaparivāsa ca. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.224
Pali: Mūlā mānattaabbhānā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.225
Pali: tatheva upasampadā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.226
Pali: Aññaṁ kareyya aññassa, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.227
Pali: soḷasete adhammikā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.228
Pali: Taṁ taṁ kareyya taṁ tassa, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.229
Pali: soḷasete sudhammikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.230
Pali: Paccāropeyya aññaññaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.231
Pali: soḷasete adhammikā. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.232
Pali: Dve dve tammūlakaṁ tassa, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.233
Pali: tepi soḷasa dhammikā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.234
Pali: Ekekamūlakaṁ cakkaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.235
Pali: “adhamman”ti jinobravi. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.236
Pali: Akāsi tajjanīyaṁ kammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.237
Pali: saṅgho bhaṇḍanakārako; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.238
Pali: Adhammena vaggakammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.239
Pali: aññaṁ āvāsaṁ gacchi so. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.240
Pali: Tatthādhammena samaggā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.241
Pali: tassa tajjanīyaṁ karuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.242
Pali: Aññattha vaggādhammena, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.243
Pali: tassa tajjanīyaṁ karuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.244
Pali: Patirūpena vaggāpi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.245
Pali: samaggāpi tathā karuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.246
Pali: Adhammena samaggā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.247
Pali: dhammena vaggameva ca. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.248
Pali: Patirūpakena vaggā ca, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.249
Pali: samaggā ca ime padā; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.250
Pali: Ekekamūlakaṁ katvā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.251
Pali: cakkaṁ bandhe vicakkhaṇo. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.252
Pali: Bālā byattassa niyassaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.253
Pali: pabbāje kuladūsakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.254
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyaṁ kammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.255
Pali: kare akkosakassa ca. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.256
Pali: Adassanāppaṭikamme, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.257
Pali: yo ca diṭṭhiṁ na nissajje; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.258
Pali: Tesaṁ ukkhepanīyakammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.259
Pali: satthavāhena bhāsitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.260
Pali: Upari nayakammānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.261
Pali: pañño tajjanīyaṁ naye; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.262
Pali: Tesaṁyeva anulomaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.263
Pali: sammā vattati yācite. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.264
Pali: Passaddhi tesaṁ kammānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.265
Pali: heṭṭhā kammanayena ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.266
Pali: Tasmiṁ tasmiṁ tu kammesu, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.267
Pali: tatraṭṭho ca vivadati. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.268
Pali: Akataṁ dukkaṭañceva, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.269
Pali: punakātabbakanti ca; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.270
Pali: Kamme passaddhiyā cāpi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.271
Pali: te bhikkhū dhammavādino. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.272
Pali: Vipattibyādhite disvā, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.273
Pali: kammappatte mahāmuni; 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.274
Pali: Paṭippassaddhimakkhāsi, 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.275
Pali: sallakattova osadhanti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.276
Pali: Imamhi khandhake vatthūni chattiṁsāti. 

pli-tv-kd9:7.20.277
Pali: Campeyyakkhandhako niṭṭhito.

pli-tv-kd10:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka

pli-tv-kd10:0.3
Pali: 10. Kosambakakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd10:0.4
Pali: 1. Kosambakavivādakathā 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.3
Pali: So tassā āpattiyā āpattidiṭṭhi hoti; 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.4
Pali: aññe bhikkhū tassā āpattiyā anāpattidiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.5
Pali: So aparena samayena tassā āpattiyā anāpattidiṭṭhi hoti; 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.6
Pali: aññe bhikkhū tassā āpattiyā āpattidiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.7
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.8
Pali: “āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattin”ti? 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.9
Pali: “Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti yamahaṁ passeyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.1.10
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū sāmaggiṁ labhitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ āpattiyā adassane ukkhipiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.1
Pali: So ca bhikkhu bahussuto hoti āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito byatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.2
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu sandiṭṭhe sambhatte bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.3
Pali: “anāpatti esā, āvuso, nesā āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.4
Pali: Anāpannomhi, namhi āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.5
Pali: Anukkhittomhi, namhi ukkhitto. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.6
Pali: Adhammikenamhi kammena ukkhitto kuppena aṭṭhānārahena. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.7
Pali: Hotha me āyasmanto dhammato vinayato pakkhā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.8
Pali: Alabhi kho so bhikkhu sandiṭṭhe sambhatte bhikkhū pakkhe. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.9
Pali: Jānapadānampi sandiṭṭhānaṁ sambhattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ santike dūtaṁ pāhesi—

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.10
Pali: “anāpatti esā, āvuso, nesā āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.11
Pali: Anāpannomhi, namhi āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.12
Pali: Anukkhittomhi, namhi ukkhitto. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.13
Pali: Adhammikenamhi kammena ukkhitto kuppena aṭṭhānārahena. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.14
Pali: Hontu me āyasmanto dhammato vinayato pakkhā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.2.15
Pali: Alabhi kho so bhikkhu jānapadepi sandiṭṭhe sambhatte bhikkhū pakkhe. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.1
Pali: Atha kho te ukkhittānuvattakā bhikkhū yena ukkhepakā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā ukkhepake bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.2
Pali: “anāpatti esā, āvuso, nesā āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.3
Pali: Anāpanno eso bhikkhu, neso bhikkhu āpanno. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.4
Pali: Anukkhitto eso bhikkhu, neso bhikkhu ukkhitto. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.5
Pali: Adhammikena kammena ukkhitto kuppena aṭṭhānārahenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.6
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, ukkhepakā bhikkhū ukkhittānuvattake bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.7
Pali: “āpatti esā, āvuso, nesā anāpatti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.8
Pali: Āpanno eso bhikkhu, neso bhikkhu anāpanno. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.9
Pali: Ukkhitto eso bhikkhu, neso bhikkhu anukkhitto. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.10
Pali: Dhammikena kammena ukkhitto akuppena ṭhānārahena. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.11
Pali: Mā kho tumhe āyasmanto etaṁ ukkhittakaṁ bhikkhuṁ anuvattittha anuparivārethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.3.12
Pali: Evampi kho te ukkhittānuvattakā bhikkhū ukkhepakehi bhikkhūhi vuccamānā tatheva taṁ ukkhittakaṁ bhikkhuṁ anuvattiṁsu anuparivāresuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.1
Pali: Atha kho aññataro bhikkhu yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho so bhikkhu bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.3
Pali: “idha, bhante, aññataro bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpanno ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.4
Pali: So tassā āpattiyā āpattidiṭṭhi ahosi, aññe bhikkhū tassā āpattiyā anāpattidiṭṭhino ahesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.5
Pali: So aparena samayena tassā āpattiyā anāpattidiṭṭhi ahosi, aññe bhikkhū tassā āpattiyā āpattidiṭṭhino ahesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.6
Pali: Atha kho te, bhante, bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.7
Pali: ‘āpattiṁ tvaṁ, āvuso, āpanno, passasetaṁ āpattin’ti? 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.8
Pali: ‘Natthi me, āvuso, āpatti yamahaṁ passeyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.9
Pali: Atha kho te, bhante, bhikkhū sāmaggiṁ labhitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ āpattiyā adassane ukkhipiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.10

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.11

pli-tv-kd10:1.4.27
