pli-tv-kd11:4.1.0
Pali: 1.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.2
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.3
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.4
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.5
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.6
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.7
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.8
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.9
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.10
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:4.1.11
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.1
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.2
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.3
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.4
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.5
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.6
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.7
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.8
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.9
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.10
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.11
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, tajjanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:4.2.12
Pali: Ākaṅkhamānachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.0
Pali: 1.4. Aṭṭhārasavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.1
Pali: Tajjanīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.3
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.7
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.8
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.9
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.10
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.11
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.12
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.13
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.14
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.15
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.16
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.17
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.18
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.19
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.20
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:5.1.21
Pali: Tajjanīyakamme aṭṭhārasavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.0
Pali: 1.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.2
Pali: Te saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattanti, lomaṁ pātenti, netthāraṁ vattanti, bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.3
Pali: “mayaṁ, āvuso, saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattāma, lomaṁ pātema, netthāraṁ vattāma, kathaṁ nu kho amhehi paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.4
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ … 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.5
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.9
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:6.2.11
Pali: Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.0
Pali: 1.6. Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.2
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena tajjanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.6
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.8
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.9
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:7.1.11
Pali: Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.2
Pali: Tehi, bhikkhave, paṇḍukalohitakehi bhikkhūhi saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.3
Pali: ‘mayaṁ, bhante, saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattāma, lomaṁ pātema, netthāraṁ vattāma, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.1.6
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.1
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.2
Pali: Ime paṇḍukalohitakā bhikkhū saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattanti, lomaṁ pātenti, netthāraṁ vattanti, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.3
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.4
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.5
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.6
Pali: Ime paṇḍukalohitakā bhikkhū saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattanti, lomaṁ pātenti, netthāraṁ vattanti, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.7
Pali: Saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.8
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.9
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.10
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.11
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.12
Pali: Ime paṇḍukalohitakā bhikkhū saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattanti, lomaṁ pātenti, netthāraṁ vattanti, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.13
Pali: Saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.14
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.15
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.16
Pali: Tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.17
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.18
Pali: Ime paṇḍukalohitakā bhikkhū saṅghena tajjanīyakammakatā sammā vattanti, lomaṁ pātenti, netthāraṁ vattanti, tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.19
Pali: Saṅgho paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.20
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.21
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.22
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena paṇḍukalohitakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ tajjanīyakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.23
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:8.2.24
Pali: Tajjanīyakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ paṭhamaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.0
Pali: 2. Niyassakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā seyyasako bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.2
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.3
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā seyyasako bālo bhavissati abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.6
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharissati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.7
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.8
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.9
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, seyyasako bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.11
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.12
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.14
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.15
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, bhikkhave, tassa moghapurisassa ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.16
Pali: Kathañhi nāma so, bhikkhave, moghapuriso bālo bhavissati abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.17
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharissati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.18
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.19
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.20
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.21
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.22
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ karotu—

pli-tv-kd11:9.1.23
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.2
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.4
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.5
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.6
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.8
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.9
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.10
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.11
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.12
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.13
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.14
Pali: Saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.15
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.16
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.17
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.18
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.19
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.20
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.21
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.22
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu bālo abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.23
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.24
Pali: apissu bhikkhū pakatā parivāsaṁ dentā mūlāya paṭikassantā mānattaṁ dentā abbhentā. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.25
Pali: Saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.26
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.27
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.28
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.29
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.30
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.31
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:9.2.32
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.0
Pali: 2.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.1
Pali: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.2
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.5
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.7
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.8
Pali: Acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.9
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.10
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.11
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.12
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.13
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.14
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.15
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.16
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.17
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.18
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.19
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.20
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.21
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.22
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.23
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.24
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.25
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.26
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.27
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.28
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.29
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.30
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.31
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.32
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.33
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.34
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.35
Pali: Āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.36
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.37
Pali: Adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.38.0
Pali: 2.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.38.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.39
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.40
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.41
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.42
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.43
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.44
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.45
Pali: Codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.46
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.47
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.48
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.49
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.50
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.51
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.52
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.53
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.54
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.55
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.56
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.57
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.58

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.59
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.60

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.61

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.62
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.63
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.65
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.66
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.67
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.68
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.69
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.70
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.71
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.72
Pali: Āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.73
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ niyassakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.74
Pali: Dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.75.0
Pali: 2.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.75.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.76
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.77
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.78
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.79
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.80
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.81
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.82
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.83
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.84
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.85
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.86
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.87
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.88
Pali: eko bālo hoti, abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.89
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.90
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.91
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.92
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.93
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.94
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.95
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.96
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, niyassakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.97
Pali: Ākaṅkhamānachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.98.0
Pali: 2.4. Aṭṭhārasavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.98.1
Pali: Niyassakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.99
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.100
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.101
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.102
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.103
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.104
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.105
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena niyassakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.106
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.107
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.108
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.109
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.110
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.111
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.112
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.113
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.114
Pali: na okāso kārāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.115
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.116
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.117
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:10.1.118
Pali: Niyassakamme aṭṭhārasavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.2
Pali: nissāya te vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.3
Pali: So saṅghena niyassakammakato kalyāṇamitte sevamāno bhajamāno payirupāsamāno uddisāpento paripucchanto bahussuto hoti, āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.4
Pali: Sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.5
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.6
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.7
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ … 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.8
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.1.9
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.0
Pali: 2.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena niyassakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.9
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.11
Pali: Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.12.0
Pali: 2.6. Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.12.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.13
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.14
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.15
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.16
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena niyassakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.17
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.18
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.19
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.20
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.21
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:11.2.22
Pali: Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.1.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, seyyasakena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:12.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.3
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.4
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.5
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.6
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.7
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.8
Pali: Saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.9
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.10
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.11
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.12
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.13
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.14
Pali: Saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.15
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.16
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.17
Pali: Tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.18
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.19
Pali: Ayaṁ seyyasako bhikkhu saṅghena niyassakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.20
Pali: Saṅgho seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.22
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.23
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena seyyasakassa bhikkhuno niyassakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:12.2.25
Pali: Niyassakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ dutiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.0
Pali: 3. Pabbājanīyakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā honti alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.2
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.3
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi, ocinantipi ocināpentipi, ganthentipi ganthāpentipi, ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, mañjarikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, āveḷaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, uracchadaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.4
Pali: Te kulitthīnaṁ kuladhītānaṁ kulakumārīnaṁ kulasuṇhānaṁ kuladāsīnaṁ ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, mañjarikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, āveḷaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, uracchadaṁ harantipi harāpentipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.5
Pali: Te kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi saddhiṁ ekabhājanepi bhuñjanti, ekathālakepi pivanti, ekāsanepi nisīdanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, vikālepi bhuñjanti, majjampi pivanti, mālāgandhavilepanampi dhārenti, naccantipi, gāyantipi, vādentipi, lāsentipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.6
Pali: naccantiyāpi naccanti, naccantiyāpi gāyanti, naccantiyāpi vādenti, naccantiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.7
Pali: gāyantiyāpi naccanti, gāyantiyāpi gāyanti, gāyantiyāpi vādenti, gāyantiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.8
Pali: vādentiyāpi naccanti, vādentiyāpi gāyanti, vādentiyāpi vādenti, vādentiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.1.9
Pali: lāsentiyāpi naccanti, lāsentiyāpi gāyanti, lāsentiyāpi vādenti, lāsentiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.1
Pali: aṭṭhapadepi kīḷanti, dasapadepi kīḷanti, ākāsepi kīḷanti, parihārapathepi kīḷanti, santikāyapi kīḷanti, khalikāyapi kīḷanti, ghaṭikāyapi kīḷanti, salākahatthenapi kīḷanti, akkhenapi kīḷanti, paṅgacīrenapi kīḷanti, vaṅkakenapi kīḷanti, mokkhacikāyapi kīḷanti, ciṅgulakenapi kīḷanti, pattāḷhakenapi kīḷanti, rathakenapi kīḷanti, dhanukenapi kīḷanti, akkharikāyapi kīḷanti, manesikāyapi kīḷanti, yathāvajjenapi kīḷanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.2
Pali: hatthismimpi sikkhanti, assasmimpi sikkhanti, rathasmimpi sikkhanti, dhanusmimpi sikkhanti, tharusmimpi sikkhanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.3
Pali: hatthissapi purato dhāvanti, assassapi purato dhāvanti, rathassapi purato dhāvantipi ādhāvantipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.4
Pali: usseḷentipi, apphoṭentipi, nibbujjhantipi, muṭṭhīhipi yujjhanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.5
Pali: raṅgamajjhepi saṅghāṭiṁ pattharitvā naccakiṁ evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.6
Pali: “idha, bhagini, naccassū”ti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.7
Pali: nalāṭikampi denti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.2.8
Pali: vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu kāsīsu vassaṁvuṭṭho sāvatthiṁ gacchanto bhagavantaṁ dassanāya yena kīṭāgiri tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.2
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya kīṭāgiriṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi pāsādikena abhikkantena paṭikkantena ālokitena vilokitena samiñjitena pasāritena, okkhittacakkhu iriyāpathasampanno. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.3
Pali: Manussā taṁ bhikkhuṁ passitvā evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.4
Pali: “kvāyaṁ abalabalo viya mandamando viya bhākuṭikabhākuṭiko viya? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.5
Pali: Ko imassa upagatassa piṇḍakampi dassati? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.6
Pali: Amhākaṁ pana ayyā assajipunabbasukā saṇhā sakhilā sukhasambhāsā mihitapubbaṅgamā ehisvāgatavādino abbhākuṭikā uttānamukhā pubbabhāsino. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.7
Pali: Tesaṁ kho nāma piṇḍo dātabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.8
Pali: Addasā kho aññataro upāsako taṁ bhikkhuṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ piṇḍāya carantaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.9
Pali: disvāna yena so bhikkhu tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ abhivādetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.10
Pali: “api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.11
Pali: “Na kho, āvuso, piṇḍo labbhatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.3.12
Pali: “Ehi, bhante, gharaṁ gamissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.1
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako taṁ bhikkhuṁ gharaṁ netvā bhojetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.2
Pali: “kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.3
Pali: “Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, āvuso, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.4
Pali: “Tena hi, bhante, mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda, evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.5
Pali: ‘duṭṭho, bhante, kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.6
Pali: Assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.7
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.8
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi, siñcantipi siñcāpentipi, ocinantipi ocināpentipi, ganthentipi ganthāpentipi, ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, mañjarikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, āveḷaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi, uracchadaṁ karontipi kārāpentipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.9
Pali: Te kulitthīnaṁ kuladhītānaṁ kulakumārīnaṁ kulasuṇhānaṁ kuladāsīnaṁ ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, mañjarikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vidhūtikaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, āveḷaṁ harantipi harāpentipi, uracchadaṁ harantipi harāpentipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.10
Pali: Te kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi saddhiṁ ekabhājanepi bhuñjanti, ekathālakepi pivanti, ekāsanepi nisīdanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, vikālepi bhuñjanti, majjampi pivanti, mālāgandhavilepanampi dhārenti, naccantipi, gāyantipi, vādentipi, lāsentipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.11
Pali: naccantiyāpi naccanti, naccantiyāpi gāyanti, naccantiyāpi vādenti, naccantiyāpi lāsenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.12
Pali: (cakkaṁ kātabbaṁ). 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.13
Pali: Lāsentiyāpi naccanti, lāsentiyāpi gāyanti, lāsentiyāpi vādenti, lāsentiyāpi lāsenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.14
Pali: aṭṭhapadepi kīḷanti, dasapadepi kīḷanti, ākāsepi kīḷanti, parihārapathepi kīḷanti, santikāyapi kīḷanti, khalikāyapi kīḷanti, ghaṭikāyapi kīḷanti, salākahatthenapi kīḷanti, akkhenapi kīḷanti, paṅgacīrenapi kīḷanti, vaṅkakenapi kīḷanti, mokkhacikāyapi kīḷanti, ciṅgulakenapi kīḷanti, pattāḷhakenapi kīḷanti, rathakenapi kīḷanti, dhanukenapi kīḷanti, akkharikāyapi kīḷanti, manesikāyapi kīḷanti, yathāvajjenapi kīḷanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.15
Pali: hatthismimpi sikkhanti, assasmimpi sikkhanti, rathasmimpi sikkhanti, dhanusmimpi sikkhanti, tharusmimpi sikkhanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.16
Pali: hatthissapi purato dhāvanti, assassapi purato dhāvanti, rathassapi purato dhāvantipi ādhāvantipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.17
Pali: usseḷentipi, apphoṭentipi, nibbujjhantipi, muṭṭhīhipi yujjhanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.18
Pali: raṅgamajjhepi saṅghāṭiṁ pattharitvā naccakiṁ evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.19
Pali: “idha, bhagini, naccassū”ti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.20
Pali: nalāṭikampi denti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.21
Pali: vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.22
Pali: Yepi te, bhante, manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.23
Pali: Yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.24
Pali: Riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū, nivasanti pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.4.25
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā kīṭāgiriṁ bhikkhū pahiṇeyya, yathāyaṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso saṇṭhaheyyā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.1
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti kho so bhikkhu tassa upāsakassa paṭissuṇitvā uṭṭhāyāsanā yena sāvatthi tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.2
Pali: Anupubbena yena sāvatthi jetavanaṁ anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāmo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.3
Pali: Āciṇṇaṁ kho panetaṁ buddhānaṁ bhagavantānaṁ āgantukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ paṭisammodituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.4
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.5
Pali: “kacci, bhikkhu, khamanīyaṁ, kacci yāpanīyaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.6
Pali: kaccisi appakilamathena addhānaṁ āgato, 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.7
Pali: kuto ca tvaṁ bhikkhu āgacchasī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.8
Pali: “Khamanīyaṁ, bhagavā, yāpanīyaṁ, bhagavā; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.9
Pali: appakilamathena ca ahaṁ, bhante, addhānaṁ āgato. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.10
Pali: Idhāhaṁ, bhante, kāsīsu vassaṁvuṭṭho sāvatthiṁ āgacchanto bhagavantaṁ dassanāya yena kīṭāgiri tadavasariṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.11
Pali: Atha khvāhaṁ, bhante, pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya kīṭāgiriṁ piṇḍāya pāvisiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.12
Pali: Addasā kho maṁ, bhante, aññataro upāsako kīṭāgirismiṁ piṇḍāya carantaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.13
Pali: disvāna yenāhaṁ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā maṁ abhivādetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.14
Pali: ‘api, bhante, piṇḍo labbhatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.15
Pali: ‘Na kho, āvuso, piṇḍo labbhatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.16
Pali: ‘Ehi, bhante, gharaṁ gamissāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.17
Pali: Atha kho, bhante, so upāsako maṁ gharaṁ netvā bhojetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.18
Pali: ‘kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo gamissatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.19
Pali: ‘Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, āvuso, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.20
Pali: ‘Tena hi, bhante, mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda, evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.21
Pali: “duṭṭho, bhante, kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.22
Pali: Assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.23
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.24
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi ropāpentipi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.25
Pali: vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.26
Pali: Yepi te, bhante, manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.27
Pali: Yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.28
Pali: Riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū, nivasanti pāpabhikkhū. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.29
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, bhagavā kīṭāgiriṁ bhikkhū pahiṇeyya, yathāyaṁ kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāso saṇṭhaheyyā”’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.5.30
Pali: Tato ahaṁ, bhagavā, āgacchāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.2
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, assajipunabbasukā nāma kīṭāgirismiṁ āvāsikā alajjino pāpabhikkhū? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.3
Pali: Te evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācaranti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.4
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropentipi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.5
Pali: vividhampi anācāraṁ ācaranti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.6
Pali: Yepi te manussā pubbe saddhā ahesuṁ pasannā tepi etarahi assaddhā appasannā? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.7
Pali: Yānipi tāni saṅghassa pubbe dānapathāni tānipi etarahi upacchinnāni? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.8
Pali: Riñcanti pesalā bhikkhū, nivasanti pāpabhikkhū”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.11
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā evarūpaṁ anācāraṁ ācarissanti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.13
Pali: mālāvacchaṁ ropessantipi ropāpessantipi, siñcissantipi siñcāpessantipi, ocinissantipi ocināpessantipi, ganthessantipi ganthāpessantipi, ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, mañjarikaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, vidhūtikaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, āveḷaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi, uracchadaṁ karissantipi kārāpessantipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.14
Pali: Te kulitthīnaṁ kuladhītānaṁ kulakumārīnaṁ kulasuṇhānaṁ kuladāsīnaṁ ekatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, ubhatovaṇṭikamālaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, mañjarikaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, vidhūtikaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, vaṭaṁsakaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, āveḷaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi, uracchadaṁ harissantipi harāpessantipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.15
Pali: Te kulitthīhi kuladhītāhi kulakumārīhi kulasuṇhāhi kuladāsīhi saddhiṁ ekabhājanepi bhuñjissanti, ekathālakepi pivissanti, ekāsanepi nisīdissanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭissanti, vikālepi bhuñjissanti, majjampi pivissanti, mālāgandhavilepanampi dhāressanti, naccissantipi, gāyissantipi, vādessantipi, lāsessantipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.16
Pali: naccantiyāpi naccissanti, naccantiyāpi gāyissanti, naccantiyāpi vādessanti, naccantiyāpi lāsessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.17
Pali: gāyantiyāpi naccissanti, gāyantiyāpi gāyissanti, gāyantiyāpi vādessanti, gāyantiyāpi lāsessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.18
Pali: vādentiyāpi naccissanti, vādentiyāpi gāyissanti, vādentiyāpi vādessanti, vādentiyāpi lāsessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.19
Pali: lāsentiyāpi naccissanti, lāsentiyāpi gāyissanti, lāsentiyāpi vādessanti, lāsentiyāpi lāsessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.20
Pali: aṭṭhapadepi kīḷissanti, dasapadepi kīḷissanti, ākāsepi kīḷissanti, parihārapathepi kīḷissanti, santikāyapi kīḷissanti, khalikāyapi kīḷissanti, ghaṭikāyapi kīḷissanti, salākahatthenapi kīḷissanti, akkhenapi kīḷissanti, paṅgacīrenapi kīḷissanti, vaṅkakenapi kīḷissanti mokkhacikāyapi kīḷissanti, ciṅgulakenapi kīḷissanti, pattāḷhakenapi kīḷissanti, rathakenapi kīḷissanti, dhanukenapi kīḷissanti, akkharikāyapi kīḷissanti, manesikāyapi kīḷissanti, yathāvajjenapi kīḷissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.21
Pali: hatthismimpi sikkhissanti, assasmimpi sikkhissanti, rathasmimpi sikkhissanti, dhanusmimpi sikkhissanti, tharusmimpi sikkhissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.22
Pali: hatthissapi purato dhāvissanti, assassapi purato dhāvissanti, rathassapi purato dhāvissantipi ādhāvissantipi; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.23
Pali: usseḷessantipi, apphoṭessantipi, nibbujjhissantipi, muṭṭhīhipi yujjhissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.24
Pali: raṅgamajjhepi saṅghāṭiṁ pattharitvā naccakiṁ evaṁ vakkhanti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.25
Pali: ‘idha, bhagini, naccassū’ti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.26
Pali: nalāṭikampi dassanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.27
Pali: vividhampi anācāraṁ ācarissanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.28
Pali: (…) Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.29
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.30
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā sāriputtamoggallāne āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.31
Pali: “gacchatha tumhe, sāriputtā, kīṭāgiriṁ gantvā assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karotha, tumhākaṁ ete saddhivihārino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.32
Pali: “Kathaṁ mayaṁ, bhante, assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoma, caṇḍā te bhikkhū pharusā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.33
Pali: “Tena hi tumhe, sāriputtā, bahukehi bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ gacchathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.6.34
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho sāriputtamoggallānā bhagavato paccassosuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.1
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.2
Pali: paṭhamaṁ assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū codetabbā, codetvā sāretabbā, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbā, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.4
Pali: Ime assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū kuladūsakā pāpasamācārā. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.5
Pali: Imesaṁ pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.6
Pali: Kulāni ca imehi duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.8
Pali: na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.9
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.10
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.11
Pali: Ime assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū kuladūsakā pāpasamācārā. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.12
Pali: Imesaṁ pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.13
Pali: Kulāni ca imehi duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.14
Pali: Saṅgho assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.15
Pali: na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.16
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.17
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.18
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.19
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.21
Pali: Ime assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū kuladūsakā pāpasamācārā. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.22
Pali: Imesaṁ pāpakā samācārā dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.23
Pali: Kulāni ca imehi duṭṭhāni dissanti ceva suyyanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.24
Pali: Saṅgho assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.25
Pali: na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.26
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.27
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.28
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.29
Pali: na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:13.7.30
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.0
Pali: 3.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.1
Pali: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.2
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.5
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.6
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.7
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.8
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.9
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.10
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.11
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.12
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.13
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.14
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.15
Pali: āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.17
Pali: Adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.18.0
Pali: 3.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.18.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.19
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.20
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.21
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.22
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.23
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.24
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.25
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.26
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.27
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.28
Pali: desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.29
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.30
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.31
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.32
Pali: āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.33
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ pabbājanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.34
Pali: Dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.35.0
Pali: 3.3. Ākaṅkhamānacuddasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.35.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.36
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.37
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.38
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.39
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.40
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.41
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.42
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.43
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.44
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.45
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.46
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.47
Pali: Kāyikena davena samannāgato hoti, vācasikena davena samannāgato hoti, kāyikavācasikena davena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.48
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.49
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.50
Pali: Kāyikena anācārena samannāgato hoti, vācasikena anācārena samannāgato hoti, kāyikavācasikena anācārena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.51
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.52
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.53
Pali: Kāyikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti, vācasikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti, kāyikavācasikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.54
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.55
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.56
Pali: Kāyikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti, vācasikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti, kāyikavācasikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.1.57
Pali: imehi, kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.1
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.2
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.3
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.4
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.5
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.6
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.7
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.8
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.9
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.10
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.11
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.12
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.13
Pali: Eko kāyikena davena samannāgato hoti, eko vācasikena davena samannāgato hoti, eko kāyikavācasikena davena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.14
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.15
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.16
Pali: Eko kāyikena anācārena samannāgato hoti, eko vācasikena anācārena samannāgato hoti, eko kāyikavācasikena anācārena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.17
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.18
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.19
Pali: Eko kāyikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti, eko vācasikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti, eko kāyikavācasikena upaghātikena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.20
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.21
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.22
Pali: Eko kāyikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti, eko vācasikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti, eko kāyikavācasikena micchājīvena samannāgato hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.23
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pabbājanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:14.2.24
Pali: Ākaṅkhamānacuddasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.0
Pali: 3.4. Aṭṭhārasavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.1
Pali: Pabbājanīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.3
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.7
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.8
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena pabbājanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.9
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.10
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.11
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.12
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.13
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.14
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.15
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.16
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.17
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.18
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.19
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.20
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:15.1.21
Pali: Pabbājanīyakamme aṭṭhārasavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.1
Pali: Atha kho sāriputtamoggallānappamukho bhikkhusaṅgho kīṭāgiriṁ gantvā assajipunabbasukānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.2
Pali: na assajipunabbasukehi bhikkhūhi kīṭāgirismiṁ vatthabbanti. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.3
Pali: Te saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattanti, na lomaṁ pātenti, na netthāraṁ vattanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.4
Pali: na bhikkhū khamāpenti, akkosanti, paribhāsanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.5
Pali: chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.6
Pali: pakkamantipi, vibbhamantipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattissanti, na lomaṁ pātessanti, na netthāraṁ vattissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.9
Pali: na bhikkhū khamāpessanti, akkosissanti, paribhāsissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.10
Pali: chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.11
Pali: pakkamissantipi, vibbhamissantipī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.12
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.13
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.14
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, assajipunabbasukā bhikkhū saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattanti, na lomaṁ pātenti, na netthāraṁ vattanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.15
Pali: na bhikkhū khamāpenti, akkosanti, paribhāsanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.16
Pali: chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpenti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.17
Pali: pakkamantipi, vibbhamantipī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.18
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.19
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.20
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.21
Pali: kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakatā na sammā vattissanti, na lomaṁ pātessanti, na netthāraṁ vattissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.22
Pali: na bhikkhū khamāpessanti, akkosissanti, paribhāsissanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.23
Pali: chandagāmitā dosagāmitā mohagāmitā bhayagāmitā pāpessanti; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.24
Pali: pakkamissantipi, vibbhamissantipi. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.25
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.26
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.27
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:16.1.28
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.0
Pali: 3.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena pabbājanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.9
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.11
Pali: Pabbājanīyakamme nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.12.0
Pali: 3.6. Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.12.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.13
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.14
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.15
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.16
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena pabbājanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.17
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.18
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.19
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.20
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.21
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:16.2.22
Pali: Pabbājanīyakamme paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, pabbājanīyakammakatena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.1.6
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.1
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.2
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.3
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.4
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.5
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.6
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.7
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.8
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.9
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.10
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.11
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.12
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.13
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena pabbājanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.14
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.15
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.16
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.17
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno pabbājanīyakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.18
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:17.2.19
Pali: Pabbājanīyakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ tatiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.0
Pali: 4. Paṭisāraṇīyakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā sudhammo macchikāsaṇḍe cittassa gahapatino āvāsiko hoti, navakammiko dhuvabhattiko. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.2
Pali: Yadā citto gahapati saṅghaṁ vā gaṇaṁ vā puggalaṁ vā nimantetukāmo hoti tadā na āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ anapaloketvā saṅghaṁ vā gaṇaṁ vā puggalaṁ vā nimanteti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sambahulā therā bhikkhū, āyasmā ca sāriputto, āyasmā ca mahāmoggallāno, āyasmā ca mahākaccāno, āyasmā ca mahākoṭṭhiko, āyasmā ca mahākappino, āyasmā ca mahācundo, āyasmā ca anuruddho, āyasmā ca revato, āyasmā ca upāli, āyasmā ca ānando, āyasmā ca rāhulo, kāsīsu cārikaṁ caramānā yena macchikāsaṇḍo tadavasaruṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.4
Pali: Assosi kho citto gahapati therā kira bhikkhū macchikāsaṇḍaṁ anuppattāti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.5
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati yena therā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā there bhikkhū abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.6
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho cittaṁ gahapatiṁ āyasmā sāriputto dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.7
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati āyasmatā sāriputtena dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito there bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.8
Pali: “adhivāsentu me, bhante, therā svātanāya āgantukabhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.1.9
Pali: Adhivāsesuṁ kho therā bhikkhū tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.1
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā there bhikkhū abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā yenāyasmā sudhammo tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhito kho citto gahapati āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.3
Pali: “adhivāsetu me, bhante, ayyo sudhammo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ therehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.4
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sudhammo—

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.5
Pali: “pubbe khvāyaṁ citto gahapati yadā saṅghaṁ vā gaṇaṁ vā puggalaṁ vā nimantetukāmo na maṁ anapaloketvā saṅghaṁ vā gaṇaṁ vā puggalaṁ vā nimanteti; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.6
Pali: sodāni maṁ anapaloketvā there bhikkhū nimantesi; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.7
Pali: duṭṭhodānāyaṁ citto gahapati anapekkho virattarūpo mayī”ti cittaṁ gahapatiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.8
Pali: “alaṁ, gahapati, nādhivāsemī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.9
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.10
Pali: tatiyampi kho citto gahapati āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.11
Pali: “adhivāsetu me, bhante, ayyo sudhammo svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ therehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.12
Pali: “Alaṁ, gahapati, nādhivāsemī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.13
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati—

pli-tv-kd11:18.2.14
Pali: “kiṁ me karissati ayyo sudhammo adhivāsento vā anadhivāsento vā”ti āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.1
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati tassā rattiyā accayena therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.2
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sudhammo—

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.3
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ cittassa gahapatino therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṭiyattaṁ passeyyan”ti pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena cittassa gahapatino nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.4
Pali: Atha kho citto gahapati yenāyasmā sudhammo tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ sudhammaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.5
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho cittaṁ gahapatiṁ āyasmā sudhammo etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.6
Pali: “pahūtaṁ kho te idaṁ, gahapati, khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyattaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.7
Pali: ekā ca kho idha natthi yadidaṁ tilasaṅguḷikā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.8
Pali: “Bahumhi vata, bhante, ratane buddhavacane vijjamāne ayyena sudhammena yadeva kiñci bhāsitaṁ yadidaṁ tilasaṅguḷikāti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.9
Pali: Bhūtapubbaṁ, bhante, dakkhiṇāpathakā vāṇijā puratthimaṁ janapadaṁ agamaṁsu vāṇijjāya. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.10
Pali: Te tato kukkuṭiṁ ānesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.11
Pali: Atha kho sā, bhante, kukkuṭī kākena saddhiṁ saṁvāsaṁ kappesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.12
Pali: Sā potakaṁ janesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.13
Pali: Yadā kho so, bhante, kukkuṭapotako kākavassaṁ vassitukāmo hoti, kākakukkuṭīti vassati; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.14
Pali: yadā kukkuṭivassaṁ vassitukāmo hoti, kukkuṭikākāti vassati. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.3.15
Pali: Evameva kho, bhante, bahumhi ratane buddhavacane vijjamāne ayyena sudhammena yadeva kiñci bhāsitaṁ yadidaṁ tilasaṅguḷikā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.1
Pali: “Akkosasi maṁ tvaṁ, gahapati, paribhāsasi maṁ tvaṁ, gahapati. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.2
Pali: Eso te, gahapati, āvāso, pakkamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.3
Pali: “Nāhaṁ, bhante, ayyaṁ sudhammaṁ akkosāmi, paribhāsāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.4
Pali: Vasatu, bhante, ayyo sudhammo macchikāsaṇḍe. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.5
Pali: Ramaṇīyaṁ ambāṭakavanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.6
Pali: Ahaṁ ayyassa sudhammassa ussukkaṁ karissāmi, cīvarapiṇḍapātasenāsanagilānappaccayabhesajjaparikkhārānan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.7
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.8
Pali: tatiyampi kho āyasmā sudhammo cittaṁ gahapatiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.9
Pali: “akkosasi maṁ tvaṁ, gahapati, paribhāsasi maṁ tvaṁ, gahapati. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.10
Pali: Eso te, gahapati, āvāso, pakkamissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.11
Pali: “Kahaṁ, bhante, ayyo sudhammo gamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.12
Pali: “Sāvatthiṁ kho ahaṁ, gahapati, gamissāmi bhagavantaṁ dassanāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.13
Pali: “Tena hi, bhante, yañca attanā bhaṇitaṁ, yañca mayā bhaṇitaṁ taṁ sabbaṁ bhagavato ārocehi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.4.14
Pali: Anacchariyaṁ kho panetaṁ, bhante, yaṁ ayyo sudhammo punadeva macchikāsaṇḍaṁ paccāgaccheyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sudhammo senāsanaṁ saṁsāmetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena sāvatthi tena pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.2
Pali: Anupubbena yena sāvatthi jetavanaṁ anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāmo yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā sudhammo yañca attanā bhaṇitaṁ yañca cittena gahapatinā bhaṇitaṁ taṁ sabbaṁ bhagavato ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.4
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.5
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.6
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, cittaṁ gahapatiṁ saddhaṁ pasannaṁ dāyakaṁ kārakaṁ saṅghupaṭṭhākaṁ hīnena khuṁsessasi, hīnena vambhessasi? 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.7
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.8
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.9
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.10
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karotu—

pli-tv-kd11:18.5.11
Pali: citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.2
Pali: paṭhamaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.4
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu cittaṁ gahapatiṁ saddhaṁ pasannaṁ dāyakaṁ kārakaṁ saṅghupaṭṭhākaṁ hīnena khuṁseti, hīnena vambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.6
Pali: citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.7
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.8
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.9
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu cittaṁ gahapatiṁ saddhaṁ pasannaṁ dāyakaṁ kārakaṁ saṅghupaṭṭhākaṁ hīnena khuṁseti, hīnena vambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.10
Pali: Saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.11
Pali: citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.12
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.13
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.14
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.15
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.16
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.17
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu cittaṁ gahapatiṁ saddhaṁ pasannaṁ dāyakaṁ kārakaṁ saṅghupaṭṭhākaṁ hīnena khuṁseti, hīnena vambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.18
Pali: Saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.19
Pali: citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.20
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.21
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.22
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.23
Pali: citto te gahapati khamāpetabboti. 

pli-tv-kd11:18.6.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.0
Pali: 4.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.2
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.5
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.6
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.7
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.8
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.9
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.10
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.11
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.12
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.13
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.14
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.15
Pali: āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.17
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakamme adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.18.0
Pali: 4.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.18.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.19
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.20
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.21
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.22
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.23
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.24
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.25
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.26
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.27
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.28
Pali: desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.29
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.30
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe…
