pli-tv-kd11:19.1.31
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.32
Pali: āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.33
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:19.1.34
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakamme dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.0
Pali: 4.3. Ākaṅkhamānacatukka 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.2
Pali: Gihīnaṁ alābhāya parisakkati, gihīnaṁ anatthāya parisakkati, gihīnaṁ anāvāsāya parisakkati, gihī akkosati paribhāsati, gihī gihīhi bhedeti—

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.5
Pali: Gihīnaṁ buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, gihīnaṁ dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, gihīnaṁ saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, gihī hīnena khuṁseti hīnena vambheti, gihīnaṁ dhammikaṁ paṭissavaṁ na saccāpeti—

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.6
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.7
Pali: Pañcannaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.8
Pali: Eko gihīnaṁ alābhāya parisakkati, eko gihīnaṁ anatthāya parisakkati, eko gihīnaṁ anāvāsāya parisakkati, eko gihī akkosati paribhāsati, eko gihī gihīhi bhedeti—

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.9
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.10
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.11
Pali: Eko gihīnaṁ buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko gihīnaṁ dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko gihīnaṁ saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko gihī hīnena khuṁseti hīnena vambheti, eko gihīnaṁ dhammikaṁ paṭissavaṁ na saccāpeti—

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.12
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, pañcannaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:20.1.13
Pali: Ākaṅkhamānacatukkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.0
Pali: 4.4. Aṭṭhārasavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.1
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.3
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.7
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.8
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.9
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.10
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.11
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.12
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.13
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.14
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.15
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.16
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.17
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.18
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.19
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.20
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:21.1.21
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakamme aṭṭhārasavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.2
Pali: “citto te gahapati khamāpetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.3
Pali: So saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato macchikāsaṇḍaṁ gantvā maṅkubhūto nāsakkhi cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.4
Pali: Punadeva sāvatthiṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.6
Pali: “khamāpito tayā, āvuso sudhamma, citto gahapatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.7
Pali: “Idhāhaṁ, āvuso, macchikāsaṇḍaṁ gantvā maṅkubhūto nāsakkhiṁ cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.1.8
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.1
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno anudūtaṁ detu—

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.2
Pali: cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.3
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.4
Pali: paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.5
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.6
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ sudhammassa bhikkhuno anudūtaṁ dadeyya cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.7
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.8
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.9
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ sudhammassa bhikkhuno anudūtaṁ deti cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.10
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sudhammassa bhikkhuno anudūtassa dānaṁ cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.11
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.12
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu sudhammassa bhikkhuno anudūto cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.2.13
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.1
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, sudhammena bhikkhunā anudūtena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ macchikāsaṇḍaṁ gantvā citto gahapati khamāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.2
Pali: ‘khama, gahapati, pasādemi tan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.3
Pali: Evañce vuccamāno khamati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.4
Pali: No ce khamati, anudūtena bhikkhunā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.5
Pali: ‘khama, gahapati, imassa bhikkhuno, pasādeti tan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.6
Pali: Evañce vuccamāno khamati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.7
Pali: No ce khamati, anudūtena bhikkhunā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.8
Pali: ‘khama, gahapati, imassa bhikkhuno, ahaṁ taṁ pasādemī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.9
Pali: Evañce vuccamāno khamati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.10
Pali: No ce khamati, anudūtena bhikkhunā vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.11
Pali: ‘khama, gahapati, imassa bhikkhuno, saṅghassa vacanenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.12
Pali: Evañce vuccamāno khamati, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:22.3.13
Pali: No ce khamati, anudūtena bhikkhunā sudhammo bhikkhu cittassa gahapatino dassanūpacāraṁ avijahāpetvā savanūpacāraṁ avijahāpetvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ kārāpetvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīdāpetvā añjaliṁ paggaṇhāpetvā taṁ āpattiṁ desāpetabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā sudhammo anudūtena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ macchikāsaṇḍaṁ gantvā cittaṁ gahapatiṁ khamāpesi. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.2
Pali: So sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.5
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:23.1.6
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.0
Pali: 4.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.9
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.11
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakamme nappaṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.12.0
Pali: 4.6. Paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.12.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.13
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.14
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.15
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.16
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.17
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.18
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.19
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.20
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.21
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:23.2.22
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakamme paṭippassambhetabbaaṭṭhārasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, sudhammena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.6
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.7
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.8
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.11
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.12
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.13
Pali: Saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.14
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.15
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.16
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.17
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.18
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.19
Pali: Ayaṁ sudhammo bhikkhu saṅghena paṭisāraṇīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.20
Pali: Saṅgho sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.22
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.23
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena sudhammassa bhikkhuno paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:24.1.25
Pali: Paṭisāraṇīyakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ catutthaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.0
Pali: 5. Āpattiyāadassaneukkhepanīyakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ passituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchissati āpattiṁ passitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ passitun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma so, bhikkhave, moghapuriso āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchissati āpattiṁ passituṁ? 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.13
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.14
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.15
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karotu—

pli-tv-kd11:25.1.16
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.2
Pali: paṭhamaṁ channo bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.4
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ passituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.6
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.7
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.8
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.9
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ passituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.10
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.11
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.12
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.13
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.14
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.15
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.16
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.17
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.18
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ passituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.19
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.20
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.22
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.23
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.24
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.25
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.26
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.27
Pali: Āvāsaparamparañca, bhikkhave, saṁsatha—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.28
Pali: ‘channo bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato—

pli-tv-kd11:25.2.29
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.0
Pali: 5.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.2
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.5
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.6
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.7
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.8
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.9
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.10
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.11
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.12
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.13
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.14
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.15
Pali: āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.17
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.18.0
Pali: 5.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.18.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.19
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.20
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.21
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.22
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.23
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.24
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.25
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.26
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.27
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.28
Pali: desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.29
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.30
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.31
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.32
Pali: āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.33
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.34
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.35.0
Pali: 5.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.35.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.36
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.37
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.38
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.39
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.40
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.41
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.42
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.43
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.44
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.45
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.46
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.47
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.48
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.49
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.50
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.51
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.52
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.53
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.54
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.55
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.56
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:26.1.57
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme ākaṅkhamānachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.0
Pali: 5.4. Tecattālīsavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.1
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.3
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.7
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.8
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.9
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.10
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.11
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.12
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.13
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.14
Pali: paccuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.15
Pali: añjalikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.16
Pali: sāmīcikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.17
Pali: āsanābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.18
Pali: seyyābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.19
Pali: pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.20
Pali: pādakathalikaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.21
Pali: pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.22
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sāditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.23
Pali: Na pakatatto bhikkhu sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.24
Pali: na ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.25
Pali: na diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.26
Pali: na ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.27
Pali: na bhikkhu bhikkhūhi bhedetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.28
Pali: na gihiddhajo dhāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.29
Pali: na titthiyaddhajo dhāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.30
Pali: na titthiyā sevitabbā; 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.31
Pali: bhikkhū sevitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.32
Pali: bhikkhusikkhāya sikkhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.33
Pali: Na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.34
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.35
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.36
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.37
Pali: na pakatatto bhikkhu āsādetabbo anto vā bahi vā. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.38
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.39
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.40
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.41
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.42
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.43
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.44
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.45
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:27.1.46
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme tecattālīsavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.2
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.3
Pali: So saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.4
Pali: Tattha bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.5
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.6
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.7
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.8
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.9
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato punadeva kosambiṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.10
Pali: So sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.11
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.12
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.13
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.1.14
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.0
Pali: 5.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.8
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.9
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ sādiyati—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.11
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.12
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sādiyati—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.13
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.14
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.15
Pali: Pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, bhikkhuṁ bhikkhūhi bhedeti—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.17
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.18
Pali: Gihiddhajaṁ dhāreti, titthiyaddhajaṁ dhāreti, titthiye sevati; 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.19
Pali: bhikkhū na sevati, bhikkhusikkhāya na sikkhati—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.20
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.21
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.22
Pali: Pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vasati, ekacchanne anāvāse vasati, ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vasati; 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.23
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā na vuṭṭhāti; 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.24
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ āsādeti anto vā bahi vā—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.25
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.26
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.27
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.28
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:28.2.29
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.0
Pali: 5.6. Paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.2
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.6
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.8
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.9
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ sādiyati—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.10
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.11
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.12
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sādiyati—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.13
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.14
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.15
Pali: Na pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na bhikkhuṁ bhikkhūhi bhedeti—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.17
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.18
Pali: Na gihiddhajaṁ dhāreti, na titthiyaddhajaṁ dhāreti, na titthiye sevati, bhikkhū sevati, bhikkhusikkhāya sikkhati—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.19
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.20
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.21
Pali: Na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vasati, na ekacchanne anāvāse vasati, na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vasati, pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhāti, na pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ āsādeti anto vā bahi vā—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.22
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.23
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.24
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.25
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:29.1.26
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakamme paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, channena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.6
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.7
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.8
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.11
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.12
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.13
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.14
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.15
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.16
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.17
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.18
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.19
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.20
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.22
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.23
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:30.1.25
Pali: Āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ pañcamaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.0
Pali: 6. Āpattiyāappaṭikammeukkhepanīyakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā kosambiyaṁ viharati ghositārāme. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā channo āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ paṭikātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma āyasmā channo āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchissati āpattiṁ paṭikātun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ paṭikātun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma so, bhikkhave, moghapuriso āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchissati āpattiṁ paṭikātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.13
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.14
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.15
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karotu—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.16
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.17
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.18
Pali: paṭhamaṁ channo bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.19
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.20
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ paṭikātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.21
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.22
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.23
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.24
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.25
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ paṭikātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.26
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.27
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.28
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.29
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.30
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.31
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.32
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.33
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.34
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpajjitvā na icchati āpattiṁ paṭikātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.35
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.36
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.37
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.38
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.39
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.40
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.41
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.42
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.43
Pali: Āvāsaparamparañca, bhikkhave, saṁsatha—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.44
Pali: ‘channo bhikkhu saṅghena āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.45
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.46.0
Pali: 6.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.46.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.47
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.48
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.49
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.50
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.51
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.52
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.53
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.54
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.55
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.56
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.57
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.58
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.59
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.60
Pali: āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.61
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.62
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.63.0
Pali: 6.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.63.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.64
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.65
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.66
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.67
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.68
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.69
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.70
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.71
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.72
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.73
Pali: desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.74
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.75
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.76
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.77
Pali: āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.78
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.79
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.80.0
Pali: 6.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.80.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.81
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.82
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.83
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.84
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.85
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.86
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.87
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.88
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.89
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.90
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.91
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.92
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.93
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.94
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.95
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.96
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.97
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.98
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.99
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.100
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.101
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.102
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme ākaṅkhamānachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.103.0
Pali: 6.4. Tecattālīsavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.103.1
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.104
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.105
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.106
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.107
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.108
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.109
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.110
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.111
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.112
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.113
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.114
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.115
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.116
Pali: paccuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.117
Pali: añjalikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.118
Pali: sāmīcikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.119
Pali: āsanābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.120
Pali: seyyābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.121
Pali: pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.122
Pali: pādakathalikaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.123
Pali: pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.124
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sāditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.125
Pali: Na pakatatto bhikkhu sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.126
Pali: na ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.127
Pali: na diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.128
Pali: na ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁsetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.129
Pali: na bhikkhu bhikkhūhi bhedetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.130
Pali: Na gihiddhajo dhāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.131
Pali: na titthiyaddhajo dhāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.132
Pali: na titthiyā sevitabbā; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.133
Pali: bhikkhū sevitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.134
Pali: bhikkhusikkhāya sikkhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.135
Pali: Na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.136
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.137
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.138
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.139
Pali: na pakatatto bhikkhu āsādetabbo anto vā bahi vā. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.140
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.141
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.142
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.143
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.144
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.145
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.146
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.147
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.148
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme tecattālīsavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.149
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.150
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.151
Pali: So saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato tamhā āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.152
Pali: Tattha bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.153
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.154
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.155
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato tamhāpi āvāsā aññaṁ āvāsaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.156
Pali: Tatthapi bhikkhū neva abhivādesuṁ, na paccuṭṭhesuṁ, na añjalikammaṁ na sāmīcikammaṁ akaṁsu, na sakkariṁsu, na garuṁ kariṁsu, na mānesuṁ, na pūjesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.157
Pali: So bhikkhūhi asakkariyamāno agarukariyamāno amāniyamāno apūjiyamāno asakkārapakato punadeva kosambiṁ paccāgañchi. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.158
Pali: So sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.159
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.160
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.161
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.162
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.163.0
Pali: 6.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.163.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.164
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.165
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.166
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.167
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.168
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.169
Pali: pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ sādiyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.170
Pali: pakatattassa bhikkhuno seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sādiyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.171
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, bhikkhuṁ bhikkhūhi bhedeti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.172
Pali: gihiddhajaṁ dhāreti, titthiyaddhajaṁ dhāreti, titthiye sevati, bhikkhū na sevati, bhikkhusikkhāya na sikkhati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.173
Pali: pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vasati, ekacchanne anāvāse vasati, ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vasati, pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā na vuṭṭhāti, pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ āsādeti anto vā bahi vā—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.174
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.175
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.176
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.177
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.178
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.179.0
Pali: 6.6. Paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.179.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.180
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.181
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.182
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.183
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.184
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.185
Pali: na pakatattassa bhikkhuno abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ sādiyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.186
Pali: na pakatattassa bhikkhuno seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ sādiyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.187
Pali: na pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na ācāravipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na diṭṭhivipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na ājīvavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti, na bhikkhuṁ bhikkhūhi bhedeti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.188
Pali: na gihiddhajaṁ dhāreti, na titthiyaddhajaṁ dhāreti, na titthiye sevati, bhikkhū sevati, bhikkhusikkhāya sikkhati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.189
Pali: na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vasati, na ekacchanne anāvāse vasati, na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vasati, pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhāti, na pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ āsādeti anto vā bahi vā—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.190
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.191
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.192
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.193
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.194
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakamme paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.195
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.196
Pali: Tena bhikkhave, channena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.197
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.198
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.199
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.200
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.201
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.202
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.203
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.204
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.205
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.206
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.207
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.208
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.209
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.210
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.211
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.212
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.213
Pali: Ayaṁ channo bhikkhu saṅghena, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.214
Pali: Saṅgho channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.215
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhi, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.216
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.217
Pali: Paṭippassaddhaṁ saṅghena channassa bhikkhuno, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.218
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:31.1.219
Pali: Āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhepanīyakammaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ chaṭṭhaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.0
Pali: 7. Pāpikāyadiṭṭhiyāappaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamma 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena ariṭṭhassa nāma bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.3
Pali: “tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho sambahulā bhikkhū ariṭṭhassa nāma kira bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.5
Pali: “Tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū yena ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo tenupasaṅkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.7
Pali: Upasaṅkamitvā ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, āvuso ariṭṭha, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.9
Pali: tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:32.1.10
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, āvuso, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.1
Pali: “Māvuso ariṭṭha, evaṁ avaca. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.2
Pali: Mā bhagavantaṁ abbhācikkhi. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.3
Pali: Na hi sādhu bhagavato abbhakkhānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.4
Pali: Na hi bhagavā evaṁ vadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.5
Pali: Anekapariyāyenāvuso ariṭṭha, antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā bhagavatā. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.6
Pali: Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.7
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.8
Pali: Aṭṭhikaṅkalūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.9
Pali: Maṁsapesūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.10
Pali: tiṇukkūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.11
Pali: aṅgārakāsūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.12
Pali: supinakūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.13
Pali: yācitakūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.14
Pali: rukkhaphalūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.15
Pali: asisūnūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.16
Pali: sattisūlūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.17
Pali: sappasirūpamā kāmā vuttā bhagavatā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.18
Pali: Evampi kho ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo tehi bhikkhūhi vuccamāno tatheva taṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ thāmasā parāmāsā abhinivissa voharati—

pli-tv-kd11:32.2.19
Pali: “evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, āvuso, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.1
Pali: Yato ca kho te bhikkhū nāsakkhiṁsu ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ etasmā pāpakā diṭṭhigatā vivecetuṁ, atha kho te bhikkhū yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā ariṭṭhaṁ bhikkhuṁ gaddhabādhipubbaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.3
Pali: “saccaṁ kira te, ariṭṭha, evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.4
Pali: tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.5
Pali: “Evaṁ byā kho ahaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi, yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.6
Pali: “Kassa nu kho nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, mayā evaṁ dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāsi? 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.7
Pali: Nanu mayā, moghapurisa, anekapariyāyena antarāyikā dhammā antarāyikā vuttā? 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.8
Pali: Alañca pana te paṭisevato antarāyāya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.9
Pali: Appassādā kāmā vuttā mayā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.10
Pali: Aṭṭhikaṅkalūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.11
Pali: Maṁsapesūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.12
Pali: tiṇukkūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.13
Pali: aṅgārakāsūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.14
Pali: supinakūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.15
Pali: yācitakūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.16
Pali: rukkhaphalūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.17
Pali: asisūnūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.18
Pali: sattisūlūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā … 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.19
Pali: sappasirūpamā kāmā vuttā mayā, bahudukkhā bahupāyāsā, ādīnavo ettha bhiyyo. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.20
Pali: Atha ca pana tvaṁ, moghapurisa, attanā duggahitena amhe ceva abbhācikkhasi, attānañca khaṇasi, bahuñca apuññaṁ pasavasi. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.21
Pali: Tañhi te, moghapurisa, bhavissati dīgharattaṁ ahitāya dukkhāya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.22
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.23
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.24
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.25
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karotu—

pli-tv-kd11:32.3.26
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.2
Pali: paṭhamaṁ ariṭṭho bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.4
Pali: Ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.5
Pali: tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyāti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.6
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.8
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.9
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.10
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.11
Pali: Ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.12
Pali: tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyāti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.13
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.14
Pali: Saṅgho ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.15
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.16
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.17
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.18
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.19
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.20
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.21
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.22
Pali: Ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa evarūpaṁ pāpakaṁ diṭṭhigataṁ uppannaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.23
Pali: tathāhaṁ bhagavatā dhammaṁ desitaṁ ājānāmi yathā yeme antarāyikā dhammā vuttā bhagavatā te paṭisevato nālaṁ antarāyāyāti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.24
Pali: So taṁ diṭṭhiṁ na paṭinissajjati. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.25
Pali: Saṅgho ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.26
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.27
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa karaṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.28
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.29
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.30
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.31
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.32
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.33
Pali: Āvāsaparamparañca, bhikkhave, saṁsatha—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.34
Pali: ‘ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo, saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato—

pli-tv-kd11:32.4.35
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghenā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.0
Pali: 7.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.1
Pali: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.2
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.5
Pali: Anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.6
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, asāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.7
Pali: asammukhā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.8
Pali: appaṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.9
Pali: appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.10
Pali: anāpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.11
Pali: adesanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.12
Pali: desitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.13
Pali: acodetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.14
Pali: asāretvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.15
Pali: āpattiṁ anāropetvā kataṁ hoti, adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.16
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.17
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamme adhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.18.0
Pali: 7.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.18.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.19
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.20
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.21
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.22
Pali: Āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.23
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, sāretvā kataṁ hoti, āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.24
Pali: sammukhā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.25
Pali: paṭipucchā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.26
Pali: paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.27
Pali: āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.28
Pali: desanāgāminiyā āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.29
Pali: adesitāya āpattiyā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.30
Pali: codetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.31
Pali: sāretvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.32
Pali: āpattiṁ āropetvā kataṁ hoti, dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.33
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.34
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamme dhammakammadvādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.35.0
Pali: 7.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.35.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.36
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.37
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.38
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.39
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.40
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.41
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.42
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.43
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.44
Pali: Buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.45
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.46
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.47
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.48
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.49
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.50
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.51
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.52
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.53
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.54
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.55
Pali: Eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.56
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissage, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.57
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissage ukkhepanīyakamme ākaṅkhamānachakkaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.58.0
Pali: 7.4. Tecattālīsavatta 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.58.1
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.59
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.60
Pali: na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.61
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.62
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.63
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.64
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.65
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.66
Pali: aññā vā tādisikā, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.67
Pali: tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.68
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.69.1
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā …pe…, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.70
Pali: na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.71
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.72
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.73
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.74
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.75
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.76
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.77
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:33.1.78
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamme tecattālīsavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho ariṭṭhassa bhikkhuno gaddhabādhipubbassa, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.2
Pali: asambhogaṁ saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.3
Pali: So saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato vibbhami. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato vibbhamissatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, ariṭṭho bhikkhu gaddhabādhipubbo saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato vibbhamatī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.11
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.12
Pali: kathañhi nāma so, bhikkhave, moghapuriso saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato vibbhamissati?
