pli-tv-kd11:34.1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.14
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.15
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd11:34.1.16
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetu. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.0
Pali: 7.5. Nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.2
Pali: Upasampādeti, nissayaṁ deti, sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.3
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissage, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.4
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.5
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.6
Pali: kammaṁ garahati, kammike garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.7
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.8
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.9
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.10
Pali: Pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, savacanīyaṁ karoti, anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, okāsaṁ kāreti, codeti, sāreti, bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.11
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ nappaṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.12
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamme nappaṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.13.0
Pali: 7.6. Paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.13.1
Pali: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.14
Pali: Na upasampādeti, na nissayaṁ deti, na sāmaṇeraṁ upaṭṭhāpeti, na bhikkhunovādakasammutiṁ sādiyati, sammatopi bhikkhuniyo na ovadati—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.15
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.16
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.17
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ kataṁ hoti taṁ āpattiṁ na āpajjati, aññaṁ vā tādisikaṁ, tato vā pāpiṭṭhataraṁ; 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.18
Pali: kammaṁ na garahati, kammike na garahati—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.19
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.20
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.21
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.22
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposathaṁ ṭhapeti, na pavāraṇaṁ ṭhapeti, na savacanīyaṁ karoti, na anuvādaṁ paṭṭhapeti, na okāsaṁ kāreti, na codeti, na sāreti, na bhikkhūhi sampayojeti—

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.23
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:34.2.24
Pali: Pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhepanīyakamme paṭippassambhetabbatecattālīsakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, paṭippassambhetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakatena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.4
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.5
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.6
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.7
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.8
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghena, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammakato sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyassa kammassa paṭippassaddhiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge, ukkhepanīyakammaṁ paṭippassambheyya. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.11

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.13

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.14

pli-tv-kd11:35.1.15

Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka

Pali: Cūḷavagga 

pli-tv-kd12:0.3
Pali: 12. Pārivāsikakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd12:0.4
Pali: 1. Pārivāsikavatta 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena pārivāsikā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma pārivāsikā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, pārivāsikā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, pārivāsikā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.12

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.13
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.14

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.15
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sāditabbaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.16
Pali: pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.17
Pali: paccuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.18
Pali: añjalikammaṁ,

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.20

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.21

Pali: Yo sādiyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.27
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pārivāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mithu yathāvuḍḍhaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.28
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pārivāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pañca yathāvuḍḍhaṁ—

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.29
Pali: uposathaṁ, pavāraṇaṁ, vassikasāṭikaṁ, oṇojanaṁ, bhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.1.30
Pali: Tena hi, bhikkhave, pārivāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ vattaṁ paññapessāmi yathā pārivāsikehi bhikkhūhi vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.1
Pali: Pārivāsikena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.3
Pali: Na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.7
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.8
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena parivāso dinno hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, aññā vā tādisikā, tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.9
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.10
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.11
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.12
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.13
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.14
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.15
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.16
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.17
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.18
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.19
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā pakatattassa bhikkhuno purato gantabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.20
Pali: na purato nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.21
Pali: Yo hoti saṅghassa āsanapariyanto seyyāpariyanto vihārapariyanto so tassa padātabbo. Tena ca so sāditabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.22
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā puresamaṇena vā 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.23
Pali: pacchāsamaṇena vā kulāni upasaṅkamitabbāni, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.24
Pali: na āraññikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.25
Pali: na piṇḍapātikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.26
Pali: na ca tappaccayā piṇḍapāto nīharāpetabbo—mā maṁ jāniṁsūti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.27
Pali: Pārivāsikena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā āgantukena ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.28
Pali: āgantukassa ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.29
Pali: uposathe ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.30
Pali: pavāraṇāya ārocetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.2.31
Pali: Sace gilāno hoti, dūtenapi ārocetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.1
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.2
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.3
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.4
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.5
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.6
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.7
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.8
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.9
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā abhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.10
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.11
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.12
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.13
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.14
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.15
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā.

Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.18
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.19
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.20
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko anāvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.21
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.22
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.23
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko anāvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.24
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.25
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.26
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko anāvāso, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.3.27
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.1
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.2
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.3
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.4
Pali: Pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.5
Pali: Pakatatto bhikkhu āsanena nimantetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.6
Pali: Na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekāsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.7
Pali: na nīce āsane nisinne ucce āsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.8
Pali: na chamāyaṁ nisinne āsane nisīditabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.9
Pali: na ekacaṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.10
Pali: na nīce caṅkame caṅkamante ucce caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.11
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.12
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, pārivāsikena bhikkhunā pārivāsikena vuḍḍhatarena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.13
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.14
Pali: mānattārahena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.15
Pali: mānattacārikena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.16
Pali: abbhānārahena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.17
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.18
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.19
Pali: na ekāsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.20
Pali: na nīce āsane nisinne ucce āsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.21
Pali: na chamāyaṁ nisinne āsane nisīditabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.22
Pali: na ekacaṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.23
Pali: na nīce caṅkame caṅkamante ucce caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.24
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.25
Pali: Pārivāsikacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.26
Pali: mūlāya paṭikasseyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.27
Pali: mānattaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.28
Pali: taṁvīso abbheyya, akammaṁ, na ca karaṇīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:1.4.29
Pali: Catunnavutipārivāsikavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā upāli yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.2
Pali: Upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.3
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā upāli bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.4
Pali: “kati nu kho, bhante, pārivāsikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.5
Pali: “Tayo kho, upāli, pārivāsikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā. 

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.6
Pali: Sahavāso, vippavāso, anārocanā—

pli-tv-kd12:2.1.7
Pali: ime kho, upāli, tayo pārivāsikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyaṁ mahābhikkhusaṅgho sannipatito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.2
Pali: Na sakkonti pārivāsikā bhikkhū parivāsaṁ sodhetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ nikkhipituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, nikkhipitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.6
Pali: Tena pārivāsikena bhikkhunā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.7
Pali: ‘parivāsaṁ nikkhipāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.8
Pali: Nikkhitto hoti parivāso. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.9
Pali: ‘Vattaṁ nikkhipāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.1.10
Pali: Nikkhitto hoti parivāso”. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyā bhikkhū tahaṁ tahaṁ pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.2
Pali: Sakkonti pārivāsikā bhikkhū parivāsaṁ sodhetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ samādiyituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, samādiyitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.6
Pali: Tena pārivāsikena bhikkhunā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.7
Pali: ‘parivāsaṁ samādiyāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.8
Pali: Samādinno hoti parivāso. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.9
Pali: ‘Vattaṁ samādiyāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.10
Pali: Samādinno hoti parivāso”. 

pli-tv-kd12:3.2.11
Pali: Pārivāsikavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.0
Pali: 2. Mūlāyapaṭikassanārahavatta 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mūlāyapaṭikassanārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mūlāyapaṭikassanārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.9
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.11
Pali: Netaṁ bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.12
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.13
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.14

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.26
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mithu yathāvuḍḍhaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.27
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pañca yathāvuḍḍhaṁ—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.28
Pali: uposathaṁ, pavāraṇaṁ, vassikasāṭikaṁ, oṇojanaṁ, bhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.29
Pali: Tena hi, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ vattaṁ paññapessāmi yathā mūlāyapaṭikassanārahehi bhikkhūhi vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.30
Pali: Mūlāyapaṭikassanārahena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.31
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.32
Pali: Na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.33
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.34
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.35
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.36
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.37
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena mūlāyapaṭikassanāraho kato hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, aññā vā tādisikā, tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.38
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.39
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.40
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.41
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.42
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.43
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.44
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.45
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.46
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.47
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.48

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.49
Pali: na purato nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.50
Pali: Yo hoti saṅghassa āsanapariyanto seyyāpariyanto vihārapariyanto so tassa padātabbo. Tena ca so sāditabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.51

Pali: na āraññikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ,

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.55

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.57

Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanārahena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ,

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.92

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.93
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ.

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.107

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.108
Pali: mūlāya paṭikasseyya,

Pali: mānattaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.110
Pali: taṁvīso abbheyya, akammaṁ, na ca karaṇīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:4.1.111
Pali: Mūlāyapaṭikassanārahavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.0
Pali: 3. Mānattārahavatta 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mānattārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mānattārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, mānattārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.6
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.7
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.8
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.9
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, mānattārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.10
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.11
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.12
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.13

Pali: pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.15
Pali: paccuṭṭhānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.16.1
Pali: …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.17
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.18

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.19

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.23

Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.48
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.49
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.50
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.51
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.52
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.53
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, yatthassu bhikkhū nānāsaṁvāsakā, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.54
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.55
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.56
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.57
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.58
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.59
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.60
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.61
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.62
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.63
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.64
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.65
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.66
Pali: Pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.67
Pali: Pakatatto bhikkhu āsanena nimantetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.68
Pali: Na pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekāsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.69
Pali: na nīce āsane nisinne ucce āsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.70
Pali: na chamāyaṁ nisinne āsane nisīditabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.71
Pali: na ekacaṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.72
Pali: na nīce caṅkame caṅkamante ucce caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.73
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.74
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattārahena bhikkhunā pārivāsikena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.75
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanārahena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.76
Pali: mānattārahena vuḍḍhatarena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.77
Pali: mānattacārikena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.78
Pali: abbhānārahena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.79
Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.80
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.81
Pali: na ekāsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.82
Pali: na nīce āsane nisinne ucce āsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.83
Pali: na chamāyaṁ nisinne āsane nisīditabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.84
Pali: na ekacaṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.85
Pali: na nīce caṅkame caṅkamante ucce caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.86
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.87
Pali: Mānattārahacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.88
Pali: mūlāya paṭikasseyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.89
Pali: mānattaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.90
Pali: taṁvīso abbheyya, akammaṁ, na ca karaṇīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:5.1.91
Pali: Mānattārahavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.0
Pali: 4. Mānattacārikavatta 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mānattacārikā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ, añjalikammaṁ, sāmīcikammaṁ, āsanābhihāraṁ, seyyābhihāraṁ, pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, pādakathalikaṁ, pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mānattacārikā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, mānattacārikā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.7
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.8
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.9
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.10
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, mānattacārikā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.11
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.12
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.13
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.14
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sāditabbaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.15
Pali: pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.16
Pali: paccuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.17
Pali: añjalikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.18
Pali: sāmīcikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.19
Pali: āsanābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.20
Pali: seyyābhihāro, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.21
Pali: pādodakaṁ pādapīṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.22
Pali: pādakathalikaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.23
Pali: pattacīvarappaṭiggahaṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.24
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.25
Pali: Yo sādiyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.26
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mānattacārikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mithu yathāvuḍḍhaṁ abhivādanaṁ, paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.27
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mānattacārikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pañca yathāvuḍḍhaṁ—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.28
Pali: uposathaṁ, pavāraṇaṁ, vassikasāṭikaṁ, oṇojanaṁ, bhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.29
Pali: Tena hi, bhikkhave, mānattacārikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ vattaṁ paññapessāmi yathā mānattacārikehi bhikkhūhi vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.30
Pali: Mānattacārikena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.31
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.32
Pali: Na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.33
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.34
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.35
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.36
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.37
Pali: Yāya āpattiyā saṅghena mānattaṁ dinnaṁ hoti sā āpatti na āpajjitabbā, aññā vā tādisikā, tato vā pāpiṭṭhatarā; 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.38
Pali: kammaṁ na garahitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.39
Pali: kammikā na garahitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.40
Pali: Na pakatattassa bhikkhuno uposatho ṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.41
Pali: na pavāraṇā ṭhapetabbā, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.42
Pali: na savacanīyaṁ kātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.43
Pali: na anuvādo paṭṭhapetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.44
Pali: na okāso kāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.45
Pali: na codetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.46
Pali: na sāretabbo, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.47
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.48
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā pakatattassa bhikkhuno purato gantabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.49
Pali: na purato nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.50
Pali: Yo hoti saṅghassa āsanapariyanto seyyāpariyanto vihārapariyanto so tassa padātabbo. Tena ca so sāditabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.51
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā puresamaṇena vā 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.52
Pali: pacchāsamaṇena vā kulāni upasaṅkamitabbāni, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.53
Pali: na āraññikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.54
Pali: na piṇḍapātikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.55
Pali: na ca tappaccayā piṇḍapāto nīharāpetabbo—mā maṁ jāniṁsūti. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.56
Pali: Mānattacārikena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā āgantukena ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.57
Pali: āgantukassa ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.58
Pali: uposathe ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.59
Pali: pavāraṇāya ārocetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.60
Pali: devasikaṁ ārocetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.61
Pali: Sace gilāno hoti, dūtenapi ārocetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.62
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, aññatra saṅghena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.63
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, aññatra saṅghena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.64
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, aññatra saṅghena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.65
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.66
Pali: abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.67
Pali: abhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā gantabbo, aññatra saṅghena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.68
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo …pe…

Pali: abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe…

Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe…

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.74

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.76

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.77
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā vā anāvāsā vā sabhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo …pe…

Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.79

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.80
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.81
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.82
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.83
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā anāvāsā sabhikkhuko āvāso …pe…

Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe…

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.89
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, mānattacārikena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ,

Pali: na nīce āsane nisinne ucce āsane nisīditabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.109
Pali: na chamāyaṁ nisinne āsane nisīditabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.110
Pali: na ekacaṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.111
Pali: na nīce caṅkame caṅkamante ucce caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.112
Pali: na chamāyaṁ caṅkamante caṅkame caṅkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.113
Pali: Mānattacārikacatuttho ce, bhikkhave, parivāsaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.114
Pali: mūlāya paṭikasseyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.115
Pali: mānattaṁ dadeyya, 

pli-tv-kd12:6.1.116
Pali: taṁvīso abbheyya, akammaṁ, na ca karaṇīyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā upāli yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā upāli bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.3
Pali: “kati nu kho, bhante, mānattacārikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.4
Pali: “Cattāro kho, upāli, mānattacārikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā. 

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.5
Pali: Sahavāso, vippavāso, anārocanā, ūne gaṇe caraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd12:7.1.6
Pali: ime kho, upāli, cattāro mānattacārikassa bhikkhuno ratticchedā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyaṁ mahābhikkhusaṅgho sannipatito hoti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.2
Pali: Na sakkonti mānattacārikā bhikkhū mānattaṁ sodhetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mānattaṁ nikkhipituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, nikkhipitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.6
Pali: Tena mānattacārikena bhikkhunā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.7
Pali: ‘mānattaṁ nikkhipāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.8
Pali: Nikkhittaṁ hoti mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.9
Pali: ‘Vattaṁ nikkhipāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.10
Pali: Nikkhittaṁ hoti mānattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyā bhikkhū tahaṁ tahaṁ pakkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.12
Pali: Sakkonti mānattacārikā bhikkhū mānattaṁ sodhetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.14
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, mānattaṁ samādiyituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.15
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, samādiyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.16
Pali: Tena mānattacārikena bhikkhunā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā, evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.17
Pali: ‘mānattaṁ samādiyāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.18
Pali: Samādinnaṁ hoti mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.19
Pali: ‘Vattaṁ samādiyāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.20
Pali: Samādinnaṁ hoti mānattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:8.1.21
Pali: Mānattacārikavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.0
Pali: 5. Abbhānārahavatta 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena abbhānārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.2
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma abbhānārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.6
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, abbhānārahā bhikkhū sādiyanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikamman”ti? 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.9
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.10
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.11
Pali: kathañhi nāma, bhikkhave, abbhānārahā bhikkhū sādiyissanti pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.12
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.13
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.14
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.15
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā sāditabbaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.16
Pali: pakatattānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccupaṭṭhānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.17.1
Pali: …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.18
Pali: nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.19
Pali: Yo sādiyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.20
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, abbhānārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mithu yathāvuḍḍhaṁ abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ …pe… nahāne piṭṭhiparikammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.21
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, abbhānārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pañca yathāvuḍḍhaṁ—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.22
Pali: uposathaṁ, pavāraṇaṁ, vassikasāṭikaṁ, oṇojanaṁ, bhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.23
Pali: Tena hi, bhikkhave, abbhānārahānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ vattaṁ paññapessāmi yathā abbhānārahehi bhikkhūhi vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.24
Pali: Abbhānārahena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.25
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.26
Pali: Na upasampādetabbaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.27.1
Pali: (yathā heṭṭhā, tathā vitthāretabbaṁ) 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.28
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.29
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā pakatattassa bhikkhuno purato gantabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.30
Pali: na purato nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.31
Pali: Yo hoti saṅghassa āsanapariyanto seyyāpariyanto vihārapariyanto so tassa padātabbo. Tena ca so sāditabbo. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.32
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā puresamaṇena vā 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.33
Pali: pacchāsamaṇena vā kulāni upasaṅkamitabbāni; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.34
Pali: na āraññikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.35
Pali: na piṇḍapātikaṅgaṁ samādātabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.36
Pali: na ca tappaccayā piṇḍapāto nīharāpetabbo—mā maṁ jāniṁsūti. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.37
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko āvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.38
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā abhikkhuko anāvāso gantabbo, aññatra pakatattena, aññatra antarāyā … 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.39
Pali: pe…. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.40.1
Pali: (Yathā heṭṭhā, tathā vitthāretabbā.) 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.41
Pali: Gantabbo, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā sabhikkhukā āvāsā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.42
Pali: anāvāsā …pe…

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.44.1
Pali: sabhikkhuko anāvāso …pe… 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.45
Pali: sabhikkhuko āvāso vā anāvāso vā, yatthassu bhikkhū samānasaṁvāsakā, yaṁ jaññā sakkomi ajjeva gantunti. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.46
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, abbhānārahena bhikkhunā pakatattena bhikkhunā saddhiṁ ekacchanne āvāse vatthabbaṁ,

Pali: na ekacchanne anāvāse vatthabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.48
Pali: na ekacchanne āvāse vā anāvāse vā vatthabbaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.49
Pali: pakatattaṁ bhikkhuṁ disvā āsanā vuṭṭhātabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.50
Pali: pakatatto bhikkhu āsanena nimantetabbo; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.51

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.74
Pali: Abbhānārahavattaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.75
Pali: Pārivāsikakkhandhako dutiyo. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.76
Pali: Imamhi khandhake vatthū pañca. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.77
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.78
Pali: Pārivāsikā sādenti, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.79
Pali: pakatattāna bhikkhunaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.80
Pali: Abhivādanaṁ paccuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.81
Pali: añjaliñca sāmīciyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.82
Pali: Āsanaṁ seyyābhihāraṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.83
Pali: pādo pīṭhaṁ kathalikaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.84
Pali: Pattaṁ nahāne parikammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.85
Pali: ujjhāyanti ca pesalā. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.86
Pali: Dukkaṭaṁ sādiyantassa, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.87
Pali: Mithu pañca yathāvuḍḍhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.88
Pali: Uposathaṁ pavāraṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.89
Pali: Vassikoṇojabhojanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.90
Pali: Sammā ca vattanā tattha, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.91
Pali: pakatattassa gacchantaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.92
Pali: Yo ca hoti pariyanto, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.93
Pali: pure pacchā tatheva ca. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.94
Pali: Āraññapiṇḍanīhāro, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.95
Pali: āgantuke uposathe; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.96
Pali: Pavāraṇāya dūtena, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.97
Pali: gantabbo ca sabhikkhuko. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.98
Pali: Ekacchanne ca vuṭṭhānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.99
Pali: tatheva ca nimantaye; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.100
Pali: Āsane nīce caṅkame, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.101
Pali: chamāyaṁ caṅkamena ca. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.102
Pali: Vuḍḍhatarena akammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.103
Pali: ratticchedā ca sodhanā; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.104
Pali: Nikkhipanaṁ samādānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.105
Pali: vattaṁva pārivāsike. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.106
Pali: Mūlāya mānattārahā, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.107
Pali: tathā mānattacārikā; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.108
Pali: Abbhānārahe nayo cāpi, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.109
Pali: sambhedaṁ nayato puna. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.110
Pali: Pārivāsikesu tayo, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.111
Pali: catu mānattacārike; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.112
Pali: Na samenti ratticchedesu, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.113
Pali: mānattesu ca devasi; 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.114
Pali: Dve kammā sadisā sesā, 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.115
Pali: tayo kammā samāsamāti. 

pli-tv-kd12:9.1.116
Pali: Pārivāsikakkhandhakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ.

pli-tv-kd13:0.1
Pali: Theravāda Vinayapiṭaka 

pli-tv-kd13:0.2
Pali: Cūḷavagga 

pli-tv-kd13:0.3
Pali: 13. Samuccayakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd13:0.4
Pali: 1. Sukkavissaṭṭhi 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.3
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.4
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.2.0
Pali: 1.1. Appaṭicchannamānatta 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.2.1
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.4
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.5
Pali: Ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.6
Pali: Dutiyampi, sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.7
Pali: Ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.2.8
Pali: Tatiyampi sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.8
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.9
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.10
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.13
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.14
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.15
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.16
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.17
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.18
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.19
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.20
Pali: Tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.21
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.22
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.23
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.24
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.25
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.26
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.27
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:1.3.28
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.0
Pali: 1.2. Appaṭicchannaabbhāna 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.3
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.4
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.5
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.6
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.1.8
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbhetu. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, abbhetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ, sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.4
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.6
Pali: Ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.8
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.9
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto dutiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.10
Pali: Ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.11
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.12
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.2.13
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto tatiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.5
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.6
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.8
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.9
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.10
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.11
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.12
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.13
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.14
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.15
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.16
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.17
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.18
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.19
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.20
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.21
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.22
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.23
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.24
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.25
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.26
Pali: Tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.27
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.28
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.29
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.30
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.31
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.32
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.33
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.34
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.35
Pali: Abbhito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd13:2.3.36
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.0
Pali: 1.3. Ekāhappaṭicchannaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.4
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.5
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.2.6
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.8
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.9
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.10
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.13
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.14
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.15
Pali: Dinno saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:3.3.16
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.0
Pali: 1.4. Ekāhappaṭicchannamānatta 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.1
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.3
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.4
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.5
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.6
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.1.8
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.8
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.2.9
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.5
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.6
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.8
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.9
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.10
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.11
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.12
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.13
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.14
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.15
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.16
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.17
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.18
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.19
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:4.3.20
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.0
Pali: 1.5. Ekāhappaṭicchannaabbhāna 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.3
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.4
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.5
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.7
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.8
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.1.10
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbhetu. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, abbhetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.8
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.9
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.10
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.2.11
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.5
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.6
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.7
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.8
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.11
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.12
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ ekāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.14
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya ekāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.15
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.16
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā ekāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.17
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.18
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.19
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.20
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.21
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.22
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.23
Pali: Abbhito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd13:5.3.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.0
Pali: 1.6. Pañcāhappaṭicchannaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ dvīhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.2
Pali: tīhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.3
Pali: catūhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.4
Pali: pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.5
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.6
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.7
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.9
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.10
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.11
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.12
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.13
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.14
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.15
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.16
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.17
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.18
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.19
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.20
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.21
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.22
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.23
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.24
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.25
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.26
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.27
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.28
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.29
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.30
Pali: Dinno saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:6.1.31
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.0
Pali: 1.7. Pārivāsikamūlāyapaṭikassanā 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.1
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.4
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.5
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.6
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.7
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.1.9
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassatu. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.8
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.9
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.2.10
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.5
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.6
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.7
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.8
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikasseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.9
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.10
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.11
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.12
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.13
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.14
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.15
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.16
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassati. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.17
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.18
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.19
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.20
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.21
Pali: Paṭikassito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā. 

pli-tv-kd13:7.3.22
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.0
Pali: 1.8. Mānattārahamūlāyapaṭikassanā 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.1
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.4
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.5
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.6
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.7
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.8
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.9
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.10
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.1.12
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassatu. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.5
Pali: sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.6
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.7
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.2.8
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.4
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.6
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikasseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.7
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.8
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.9
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.10
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.11
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.12
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassati. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.13
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.14
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.15
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.16
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.17
Pali: Paṭikassito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā. 

pli-tv-kd13:8.3.18
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.0
Pali: 1.9. Tikāpattimānatta 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.1
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.3
Pali: sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.7
Pali: sohaṁ, bhante, parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.8
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.2.9
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.4
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.8
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.9
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.10
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.13
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.14
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.15
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:9.3.16
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.0
Pali: 1.10. Mānattacārikamūlāyapaṭikassanā 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.1
Pali: So mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.4
Pali: sohaṁ mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.9
