pli-tv-kd13:10.1.12
Pali: sohaṁ mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.13
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.14
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.15
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.16
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.17
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.18
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.19
Pali: mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.20
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikasseyya.

Pali: Esā ñatti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.22
Pali: paṭikassito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.23
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmīti.

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.39
Pali: Esā ñatti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.40
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:10.1.41
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.0
Pali: 1.11. Abbhānārahamūlāyapaṭikassanā 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.4
Pali: sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.10
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:11.1.11
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.0
Pali: 1.12. Mūlāyapaṭikassitaabbhāna 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.3
Pali: sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbhetu. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, abbhetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.8
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.9
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.10
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.11
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.12
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.13
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.14
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.15
Pali: Sohaṁ mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.16
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.17
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.18
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.19
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.20
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.21
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.22
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.23
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.24
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.25
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.26
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.2.27
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.3
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.4
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.5
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya pañcāhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.6
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.7
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.8
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.9
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.10
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.11
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.12
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.13
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.14
Pali: So mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.15
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.16
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.17
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.18
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.19
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ appaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.20
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.21
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.22
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.23
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā appaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.24
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.25
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.26
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.27
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.28
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.29
Pali: so ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.30
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.31
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.32
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.33
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.34
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.35
Pali: Abbhito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd13:12.3.36
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.0
Pali: 1.13. Pakkhappaṭicchannaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā udāyī ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.7
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.8
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.9
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.10
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.11
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.12
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.13
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.14
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.15
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.16
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.17
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.18
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.19
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.21
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.22
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.23
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.24
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.25
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.26
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.27
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.28
Pali: Dinno saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:13.1.29
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.0
Pali: 1.14. Pakkhapārivāsikamūlāyapaṭikassana 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.1
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.4
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.5
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.6
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.7
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.1.9
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.8
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.9
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.10
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.11
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.12
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.13
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.14
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.15
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.16
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.17
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.18
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikasseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.19
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.21
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.22
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.23
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.24
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.25
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.26
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassati. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.27
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.28
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.29
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.30
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.31
Pali: Paṭikassito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanā. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.2.32
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.0
Pali: 1.15. Samodhānaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.1
Pali: “Evañca pana, bhikkhave, purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.2
Pali: tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.5
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.6
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.7
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.8
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.9
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.10
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.11
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.12
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.13
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.14
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.15
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.16
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.17
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.18
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.19
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.20
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.21
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.22
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.23
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.24
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.25
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.26
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.27
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.28
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.29
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.30
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.31
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.32
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.33
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.34
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.35
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.36
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.37
Pali: Dinno saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:14.3.38
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.0
Pali: 1.16. Mānattārahamūlāyapaṭikassanādi 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.1
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.4
Pali: sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.10
Pali: deti …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.11
Pali: Dinno saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:15.1.12
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.0
Pali: 1.17. Tikāpattimānatta 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.1
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.3
Pali: sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.7
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.8
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.9
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.10
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.11
Pali: sohaṁ, bhante, parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.12
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.13
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.14
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.15
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.16
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.17
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.18
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.19
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.21
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.22
Pali: so parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.23
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.24
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.25
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.26
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.27
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.28
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:16.1.29
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.0
Pali: 1.18. Mānattacārikamūlāyapaṭikassanādi 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.1
Pali: So mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.4
Pali: sohaṁ mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ datvā chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.10
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.11
Pali: deti …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.12
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:17.1.13
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.0
Pali: 1.19. Abbhānārahamūlāyapaṭikassanādi 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.4
Pali: sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.7
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassitvā purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ datvā chārattaṁ mānattaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.8
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, mūlāya paṭikassitabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.10
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, chārattaṁ mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.11
Pali: deti …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.12
Pali: Dinnaṁ saṅghena udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:18.1.13
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.0
Pali: 1.20. Pakkhappaṭicchannaabbhāna 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.1
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.3
Pali: sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.4
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.6
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbhetu. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.7
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, abbhetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.8
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, udāyinā bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā, ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā, vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā, ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā, añjaliṁ paggahetvā, evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.9
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.10
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.11
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.12
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.13
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.14
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.15
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.16
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.17
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.18
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.19
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.20
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.21
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.22
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.23
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.24
Pali: Sohaṁ mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.25
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.26
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.27
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.28
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.29
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.30
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.31
Pali: Sohaṁ ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjiṁ sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.32
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.33
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.34
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.35
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.36
Pali: Sohaṁ parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.37
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.38
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.39
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.40
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.41
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.42
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.43
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.44
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.45
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pakkhappaṭicchannāya pakkhaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.46
Pali: So parivasanto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.47
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.48
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.49
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.50
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.51
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso mānattāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.52
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.53
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.54
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.55
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.56
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.57
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno tissannaṁ āpattīnaṁ chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.58
Pali: So mānattaṁ caranto antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.59
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.60
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.61
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.62
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.63
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.64
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.65
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto abbhānāraho antarā ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pañcāhappaṭicchannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.66
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.67
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya mūlāya paṭikassi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.68
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.69
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.70
Pali: So parivutthaparivāso saṅghaṁ antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.71
Pali: Saṅgho udāyissa bhikkhuno antarā ekissā āpattiyā sañcetanikāya sukkavissaṭṭhiyā pañcāhappaṭicchannāya chārattaṁ mānattaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.72
Pali: So ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.73
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.74
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.75
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.76
Pali: Ayaṁ udāyī bhikkhu ekaṁ āpattiṁ āpajji sañcetanikaṁ sukkavissaṭṭhiṁ pakkhappaṭicchannaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.77
Pali: so ciṇṇamānatto saṅghaṁ abbhānaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.78
Pali: Saṅgho udāyiṁ bhikkhuṁ abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.79
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati udāyissa bhikkhuno abbhānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.80
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.81
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.82
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.83
Pali: Abbhito saṅghena udāyī bhikkhu. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.84
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:19.1.85
Pali: Sukkavissaṭṭhi samattā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.0.1
Pali: 2. Parivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.0.2
Pali: 2.1. Agghasamodhānaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.2
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti dvīhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti tīhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti catūhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti pañcāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti chāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti sattāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti aṭṭhāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti navāhappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.3
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.4
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.5
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.6
Pali: ekā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.7
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.1.9
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho tassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.5
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.6
Pali: ekā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.7
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.8
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.9
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.10
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.11
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.12
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.13
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.14
Pali: ekā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.15
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.16
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.17
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.18
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.19
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji—

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.20
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.21
Pali: ekā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.22
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.23
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.24
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā; 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.25
Pali: tassā agghena samodhānaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.26
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.27
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.28
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.29
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpatti dasāhappaṭicchannā tassā agghena samodhānaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:20.2.30
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.0
Pali: 2.2. Sabbacirappaṭicchannaagghasamodhāna 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.2
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā, dve āpattiyo dvīhappaṭicchannāyo, tisso āpattiyo tīhappaṭicchannāyo, catasso āpattiyo catūhappaṭicchannāyo, pañca āpattiyo pañcāhappaṭicchannāyo, cha āpattiyo chāhappaṭicchannāyo, satta āpattiyo sattāhappaṭicchannāyo, aṭṭha āpattiyo aṭṭhāhappaṭicchannāyo, nava āpattiyo navāhappaṭicchannāyo, dasa āpattiyo dasāhappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.3
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.4
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ, ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.5
Pali: dasa āpattiyo dasāhappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.6
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.8
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho tassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.9
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.10
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.11
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.12
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ, ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.13
Pali: dasa āpattiyo dasāhappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.14
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.15
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.16
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.17
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.18
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.19
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji, ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.20
Pali: dasa āpattiyo dasāhappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.21
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.22
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.23
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.24
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.25
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji—

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.26
Pali: ekā āpatti ekāhappaṭicchannā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.27
Pali: dasa āpattiyo dasāhappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.28
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.29
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.30
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.31
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.32
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.33
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.34
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ yā āpattiyo sabbacirappaṭicchannāyo tāsaṁ agghena samodhānaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:21.1.35
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.0
Pali: 2.3. Dvemāsaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpanno hoti dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.2
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.4
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.6
Pali: Tassa saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.7
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.8
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.9
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.10
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.11
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.12
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.13
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.14
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.1.15
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.1
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.2
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.3
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.5
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.6
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.7
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.8
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.9
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.10
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.11
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.12
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.13
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.14
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.15
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.16
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.17
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:22.2.18
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.1
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho tassa bhikkhuno itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.2
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.3
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā, ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā, vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā, ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā, añjaliṁ paggahetvā, evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.5
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.6
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.7
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.8
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.9
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.10
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.11
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.12
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.13
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.14
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.15
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.16
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.17
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.18
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.19
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.20
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.3.21
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.1
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.4
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.5
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.6
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.7
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.8
Pali: Tassa saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.9
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.10
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.11
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.12
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.13
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.14
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.15
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.16
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.17
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.18
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.19
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.20
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.21
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.22
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.23
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.24
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.25
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.26
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.27
Pali: Tassa saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.28
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.29
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.30
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.31
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.32
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.33
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.34
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.35
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.36
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.37
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.38
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.39
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.40
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.41
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.42
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.43
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.44
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:22.4.45
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tadupādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.0
Pali: 2.4. Dvemāsāparivasitabbavidhi 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.2
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.4
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.6
Pali: Tassa saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.7
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.8
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.9
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.10
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.11
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.12
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.13
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho ekissā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.14
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.15
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.16
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.17
Pali: Tassa saṅgho itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.1.18
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tadupādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.2
Pali: ekaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, ekaṁ āpattiṁ na jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ yaṁ āpattiṁ jānāti, tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.5
Pali: So parivasanto itarampi āpattiṁ jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.6
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.7
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.8
Pali: ekaṁ āpattiṁ jāniṁ, ekaṁ āpattiṁ na jāniṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.9
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ yaṁ āpattiṁ jāniṁ tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.10
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.11
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarampi āpattiṁ jānāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.12
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.14
Pali: Tassa saṅgho itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.2.15
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tadupādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.2
Pali: ekaṁ āpattiṁ sarati, ekaṁ āpattiṁ nassarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ yaṁ āpattiṁ sarati, tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.5
Pali: So parivasanto itarampi āpattiṁ sarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.6
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.7
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.8
Pali: ekaṁ āpattiṁ sariṁ, ekaṁ āpattiṁ nassariṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.9
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ yaṁ āpattiṁ sariṁ, tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.10
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.11
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarampi āpattiṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.12
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.14
Pali: Tassa saṅgho itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.3.15
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tadupādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.2
Pali: ekāya āpattiyā nibbematiko, ekāya āpattiyā vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ yāya āpattiyā nibbematiko, tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.5
Pali: So parivasanto itarissāpi āpattiyā nibbematiko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.6
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.7
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.8
Pali: ekāya āpattiyā nibbematiko, ekāya āpattiyā vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.9
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ yāya āpattiyā nibbematiko tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.10
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tassā āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.11
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarissāpi āpattiyā nibbematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.12
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.14
Pali: Tassa saṅgho itarissāpi āpattiyā dvemāsappaṭicchannāya dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.4.15
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā tadupādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.2
Pali: ekā āpatti jānappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti ajānappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.5
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.7
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.8
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.9
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.10
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.11
Pali: ekā āpatti jānappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti ajānappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.12
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.13
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.14
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno, tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.15
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.16
Pali: ‘yāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti jānappaṭicchannā, dhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.17
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.18
Pali: Yā ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti ajānappaṭicchannā, adhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.19
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.5.20
Pali: Ekissā, āvuso, āpattiyā bhikkhu mānattāraho’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.2
Pali: ekā āpatti saramānappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti assaramānappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.5
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.7
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.8
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.9
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.10
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.11
Pali: ekā āpatti saramānappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti assaramānappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.12
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.13
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.14
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.15
Pali: tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.16
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.17
Pali: ‘yāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti saramānappaṭicchannā dhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.18
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.19
Pali: Yā ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti assaramānappaṭicchannā, adhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.20
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.21
Pali: Ekissā, āvuso, āpattiyā bhikkhu mānattāraho’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.22
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.23
Pali: ekā āpatti nibbematikappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti vematikappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.24
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.25
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.26
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.27
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.28
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.29
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.30
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.31
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.32
Pali: ekā āpatti nibbematikappaṭicchannā, ekā āpatti vematikappaṭicchannā. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.33
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.34
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.35
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.36
Pali: tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.37
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.38
Pali: ‘yāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti nibbematikappaṭicchannā, dhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.39
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.40
Pali: Yā ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, āpatti vematikappaṭicchannā adhammikaṁ tassā āpattiyā parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.41
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:23.6.42
Pali: Ekissā, āvuso, āpattiyā bhikkhu mānattāraho’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpanno hoti dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.2
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.3
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.4
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.6
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.7
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.8
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.9
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.10
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.11
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.12
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.13
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.14
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.1.15
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.1
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.2
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.3
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo.

Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.6
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.7
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.8
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.9
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.10

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.11

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.13
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.14
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.15
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.16
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.17
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:24.2.18
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.1
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho tassa bhikkhuno dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.2
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.3
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.4
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.5
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.6
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.7

Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.9
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ.

Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi.

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.13
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.14
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.15
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.16
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.17
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.18
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.19
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.20
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.21
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.22
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.23
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.24
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.25
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.26
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.27
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.28
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.29
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.30
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.31
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.32
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.33
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.34
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.35
