pli-tv-kd13:24.3.36
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.37
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.38
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.39
Pali: “Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.40
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.41
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.42
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.43
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.44
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.45
Pali: Tassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.46
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.47
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.48
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.49
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.50
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.51
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.52
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.53
Pali: ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.54
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.55
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.56
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.57
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.58
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.59
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.60
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.61
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.62
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.63
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.64
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.65
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.66
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:24.3.67
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā purimaṁ upādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.2
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.4
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.6
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.7
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.8
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.9
Pali: Tassa me etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.10
Pali: “ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.11
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.12
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.13
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ ekamāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.14
Pali: Tassa me parivasantassa lajjīdhammo okkami—

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.15
Pali: “Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.16
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.17
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.1.18
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā purimaṁ upādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.2
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ jānāti, ekaṁ māsaṁ na jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ jānāti taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ jānāti taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.5
Pali: So parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.6
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.7
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.8
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ jāniṁ, ekaṁ māsaṁ na jāniṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.9
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ jāniṁ taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.10
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ jāniṁ taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.11
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ jānāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.12
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.14
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.15
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā purimaṁ upādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.16
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.17
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ sarati, ekaṁ māsaṁ nassarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.18
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ sarati taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.19
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ sarati taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.20
Pali: So parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ sarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.21
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.22
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.23
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ sariṁ, ekaṁ māsaṁ nassariṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.24
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ sariṁ taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.25
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ sariṁ taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.26
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.27
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.28
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.29
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.30
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā purimaṁ upādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.31
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.32
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko, ekaṁ māsaṁ vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.33
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.34
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.35
Pali: So parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ nibbematiko hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.36
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.37
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.38
Pali: ekaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko, ekaṁ māsaṁ vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.39
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.40
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchānnānaṁ yaṁ māsaṁ nibbematiko taṁ māsaṁ parivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.41
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto itarampi māsaṁ nibbematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.42
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yāceyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.43
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.44
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ itarampi māsaṁ parivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.2.45
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā purimaṁ upādāya dve māsā parivasitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.2
Pali: eko māso jānappaṭicchanno, eko māso ajānappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.5
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.7
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.8
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.9
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.10
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.11
Pali: Eko māso jānappaṭicchanno, eko māso ajānappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.12
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.13
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.14
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.15
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.16
Pali: ‘yvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso jānappaṭicchanno dhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.17
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.18
Pali: Yo ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso ajānappaṭicchanno adhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.19
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.20
Pali: Ekassa, āvuso, māsassa bhikkhu mānattāraho’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.21
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.22
Pali: eko māso saramānappaṭicchanno, eko māso assaramānappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.23
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.24
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.25
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.26
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.27
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.28
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.29
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.30
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.31
Pali: eko māso saramānappaṭicchanno, eko māso assaramānappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.32
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.33
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.34
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.35
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.36
Pali: ‘yvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso saramānappaṭicchanno dhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.37
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.38
Pali: Yo ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso assaramānappaṭicchanno adhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.39
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.40
Pali: Ekassa, āvuso, māsassa bhikkhu mānattāraho’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.41
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.42
Pali: eko māso nibbematikappaṭicchanno, eko māso vematikappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.43
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.44
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.45
Pali: Tassa parivasantassa añño bhikkhu āgacchati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.46
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.47
Pali: ‘kiṁ ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.48
Pali: Kissāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.49
Pali: Te evaṁ vadenti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.50
Pali: ‘ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu dve saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji dvemāsappaṭicchannāyo; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.51
Pali: eko māso nibbematikappaṭicchanno, eko māso vematikappaṭicchanno. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.52
Pali: So saṅghaṁ dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.53
Pali: Tassa saṅgho dvinnaṁ āpattīnaṁ dvemāsappaṭicchannānaṁ dvemāsaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.54
Pali: Tāyo ayaṁ, āvuso, bhikkhu āpanno tāsāyaṁ bhikkhu parivasatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.55
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.56
Pali: ‘yvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso nibbematikappaṭicchanno dhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.57
Pali: dhammattā ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.58
Pali: Yo ca khvāyaṁ, āvuso, māso vematikappaṭicchanno adhammikaṁ tassa māsassa parivāsadānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.59
Pali: adhammattā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:25.3.60
Pali: Ekassa, āvuso, māsassa bhikkhu mānattāraho’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.0
Pali: 2.5. Suddhantaparivāsa 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.2
Pali: So āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.3
Pali: rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.4
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.5
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.6
Pali: So bhikkhūnaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.7
Pali: “ahaṁ, āvuso, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.8
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāmi, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāmi; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.9
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarāmi, rattipariyantaṁ nassarāmi; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.10
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.11
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho mayā paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.12
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.1.13
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho tassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.3
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.4
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.5
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāmi, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāmi; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.6
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarāmi, rattipariyantaṁ nassarāmi; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.7
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.8
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.9
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.10
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.11
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.12
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.13
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.14
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.15
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.16
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.17
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.18
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.19
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.20
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.21
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajji. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.22
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.23
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.24
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.25
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.26
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.27
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāsassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.28
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.29
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.30
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.31
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ suddhantaparivāso. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.32
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.33
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, suddhantaparivāso dātabbo; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.2.34
Pali: evaṁ parivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.1
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, suddhantaparivāso dātabbo? 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.2
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.3
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.4
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante vematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.5
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.6
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.7
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ sarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.8
Pali: āpattipariyante nibbematiko, rattipariyante vematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.9
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.10
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.11
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.12
Pali: āpattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko, rattipariyante vematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.13
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.14
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.15
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.16
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.17
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.18
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.19
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ sarati, rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.20
Pali: āpattipariyante nibbematiko, rattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.21
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.22
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.23
Pali: rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.24
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.25
Pali: rattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.26
Pali: āpattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.27
Pali: rattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.28
Pali: suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.3.29
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, suddhantaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.1
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, parivāso dātabbo? 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.2
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.3
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ sarati, rattipariyantaṁ sarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.4
Pali: āpattipariyante nibbematiko, rattipariyante nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.5
Pali: parivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.6
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.7
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ sarati, 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.8
Pali: āpattipariyante vematiko, rattipariyante nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.9
Pali: parivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.10
Pali: Āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ jānāti, ekaccaṁ na jānāti, rattipariyantaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.11
Pali: āpattipariyantaṁ ekaccaṁ sarati, ekaccaṁ nassarati, rattipariyantaṁ sarati; 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.12
Pali: āpattipariyante ekacce vematiko, ekacce nibbematiko, rattipariyante nibbematiko—

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.13
Pali: parivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.14
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, parivāso dātabbo”. 

pli-tv-kd13:26.4.15
Pali: Parivāso niṭṭhito. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.0
Pali: 3. Cattālīsaka 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu parivasanto vibbhami. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.2
Pali: So puna paccāgantvā bhikkhū upasampadaṁ yāci. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.4
Pali: “Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.5
Pali: Vibbhantakassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.6
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.7
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto sāmaṇero hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.9
Pali: Sāmaṇerassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.10
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.11
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.12
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto ummattako hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.13
Pali: Ummattakassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.14
Pali: So ce puna anummattako hoti, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.15
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.16
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto khittacitto hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.17
Pali: Khittacittassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.18
Pali: So ce puna akhittacitto hoti, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.19
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.20
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto vedanāṭṭo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.21
Pali: Vedanāṭṭassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.22
Pali: So ce puna avedanāṭṭo hoti, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.23
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.24
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto, āpattiyā adassane, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.25
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.26
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.27
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.28
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto, āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.29
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.30
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.31
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.32
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā, appaṭinissagge, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.33
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, parivāso na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.34
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.1.35
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho, avaseso parivasitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mūlāyapaṭikassanāraho vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.2
Pali: Vibbhantakassa, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.3
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.4
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.5
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mūlāyapaṭikassanāraho sāmaṇero hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.7
Pali: ummattako hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.8
Pali: khittacitto hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.9
Pali: vedanāṭṭo hoti …pe…

Pali: āpattiyā adassane ukkhipiyyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.11
Pali: āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhipiyyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.12
Pali: pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā, appaṭinissagge, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.13
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, mūlāyapaṭikassanā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.14
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.15
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.2.16
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mānattāraho vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.2
Pali: Vibbhantakassa, bhikkhave, mānattadānaṁ na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.3
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.4
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.5
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mānattāraho sāmaṇero hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.7
Pali: ummattako hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.8
Pali: khittacitto hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.9
Pali: vedanāṭṭo hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.10
Pali: āpattiyā adassane, ukkhipiyyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.11
Pali: āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhipiyyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.12
Pali: pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā, appaṭinissagge, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.13
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, mānattadānaṁ na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.14
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.15
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.3.16
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mānattaṁ caranto vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.2
Pali: Vibbhantakassa, bhikkhave, mānattacariyā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.3
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.4
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo parivuttho suparivuttho; 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.5
Pali: yaṁ mānattaṁ dinnaṁ sudinnaṁ, yaṁ mānattaṁ ciṇṇaṁ suciṇṇaṁ, avasesaṁ caritabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mānattaṁ caranto sāmaṇero hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.7
Pali: ummattako hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.8
Pali: khittacitto hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.9
Pali: vedanāṭṭo hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.10

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.11
Pali: āpattiyā appaṭikamme, ukkhipiyyati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.12
Pali: pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā, appaṭinissagge, ukkhipiyyati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.13
Pali: Ukkhittakassa, bhikkhave, mānattacariyā na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.14
Pali: So ce puna osāriyyati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.15
Pali: Yo parivāso dinno sudinno, yo purivuttho suparivuttho; 

pli-tv-kd13:27.4.16
Pali: yaṁ mānattaṁ dinnaṁ sudinnaṁ, yaṁ mānattaṁ ciṇṇaṁ suciṇṇaṁ, avasesaṁ caritabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu abbhānāraho vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.2
Pali: Vibbhantakassa, bhikkhave, abbhānaṁ na ruhati. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.3
Pali: So ce puna upasampajjati, tassa tadeva purimaṁ parivāsadānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.4

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.5

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.6
Pali: So bhikkhu abbhetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu abbhānāraho sāmaṇero hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.8

pli-tv-kd13:27.5.13

Pali: So bhikkhu abbhetabbo.

Pali: Cattālīsakaṁ samattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.0
Pali: 4. Chattiṁsaka 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.2
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.3
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.4
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.5
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.7
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.8
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati aparimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.10
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.11
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.12
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.13
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.14
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.15
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.1.16
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu mānattāraho …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.2
Pali: mānattaṁ caranto …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.3
Pali: (yathāparivāsaṁ tathā vitthāretabbaṁ) 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.4
Pali: abbhānāraho antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā, āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.5
Pali: parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.6
Pali: parimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.7
Pali: aparimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.8
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.9
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.10
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.11
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.12
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.13
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.14
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:28.2.15
Pali: Chattiṁsakaṁ samattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.0
Pali: 5. Mānattasata 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā appaṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.2
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.3
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā appaṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.5
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.6
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno pacchimasmiṁ āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā paṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.8
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.9
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno purimasmiṁ āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.10
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā paṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.11
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.1.12
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno purimasmiñca pacchimasmiñca āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.2
Pali: Tassa honti āpattiyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.3
Pali: So vibbhamitvā puna upasampanno yā āpattiyo pubbe chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nacchādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.4
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.5
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno purimasmiṁ āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.7

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.8

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.9

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.10
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno purimasmiñca pacchimasmiñca āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:29.2.11

Pali: ekaccā āpattiyo jānāti, ekaccā āpattiyo na jānāti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.8
Pali: ekaccā āpattiyo sarati, ekaccā āpattiyo nassarati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.9
Pali: ekaccāsu āpattīsu nibbematiko, ekaccāsu āpattīsu vematiko. 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.10
Pali: Yāsu āpattīsu nibbematiko tā āpattiyo chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.11
Pali: yāsu āpattīsu vematiko tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.12
Pali: So vedanāṭṭo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.13
Pali: So puna avedanāṭṭo hutvā yā āpattiyo pubbe nibbematiko chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko nacchādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.14
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe vematiko nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko nacchādeti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.15
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe nibbematiko chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko nacchādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.16
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe vematiko nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.17
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe nibbematiko chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.18
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe vematiko nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko nacchādeti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.19
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe nibbematiko chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.20
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe vematiko nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.21
Pali: Tassa, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno purimasmiñca pacchimasmiñca āpattikkhandhe yathāpaṭicchanne parivāsaṁ datvā mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:30.1.22
Pali: Mānattasataṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.0
Pali: 6. Samūlāyasamodhānaparivāsacatussata 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā appaṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.2
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.3
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā appaṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.5
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.6
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.7
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā paṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.9
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.10
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.11
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.12
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā paṭicchādetvā vibbhamati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.13
Pali: So puna upasampanno tā āpattiyo chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.14
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.1.15
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.2
Pali: Tassa honti āpattiyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.3
Pali: So vibbhamitvā puna upasampanno yā āpattiyo pubbe chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nacchādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.4
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.5
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.6
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati.

Pali: Tassa honti āpattiyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.9

pli-tv-kd13:31.2.11

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.2
Pali: Ekaccā āpattiyo jānāti, ekaccā āpattiyo na jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.3
Pali: Yā āpattiyo jānāti tā āpattiyo chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.4

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.5

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.90
Pali: Yāsu āpattīsu nibbematiko tā āpattiyo chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.91
Pali: yāsu āpattīsu vematiko tā āpattiyo nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.92
Pali: So vibbhamitvā puna upasampanno yā āpattiyo pubbe nibbematiko chādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti; 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.93
Pali: yā āpattiyo pubbe vematiko nacchādesi tā āpattiyo pacchā nibbematiko chādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.94
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.95
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.96
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā appaṭicchādetvā sāmaṇero hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.97
Pali: ummattako hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.98
Pali: khittacitto hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.99
Pali: vedanāṭṭo hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.100
Pali: tassa honti āpattiyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.101
Pali: (yathā heṭṭhā vitthāritaṁ tathā vitthāretabbaṁ) 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.102
Pali: ekaccā āpattiyo jānāti, ekaccā āpattiyo na jānāti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.103
Pali: ekaccā āpattiyo sarati, ekaccā āpattiyo nassarati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.104
Pali: ekaccāsu āpattīsu nibbematiko, ekaccāsu āpattīsu vematiko.

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.107
Pali: So vedanāṭṭo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.108

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.109

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.110

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.111

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.112

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.116
Pali: So bhikkhu mūlāya paṭikassitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:31.3.117
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchannānañcassa āpattīnaṁ purimāya āpattiyā samodhānaparivāso dātabbo.

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.0
Pali: 7. Parimāṇādivāraaṭṭhaka 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjitvā parimāṇā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.2
Pali: aparimāṇā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.3
Pali: ekanāmā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.4
Pali: nānānāmā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.5
Pali: sabhāgā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.6
Pali: visabhāgā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.7
Pali: vavatthitā appaṭicchādetvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.8
Pali: sambhinnā appaṭicchādetvā vibbhamati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.9
Pali: (yathā heṭṭhā tathā vitthāretabbaṁ). 

pli-tv-kd13:33.1.10
Pali: Parimāṇādivāraaṭṭhakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.0
Pali: 8. Dvebhikkhuvāraekādasaka 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.1
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.2
Pali: Te saṅghādisese saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.3
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.4
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.5
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.6
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.7
Pali: Te saṅghādisese vematikā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.8
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.9
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.10
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.11
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.12
Pali: Te saṅghādisese missakadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.13
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.14
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.15
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.16
Pali: Dve bhikkhū missakaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.17
Pali: Te missake saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.18
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.19
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.20
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.21
Pali: Dve bhikkhū missakaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.22
Pali: Te missake missakadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.23
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.24
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.25
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.26
Pali: Dve bhikkhū suddhakaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.27
Pali: Te suddhake saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.28
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.29
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.30
Pali: Ubhopi yathādhammaṁ kārāpetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.31
Pali: Dve bhikkhū suddhakaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.32
Pali: Te suddhake suddhakadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.33
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.34
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.1.35
Pali: Ubhopi yathādhammaṁ kārāpetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.1
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.2
Pali: Te saṅghādisese saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.3
Pali: Ekassa hoti ārocessāmīti, ekassa hoti na ārocessāmīti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.4
Pali: So paṭhamampi yāmaṁ chādeti, dutiyampi yāmaṁ chādeti, tatiyampi yāmaṁ chādeti—

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.5
Pali: uṭṭhite aruṇe channā hoti āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.6
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.7
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.8
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.9
Pali: Te saṅghādisese saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.10
Pali: Te gacchanti ārocessāmāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.11
Pali: Ekassa antarāmagge makkhadhammo uppajjati na ārocessāmīti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.12
Pali: So paṭhamampi yāmaṁ chādeti, dutiyampi yāmaṁ chādeti, tatiyampi yāmaṁ chādeti—

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.13
Pali: uṭṭhite aruṇe channā hoti āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.14
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.15
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.16
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.17
Pali: Te saṅghādisese saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.18
Pali: Te ummattakā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.19
Pali: Te pacchā anummattakā hutvā eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.20
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.21
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.22
Pali: Dve bhikkhū saṅghādisesaṁ āpannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.23
Pali: Te pātimokkhe uddissamāne evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.24
Pali: ‘idāneva kho mayaṁ jānāma—

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.25
Pali: ayampi kira dhammo suttāgato suttapariyāpanno anvaddhamāsaṁ uddesaṁ āgacchatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.26
Pali: Te saṅghādisese saṅghādisesadiṭṭhino honti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.27
Pali: Eko chādeti, eko nacchādeti. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.28
Pali: Yo chādeti so dukkaṭaṁ desāpetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.29
Pali: Yathāpaṭicchanne cassa parivāsaṁ datvā ubhinnampi mānattaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:34.2.30
Pali: Dvebhikkhuvāraekādasakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.0
Pali: 9. Mūlāyaavisuddhinavaka 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.2
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.3
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.4
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.6
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.7
Pali: adhammena mānattaṁ deti, adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.8
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.10
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.11
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.12
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyo paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.14
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.15
Pali: adhammena mānattaṁ deti, adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.16
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.17
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.18
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.19
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.20
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.21
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.22
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti, adhammena mānattaṁ deti, adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.1.23
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.2
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.3
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.4
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati aparimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.5
Pali: aparimāṇāyo paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.6
Pali: aparimāṇāyo paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.7
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.8
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.9
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.10
Pali: adhammena mānattaṁ deti, adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.11
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.12
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.13
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.14
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.15
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.16
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.17
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.18
Pali: adhammena mānattaṁ deti, adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.19
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.20
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.21
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.22
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.23
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.24
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.25
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.26
Pali: dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.27
Pali: adhammena mānattaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.28
Pali: adhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.29
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:35.2.30
Pali: Mūlāyaavisuddhinavakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.0
Pali: 10. Dutiyanavaka 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.2
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti, so parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.5
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.6
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.7
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.8
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.10
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.11
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.12
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.13
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.14
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.15
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.16
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.17
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.18
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe…

Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.20

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.21
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.22
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.23

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.26
Pali: So bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.27
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi, ekanāmampi nānānāmampi, sabhāgampi visabhāgampi, vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.28
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.29
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.30
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati aparimāṇā appaṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.31
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyo …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.32
Pali: aparimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.33
Pali: parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.34
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati.

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.44
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti, dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.45
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.46
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.47
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.48
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.49
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.50
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyopi aparimāṇāyopi paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.51
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.52
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.53
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.54
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu avisuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.1.55
Pali: Dutiyanavakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.0
Pali: 11. Tatiyanavaka 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.1
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.2
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.3
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.4
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.5
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.6
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.7
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.8
Pali: So parivasāmīti maññamāno antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.9
Pali: So tasmiṁ bhūmiyaṁ ṭhito purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarati, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.10
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.11
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.12
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.13
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.14
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.15
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.16
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.17
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassi adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.18
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasāmīti maññamāno antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇāyo appaṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.19
Pali: Sohaṁ tasmiṁ bhūmiyaṁ ṭhito purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarāmi, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.20
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāceyyaṁ dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.21
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ, dhammena abbhānan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.22
Pali: So saṅghaṁ purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.23
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ, dhammena abbhānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.24
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.25
Pali: dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.26
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu visuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.27
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.28
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.29
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.30
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.31
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.32
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.33
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassati, adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.34
Pali: So parivasāmīti maññamāno antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.35
Pali: So tasmiṁ bhūmiyaṁ ṭhito purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarati, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.36
Pali: Tassa evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.37
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.38
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.39
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.40
Pali: Tassa me saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.41
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.42
Pali: Sohaṁ saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāciṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.43
Pali: Taṁ maṁ saṅgho antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāya paṭikassi, adhammikena kammena kuppena aṭṭhānārahena, adhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.44
Pali: Sohaṁ parivasāmīti maññamāno antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjiṁ parimāṇā paṭicchannāyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.45
Pali: Sohaṁ tasmiṁ bhūmiyaṁ ṭhito purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarāmi, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattiyo sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.46
Pali: Yannūnāhaṁ saṅghaṁ purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yāceyyaṁ dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ, dhammena mānattaṁ, dhammena abbhānan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.47
Pali: So saṅghaṁ purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ, dhammena mānattaṁ, dhammena abbhānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.48
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho purimāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, aparāāpattīnaṁ antarāāpattīnañca, mūlāya paṭikassati dhammikena kammena akuppena ṭhānārahena, dhammena samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti, dhammena mānattaṁ deti, dhammena abbheti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.49
Pali: So, bhikkhave, bhikkhu visuddho tāhi āpattīhi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.50
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇampi aparimāṇampi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.51
Pali: vavatthitampi sambhinnampi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.52
Pali: So saṅghaṁ tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.53
Pali: Tassa saṅgho tāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ samodhānaparivāsaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.54
Pali: So parivasanto antarā sambahulā saṅghādisesā āpattiyo āpajjati parimāṇā paṭicchannāyopi appaṭicchannāyopi. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.55
Pali: So saṅghaṁ antarāāpattīnaṁ mūlāyapaṭikassanaṁ yācati.

pli-tv-kd13:36.2.57

Pali: Tatiyanavakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.48
Pali: Samuccayakkhandhako tatiyo. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.49
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.50
Pali: Appaṭicchannā ekāha, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.51
Pali: dvīha tīha catūha ca; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.52
Pali: Pañcāhapakkhadasannaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.53
Pali: āpattimāha mahāmuni. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.54
Pali: Suddhanto ca vibbhamanto, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.55
Pali: parimāṇamukhaṁ dve bhikkhū; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.56
Pali: Tattha saññino dve yathā, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.57
Pali: vematikā tatheva ca. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.58
Pali: Missakadiṭṭhino dve ca, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.59
Pali: asuddhakekadiṭṭhino; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.60
Pali: Dve ceva suddhadiṭṭhino. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.61
Pali: Tatheva ca eko chādeti, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.62
Pali: Atha makkhamatena ca; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.63
Pali: Ummattakadesanañca, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.64
Pali: Mūlā aṭṭhārasa visuddhato. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.65
Pali: Ācariyānaṁ vibhajjapadānaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.66
Pali: Tambapaṇṇidīpapasādakānaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.67
Pali: Mahāvihāravāsīnaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.68
Pali: Vācanā saddhammaṭṭhitiyāti. 

pli-tv-kd13:36.4.69
Pali: Samuccayakkhandhako niṭṭhito.
