Pali: Cūḷavagga 

pli-tv-kd14:0.3
Pali: 14. Samathakkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd14:0.4
Pali: 1. Sammukhāvinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū asammukhībhūtānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.3
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampi. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.5
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū asammukhībhūtānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.6
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.7
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū asammukhībhūtānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.9
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.10
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.11
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.12
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, bhikkhave, tesaṁ moghapurisānaṁ ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.13
Pali: Kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā asammukhībhūtānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.14
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampi. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.15
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.16
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.17
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.18
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, asammukhībhūtānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ kammaṁ kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.19
Pali: tajjanīyaṁ vā, niyassaṁ vā, pabbājanīyaṁ vā, paṭisāraṇīyaṁ vā, ukkhepanīyaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.20
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.21
Pali: Adhammavādī puggalo adhammavādī sambahulā adhammavādī saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:1.1.22
Pali: Dhammavādī puggalo dhammavādī sambahulā dhammavādī saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.0
Pali: 1.1. Kaṇhapakkhanavaka 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.1
Pali: Adhammavādī puggalo dhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.2
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.3
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.4
Pali: Adhammavādī puggalo dhammavādī sambahule saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.5
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.6
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.7
Pali: Adhammavādī puggalo dhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.8
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.9
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.10
Pali: Adhammavādī sambahulā dhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.11
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.12
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.13
Pali: Adhammavādī sambahulā dhammavādī sambahule saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.14
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.15
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.16
Pali: Adhammavādī sambahulā dhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.17
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.18
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.19
Pali: Adhammavādī saṅgho dhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.20
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.21
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.22
Pali: Adhammavādī saṅgho dhammavādī sambahule saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.23
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.24
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.25
Pali: Adhammavādī saṅgho dhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.26
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.27
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, adhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayapatirūpakena. 

pli-tv-kd14:2.1.28
Pali: Kaṇhapakkhanavakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.0
Pali: 1.2. Sukkapakkhanavaka 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.1
Pali: Dhammavādī puggalo adhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.2
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.3
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.4
Pali: Dhammavādī puggalo adhammavādī sambahule saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.5
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.6
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.7
Pali: Dhammavādī puggalo adhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.8
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.9
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.10
Pali: Dhammavādī sambahulā adhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.11
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.12
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.13
Pali: Dhammavādī sambahulā adhammavādī sambahule saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.14
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.15
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.16
Pali: Dhammavādī sambahulā adhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpenti nijjhāpenti pekkhenti anupekkhenti dassenti anudassenti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.17
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.18
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.19
Pali: Dhammavādī saṅgho adhammavādiṁ puggalaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.20
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.21
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.22
Pali: Dhammavādī saṅgho adhammavādī sambahule saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.23
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhatha, imaṁ rocethā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.24
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.25
Pali: Dhammavādī saṅgho adhammavādiṁ saṅghaṁ saññāpeti nijjhāpeti pekkheti anupekkheti dasseti anudasseti—

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.26
Pali: ‘ayaṁ dhammo, ayaṁ vinayo, idaṁ satthusāsanaṁ, imaṁ gaṇhāhi, imaṁ rocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.27
Pali: Evañcetaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati, dhammena vūpasammati sammukhāvinayenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:3.1.28
Pali: Sukkapakkhanavakaṁ niṭṭhitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.0
Pali: 2. Sativinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmatā dabbena mallaputtena jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.3
Pali: Yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ sabbaṁ tena anuppattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.4
Pali: Natthi cassa kiñci uttari karaṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.5
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.6
Pali: “mayā kho jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.7
Pali: Yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ sabbaṁ mayā anuppattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.8
Pali: Natthi ca me kiñci uttarikaraṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.9
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ saṅghassa veyyāvaccaṁ kareyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.10
Pali: Atha kho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.1.11
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeyyaṁ bhattāni ca uddiseyyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto sāyanhasamayaṁ paṭisallānā vuṭṭhito yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.3
Pali: “idha mayhaṁ, bhante, rahogatassa paṭisallīnassa evaṁ cetaso parivitakko udapādi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.4
Pali: ‘mayā kho jātiyā sattavassena arahattaṁ sacchikataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.5
Pali: Yaṁ kiñci sāvakena pattabbaṁ, sabbaṁ mayā anuppattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.6
Pali: Natthi ca me kiñci uttarikaraṇīyaṁ, katassa vā paticayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.7
Pali: Kiṁ nu kho ahaṁ saṅghassa veyyāvaccaṁ kareyyan’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.8
Pali: Tassa mayhaṁ, bhante, etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.9
Pali: ‘yannūnāhaṁ saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapeyyaṁ bhattāni ca uddiseyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.10
Pali: Icchāmahaṁ, bhante, saṅghassa senāsanañca paññāpetuṁ bhattāni ca uddisitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.11
Pali: “Sādhu sādhu, dabba. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.12
Pali: Tena hi tvaṁ, dabba, saṅghassa senāsanañca paññapehi bhattāni ca uddisāhī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.2.13
Pali: “Evaṁ, bhante”ti kho āyasmā dabbo mallaputto bhagavato paccassosi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.2
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammannatu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.3
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.4
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ dabbo mallaputto yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.5
Pali: Yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.6
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.7
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.8
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.9
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.10
Pali: Saṅgho āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ senāsanapaññāpakañca bhattuddesakañca sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa senāsanapaññāpakassa ca bhattuddesakassa ca sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.13
Pali: Sammato saṅghena āyasmā dabbo mallaputto senāsanapaññāpako ca bhattuddesako ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.3.14
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.1
Pali: Sammato ca panāyasmā dabbo mallaputto sabhāgānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū suttantikā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.3
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ suttantaṁ saṅgāyissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.4
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū vinayadharā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.5
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ vinayaṁ vinicchinissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.6
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū dhammakathikā tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.7
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ dhammaṁ sākacchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.8
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū jhāyino tesaṁ ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.9
Pali: “te aññamaññaṁ na byābādhissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.10
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū tiracchānakathikā kāyadaḷhibahulā viharanti tesampi ekajjhaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.11
Pali: “imāyapime āyasmanto ratiyā acchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.12
Pali: Yepi te bhikkhū vikāle āgacchanti tesampi tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā teneva ālokena senāsanaṁ paññapeti; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.13
Pali: apissu bhikkhū sañcicca vikāle āgacchanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.14
Pali: “mayaṁ āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ passissāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.15
Pali: Te āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ upasaṅkamitvā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.16
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso dabba, senāsanaṁ paññapehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.17
Pali: Te āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.18
Pali: “kattha āyasmantā icchanti kattha paññapemī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.19
Pali: Te sañcicca dūre apadisanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.20
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso dabba, gijjhakūṭe pabbate senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.21
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, corapapāte senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.22
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, isigilipasse kāḷasilāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.23
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, vebhārapasse sattapaṇṇiguhāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.24
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, sītavane sappasoṇḍikapabbhāre senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.25
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, gotamakakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.26
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tindukakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.27
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tapodakandarāyaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.28
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, tapodārāme senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.29
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, jīvakambavane senāsanaṁ paññapehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.30
Pali: Amhākaṁ, āvuso, maddakucchimhi migadāye senāsanaṁ paññapehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.31
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto tejodhātuṁ samāpajjitvā aṅguliyā jalamānāya purato purato gacchati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.32
Pali: Tepi teneva ālokena āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa piṭṭhito piṭṭhito gacchanti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.33
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapeti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.34
Pali: “ayaṁ mañco, idaṁ pīṭhaṁ, ayaṁ bhisi, idaṁ bibbohanaṁ, idaṁ vaccaṭṭhānaṁ, idaṁ passāvaṭṭhānaṁ, idaṁ pānīyaṁ, idaṁ paribhojanīyaṁ, ayaṁ kattaradaṇḍo, idaṁ saṅghassa katikasaṇṭhānaṁ, imaṁ kālaṁ pavisitabbaṁ, imaṁ kālaṁ nikkhamitabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.4.35
Pali: Tesaṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto evaṁ senāsanaṁ paññapetvā punadeva veḷuvanaṁ paccāgacchati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū navakā ceva honti appapuññā ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.2
Pali: Yāni saṅghassa lāmakāni senāsanāni tāni tesaṁ pāpuṇanti lāmakāni ca bhattāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.3
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahe manussā icchanti therānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ abhisaṅkhārikaṁ piṇḍapātaṁ dātuṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.4
Pali: sappimpi, telampi, uttaribhaṅgampi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.5
Pali: Mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ pana bhikkhūnaṁ pākatikaṁ denti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.6
Pali: yathārandhaṁ kaṇājakaṁ bilaṅgadutiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.7
Pali: Te pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā there bhikkhū pucchanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.8
Pali: “tumhākaṁ, āvuso, bhattagge kiṁ ahosi, tumhākaṁ kiṁ ahosī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.9
Pali: Ekacce therā evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.10
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso, sappi ahosi, telaṁ ahosi, uttaribhaṅgaṁ ahosī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.11
Pali: Mettiyabhūmajakā pana bhikkhū evaṁ vadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.12
Pali: “amhākaṁ, āvuso, na kiñci ahosi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.5.13
Pali: pākatikaṁ yathārandhaṁ kaṇājakaṁ bilaṅgadutiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati saṅghassa catukkabhattaṁ deti niccabhattaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.2
Pali: So bhattagge saputtadāro upatiṭṭhitvā parivisati—

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.3
Pali: aññe odanena pucchanti, aññe sūpena pucchanti, aññe telena pucchanti, aññe uttaribhaṅgena pucchanti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino bhattaṁ svātanāya mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ uddiṭṭhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.5
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati ārāmaṁ agamāsi kenacideva karaṇīyena. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.6
Pali: So yenāyasmā dabbo mallaputto tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.7
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho kalyāṇabhattikaṁ gahapatiṁ āyasmā dabbo mallaputto dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.8
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati āyasmatā dabbena mallaputtena dhammiyā kathāya sandassito samādapito samuttejito sampahaṁsito āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.9
Pali: “kassa, bhante, amhākaṁ ghare svātanāya bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhan”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.10
Pali: “Mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ kho, gahapati, bhikkhūnaṁ tumhākaṁ ghare svātanāya bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.11
Pali: Atha kho kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati anattamano ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.12
Pali: Kathañhi nāma pāpabhikkhū amhākaṁ ghare bhuñjissantīti gharaṁ gantvā dāsiṁ āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.13
Pali: “ye, je, sve bhattikā āgacchanti te koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena parivisā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.6.14
Pali: “Evaṁ, ayyā”ti kho sā dāsī kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino paccassosi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.1
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.2
Pali: “hiyyo kho, āvuso, amhākaṁ kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino bhattaṁ uddiṭṭhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.3
Pali: sve amhe kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati saputtadāro upatiṭṭhitvā parivisissati; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.4
Pali: aññe odanena pucchissanti, aññe sūpena pucchissanti, aññe telena pucchissanti, aññe uttaribhaṅgena pucchissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.5
Pali: Te teneva somanassena na cittarūpaṁ rattiyā supiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.6
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena kalyāṇabhattikassa gahapatino nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.7
Pali: Addasā kho sā dāsī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū dūratova āgacchante; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.8
Pali: disvāna koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.9
Pali: “nisīdatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.10
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.11
Pali: “nissaṁsayaṁ kho na tāva bhattaṁ siddhaṁ bhavissati yathā mayaṁ koṭṭhake nisīdāpiyāmā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.12
Pali: Atha kho sā dāsī kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena upagañchi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.13
Pali: “bhuñjatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.14
Pali: “Mayaṁ kho, bhagini, niccabhattikā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.15
Pali: “Jānāmi ayyā niccabhattikāti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.16
Pali: Api cāhaṁ hiyyova gahapatinā āṇattā—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.17
Pali: ‘ye, je, sve bhattikā āgacchanti, te koṭṭhake āsanaṁ paññapetvā kaṇājakena bilaṅgadutiyena parivisā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.18
Pali: Bhuñjatha, bhante”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.19
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.20
Pali: “hiyyo kho, āvuso, kalyāṇabhattiko gahapati ārāmaṁ agamāsi dabbassa mallaputtassa santike. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.21
Pali: Nissaṁsayaṁ kho mayaṁ dabbena mallaputtena gahapatino antare paribhinnā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.22
Pali: Te teneva domanassena na cittarūpaṁ bhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.7.23
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū pacchābhattaṁ piṇḍapātapaṭikkantā ārāmaṁ gantvā pattacīvaraṁ paṭisāmetvā bahārāmakoṭṭhake saṅghāṭipallatthikāya nisīdiṁsu tuṇhībhūtā maṅkubhūtā pattakkhandhā adhomukhā pajjhāyantā appaṭibhānā. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.1
Pali: Atha kho mettiyā bhikkhunī yena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.2
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.3
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.4
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.5
Pali: tatiyampi kho mettiyā bhikkhunī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.6
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.7
Pali: Tatiyampi kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.8
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ ayyānaṁ aparajjhāmi? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.9
Pali: Kissa maṁ ayyā nālapantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.10
Pali: “Tathā hi pana tvaṁ, bhagini, amhe dabbena mallaputtena viheṭhiyamāne ajjhupekkhasī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.11
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.12
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, bhagini, iccheyyāsi, ajjeva bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ nāsāpeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.13
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomi? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.14
Pali: Kiṁ mayā sakkā kātun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.15
Pali: “Ehi tvaṁ, bhagini, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ evaṁ vadehi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.16
Pali: ‘idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ, yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.17
Pali: yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.18
Pali: udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.19
Pali: ayyenamhi dabbena mallaputtena dūsitā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.20
Pali: “Evaṁ, ayyā”ti kho mettiyā bhikkhunī mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṭissutvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.21
Pali: Ekamantaṁ ṭhitā kho mettiyā bhikkhunī bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.22
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ, yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.23
Pali: yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.24
Pali: udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.8.25
Pali: ayyenamhi dabbena mallaputtena dūsitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.2
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ bhikkhunī āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.3
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.4
Pali: Dutiyampi kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.5
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ bhikkhunī āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.6
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.7
Pali: Tatiyampi kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.8
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ bhikkhunī āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.9
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.10
Pali: “Na kho, dabba, dabbā evaṁ nibbeṭhenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.11
Pali: Sace tayā kataṁ katanti vadehi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.12
Pali: Sace akataṁ akatanti vadehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.13
Pali: “Yatohaṁ, bhante, jāto nābhijānāmi supinantenapi methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevitā, pageva jāgaro”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.14
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.15
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsetha. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.16
Pali: Ime ca bhikkhū anuyuñjathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.17
Pali: Idaṁ vatvā bhagavā uṭṭhāyāsanā vihāraṁ pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.18
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.19
Pali: Atha kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū te bhikkhū etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.20
Pali: “māvuso, mettiyaṁ bhikkhuniṁ nāsetha, na sā kiñci aparajjhati; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.21
Pali: amhehi sā ussāhitā kupitehi anattamanehi cāvanādhippāyehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.22
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tumhe, āvuso, āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsethā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.23
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.24
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.25
Pali: “kathañhi nāma mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsessantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.26
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.27
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsentī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.28
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.29
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:4.9.30
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.1
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.2
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.3
Pali: tena, bhikkhave, dabbena mallaputtena saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā, ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā, vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā, ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā, añjaliṁ paggahetvā, evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.4
Pali: ‘ime maṁ, bhante, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.5
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.6
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.7
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.8
Pali: ‘ime maṁ, bhante, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.9
Pali: Sohaṁ sativepullappatto tatiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.10
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.11
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.12
Pali: Ime mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.13
Pali: Āyasmā dabbo mallaputto sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.14
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.15
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.16
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.17
Pali: Ime mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.18
Pali: Āyasmā dabbo mallaputto sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.19
Pali: Saṅgho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.20
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.21
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.22
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.23
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.24
Pali: suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.25
Pali: Ime mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.26
Pali: Āyasmā dabbo mallaputto sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.27
Pali: Saṅgho āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.28
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.29
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.30
Pali: Dinno saṅghena āyasmato dabbassa mallaputtassa sativepullappattassa sativinayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.10.31
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.11.1
Pali: Pañcimāni, bhikkhave, dhammikāni sativinayassa dānāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:4.11.2
Pali: Suddho hoti bhikkhu anāpattiko, anuvadanti ca naṁ, yācati ca, tassa saṅgho sativinayaṁ deti dhammena samaggena—

pli-tv-kd14:4.11.3
Pali: imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammikāni sativinayassa dānānī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.0
Pali: 3. Amūḷhavinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena gaggo bhikkhu ummattako hoti, cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.2
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ hoti bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū gaggaṁ bhikkhuṁ ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.4
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.5
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.6
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.7
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.8
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.9
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.10
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.11
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.12
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.13
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhū gaggaṁ bhikkhuṁ ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codessanti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.14
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.15
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.16
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.17
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.18
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.19
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.20
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.21
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.22
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.23
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.24
Pali: saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.25
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.26
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:5.1.27
Pali: “Tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho gaggassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayaṁ detu. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.2
Pali: tena, bhikkhave, gaggena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā, ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā, vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā, ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā, añjaliṁ paggahetvā, evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.4
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.5
Pali: Maṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.6
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.7
Pali: Tyāhaṁ evaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.8
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.9
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.10
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.11
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.12
Pali: Evampi maṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.13
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.14
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.15
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.16
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.17
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.18
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.19
Pali: Maṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.20
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.21
Pali: Tyāhaṁ evaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.22
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.23
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.24
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.25
Pali: Evampi maṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.26
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.27
Pali: Sohaṁ amūḷho tatiyampi, bhante, saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.28
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.29
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.30
Pali: Ayaṁ gaggo bhikkhu ummattako ahosi cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.31
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.32
Pali: Bhikkhū gaggaṁ bhikkhuṁ ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.33
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.34
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.35
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.36
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.37
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi, mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.38
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.39
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.40
Pali: So amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.41
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho gaggassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.42
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.43
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.44
Pali: Ayaṁ gaggo bhikkhu ummattako ahosi cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.45
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.46
Pali: Bhikkhū gaggaṁ bhikkhuṁ ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.47
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.48
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.49
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.50

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.51
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.52
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.53
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.54
Pali: So amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.55
Pali: Saṅgho gaggassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.56
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati gaggassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.57
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.58
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.59
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.60
Pali: Dinno saṅghena gaggassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:5.2.61
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.1
Pali: Tīṇimāni, bhikkhave, adhammikāni amūḷhavinayassa dānāni, tīṇi dhammikāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.2
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi adhammikāni amūḷhavinayassa dānāni? 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.3
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.4
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.5
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.6
Pali: So saramānova evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.7
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, sarāmi evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.8
Pali: Tassa saṅgho amūḷhavinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.9
Pali: Adhammikaṁ amūḷhavinayassa dānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.10
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.11
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.12
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.13
Pali: So saramānova evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.14
Pali: ‘sarāmi kho ahaṁ, āvuso, yathāsupinantenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.15
Pali: Tassa saṅgho amūḷhavinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.16
Pali: Adhammikaṁ amūḷhavinayassa dānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.17
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu āpattiṁ āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.18
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.19
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.20
Pali: So anummattako ummattakālayaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.21
Pali: ‘ahampi kho evaṁ karomi. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.22
Pali: Tumhepi evaṁ karotha. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.23
Pali: Mayhampi etaṁ kappati. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.24
Pali: Tumhākampetaṁ kappatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.25
Pali: Tassa saṅgho amūḷhavinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.1.26
Pali: Adhammikaṁ amūḷhavinayassa dānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.2.1
Pali: Imāni tīṇi adhammikāni amūḷhavinayassa dānāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.2.2
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi dhammikāni amūḷhavinayassa dānāni? 

pli-tv-kd14:6.2.3
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ummattako hoti cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:6.2.4

pli-tv-kd14:6.2.30
Pali: Imāni tīṇi dhammikāni amūḷhavinayassa dānānī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.0
Pali: 4. Paṭiññātakaraṇa 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū appaṭiññāya bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karonti—

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.2
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampi. 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.3
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū appaṭiññāya bhikkhūnaṁ kammāni karissanti—

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.5
Pali: tajjanīyampi, niyassampi, pabbājanīyampi, paṭisāraṇīyampi, ukkhepanīyampī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.7
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.9
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.10
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.11
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, appaṭiññāya bhikkhūnaṁ kammaṁ kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.12
Pali: tajjanīyaṁ vā, niyassaṁ vā, pabbājanīyaṁ vā, paṭisāraṇīyaṁ vā, ukkhepanīyaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:7.1.13
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.1
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, adhammikaṁ hoti paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ, evaṁ dhammikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.2
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, adhammikaṁ hoti paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhu pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.4
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.5
Pali: ‘pārājikaṁ āyasmā ajjhāpanno’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.7
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno, saṅghādisesaṁ ajjhāpanno’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.8
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho saṅghādisesena kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.9
Pali: Adhammikaṁ paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.10
Pali: Bhikkhu pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.11
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.12
Pali: ‘pārājikaṁ āyasmā ajjhāpanno’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.13
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.14
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno, thullaccayaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.15
Pali: pācittiyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.16
Pali: pāṭidesanīyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.17
Pali: dukkaṭaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.18
Pali: dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.19
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho dubbhāsitena kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.20
Pali: Adhammikaṁ paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.21
Pali: Bhikkhu saṅghādisesaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.22

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.23
Pali: pācittiyaṁ …pe…

Pali: pāṭidesanīyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.25
Pali: dukkaṭaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.26
Pali: dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.27
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.28
Pali: ‘dubbhāsitaṁ āyasmā ajjhāpanno’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.29
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.30
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno, pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.31
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho pārājikena kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.32
Pali: Adhammikaṁ paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.33
Pali: Bhikkhu dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.34
Pali: Tamenaṁ codeti saṅgho vā, sambahulā vā, ekapuggalo vā—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.35
Pali: ‘dubbhāsitaṁ āyasmā ajjhāpanno’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.36
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.37
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno, saṅghādisesaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.38
Pali: thullaccayaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.39
Pali: pācittiyaṁ …pe…

Pali: pāṭidesanīyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.41
Pali: dukkaṭaṁ ajjhāpanno’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.42
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho dukkaṭena kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.1.43
Pali: Adhammikaṁ paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.1
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, adhammikaṁ hoti paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.2
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, dhammikaṁ hoti paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.3
Pali: Bhikkhu pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.4

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.5
Pali: ‘pārājikaṁ āyasmā ajjhāpanno’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.6
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.7
Pali: ‘āma, āvuso, pārājikaṁ ajjhāpanno’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.8
Pali: Taṁ saṅgho pārājikena kāreti. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.9
Pali: Dhammikaṁ paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.10
Pali: Bhikkhu saṅghādisesaṁ …pe…

Pali: pācittiyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.13
Pali: pāṭidesanīyaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.14
Pali: dukkaṭaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:8.2.15
Pali: dubbhāsitaṁ ajjhāpanno hoti.
