pli-tv-kd14:8.2.22
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dhammikaṁ hoti paṭiññātakaraṇan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.0
Pali: 5. Yebhuyyasikā 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū saṅghamajjhe bhaṇḍanajātā kalahajātā vivādāpannā aññamaññaṁ mukhasattīhi vitudantā viharanti, na sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ yebhuyyasikāya vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.4
Pali: Pañcahaṅgehi samannāgato bhikkhu salākaggāhāpako sammannitabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.5
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, gahitāgahitañca jāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.6
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.7
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.8
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ salākaggāhāpakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.11
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.12
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ salākaggāhāpakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.13
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno salākaggāhāpakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.14
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.15
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu salākaggāhāpako. 

pli-tv-kd14:9.1.16
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:10.1.1
Pali: Dasayime, bhikkhave, adhammikā salākaggāhā, dasa dhammikā. 

pli-tv-kd14:10.1.2
Pali: Katame dasa adhammikā salākaggāhā? 

pli-tv-kd14:10.1.3
Pali: Oramattakañca adhikaraṇaṁ hoti, na ca gatigataṁ hoti, na ca saritasāritaṁ hoti, jānāti adhammavādī bahutarāti, appeva nāma adhammavādī bahutarā assūti, jānāti saṅgho bhijjissatīti, appeva nāma saṅgho bhijjeyyāti, adhammena gaṇhanti, vaggā gaṇhanti, na ca yathādiṭṭhiyā gaṇhanti—

pli-tv-kd14:10.1.4
Pali: ime dasa adhammikā salākaggāhā. 

pli-tv-kd14:10.2.1
Pali: Katame dasa dhammikā salākaggāhā? 

pli-tv-kd14:10.2.2
Pali: Na ca oramattakaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ hoti, gatigatañca hoti, saritasāritañca hoti, jānāti dhammavādī bahutarāti, appeva nāma dhammavādī bahutarā assūti, jānāti saṅgho na bhijjissatīti, appeva nāma saṅgho na bhijjeyyāti, dhammena gaṇhanti, samaggā gaṇhanti, yathādiṭṭhiyā ca gaṇhanti—

pli-tv-kd14:10.2.3
Pali: ime dasa dhammikā salākaggāhā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.0
Pali: 6. Tassapāpiyasikā 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena upavāḷo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānāti, paṭijānitvā avajānāti, aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati, sampajānamusā bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma upavāḷo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānissati, paṭijānitvā avajānissati, aññenaññaṁ paṭicarissati, sampajānamusā bhāsissatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.5
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.6
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.7
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.8
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:11.1.9
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karotu. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.2
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ upavāḷo bhikkhu codetabbo, codetvā sāretabbo, sāretvā āpattiṁ āropetabbo, āpattiṁ āropetvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.4
Pali: Ayaṁ upavāḷo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānāti, paṭijānitvā avajānāti, aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati, sampajānamusā bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.8
Pali: Ayaṁ upavāḷo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānāti, paṭijānitvā avajānāti, aññenaññaṁ paṭicarati, sampajānamusā bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.9
Pali: Saṅgho upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.10
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammassa karaṇaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.11
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.12
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.13
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.14
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:11.2.15
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.1.1
Pali: Pañcimāni, bhikkhave, dhammikāni tassapāpiyasikākammassa karaṇāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.1.2
Pali: Asuci ca hoti, alajjī ca, sānuvādo ca, tassa saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti dhammena, samaggena—

pli-tv-kd14:12.1.3
Pali: imāni kho, bhikkhave, pañca dhammikāni tassapāpiyasikākammassa karaṇāni. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.2.0
Pali: 6.1. Adhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd14:12.2.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.2.2.1
Pali: Asammukhā kataṁ hoti, appaṭipucchākataṁ hoti, appaṭiññāya kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.2.3
Pali: … adhammena kataṁ hoti, vaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:12.2.4
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ adhammakammañca hoti, avinayakammañca, duvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.3.0
Pali: 6.2. Dhammakammadvādasaka 

pli-tv-kd14:12.3.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgataṁ tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.3.2.1
Pali: Sammukhā kataṁ hoti, paṭipucchākataṁ hoti, paṭiññāya kataṁ hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.3.3
Pali: … dhammena kataṁ hoti, samaggena kataṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:12.3.4
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgataṁ tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ dhammakammañca hoti, vinayakammañca, suvūpasantañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.0
Pali: 6.3. Ākaṅkhamānachakka 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.1
Pali: Tīhi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.2
Pali: Bhaṇḍanakārako hoti kalahakārako vivādakārako bhassakārako saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.3
Pali: bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.4
Pali: gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.5
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.6
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.7
Pali: Adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.8
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.9
Pali: Aparehipi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.10
Pali: buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.11
Pali: imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhaṅgehi samannāgatassa bhikkhuno ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.12
Pali: Tiṇṇaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.13
Pali: Eko bhaṇḍanakārako hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.14
Pali: saṅghe adhikaraṇakārako; 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.15
Pali: eko bālo hoti abyatto āpattibahulo anapadāno; 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.16
Pali: eko gihisaṁsaṭṭho viharati ananulomikehi gihisaṁsaggehi—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.17
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.18
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.19
Pali: Eko adhisīle sīlavipanno hoti, eko ajjhācāre ācāravipanno hoti, eko atidiṭṭhiyā diṭṭhivipanno hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.20
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.21
Pali: Aparesampi, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.22
Pali: eko buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, eko saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati—

pli-tv-kd14:12.4.23
Pali: imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, tiṇṇaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ ākaṅkhamāno saṅgho tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.0
Pali: 6.4. Aṭṭhārasavatta 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.1
Pali: Tassapāpiyasikākammakatena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sammā vattitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.2
Pali: Tatrāyaṁ sammāvattanā—

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.3
Pali: Na upasampādetabbaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.4
Pali: na nissayo dātabbo, 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.5
Pali: na sāmaṇero upaṭṭhāpetabbo, 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.6
Pali: na bhikkhunovādakasammuti sāditabbā, 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.7.1
Pali: sammatenapi bhikkhuniyo na ovaditabbā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:12.5.8
Pali: na bhikkhūhi sampayojetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:12.6.1
Pali: Atha kho saṅgho upavāḷassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.0
Pali: 7. Tiṇavatthāraka 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ hoti bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.2
Pali: Atha kho tesaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.3
Pali: “amhākaṁ kho bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.4
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.5
Pali: Kathaṁ nu kho amhehi paṭipajjitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.7
Pali: “Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ hoti bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.8
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.9
Pali: ‘amhākaṁ kho bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:13.1.10
Pali: sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyyā’ti, anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ tiṇavatthārakena vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, vūpasametabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.2
Pali: Sabbeheva ekajjhaṁ sannipatitabbaṁ, sannipatitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.4
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.5
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.6
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ tiṇavatthārakena vūpasameyya, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.7
Pali: Ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena sako pakkho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.8
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.9
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.10
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.11
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, āyasmantānañceva atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.12
Pali: Athāparesaṁ ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena sako pakkho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.13
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.14
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.15
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.2.16
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, āyasmantānañceva atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.1
Pali: Athāparesaṁ ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.2
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.3
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.4
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.8
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.9
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.10
Pali: Ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desemi, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.11
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati amhākaṁ imāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desanā, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.12
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.13
Pali: Desitā amhākaṁ imā āpattiyo saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.14
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.15
Pali: Athāparesaṁ ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.16
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.17
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.18
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.19
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.20
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.21
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.22
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.23
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.24
Pali: Ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desemi, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.25
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati amhākaṁ imāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desanā, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.26
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.27
Pali: Desitā amhākaṁ imā āpattiyo saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.3.28
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:13.4.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, te bhikkhū tāhi āpattīhi vuṭṭhitā honti, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ, ṭhapetvā diṭṭhāvikammaṁ, ṭhapetvā ye na tattha hontī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.0
Pali: 8. Adhikaraṇa 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūpi bhikkhūhi vivadanti, bhikkhūpi bhikkhunīhi vivadanti, bhikkhuniyopi bhikkhūhi vivadanti, channopi bhikkhu bhikkhunīnaṁ anupakhajja bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ vivadati, bhikkhunīnaṁ pakkhaṁ gāheti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.2
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma channo bhikkhu bhikkhunīnaṁ anupakhajja bhikkhūhi saddhiṁ vivadissati, bhikkhunīnaṁ pakkhaṁ gāhessatīti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.4
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.5
Pali: saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.6
Pali: saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.7
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.1.8
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.1
Pali: “Cattārimāni, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇāni— vivādādhikaraṇaṁ, anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ, āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, kiccādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.2
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ vivādādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.3
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.4
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā, vinayoti vā avinayoti vā, bhāsitaṁ lapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā abhāsitaṁ alapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā anāciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, paññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā apaññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āpattīti vā anāpattīti vā, lahukā āpattīti vā garukā āpattīti vā, sāvasesā āpattīti vā anavasesā āpattīti vā, duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.5
Pali: Yaṁ tattha bhaṇḍanaṁ kalaho viggaho vivādo nānāvādo aññathāvādo vipaccatāya vohāro medhagaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.6
Pali: idaṁ vuccati vivādādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.7
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.8
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ anuvadanti sīlavipattiyā vā ācāravipattiyā vā diṭṭhivipattiyā vā ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.9
Pali: Yo tattha anuvādo anuvadanā anullapanā anubhaṇanā anusampavaṅkatā abbhussahanatā anubalappadānaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.10
Pali: idaṁ vuccati anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.11
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ āpattādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.12
Pali: Pañcapi āpattikkhandhā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, sattapi āpattikkhandhā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.13
Pali: idaṁ vuccati āpattādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.14
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.15
Pali: Yā saṅghassa kiccayatā, karaṇīyatā, apalokanakammaṁ, ñattikammaṁ, ñattidutiyakammaṁ, ñatticatutthakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.2.16
Pali: idaṁ vuccati kiccādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.1
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇassa kiṁ mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.2
Pali: Cha vivādamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.3
Pali: Tīṇipi akusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ, tīṇipi kusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.4
Pali: Katamāni cha vivādamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.5
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.6
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.7
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.8
Pali: saṅghepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.9
Pali: sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe vivādaṁ janeti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.10
Pali: Yo hoti vivādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya bahuno janassa anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.11
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.12
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.13
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.14
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.15
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhu makkhī hoti paḷāsī …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.16
Pali: issukī hoti maccharī, saṭho hoti māyāvī, pāpiccho hoti micchādiṭṭhī, sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.17
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.18
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.19
Pali: saṅghepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.20
Pali: sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe vivādaṁ janeti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.21
Pali: Yo hoti vivādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya bahuno janassa anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.22
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.23
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, vivādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.24
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.25
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa vivādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.3.26
Pali: Imāni cha vivādamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.1
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi akusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.2
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū luddhacittā vivadanti, duṭṭhacittā vivadanti, mūḷhacittā vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.3
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā, vinayoti vā avinayoti vā, bhāsitaṁ lapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā abhāsitaṁ alapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā anāciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, paññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā apaññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āpattīti vā anāpattīti vā, lahukā āpattīti vā garukā āpattīti vā, sāvasesā āpattīti vā anavasesā āpattīti vā, duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.4
Pali: Imāni tīṇi akusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.5
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi kusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū aluddhacittā vivadanti, aduṭṭhacittā vivadanti, amūḷhacittā vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.7
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.8
Pali: duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.4.9
Pali: Imāni tīṇi kusalamūlāni vivādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.1
Pali: “Anuvādādhikaraṇassa kiṁ mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.2
Pali: Cha anuvādamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.3
Pali: Tīṇipi akusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ, tīṇipi kusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ, kāyopi anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ, vācāpi anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.4
Pali: Katamāni cha anuvādamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.5
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.6
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu kodhano hoti upanāhī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.7
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.8
Pali: saṅghepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.9
Pali: sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe anuvādaṁ janeti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.10
Pali: Yo hoti anuvādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya bahuno janassa anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.11
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, anuvādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.12
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, anuvādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.13
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.14
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.15
Pali: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, bhikkhu makkhī hoti paḷāsī …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.16
Pali: issukī hoti maccharī, saṭho hoti māyāvī, pāpiccho hoti micchādiṭṭhī, sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.17
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sandiṭṭhiparāmāsī hoti ādhānaggāhī duppaṭinissaggī, so sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi agāravo viharati appatisso, saṅghepi agāravo viharati appatisso, sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.18
Pali: Yo so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu sattharipi agāravo viharati appatisso, dhammepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.19
Pali: saṅghepi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.20
Pali: sikkhāyapi na paripūrakārī, so saṅghe anuvādaṁ janeti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.21
Pali: Yo hoti anuvādo bahujanāhitāya bahujanāsukhāya bahuno janassa anatthāya ahitāya dukkhāya devamanussānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.22
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, anuvādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa pahānāya vāyameyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.23
Pali: Evarūpañce tumhe, bhikkhave, anuvādamūlaṁ ajjhattaṁ vā bahiddhā vā na samanupasseyyātha, tatra tumhe, bhikkhave, tasseva pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavāya paṭipajjeyyātha. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.24
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa pahānaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.25
Pali: Evametassa pāpakassa anuvādamūlassa āyatiṁ anavassavo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.26
Pali: Imāni cha anuvādamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.27
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi akusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.28
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ luddhacittā anuvadanti, duṭṭhacittā anuvadanti, mūḷhacittā anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.29
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.30
Pali: Imāni tīṇi akusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.31
Pali: Katamāni tīṇi kusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.32
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ aluddhacittā anuvadanti, aduṭṭhacittā anuvadanti, amūḷhacittā anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.33
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.34
Pali: Imāni tīṇi kusalamūlāni anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.35
Pali: Katamo kāyo anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.36
Pali: Idhekacco dubbaṇṇo hoti, duddassiko, okoṭimako, bahvābādho, kāṇo vā, kuṇī vā, khañjo vā, pakkhahato vā, yena naṁ anuvadanti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.37
Pali: Ayaṁ kāyo anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.38
Pali: Katamā vācā anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.39
Pali: Idhekacco dubbaco hoti, mammano, eḷagalavāco, yāya naṁ anuvadanti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.5.40
Pali: Ayaṁ vācā anuvādādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.1
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇassa kiṁ mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.2
Pali: Cha āpattisamuṭṭhānā āpattādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.3
Pali: Atthāpatti kāyato samuṭṭhāti, na vācato, na cittato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.4
Pali: Atthāpatti vācato samuṭṭhāti, na kāyato, na cittato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.5
Pali: Atthāpatti kāyato ca vācato ca samuṭṭhāti, na cittato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.6
Pali: Atthāpatti kāyato ca cittato ca samuṭṭhāti, na vācato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.7
Pali: Atthāpatti vācato ca cittato ca samuṭṭhāti, na kāyato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.8
Pali: Atthāpatti kāyato ca vācato ca cittato ca samuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.6.9
Pali: Ime cha āpattisamuṭṭhānā āpattādhikaraṇassa mūlaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.7.1
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇassa kiṁ mūlaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.7.2
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇassa ekaṁ mūlaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.7.3
Pali: saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.1
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ, akusalaṁ, abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.2
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ siyā kusalaṁ, siyā akusalaṁ, siyā abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ vivādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū kusalacittā vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.5
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.6
Pali: duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.7
Pali: Yaṁ tattha bhaṇḍanaṁ kalaho viggaho vivādo nānāvādo aññathāvādo vipaccatāya vohāro medhagaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.8
Pali: idaṁ vuccati vivādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.9
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ vivādādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.10
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū akusalacittā vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.11
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.12
Pali: duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.13
Pali: Yaṁ tattha bhaṇḍanaṁ kalaho viggaho vivādo nānāvādo aññathāvādo vipaccatāya vohāro medhagaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.14
Pali: idaṁ vuccati vivādādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.15
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ vivādādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.16
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū abyākatacittā vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.17
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.18
Pali: duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.19
Pali: Yaṁ tattha bhaṇḍanaṁ kalaho viggaho vivādo nānāvādo aññathāvādo vipaccatāya vohāro medhagaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.8.20
Pali: idaṁ vuccati vivādādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.1
Pali: Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ, akusalaṁ, abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.2
Pali: Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ siyā kusalaṁ, siyā akusalaṁ, siyā abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ kusalacittā anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.5
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.6
Pali: Yo tattha anuvādo anuvadanā anullapanā anubhaṇanā anusampavaṅkatā abbhussahanatā anubalappadānaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.7
Pali: idaṁ vuccati anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.8
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ akusalacittā anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.10
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.11
Pali: Yo tattha anuvādo anuvadanā anullapanā anubhaṇanā anusampavaṅkatā abbhussahanatā anubalappadānaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.12
Pali: idaṁ vuccati anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.13
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.14
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ abyākatacittā anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.15
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.16
Pali: Yo tattha anuvādo anuvadanā anullapanā anubhaṇanā anusampavaṅkatā abbhussahanatā anubalappadānaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.17
Pali: idaṁ vuccati anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.9.18
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ, akusalaṁ, abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.1
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ siyā akusalaṁ, siyā abyākataṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.2
Pali: natthi āpattādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ āpattādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.4
Pali: Yaṁ jānanto sañjānanto cecca abhivitaritvā vītikkamo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.5
Pali: idaṁ vuccati āpattādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.6
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ āpattādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.7
Pali: Yaṁ ajānanto asañjānanto acecca anabhivitaritvā vītikkamo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.10.8
Pali: idaṁ vuccati āpattādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.1
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ, akusalaṁ, abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.2
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ siyā kusalaṁ, siyā akusalaṁ, siyā abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.4
Pali: Yaṁ saṅgho kusalacitto kammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.5
Pali: apalokanakammaṁ, ñattikammaṁ, ñattidutiyakammaṁ, ñatticatutthakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.6
Pali: idaṁ vuccati kiccādhikaraṇaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.7
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.8
Pali: Yaṁ saṅgho akusalacitto kammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.9
Pali: apalokanakammaṁ, ñattikammaṁ, ñattidutiyakammaṁ, ñatticatutthakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.10
Pali: idaṁ vuccati kiccādhikaraṇaṁ akusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.11
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.12
Pali: Yaṁ saṅgho abyākatacitto kammaṁ karoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.13
Pali: apalokanakammaṁ, ñattikammaṁ, ñattidutiyakammaṁ, ñatticatutthakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.11.14
Pali: idaṁ vuccati kiccādhikaraṇaṁ abyākataṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.1
Pali: Vivādo vivādādhikaraṇaṁ, vivādo no adhikaraṇaṁ, adhikaraṇaṁ no vivādo, adhikaraṇañceva vivādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.2
Pali: Siyā vivādo vivādādhikaraṇaṁ, siyā vivādo no adhikaraṇaṁ, siyā adhikaraṇaṁ no vivādo, siyā adhikaraṇañceva vivādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.3
Pali: Tattha katamo vivādo vivādādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.5
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.6
Pali: duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.7
Pali: Yaṁ tattha bhaṇḍanaṁ kalaho viggaho vivādo nānāvādo aññathāvādo vipaccatāya vohāro medhagaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.8
Pali: ayaṁ vivādo vivādādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.9
Pali: Tattha katamo vivādo no adhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.10
Pali: Mātāpi puttena vivadati, puttopi mātarā vivadati, pitāpi puttena vivadati, puttopi pitarā vivadati, bhātāpi bhātarā vivadati, bhātāpi bhaginiyā vivadati, bhaginīpi bhātarā vivadati, sahāyopi sahāyena vivadati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.11
Pali: ayaṁ vivādo no adhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.12
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no vivādo? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.13
Pali: Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ, āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, kiccādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.14
Pali: idaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no vivādo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.15
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇañceva vivādo ca? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.12.16
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ adhikaraṇañceva vivādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.1
Pali: Anuvādo anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ, anuvādo no adhikaraṇaṁ, adhikaraṇaṁ no anuvādo, adhikaraṇañceva anuvādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.2
Pali: Siyā anuvādo anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ, siyā anuvādo no adhikaraṇaṁ, siyā adhikaraṇaṁ no anuvādo, siyā adhikaraṇañceva anuvādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.3
Pali: Tattha katamo anuvādo anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.4
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ anuvadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.5
Pali: sīlavipattiyā vā, ācāravipattiyā vā, diṭṭhivipattiyā vā, ājīvavipattiyā vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.6
Pali: Yo tattha anuvādo anuvadanā anullapanā anubhaṇanā anusampavaṅkatā abbhussahanatā anubalappadānaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.7
Pali: ayaṁ anuvādo anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.8
Pali: Tattha katamo anuvādo no adhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.9
Pali: Mātāpi puttaṁ anuvadati, puttopi mātaraṁ anuvadati, pitāpi puttaṁ anuvadati, puttopi pitaraṁ anuvadati, bhātāpi bhātaraṁ anuvadati, bhātāpi bhaginiṁ anuvadati, bhaginīpi bhātaraṁ anuvadati, sahāyopi sahāyaṁ anuvadati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.10
Pali: ayaṁ anuvādo no adhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.11
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no anuvādo? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.12
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, kiccādhikaraṇaṁ, vivādādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.13
Pali: idaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no anuvādo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.14
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇañceva anuvādo ca? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.13.15
Pali: Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ adhikaraṇañceva anuvādo ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.1
Pali: Āpatti āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, āpatti no adhikaraṇaṁ, adhikaraṇaṁ no āpatti, adhikaraṇañceva āpatti ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.2
Pali: Siyā āpatti āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, siyā āpatti no adhikaraṇaṁ, siyā adhikaraṇaṁ no āpatti, siyā adhikaraṇañceva āpatti ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ āpatti āpattādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.4
Pali: Pañcapi āpattikkhandhā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ, sattapi āpattikkhandhā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.5
Pali: ayaṁ āpatti āpattādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.6
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ āpatti no adhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.7
Pali: Sotāpatti samāpatti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.8
Pali: ayaṁ āpatti no adhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.9
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no āpatti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.10
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ, vivādādhikaraṇaṁ, anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.11
Pali: idaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no āpatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.12
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇañceva āpatti ca? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.14.13
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ adhikaraṇañceva āpatti ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.1
Pali: Kiccaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ, kiccaṁ no adhikaraṇaṁ, adhikaraṇaṁ no kiccaṁ, adhikaraṇañceva kiccañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.2
Pali: Siyā kiccaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ, siyā kiccaṁ no adhikaraṇaṁ, siyā adhikaraṇaṁ no kiccaṁ, siyā adhikaraṇañceva kiccañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.3
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.4
Pali: Yā saṅghassa kiccayatā, karaṇīyatā, apalokanakammaṁ, ñattikammaṁ, ñattidutiyakammaṁ, ñatticatutthakammaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.5
Pali: idaṁ kiccaṁ kiccādhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.6
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ kiccaṁ no adhikaraṇaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.7
Pali: Ācariyakiccaṁ, upajjhāyakiccaṁ, samānupajjhāyakiccaṁ, samānācariyakiccaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.8
Pali: idaṁ kiccaṁ no adhikaraṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.9
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no kiccaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.10
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ, anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ, āpattādhikaraṇaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.11
Pali: idaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ no kiccaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.12
Pali: Tattha katamaṁ adhikaraṇañceva kiccañca? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.13
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ adhikaraṇañceva kiccañca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.14.0.1
Pali: 9. Adhikaraṇavūpasamanasamatha 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.14.0.2
Pali: 9.1. Sammukhāvinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:14.15.14.1
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ katihi samathehi sammati? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.1
Pali: Vivādādhikaraṇaṁ dvīhi samathehi sammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.2
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, yebhuyyasikāya ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.3
Pali: Siyā vivādādhikaraṇaṁ ekaṁ samathaṁ anāgamma yebhuyyasikaṁ, ekena samathena sameyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.4
Pali: sammukhāvinayenāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.5
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.6
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū vivadanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.8
Pali: dhammoti vā adhammoti vā, vinayoti vā avinayoti vā, bhāsitaṁ lapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā abhāsitaṁ alapitaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā anāciṇṇaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, paññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā apaññattaṁ tathāgatenāti vā, āpattīti vā anāpattīti vā, lahukā āpattīti vā garukā āpattīti vā, sāvasesā āpattīti vā anavasesā āpattīti vā, duṭṭhullā āpattīti vā aduṭṭhullā āpattīti vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.9
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.10
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.11
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.12
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.13
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.14
Pali: Kā ca tattha saṅghasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.15
Pali: Yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.16
Pali: ayaṁ tattha saṅghasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.17
Pali: Kā ca tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.18
Pali: Yena dhammena yena vinayena yena satthusāsanena taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.19
Pali: ayaṁ tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.20
Pali: Kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.21
Pali: Yo ca vivadati, yena ca vivadati, ubho atthapaccatthikā sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.22
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.23
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.16.24
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.1
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ tasmiṁ āvāse vūpasametuṁ, tehi, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi, yasmiṁ āvāse sambahulā bhikkhū, so āvāso gantabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.2
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū taṁ āvāsaṁ gacchantā antarāmagge sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.3
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.4
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.5
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.6
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.7
Pali: Kā ca tattha saṅghasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.8
Pali: Yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.9
Pali: ayaṁ tattha saṅghasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.10
Pali: Kā ca tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.11
Pali: Yena dhammena yena vinayena yena satthusāsanena taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.12
Pali: ayaṁ tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.13
Pali: Kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.14
Pali: Yo ca vivadati, yena ca vivadati, ubho atthapaccatthikā sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.15
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.16
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.17.17
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.1
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū taṁ āvāsaṁ āgacchantā antarāmagge na sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, tehi, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi, taṁ āvāsaṁ gantvā āvāsikā bhikkhū evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.2
Pali: ‘idaṁ kho, āvuso, adhikaraṇaṁ evaṁ jātaṁ, evaṁ samuppannaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.3
Pali: sādhāyasmantā imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamentu dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena, yathayidaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ suvūpasantaṁ assā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.4
Pali: Sace, bhikkhave, āvāsikā bhikkhū vuḍḍhatarā honti, āgantukā bhikkhū navakatarā, tehi, bhikkhave, āvāsikehi bhikkhūhi āgantukā bhikkhū evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.5
Pali: ‘iṅgha tumhe, āyasmanto, muhuttaṁ ekamantaṁ hotha, yāva mayaṁ mantemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.6
Pali: Sace pana, bhikkhave, āvāsikā bhikkhū navakatarā honti, āgantukā bhikkhū vuḍḍhatarā, tehi, bhikkhave, āvāsikehi bhikkhūhi āgantukā bhikkhū evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.7
Pali: ‘tena hi tumhe, āyasmanto, muhuttaṁ idheva tāva hotha, yāva mayaṁ mantemā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.8
Pali: Sace pana, bhikkhave, āvāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mantayamānānaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.9
Pali: ‘na mayaṁ sakkoma imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanenā’ti, na taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ āvāsikehi bhikkhūhi sampaṭicchitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.10
Pali: Sace pana, bhikkhave, āvāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ mantayamānānaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.11
Pali: ‘sakkoma mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.12
Pali: Tehi, bhikkhave, āvāsikehi bhikkhūhi āgantukā bhikkhū evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.13
Pali: ‘sace tumhe, āyasmanto, amhākaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ yathājātaṁ yathāsamuppannaṁ ārocessatha, yathā ca mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamessāma dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena tathā suvūpasantaṁ bhavissati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.14
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ sampaṭicchissāma. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.15
Pali: No ce tumhe, āyasmanto, amhākaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ yathājātaṁ yathāsamuppannaṁ ārocessatha, yathā ca mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamessāma dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena tathā na suvūpasantaṁ bhavissati, na mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ sampaṭicchissāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.16
Pali: Evaṁ supariggahitaṁ kho, bhikkhave, katvā āvāsikehi bhikkhūhi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ sampaṭicchitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.17
Pali: Tehi, bhikkhave, āgantukehi bhikkhūhi āvāsikā bhikkhū evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.18
Pali: ‘yathājātaṁ yathāsamuppannaṁ mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ āyasmantānaṁ ārocessāma. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.19
Pali: Sace āyasmantā sakkonti ettakena vā ettakena vā antarena imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena tathā suvūpasantaṁ bhavissati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.20
Pali: Evaṁ mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ āyasmantānaṁ niyyādessāma. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.21
Pali: No ce āyasmantā sakkonti ettakena vā ettakena vā antarena imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena tathā na suvūpasantaṁ bhavissati, na mayaṁ imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ āyasmantānaṁ niyyādessāma. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.22
Pali: Mayameva imassa adhikaraṇassa sāmino bhavissāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.23
Pali: Evaṁ supariggahitaṁ kho, bhikkhave, katvā āgantukehi bhikkhūhi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ āvāsikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ niyyādetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.24
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.25
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.26
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.27
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.28
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.29
Pali: evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.18.30
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.0
Pali: 9.2. Ubbāhikāyavūpasamana 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.1
Pali: Tehi ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi tasmiṁ adhikaraṇe vinicchiyamāne anantāni ceva bhassāni jāyanti, na cekassa bhāsitassa attho viññāyati, anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ ubbāhikāya vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.2
Pali: Dasahaṅgehi samannāgato bhikkhu ubbāhikāya sammannitabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.3
Pali: sīlavā hoti, pātimokkhasaṁvarasaṁvuto viharati ācāragocarasampanno aṇumattesu vajjesu bhayadassāvī, samādāya sikkhati sikkhāpadesu; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.4
Pali: bahussuto hoti sutadharo sutasannicayo, ye te dhammā ādikalyāṇā majjhekalyāṇā pariyosānakalyāṇā sātthaṁ sabyañjanaṁ kevalaparipuṇṇaṁ parisuddhaṁ brahmacariyaṁ abhivadanti, tathārūpassa dhammā bahussutā honti, dhātā vacasā paricitā manasānupekkhitā diṭṭhiyā suppaṭividdhā; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.5
Pali: ubhayāni kho panassa pātimokkhāni vitthārena svāgatāni honti suvibhattāni suppavattīni suvinicchitāni suttaso anubyañjanaso; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.6
Pali: vinaye kho pana ṭhito hoti asaṁhīro; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.7
Pali: paṭibalo hoti ubho atthapaccatthike assāsetuṁ saññāpetuṁ nijjhāpetuṁ pekkhetuṁ pasādetuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.8
Pali: adhikaraṇasamuppādavūpasamanakusalo hoti; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.9
Pali: adhikaraṇaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.10
Pali: adhikaraṇasamudayaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.11
Pali: adhikaraṇanirodhaṁ jānāti; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.12
Pali: adhikaraṇanirodhagāminipaṭipadaṁ jānāti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.19.13
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi dasahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ ubbāhikāya sammannituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.2
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.4
Pali: Amhākaṁ imasmiṁ adhikaraṇe vinicchiyamāne anantāni ceva bhassāni jāyanti, na cekassa bhāsitassa attho viññāyati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhuṁ sammanneyya ubbāhikāya imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.8
Pali: Amhākaṁ imasmiṁ adhikaraṇe vinicchiyamāne anantāni ceva bhassāni jāyanti, na cekassa bhāsitassa attho viññāyati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.9
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmañca itthannāmañca bhikkhuṁ sammannati ubbāhikāya imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.10
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa ca itthannāmassa ca bhikkhuno sammuti ubbāhikāya imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.11
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.12
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo ca itthannāmo ca bhikkhu ubbāhikāya imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.20.13
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.1
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ ubbāhikāya vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.2
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.3
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.4
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.5
Pali: Dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.21.6
Pali: evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.1
Pali: Tehi ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi tasmiṁ adhikaraṇe vinicchiyamāne tatrāssa bhikkhu dhammakathiko, tassa neva suttaṁ āgataṁ hoti, no suttavibhaṅgo, so atthaṁ asallakkhento byañjanacchāyāya atthaṁ paṭibāhati, byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena te bhikkhū ñāpetabbā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.2
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dhammakathiko. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.4
Pali: Imassa neva suttaṁ āgataṁ hoti, no suttavibhaṅgo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.5
Pali: So atthaṁ asallakkhento byañjanacchāyāya atthaṁ paṭibāhati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.6
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā avasesā imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasameyyāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.7
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.8
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.9
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.10
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.11
Pali: Dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.22.12
Pali: evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.1
Pali: Tehi ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi tasmiṁ adhikaraṇe vinicchiyamāne tatrāssa bhikkhu dhammakathiko, tassa suttañhi kho āgataṁ hoti, no suttavibhaṅgo, so atthaṁ asallakkhento byañjanacchāyāya atthaṁ paṭibāhati, byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena te bhikkhū ñāpetabbā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.2
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.3
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu dhammakathiko. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.4
Pali: Imassa suttañhi kho āgataṁ hoti, no suttavibhaṅgo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.5
Pali: So atthaṁ asallakkhento byañjanacchāyāya atthaṁ paṭibāhati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.6
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā avasesā imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasameyyāmā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.7
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū taṁ bhikkhuṁ vuṭṭhāpetvā sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametuṁ, idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.8
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.9
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.10
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.11
Pali: Dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.23.12
Pali: evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.0
Pali: 9.3. Yebhuyyasikāvinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.1
Pali: Te ce, bhikkhave, bhikkhū na sakkonti taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ ubbāhikāya vūpasametuṁ, tehi, bhikkhave, bhikkhūhi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ saṅghassa niyyādetabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.2
Pali: ‘na mayaṁ, bhante, sakkoma imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ ubbāhikāya vūpasametuṁ, saṅghova imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametū’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.3
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ yebhuyyasikāya vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.4
Pali: Pañcahaṅgehi samannāgato bhikkhu salākaggāhāpako sammannitabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.5
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, gahitāgahitañca jāneyya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.6
Pali: evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.7
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.8
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.9
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ salākaggāhāpakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.10
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.11
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.12
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ salākaggāhāpakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.13
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno salākaggāhāpakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.14
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.15
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu salākaggāhāpako. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.16
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.17
Pali: Tena salākaggāhāpakena bhikkhunā salākā gāhetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.18
Pali: Yathā bahutarā bhikkhū dhammavādino vadanti tathā taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.19
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.20
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.21
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, yebhuyyasikāya ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.22
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.23
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.24
Pali: Kā ca tattha saṅghasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.25
Pali: Yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.26
Pali: ayaṁ tattha saṅghasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.27
Pali: Kā ca tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.28
Pali: Yena dhammena yena vinayena yena satthusāsanena taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.29
Pali: ayaṁ tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.30
Pali: Kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.31
Pali: Yo ca vivadati, yena ca vivadati, ubho atthapaccatthikā sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.32
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.33
Pali: Kā ca tattha yebhuyyasikāya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.34
Pali: Yā yebhuyyasikākammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.35
Pali: ayaṁ tattha yebhuyyasikāya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.36
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.24.37
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.0
Pali: 9.4. Tividhasalākaggāha 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena sāvatthiyā evaṁ jātaṁ evaṁ samuppannaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.2
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.3
Pali: asantuṭṭhā sāvatthiyā saṅghassa adhikaraṇavūpasamanena—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.4
Pali: assosuṁ kho amukasmiṁ kira āvāse sambahulā therā viharanti bahussutā āgatāgamā dhammadharā vinayadharā mātikādharā paṇḍitā viyattā medhāvino lajjino kukkuccakā sikkhākāmā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.5
Pali: Te ce therā imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasameyyuṁ dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena, evamidaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ suvūpasantaṁ assāti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū taṁ āvāsaṁ gantvā te there etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.7
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, adhikaraṇaṁ evaṁ jātaṁ, evaṁ samuppannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.8
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, therā imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamentu dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena, yathayidaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ suvūpasantaṁ assā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.9
Pali: Atha kho te therā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.10
Pali: yathā sāvatthiyā saṅghena adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamitaṁ tathā suvūpasantanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.11
Pali: tathā taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.12
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.13
Pali: asantuṭṭhā sāvatthiyā saṅghassa adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, asantuṭṭhā sambahulānaṁ therānaṁ adhikaraṇavūpasamanena—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.14
Pali: assosuṁ kho amukasmiṁ kira āvāse tayo therā viharanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.15
Pali: dve therā viharanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.16
Pali: eko thero viharati bahussuto āgatāgamo dhammadharo vinayadharo mātikādharo paṇḍito viyatto medhāvī lajjī kukkuccako sikkhākāmo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.17
Pali: So ce thero imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasameyya dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena, evamidaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ suvūpasantaṁ assāti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.18
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū taṁ āvāsaṁ gantvā taṁ theraṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.19
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, adhikaraṇaṁ evaṁ jātaṁ, evaṁ samuppannaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.20
Pali: Sādhu, bhante, thero imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasametu dhammena vinayena satthusāsanena, yathayidaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ suvūpasantaṁ assā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.21
Pali: Atha kho so thero—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.22
Pali: yathā sāvatthiyā saṅghena adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamitaṁ, yathā sambahulehi therehi adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamitaṁ, yathā tīhi therehi adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamitaṁ, yathā dvīhi therehi adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamitaṁ, tathā suvūpasantanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.23
Pali: tathā taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasamesi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.24
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū asantuṭṭhā sāvatthiyā saṅghassa adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, asantuṭṭhā sambahulānaṁ therānaṁ adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, asantuṭṭhā tiṇṇaṁ therānaṁ adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, asantuṭṭhā dvinnaṁ therānaṁ adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, asantuṭṭhā ekassa therassa adhikaraṇavūpasamanena, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkamiṁsu, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.25.25
Pali: “Nihatametaṁ, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ santaṁ vūpasantaṁ suvūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.1
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tesaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ saññattiyā tayo salākaggāhe—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.2
Pali: gūḷhakaṁ, sakaṇṇajappakaṁ, vivaṭakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.3
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, gūḷhako salākaggāho hoti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.4
Pali: Tena salākaggāhāpakena bhikkhunā salākāyo vaṇṇāvaṇṇāyo katvā ekameko bhikkhu upasaṅkamitvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.5
Pali: ‘ayaṁ evaṁvādissa salākā, ayaṁ evaṁvādissa salākā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.6
Pali: Yaṁ icchasi taṁ gaṇhāhī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.7
Pali: Gahite vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.8
Pali: ‘mā ca kassaci dassehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.9
Pali: Sace jānāti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.10
Pali: adhammavādī bahutarāti, duggahoti, paccukkaḍḍhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.11
Pali: Sace jānāti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.12
Pali: dhammavādī bahutarāti, suggahoti, sāvetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.13
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, gūḷhako salākaggāho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.14
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, sakaṇṇajappako salākaggāho hoti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.15
Pali: Tena salākaggāhāpakena bhikkhunā ekamekassa bhikkhuno upakaṇṇake ārocetabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.16
Pali: ‘ayaṁ evaṁvādissa salākā, ayaṁ evaṁvādissa salākā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.17
Pali: Yaṁ icchasi taṁ gaṇhāhī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.18
Pali: Gahite vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.19
Pali: ‘mā ca kassaci ārocehī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.20
Pali: Sace jānāti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.21
Pali: adhammavādī bahutarāti, duggahoti, paccukkaḍḍhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.22
Pali: Sace jānāti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.23
Pali: dhammavādī bahutarāti, suggahoti, sāvetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.24
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sakaṇṇajappako salākaggāho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.25
Pali: Kathañca, bhikkhave, vivaṭako salākaggāho hoti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.26
Pali: Sace jānāti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.27
Pali: dhammavādī bahutarāti, vissaṭṭheneva vivaṭena gāhetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.28
Pali: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, vivaṭako salākaggāho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.26.29
Pali: Ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo salākaggāhā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.0
Pali: 9.5. Sativinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.1
Pali: “Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ katihi samathehi sammati? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.2
Pali: Anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ catūhi samathehi sammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.3
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, sativinayena ca, amūḷhavinayena ca, tassapāpiyasikāya ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.4
Pali: Siyā anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ dve samathe anāgamma—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.5
Pali: amūḷhavinayañca, tassapāpiyasikañca; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.6
Pali: dvīhi samathehi sammeyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.7
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, sativinayena cāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.8
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.9
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.10
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhū bhikkhuṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.11
Pali: Tassa kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno sativepullappattassa sativinayo dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.12
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.13
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.14
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.15
Pali: ‘maṁ, bhante, bhikkhū amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.16
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.17
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.18
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.19
Pali: Byattenaṁ bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.20
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.21
Pali: Bhikkhū itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.22
Pali: So sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.23
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.24
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.25
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.26
Pali: Bhikkhū itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsenti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.27
Pali: So sativepullappatto saṅghaṁ sativinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.28
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sativepullappattassa sativinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.29
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sativepullappattassa sativinayassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.30
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.31
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.32
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.33
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sativepullappattassa sativinayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.34
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.35
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.36
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.37
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca sativinayena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.38
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.39
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.40
Pali: kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.41
Pali: Yo ca anuvadati, yañca anuvadati, ubho sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.42
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.43
Pali: Kiñca tattha sativinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.44
Pali: Yā sativinayassa kammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.45
Pali: idaṁ tattha sativinayasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.46
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.27.47
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.0
Pali: 9.6. Amūḷhavinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.1
Pali: Siyā anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ dve samathe anāgamma—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.2
Pali: sativinayañca, tassapāpiyasikañca; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.3
Pali: dvīhi samathehi sammeyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.4
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, amūḷhavinayena cāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.5
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.6
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ummattako hoti cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.8
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ hoti bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.9
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.10
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.11
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.12
Pali: ‘ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.13
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.14
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.15
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.16
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.17
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.18
Pali: Tassa kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayo dātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.19
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.20
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.21
Pali: evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.22
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.23
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.24
Pali: Maṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.25
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.26
Pali: Tyāhaṁ evaṁ vadāmi—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.27
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.28
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.29
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.30
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.31
Pali: Evampi maṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.32
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.33
Pali: “Sohaṁ, bhante, amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācāmī”’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.34
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.35
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.36
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.37
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.38
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu ummattako ahosi cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.39
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.40
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.41
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.42
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.43
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.44
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.45
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.46
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.47
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.48
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.49
Pali: So amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.50
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayaṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.51
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.52
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.53
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu ummattako ahosi cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.54
Pali: Tena ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.55
Pali: Taṁ bhikkhū ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena ajjhāciṇṇena āpattiyā codenti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.56
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.57
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.58
Pali: “ahaṁ kho, āvuso, ummattako ahosiṁ cittavipariyāsakato. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.59
Pali: Tena me ummattakena cittavipariyāsakatena bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.60
Pali: Nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.61
Pali: Mūḷhena me etaṁ katan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.62
Pali: Evampi naṁ vuccamānā codenteva—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.63
Pali: “saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.64
Pali: So amūḷho saṅghaṁ amūḷhavinayaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.65
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayaṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.66
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayassa dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.67
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.68
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.69
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.70
Pali: Dinno saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno amūḷhassa amūḷhavinayo. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.71
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.72
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.73
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.74
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, amūḷhavinayena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.75
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.76
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.77
Pali: kiñca tattha amūḷhavinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.78
Pali: Yā amūḷhavinayassa kammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.79
Pali: idaṁ tattha amūḷhavinayasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.80
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.28.81
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.0
Pali: 9.7. Tassapāpiyasikāvinaya 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.1
Pali: Siyā anuvādādhikaraṇaṁ dve samathe anāgamma—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.2
Pali: sativinayañca, amūḷhavinayañca; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.3
Pali: dvīhi samathehi sammeyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.4
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, tassapāpiyasikāya cāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.5
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.6
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.7
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu bhikkhuṁ saṅghamajjhe garukāya āpattiyā codeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.8
Pali: ‘saratāyasmā evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.9
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.10
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, sarāmi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.11
Pali: Tamenaṁ so nibbeṭhentaṁ ativeṭheti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.12
Pali: ‘iṅghāyasmā sādhukameva jānāhi, yadi sarasi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.13
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.14
Pali: ‘na kho ahaṁ, āvuso, sarāmi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.15
Pali: Sarāmi ca kho ahaṁ, āvuso, evarūpiṁ appamattikaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.16
Pali: Tamenaṁ so nibbeṭhentaṁ ativeṭheti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.17
Pali: ‘iṅghāyasmā sādhukameva jānāhi, yadi sarasi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.18
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.19
Pali: ‘imañhi nāmāhaṁ, āvuso, appamattikaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā apuṭṭho paṭijānissāmi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.20
Pali: Kiṁ panāhaṁ evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā, puṭṭho na paṭijānissāmī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.21
Pali: So evaṁ vadeti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.22
Pali: ‘imañhi nāma tvaṁ, āvuso, appamattikaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā apuṭṭho na paṭijānissasi. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.23
Pali: Kiṁ pana tvaṁ evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitvā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā, apuṭṭho paṭijānissasi? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.24
Pali: Iṅghāyasmā sādhukameva jānāhi, yadi sarasi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.25
Pali: So evaṁ vadesi—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.26
Pali: ‘sarāmi kho ahaṁ, āvuso, evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.27
Pali: Davā me etaṁ vuttaṁ, ravā me etaṁ vuttaṁ—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.28
Pali: nāhaṁ taṁ sarāmi evarūpiṁ garukaṁ āpattiṁ āpajjitā, pārājikaṁ vā pārājikasāmantaṁ vā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.29
Pali: Tassa kho, bhikkhave, bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.30
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.31
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.32
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.33
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe garukāya āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānāti, paṭijānitvā avajānāti, aññenāññaṁ paṭicarati, sampajānamusā bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.34
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.35
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.36
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.37
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu saṅghamajjhe garukāya āpattiyā anuyuñjiyamāno avajānitvā paṭijānāti, paṭijānitvā avajānāti, aññenāññaṁ paṭicarati, sampajānamusā bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.38
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ karoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.39
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammassa karaṇaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.40
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.41
Pali: Dutiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.42
Pali: tatiyampi etamatthaṁ vadāmi …pe…. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.43
Pali: Kataṁ saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno tassapāpiyasikākammaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.44
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.45
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.46
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.47
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, tassapāpiyasikāya ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.48
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.49
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.50
Pali: kā ca tattha tassapāpiyasikāya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.51
Pali: Yā tassapāpiyasikākammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.52
Pali: ayaṁ tattha tassapāpiyasikāya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.53
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ kārako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.29.54
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.0
Pali: 9.8. Paṭiññātakaraṇa 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.1
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ katihi samathehi sammati? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.2
Pali: Āpattādhikaraṇaṁ tīhi samathehi sammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.3
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, paṭiññātakaraṇena ca, tiṇavatthārakena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.4
Pali: Siyā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ ekaṁ samathaṁ anāgamma—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.5
Pali: tiṇavatthārakaṁ, dvīhi samathehi sammeyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.6
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, paṭiññātakaraṇena cāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.7
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.8
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.9
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu lahukaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.10
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā ekaṁ bhikkhuṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.11
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, āvuso, itthannāmaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.12
Pali: taṁ paṭidesemī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.13
Pali: Tena vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.14
Pali: ‘passasī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.15
Pali: ‘Āma passāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.16
Pali: ‘Āyatiṁ saṁvareyyāsī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.17
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.18
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.19
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, paṭiññātakaraṇena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.20
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.21
Pali: Dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.22
Pali: kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.23
Pali: Yo ca deseti, yassa ca deseti, ubho sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.24
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.25
Pali: Kiñca tattha paṭiññātakaraṇasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.26
Pali: Yā paṭiññātakaraṇassa kammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.27
Pali: idaṁ tattha paṭiññātakaraṇasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.30.28
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ paṭiggāhako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.1
Pali: Evañcetaṁ labhetha, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.2
Pali: No ce labhetha, tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā sambahule bhikkhū upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassu vacanīyā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, itthannāmaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.4
Pali: taṁ paṭidesemī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.5
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena te bhikkhū ñāpetabbā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.6
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.7
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu āpattiṁ sarati, vivarati, uttāniṁ karoti deseti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.8
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ itthannāmassa bhikkhuno āpattiṁ paṭiggaṇheyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.9
Pali: Tena vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.10
Pali: ‘passasī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.11
Pali: ‘Āma passāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.12
Pali: ‘Āyatiṁ saṁvareyyāsī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.13
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.14
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.15
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, paṭiññātakaraṇena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.16
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.17
Pali: Dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.18
Pali: kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.19
Pali: Yo ca deseti, yassa ca deseti, ubho sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.20
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.21
Pali: Kiñca tattha paṭiññātakaraṇasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.22
Pali: Yā paṭiññātakaraṇassa kammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.23
Pali: idaṁ tattha paṭiññātakaraṇasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.31.24
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ paṭiggāhako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.1
Pali: Evañcetaṁ labhetha, iccetaṁ kusalaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.2
Pali: No ce labhetha, tena, bhikkhave, bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.3
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, itthannāmaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.4
Pali: taṁ paṭidesemī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.5
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.6
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.7
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu āpattiṁ sarati, vivarati, uttāniṁ karoti, deseti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.8
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ itthannāmassa bhikkhuno āpattiṁ paṭiggaṇheyyan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.9
Pali: Tena vattabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.10
Pali: ‘passasī’ti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.11
Pali: ‘Āma passāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.12
Pali: ‘Āyatiṁ saṁvareyyāsī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.13
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.14
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.15
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, paṭiññātakaraṇena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.16
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.17
