Pali: evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ paṭiggāhako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.32.19
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.0
Pali: 9.9. Tiṇavatthāraka 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.1
Pali: Siyā āpattādhikaraṇaṁ ekaṁ samathaṁ anāgamma—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.2
Pali: paṭiññātakaraṇaṁ, dvīhi samathehi sammeyya—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.3
Pali: sammukhāvinayena ca, tiṇavatthārakena cāti? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.4
Pali: Siyātissa vacanīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.5
Pali: Yathā kathaṁ viya? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.6
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhūnaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ hoti bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.7
Pali: Tatra ce bhikkhūnaṁ evaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.8
Pali: ‘amhākaṁ kho bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.9
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyyā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, evarūpaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ tiṇavatthārakena vūpasametuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.11
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, vūpasametabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.12
Pali: Sabbeheva ekajjhaṁ sannipatitabbaṁ, sannipatitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.13
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.14
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.15
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.16
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho imaṁ adhikaraṇaṁ tiṇavatthārakena vūpasameyya, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttanti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.17
Pali: Ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena sako pakkho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.18
Pali: Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.19
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.20
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.21
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, āyasmantānañceva atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.22
Pali: Athāparesaṁ ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena sako pakkho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.23
Pali: ‘Suṇantu me āyasmantā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.24
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.25
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.26
Pali: Yadāyasmantānaṁ pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, āyasmantānañceva atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttan’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.27
Pali: Athāparesaṁ ekatopakkhikānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.28
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.29
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.30
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.31
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena deseyyaṁ, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.32
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.33
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.34
Pali: Amhākaṁ bhaṇḍanajātānaṁ kalahajātānaṁ vivādāpannānaṁ viharataṁ bahuṁ assāmaṇakaṁ ajjhāciṇṇaṁ bhāsitaparikkantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.35
Pali: Sace mayaṁ imāhi āpattīhi aññamaññaṁ kāressāma, siyāpi taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ kakkhaḷattāya vāḷattāya bhedāya saṁvatteyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.36
Pali: Ahaṁ yā ceva imesaṁ āyasmantānaṁ āpatti, yā ca attano āpatti, imesañceva āyasmantānaṁ atthāya, attano ca atthāya, saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desemi, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.37
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati amhākaṁ imāsaṁ āpattīnaṁ saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena desanā, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.38
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.39
Pali: Desitā amhākaṁ imā āpattiyo saṅghamajjhe tiṇavatthārakena, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṁ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṁyuttaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.40
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.41.1
Pali: Athāparesaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.42
Pali: evametaṁ dhārayāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.43
Pali: Idaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.44
Pali: Kena vūpasantaṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.45
Pali: Sammukhāvinayena ca, tiṇavatthārakena ca. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.46
Pali: Kiñca tattha sammukhāvinayasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.47
Pali: Saṅghasammukhatā, dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā, puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.48
Pali: Kā ca tattha saṅghasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.49
Pali: Yāvatikā bhikkhū kammappattā, te āgatā honti, chandārahānaṁ chando āhaṭo hoti, sammukhībhūtā na paṭikkosanti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.50
Pali: ayaṁ tattha saṅghasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.51
Pali: Kā ca tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.52
Pali: Yena dhammena yena vinayena yena satthusāsanena taṁ adhikaraṇaṁ vūpasammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.53
Pali: ayaṁ tattha dhammasammukhatā, vinayasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.54
Pali: Kā ca tattha puggalasammukhatā? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.55
Pali: Yo ca deseti, yassa ca deseti, ubho sammukhībhūtā honti—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.56
Pali: ayaṁ tattha puggalasammukhatā. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.57
Pali: Kiñca tattha tiṇavatthārakasmiṁ? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.58
Pali: Yā tiṇavatthārakassa kammassa kiriyā karaṇaṁ upagamanaṁ ajjhupagamanaṁ adhivāsanā appaṭikkosanā—

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.59
Pali: idaṁ tattha tiṇavatthārakasmiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.60
Pali: Evaṁ vūpasantañce, bhikkhave, adhikaraṇaṁ paṭiggāhako ukkoṭeti, ukkoṭanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd14:14.33.61
Pali: chandadāyako khīyati, khīyanakaṁ pācittiyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.34.1
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ katihi samathehi sammati? 

pli-tv-kd14:14.34.2
Pali: Kiccādhikaraṇaṁ ekena samathena sammati—

pli-tv-kd14:14.34.3
Pali: sammukhāvinayenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd14:14.34.4
Pali: Samathakkhandhako niṭṭhito catuttho.

Pali: 15. Khuddakavatthukkhandhaka 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.1
Pali: Tena samayena buddho bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.2
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nahāyamānā rukkhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsenti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā nahāyamānā rukkhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsessanti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi, seyyathāpi mallamuṭṭhikā gāmamoddavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā bhikkhū paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.8
Pali: “saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nahāyamānā rukkhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsenti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.9
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.10
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.11
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, bhikkhave, tesaṁ moghapurisānaṁ ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.12
Pali: Kathañhi nāma te, bhikkhave, moghapurisā nahāyamānā rukkhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsessanti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi? 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.13
Pali: Netaṁ, bhikkhave, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.14
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.15
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.16
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, nahāyamānena bhikkhunā rukkhe kāyo ugghaṁsetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.1.17
Pali: Yo ugghaṁseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nahāyamānā thambhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsenti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā nahāyamānā thambhe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsessanti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi, seyyathāpi mallamuṭṭhikā gāmamoddavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.6
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.7
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.8
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.9
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, nahāyamānena bhikkhunā thambhe kāyo ugghaṁsetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.10
Pali: Yo ugghaṁseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū nahāyamānā kuṭṭe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsenti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.12
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.13
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā nahāyamānā kuṭṭe kāyaṁ ugghaṁsessanti, ūrumpi bāhumpi urampi piṭṭhimpi, seyyathāpi mallamuṭṭhikā gāmamoddavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.14
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, nahāyamānena bhikkhunā kuṭṭe kāyo ugghaṁsetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.2.15
Pali: Yo ugghaṁseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū aṭṭāne nahāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.3
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.5
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.6
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.7
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.8
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.9
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, aṭṭāne nahāyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.10
Pali: Yo nahāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū gandhabbahatthakena nahāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.12
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.13
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.14
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.15
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.16
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, gandhabbahatthakena nahāyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.17
Pali: Yo nahāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.18
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kuruvindakasuttiyā nahāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.19
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.20
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhoginoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.21
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.22
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, kuruvindakasuttiyā nahāyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.3.23
Pali: Yo nahāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū viggayha parikammaṁ kārāpenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.3
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, viggayha parikammaṁ kārāpetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.6
Pali: Yo kārāpeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū mallakena nahāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.8
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.9
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, mallakena nahāyitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.12
Pali: Yo nahāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno kacchurogābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.14
Pali: Na tassa vinā mallakena phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.15
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.4.16
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa akatamallakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu jarādubbalo nahāyamāno na sakkoti attano kāyaṁ ugghaṁsetuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ukkāsikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū piṭṭhiparikammaṁ kātuṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:1.5.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, puthupāṇikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū vallikaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.2
Pali: pāmaṅgaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.3
Pali: kaṇṭhasuttakaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.4
Pali: kaṭisuttakaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.5
Pali: ovaṭṭikaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.6
Pali: kāyuraṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.7
Pali: hatthābharaṇaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.8
Pali: aṅgulimuddikaṁ dhārenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.9
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.10
Pali: seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.11
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.12
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.13
Pali: “Saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave, chabbaggiyā bhikkhū vallikaṁ dhārenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.14
Pali: pāmaṅgaṁ dhārenti, kaṇṭhasuttakaṁ dhārenti, kaṭisuttakaṁ dhārenti, ovaṭṭikaṁ dhārenti, kāyuraṁ dhārenti, hatthābharaṇaṁ dhārenti, aṅgulimuddikaṁ dhārentī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.15
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.16
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.17
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.18
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, vallikā dhāretabbā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.19
Pali: na pāmaṅgo dhāretabbo … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.20
Pali: na kaṇṭhasuttakaṁ dhāretabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.21
Pali: na kaṭisuttakaṁ dhāretabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.22
Pali: na ovaṭṭikaṁ dhāretabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.23
Pali: na kāyuraṁ dhāretabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.24
Pali: na hatthābharaṇaṁ dhāretabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.25
Pali: na aṅgulimuddikā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.1.26
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dīghe kese dhārenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, dīghā kesā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.6
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.2.7
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dumāsikaṁ vā duvaṅgulaṁ vā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū kocchena kese osaṇṭhenti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.2
Pali: phaṇakena kese osaṇṭhenti, hatthaphaṇakena kese osaṇṭhenti, sitthatelakena kese osaṇṭhenti, udakatelakena kese osaṇṭhenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, kocchena kesā osaṇṭhetabbā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.7
Pali: na sitthatelakena kesā osaṇṭhetabbā … 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.8
Pali: na udakatelakena kesā osaṇṭhetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.3.9
Pali: Yo osaṇṭheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū ādāsepi udakapattepi mukhanimittaṁ olokenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ādāse vā udakapatte vā mukhanimittaṁ oloketabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.6
Pali: Yo olokeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno mukhe vaṇo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.8
Pali: So bhikkhū pucchi—

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.9
Pali: “kīdiso me, āvuso, vaṇo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.10
Pali: Bhikkhū evamāhaṁsu—

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.11
Pali: “ediso te, āvuso vaṇo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.12
Pali: So na saddahati. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.4.14
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ābādhappaccayā ādāse vā udakapatte vā mukhanimittaṁ oloketun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū mukhaṁ ālimpanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.2
Pali: mukhaṁ ummaddenti, mukhaṁ cuṇṇenti, manosilikāya mukhaṁ lañchenti, aṅgarāgaṁ karonti, mukharāgaṁ karonti, aṅgarāgamukharāgaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, mukhaṁ ālimpitabbaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.7
Pali: na mukhaṁ ummadditabbaṁ, na mukhaṁ cuṇṇetabbaṁ, na manosilikāya mukhaṁ lañchetabbaṁ, na aṅgarāgo kātabbo, na mukharāgo kātabbo, na aṅgarāgamukharāgo kātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.8
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.9
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno cakkhurogābādho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.5.11
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ābādhappaccayā mukhaṁ ālimpitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahe giraggasamajjo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.2
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū giraggasamajjaṁ dassanāya agamaṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā naccampi gītampi vāditampi dassanāya gacchissanti, seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, naccaṁ vā gītaṁ vā vāditaṁ vā dassanāya gantabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:2.6.7
Pali: Yo gaccheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū āyatakena gītassarena dhammaṁ gāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.3
Pali: “yatheva mayaṁ gāyāma, evamevime samaṇā sakyaputtiyā āyatakena gītassarena dhammaṁ gāyantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.4
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.5
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.6
Pali: “kathañhi nāma chabbaggiyā bhikkhū āyatakena gītassarena dhammaṁ gāyissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.7
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.8
Pali: “Saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.9
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.10
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.11
Pali: “pañcime, bhikkhave, ādīnavā āyatakena gītassarena dhammaṁ gāyantassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.12
Pali: Attanāpi tasmiṁ sare sārajjati, parepi tasmiṁ sare sārajjanti, gahapatikāpi ujjhāyanti, sarakuttimpi nikāmayamānassa samādhissa bhaṅgo hoti, pacchimā janatā diṭṭhānugatiṁ āpajjati—

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.13
Pali: ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā āyatakena gītassarena dhammaṁ gāyantassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.14
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, āyatakena gītassarena dhammo gāyitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.1.15
Pali: Yo gāyeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū sarabhaññe kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:3.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sarabhaññan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bāhiralomiṁ uṇṇiṁ dhārenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, bāhiyalomi uṇṇi dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:4.1.6
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa ārāme ambā phalino honti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.2
Pali: Raññā māgadhena seniyena bimbisārena anuññātaṁ hoti—

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.3
Pali: “yathāsukhaṁ ayyā ambaṁ paribhuñjantū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.4
Pali: Chabbaggiyā bhikkhū taruṇaññeva ambaṁ pātāpetvā paribhuñjiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.5
Pali: Rañño ca māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa ambena attho hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.6
Pali: Atha kho rājā māgadho seniyo bimbisāro manusse āṇāpesi—

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.7
Pali: “gacchatha, bhaṇe, ārāmaṁ gantvā ambaṁ āharathā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.8
Pali: “Evaṁ, devā”ti kho te manussā rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa paṭissutvā ārāmaṁ gantvā ārāmapālaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.9
Pali: “devassa, bhaṇe, ambena attho, ambaṁ dethā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.10
Pali: “Natthāyyā, ambaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.11
Pali: Taruṇaññeva ambaṁ pātāpetvā bhikkhū paribhuñjiṁsū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.12
Pali: Atha kho te manussā rañño māgadhassa seniyassa bimbisārassa etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.13
Pali: “Suparibhuttaṁ, bhaṇe, ayyehi ambaṁ, api ca bhagavatā mattā vaṇṇitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.14
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā na mattaṁ jānitvā rañño ambaṁ paribhuñjissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.16
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.17
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.18
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ambaṁ paribhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.1.19
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa pūgassa saṅghabhattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.2
Pali: Sūpe ambapesikāyo pakkhittā honti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.3
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nappaṭiggaṇhanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.4
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhatha, bhikkhave, paribhuñjatha. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ambapesikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa pūgassa saṅghabhattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.7
Pali: Te na pariyāpuṇiṁsu ambapesikaṁ kātuṁ, bhattagge sakaleheva ambehi denti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.8
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā nappaṭiggaṇhanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.9
Pali: “Paṭiggaṇhatha, bhikkhave, paribhuñjatha. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahi samaṇakappehi phalaṁ paribhuñjituṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.11
Pali: aggiparicitaṁ, satthaparicitaṁ, nakhaparicitaṁ, abījaṁ, nibbattabījaññeva pañcamaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:5.2.12
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi pañcahi samaṇakappehi phalaṁ paribhuñjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu ahinā daṭṭho kālaṅkato hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.3
Pali: “Na hi nūna so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu imāni cattāri ahirājakulāni mettena cittena phari. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.4
Pali: Sace hi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu imāni cattāri ahirājakulāni mettena cittena phareyya, na hi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ahinā daṭṭho kālaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.5
Pali: Katamāni cattāri ahirājakulāni? 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.6
Pali: Virūpakkhaṁ ahirājakulaṁ, erāpathaṁ ahirājakulaṁ, chabyāputtaṁ ahirājakulaṁ, kaṇhāgotamaṁ ahirājakulaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.7
Pali: Na hi nūna so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu imāni cattāri ahirājakulāni mettena cittena phari. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.8
Pali: Sace hi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu imāni cattāri ahirājakulāni mettena cittena phareyya, na hi so, bhikkhave, bhikkhu ahinā daṭṭho kālaṁ kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.9
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imāni cattāri ahirājakulāni mettena cittena pharituṁ, attaguttiyā attarakkhāya attaparittaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.10
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, kātabbaṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.11
Pali: ‘Virūpakkhehi me mettaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.12
Pali: Mettaṁ erāpathehi me; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.13
Pali: Chabyāputtehi me mettaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.14
Pali: Mettaṁ kaṇhāgotamakehi ca. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.15
Pali: Apādakehi me mettaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.16
Pali: mettaṁ dvipādakehi me; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.17
Pali: Catuppadehi me mettaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.18
Pali: mettaṁ bahuppadehi me. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.19
Pali: Mā maṁ apādako hiṁsi, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.20
Pali: mā maṁ hiṁsi dvipādako; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.21
Pali: Mā maṁ catuppado hiṁsi, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.22
Pali: mā maṁ hiṁsi bahuppado. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.23
Pali: Sabbe sattā sabbe pāṇā, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.24
Pali: sabbe bhūtā ca kevalā; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.25
Pali: Sabbe bhadrāni passantu, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.26
Pali: mā kiñci pāpamāgamā. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.27
Pali: Appamāṇo buddho, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.28
Pali: Appamāṇo dhammo; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.29
Pali: Appamāṇo saṅgho, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.30
Pali: Pamāṇavantāni sarīsapāni. 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.31
Pali: Ahi vicchikā satapadī, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.32
Pali: Uṇṇanābhi sarabū mūsikā; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.33
Pali: Katā me rakkhā kataṁ me parittaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.34
Pali: Paṭikkamantu bhūtāni; 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.35
Pali: Sohaṁ namo bhagavato, 

pli-tv-kd15:6.1.36
Pali: Namo sattannaṁ sammāsambuddhānan’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:7.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu anabhiratiyā pīḷito attano aṅgajātaṁ chindi. 

pli-tv-kd15:7.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:7.1.3
Pali: “Aññamhi so, bhikkhave, moghapuriso chetabbamhi, aññaṁ chindi. 

pli-tv-kd15:7.1.4
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, attano aṅgajātaṁ chetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:7.1.5
Pali: Yo chindeyya, āpatti thullaccayassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa mahagghassa candanassa candanagaṇṭhi uppannā hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.2
Pali: Atha kho rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.3
Pali: “yannūnāhaṁ imāya candanagaṇṭhiyā pattaṁ lekhāpeyyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.4
Pali: Lekhañca me paribhogaṁ bhavissati, pattañca dānaṁ dassāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.5
Pali: Atha kho rājagahako seṭṭhi tāya candanagaṇṭhiyā pattaṁ lekhāpetvā sikkāya uḍḍitvā veḷagge ālaggetvā veḷuparamparāya bandhitvā evamāha—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.6
Pali: “yo samaṇo vā brāhmaṇo vā arahā ceva iddhimā ca dinnaṁyeva pattaṁ oharatū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.7
Pali: Atha kho pūraṇo kassapo yena rājagahako seṭṭhi tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā rājagahakaṁ seṭṭhiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.8
Pali: “ahañhi, gahapati, arahā ceva iddhimā ca, dehi me pattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.9
Pali: “Sace, bhante, āyasmā arahā ceva iddhimā ca dinnaṁyeva pattaṁ oharatū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.10
Pali: Atha kho makkhali gosālo … 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.11
Pali: ajito kesakambalo … 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.12
Pali: pakudho kaccāyano … 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.13
Pali: sañcayo belaṭṭhaputto … 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.14
Pali: nigaṇṭho nāṭaputto yena rājagahako seṭṭhi tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā rājagahakaṁ seṭṭhiṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.15
Pali: “ahañhi, gahapati, arahā ceva iddhimā ca, dehi me pattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.16
Pali: “Sace, bhante, āyasmā arahā ceva iddhimā ca, dinnaṁyeva pattaṁ oharatū”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.17
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā ca mahāmoggallāno āyasmā ca piṇḍolabhāradvājo pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya rājagahaṁ piṇḍāya pavisiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.18
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā piṇḍolabhāradvājo āyasmantaṁ mahāmoggallānaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.19
Pali: “āyasmā kho mahāmoggallāno arahā ceva iddhimā ca. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.20
Pali: Gacchāvuso, moggallāna, etaṁ pattaṁ ohara. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.21
Pali: Tuyheso patto”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.22
Pali: “Āyasmā kho bhāradvājo arahā ceva iddhimā ca. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.23
Pali: Gacchāvuso, bhāradvāja, etaṁ pattaṁ ohara. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.24
Pali: Tuyheso patto”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.25
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā piṇḍolabhāradvājo vehāsaṁ abbhuggantvā taṁ pattaṁ gahetvā tikkhattuṁ rājagahaṁ anupariyāyi. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.26
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahako seṭṭhi saputtadāro sake nivesane ṭhito hoti pañjaliko namassamāno—

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.27
Pali: idheva, bhante, ayyo bhāradvājo amhākaṁ nivesane patiṭṭhātūti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.28
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā piṇḍolabhāradvājo rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa nivesane patiṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.29
Pali: Atha kho rājagahako seṭṭhi āyasmato piṇḍolabhāradvājassa hatthato pattaṁ gahetvā mahagghassa khādanīyassa pūretvā āyasmato piṇḍolabhāradvājassa adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.1.30
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā piṇḍolabhāradvājo taṁ pattaṁ gahetvā ārāmaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.1
Pali: Assosuṁ kho manussā—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.2
Pali: ayyena kira piṇḍolabhāradvājena rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa patto ohāritoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.3
Pali: Te ca manussā uccāsaddā mahāsaddā āyasmantaṁ piṇḍolabhāradvājaṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.4
Pali: Assosi kho bhagavā uccāsaddaṁ mahāsaddaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.5
Pali: sutvāna āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.6
Pali: “kiṁ nu kho so, ānanda, uccāsaddo mahāsaddo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.7
Pali: “Āyasmatā, bhante, piṇḍolabhāradvājena rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa patto ohārito. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.8
Pali: Assosuṁ kho, bhante, manussā—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.9
Pali: ayyena kira piṇḍolabhāradvājena rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa patto ohāritoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.10
Pali: Te ca, bhante, manussā uccāsaddā mahāsaddā āyasmantaṁ piṇḍolabhāradvājaṁ piṭṭhito piṭṭhito anubandhā. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.11
Pali: So eso, bhante, bhagavā uccāsaddo mahāsaddo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.12
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ piṇḍolabhāradvājaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.13
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tayā, bhāradvāja, rājagahakassa seṭṭhissa patto ohārito”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.14
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.15
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.16
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, bhāradvāja, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.17
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, bhāradvāja, chavassa dārupattassa kāraṇā gihīnaṁ uttari manussadhammaṁ iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ dassessasi. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.18
Pali: Seyyathāpi, bhāradvāja, mātugāmo chavassa māsakarūpassa kāraṇā kopinaṁ dasseti; 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.19
Pali: evameva kho tayā, bhāradvāja, chavassa dārupattassa kāraṇā gihīnaṁ uttari manussadhammaṁ iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ dassitaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.20
Pali: Netaṁ, bhāradvāja, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.21
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.22
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.23
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, gihīnaṁ uttarimanussadhammaṁ iddhipāṭihāriyaṁ dassetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.24
Pali: Yo dasseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.25
Pali: Bhindathetaṁ, bhikkhave, dārupattaṁ sakalikaṁ sakalikaṁ katvā, bhikkhūnaṁ añjanupapisanaṁ detha. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.26
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, dārupatto dhāretabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:8.2.27
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvace patte dhārenti sovaṇṇamayaṁ rūpiyamayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.2
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.3
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, sovaṇṇamayo patto dhāretabbo …pe…

Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve patte—

pli-tv-kd15:9.1.17
Pali: ayopattaṁ, mattikāpattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena pattamūlaṁ ghaṁsiyati. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pattamaṇḍalan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvacāni pattamaṇḍalāni dhārenti sovaṇṇamayaṁ rūpiyamayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.5
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.6
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.8
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāvacāni pattamaṇḍalāni dhāretabbāni. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.9
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve pattamaṇḍalāni—

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.11
Pali: tipumayaṁ, sīsamayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.12
Pali: Bahalāni maṇḍalāni na acchupiyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.14
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, likhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.15
Pali: Valī honti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.16
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.17
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, makaradantakaṁ chinditun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.18
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū citrāni pattamaṇḍalāni dhārenti rūpakākiṇṇāni bhittikammakatāni. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.19
Pali: Tāni rathikāyapi dassentā āhiṇḍanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.20
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.21
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.22
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.23
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, citrāni pattamaṇḍalāni dhāretabbāni rūpakākiṇṇāni bhittikammakatāni. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.24
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:9.2.25
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pakatimaṇḍalan”ti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.4
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, adhotehi pādehi kathinaṁ akkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.5
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū allehi pādehi kathinaṁ akkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.7
Pali: Kathinaṁ dussati. 

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.10
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti.

pli-tv-kd15:11.4.12

pli-tv-kd15:12.1.1

Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dhammakaraṇan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena dve bhikkhū kosalesu janapade addhānamaggappaṭipannā honti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.2
Pali: Eko bhikkhu anācāraṁ ācarati. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.3
Pali: Dutiyo bhikkhu taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.4
Pali: “mā, āvuso, evarūpaṁ akāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.5
Pali: Netaṁ kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.6
Pali: So tasmiṁ upanandhi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.7
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu pipāsāya pīḷito upanaddhaṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.8
Pali: “dehi me, āvuso, parissāvanaṁ, pānīyaṁ pivissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.9
Pali: Upanaddho bhikkhu na adāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.10
Pali: So bhikkhu pipāsāya pīḷito kālamakāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.11
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.12
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso, parissāvanaṁ yāciyamāno na adāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.13
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.14
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.15
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu parissāvanaṁ yāciyamāno na dassatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.16
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.17
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.18
Pali: “saccaṁ kira tvaṁ, bhikkhu, parissāvanaṁ yāciyamāno na adāsī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.19
Pali: “Saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.20
Pali: Vigarahi buddho bhagavā—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.21
Pali: “ananucchavikaṁ, moghapurisa, ananulomikaṁ appatirūpaṁ assāmaṇakaṁ akappiyaṁ akaraṇīyaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.22
Pali: Kathañhi nāma tvaṁ, moghapurisa, parissāvanaṁ yāciyamāno na dassasi. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.23
Pali: Netaṁ, moghapurisa, appasannānaṁ vā pasādāya …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.24
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.25
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.26
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, addhānamaggappaṭipannena bhikkhunā parissāvanaṁ yāciyamānena na dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.27
Pali: Yo na dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.28
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, aparissāvanakena addhāno paṭipajjitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.29
Pali: Yo paṭipajjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.30
Pali: Sace na hoti parissāvanaṁ vā dhammakaraṇo vā, saṅghāṭikaṇṇopi adhiṭṭhātabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:13.2.31
Pali: iminā parissāvetvā pivissāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena vesālī tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.3.2
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā vesāliyaṁ viharati mahāvane kūṭāgārasālāyaṁ.

Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū navakammaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd15:13.3.4

Pali: “namatakaṁ adhiṭṭhātabbaṁ nu kho udāhu vikappetabban”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.6
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, namatakaṁ adhiṭṭhātabbaṁ, na vikappetabban”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū āsittakūpadhāne bhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.8
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.9
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.11
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, āsittakūpadhāne bhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.12
Pali: Yo bhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.14
Pali: So bhuñjamāno na sakkoti hatthena pattaṁ sandhāretuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.15
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.1.16
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, maḷorikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū ekabhājanepi bhuñjanti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.2
Pali: ekathālakepi pivanti, ekamañcepi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti, ekattharaṇapāvuraṇāpi tuvaṭṭenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ekabhājane bhuñjitabbaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.7
Pali: na ekathālake pātabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.8
Pali: na ekamañce tuvaṭṭitabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.9
Pali: na ekattharaṇā tuvaṭṭitabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.10
Pali: na ekapāvuraṇā tuvaṭṭitabbaṁ … 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.11
Pali: na ekattharaṇapāvuraṇā tuvaṭṭitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:19.2.12
Pali: Yo tuvaṭṭeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena vaḍḍho licchavī mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ sahāyo hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.2
Pali: Atha kho vaḍḍho licchavī yena mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.3
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.4
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.5
Pali: Dutiyampi kho vaḍḍho licchavī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.6
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.7
Pali: Dutiyampi kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.8
Pali: Tatiyampi kho vaḍḍho licchavī mettiyabhūmajake bhikkhū etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.9
Pali: “vandāmi, ayyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.10
Pali: Tatiyampi kho mettiyabhūmajakā bhikkhū nālapiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.11
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ ayyānaṁ aparajjhāmi, kissa maṁ ayyā nālapantī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.12
Pali: “Tathā hi pana tvaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, amhe dabbena mallaputtena viheṭhiyamāne ajjhupekkhasī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.13
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.14
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, iccheyyāsi, ajjeva bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ nāsāpeyyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.15
Pali: “Kyāhaṁ, ayyā, karomi, kiṁ mayā sakkā kātun”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.16
Pali: “Ehi tvaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ evaṁ vadehi—

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.17
Pali: ‘idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.18
Pali: Yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.19
Pali: yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.20
Pali: udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.1.21
Pali: ayyena me dabbena mallaputtena pajāpati dūsitā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.1
Pali: “Evaṁ, ayyā”ti kho vaḍḍho licchavī mettiyabhūmajakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ paṭissutvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho vaḍḍho licchavī bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.3
Pali: “idaṁ, bhante, nacchannaṁ nappatirūpaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.4
Pali: Yāyaṁ, bhante, disā abhayā anītikā anupaddavā sāyaṁ disā sabhayā saītikā saupaddavā; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.5
Pali: yato nivātaṁ tato savātaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.6
Pali: udakaṁ maññe ādittaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.7
Pali: ayyena me dabbena mallaputtena pajāpati dūsitā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.8
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe bhikkhusaṅghaṁ sannipātāpetvā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ paṭipucchi—

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.9
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ vaḍḍho āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.10
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.11
Pali: Dutiyampi kho bhagavā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.12
Pali: tatiyampi kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.13
Pali: “sarasi tvaṁ, dabba, evarūpaṁ kattā yathāyaṁ vaḍḍho āhā”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.14
Pali: “Yathā maṁ, bhante, bhagavā jānātī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.15
Pali: “Na kho, dabba, dabbā evaṁ nibbeṭhenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.16
Pali: Sace tayā kataṁ, katanti vadehi; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.17
Pali: sace akataṁ, akatanti vadehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.2.18
Pali: “Yato ahaṁ, bhante, jāto nābhijānāmi supinantenapi methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevitā, pageva jāgaro”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:20.3.2
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ nikkujjatu, asambhogaṁ saṅghena karotu. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.3.3
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa upāsakassa patto nikkujjitabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:20.3.4
Pali: bhikkhūnaṁ alābhāya parisakkati, bhikkhūnaṁ anatthāya parisakkati, bhikkhūnaṁ avāsāya parisakkati, bhikkhū akkosati paribhāsati, bhikkhū bhikkhūhi bhedeti, buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.3.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa upāsakassa pattaṁ nikkujjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, nikkujjitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.2
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.3
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.4
Pali: Vaḍḍho licchavī āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.5
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ nikkujjeyya, asambhogaṁ saṅghena kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.6
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.7
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.8
Pali: Vaḍḍho licchavī āyasmantaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁseti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.9
Pali: Saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ nikkujjati, asambhogaṁ saṅghena karoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.10
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattassa nikkujjanā, asambhogaṁ saṅghena karaṇaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.11
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.12
Pali: Nikkujjito saṅghena vaḍḍhassa licchavissa patto, asambhogo saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.4.13
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.1
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena vaḍḍhassa licchavissa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā vaḍḍhaṁ licchaviṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.2
Pali: “saṅghena te, āvuso vaḍḍha, patto nikkujjito. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.3
Pali: Asambhogosi saṅghenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.4
Pali: Atha kho vaḍḍho licchavī—

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.5
Pali: saṅghena kira me patto nikkujjito, asambhogomhi kira saṅghenāti—

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.6
Pali: tattheva mucchito papato. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.7
Pali: Atha kho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa mittāmaccā ñātisālohitā vaḍḍhaṁ licchaviṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.8
Pali: “alaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, mā soci, mā paridevi. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.9
Pali: Mayaṁ bhagavantaṁ pasādessāma bhikkhusaṅghañcā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.10
Pali: Atha kho vaḍḍho licchavī saputtadāro samittāmacco sañātisālohito allavattho allakeso yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato pādesu sirasā nipatitvā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.11
Pali: “accayo maṁ, bhante, accagamā yathābālaṁ yathāmūḷhaṁ yathāakusalaṁ, yohaṁ ayyaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsesiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.12
Pali: Tassa me, bhante, bhagavā accayaṁ accayato paṭiggaṇhātu āyatiṁ saṁvarāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.13
Pali: “Taggha tvaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, accayo accagamā yathābālaṁ yathāmūḷhaṁ yathāakusalaṁ, yaṁ tvaṁ dabbaṁ mallaputtaṁ amūlikāya sīlavipattiyā anuddhaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.14
Pali: Yato ca kho tvaṁ, āvuso vaḍḍha, accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikarosi, taṁ te mayaṁ paṭiggaṇhāma. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.5.15
Pali: Vuḍḍhihesā, āvuso vaḍḍha, ariyassa vinaye yo accayaṁ accayato disvā yathādhammaṁ paṭikaroti, āyatiṁ saṁvaraṁ āpajjatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.6.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:20.6.2
Pali: “tena hi, bhikkhave, saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ ukkujjatu, sambhogaṁ saṅghena karotu. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.6.3
Pali: Aṭṭhahi, bhikkhave, aṅgehi samannāgatassa upāsakassa patto ukkujjitabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:20.6.4
Pali: na bhikkhūnaṁ alābhāya parisakkati, na bhikkhūnaṁ anatthāya parisakkati, na bhikkhūnaṁ avāsāya parisakkati, na bhikkhū akkosati paribhāsati, na bhikkhū bhikkhūhi bhedeti, na buddhassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, na dhammassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati, na saṅghassa avaṇṇaṁ bhāsati. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.6.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, imehi aṭṭhahaṅgehi samannāgatassa upāsakassa pattaṁ ukkujjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.1
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, ukkujjitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.2
Pali: Tena, bhikkhave, vaḍḍhena licchavinā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.3
Pali: ‘saṅghena me, bhante, patto nikkujjito, asambhogomhi saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.4
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, sammā vattāmi, lomaṁ pātemi, netthāraṁ vattāmi, saṅghaṁ pattukkujjanaṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.5
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.6
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.7
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.8
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.9
Pali: Saṅghena vaḍḍhassa licchavissa patto nikkujjito, asambhogo saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.10
Pali: So sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, saṅghaṁ pattukkujjanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.11
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ ukkujjeyya, sambhogaṁ saṅghena kareyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.12
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.13
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.14
Pali: Saṅghena vaḍḍhassa licchavissa patto nikkujjito, asambhogo saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.15
Pali: So sammā vattati, lomaṁ pāteti, netthāraṁ vattati, saṅghaṁ pattukkujjanaṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.16
Pali: Saṅgho vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattaṁ ukkujjati, sambhogaṁ saṅghena karoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.17
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati vaḍḍhassa licchavissa pattassa ukkujjanā, sambhogaṁ saṅghena karaṇaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.18
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.19
Pali: Ukkujjito saṅghena vaḍḍhassa licchavissa patto, sambhogo saṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:20.7.20
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā vesāliyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena bhaggā tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena bhaggā tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā bhaggesu viharati susumāragire bhesakaḷāvane migadāye. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bodhissa rājakumārassa kokanado nāma pāsādo acirakārito hoti, anajjhāvuttho samaṇena vā brāhmaṇena vā kenaci vā manussabhūtena. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.5
Pali: Atha kho bodhi rājakumāro sañcikāputtaṁ māṇavaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.6
Pali: “ehi tvaṁ, samma sañcikāputta, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama, upasaṅkamitvā mama vacanena bhagavato pāde sirasā vanda; 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.7
Pali: appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ puccha—

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.8
Pali: ‘bodhi, bhante, rājakumāro bhagavato pāde sirasā vandati, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ pucchatī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.9
Pali: Evañca vadehi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.10
Pali: ‘adhivāsetu kira, bhante, bhagavā bodhissa rājakumārassa svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.11
Pali: “Evaṁ, bho”ti kho sañcikāputto māṇavo bodhissa rājakumārassa paṭissutvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavatā saddhiṁ sammodi, sammodanīyaṁ kathaṁ sāraṇīyaṁ vītisāretvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.12
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho sañcikāputto māṇavo bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.13
Pali: “bodhi kho rājakumāro bhoto gotamassa pāde sirasā vandati, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ pucchati. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.14
Pali: Evañca vadeti—

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.15
Pali: ‘adhivāsetu kira bhavaṁ gotamo bodhissa rājakumārassa svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.1.16
Pali: Adhivāsesi bhagavā tuṇhībhāvena. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.1
Pali: Atha kho sañcikāputto māṇavo bhagavato adhivāsanaṁ viditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā yena bodhi rājakumāro tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bodhiṁ rājakumāraṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.2
Pali: “avocumha kho mayaṁ bhoto vacanena taṁ bhavantaṁ gotamaṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.3
Pali: ‘bodhi kho rājakumāro bhoto gotamassa pāde sirasā vandati, appābādhaṁ appātaṅkaṁ lahuṭṭhānaṁ balaṁ phāsuvihāraṁ pucchati. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.4
Pali: Evañca vadeti—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.5
Pali: adhivāsetu kira bhavaṁ gotamo bodhissa rājakumārassa svātanāya bhattaṁ saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghenā’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.6
Pali: Adhivutthañca pana samaṇena gotamenā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.7
Pali: Atha kho bodhi rājakumāro tassā rattiyā accayena paṇītaṁ khādanīyaṁ bhojanīyaṁ paṭiyādāpetvā, kokanadañca pāsādaṁ odātehi dussehi santharāpetvā yāva pacchimasopānakaḷevarā, sañcikāputtaṁ māṇavaṁ āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.8
Pali: “ehi tvaṁ, samma sañcikāputta, yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkama, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocehi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.9
Pali: ‘kālo, bhante, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.10
Pali: “Evaṁ, bho”ti kho sañcikāputto māṇavo bodhissa rājakumārassa paṭissutvā yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavato kālaṁ ārocesi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.11
Pali: “kālo, bho gotama, niṭṭhitaṁ bhattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.12
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pubbaṇhasamayaṁ nivāsetvā pattacīvaramādāya yena bodhissa rājakumārassa nivesanaṁ tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bodhi rājakumāro bahidvārakoṭṭhake ṭhito hoti, bhagavantaṁ āgamayamāno. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.14
Pali: Addasā kho bodhi rājakumāro bhagavantaṁ dūratova āgacchantaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.15
Pali: Disvāna tato paccuggantvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā purekkhatvā yena kokanado pāsādo tenupasaṅkami. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.16
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā pacchimasopānakaḷevaraṁ nissāya aṭṭhāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.17
Pali: Atha kho bodhi rājakumāro bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.18
Pali: “akkamatu, bhante, bhagavā dussāni, akkamatu sugato dussāni, yaṁ mama assa dīgharattaṁ hitāya sukhāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.19
Pali: Evaṁ vutte, bhagavā tuṇhī ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.20
Pali: Dutiyampi kho …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.21
Pali: tatiyampi kho bodhi rājakumāro bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.22
Pali: “akkamatu, bhante, bhagavā dussāni, akkamatu sugato dussāni, yaṁ mama assa dīgharattaṁ hitāya sukhāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.23
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ apalokesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.24
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando bodhiṁ rājakumāraṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.25
Pali: “saṁharantu, rājakumāra, dussāni. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.2.26
Pali: Na bhagavā celapaṭikaṁ akkamissati pacchimaṁ janataṁ tathāgato anukampatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.1
Pali: Atha kho bodhi rājakumāro dussāni saṁharāpetvā uparikokanade pāsāde āsanaṁ paññapesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.2
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā kokanadaṁ pāsādaṁ abhiruhitvā paññatte āsane nisīdi saddhiṁ bhikkhusaṅghena. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.3
Pali: Atha kho bodhi rājakumāro buddhappamukhaṁ bhikkhusaṅghaṁ paṇītena khādanīyena bhojanīyena sahatthā santappetvā sampavāretvā, bhagavantaṁ bhuttāviṁ onītapattapāṇiṁ, ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.4
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnaṁ kho bodhiṁ rājakumāraṁ bhagavā dhammiyā kathāya sandassetvā samādapetvā samuttejetvā sampahaṁsetvā uṭṭhāyāsanā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.6
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, celapaṭikā akkamitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.3.7
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarā itthī apagatagabbhā bhikkhū nimantetvā dussaṁ paññapetvā etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.2
Pali: “akkamatha, bhante, dussan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.3
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā na akkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.4
Pali: “Akkamatha, bhante, dussaṁ maṅgalatthāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.5
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā na akkamiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.6
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.7
Pali: “kathañhi nāma ayyā maṅgalatthāya yāciyamānā celapaṭikaṁ na akkamissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.8
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tassā itthiyā ujjhāyantiyā khiyyantiyā vipācentiyā. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.9
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.10
Pali: “Gihī, bhikkhave, maṅgalikā. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.11
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gihīnaṁ maṅgalatthāya yāciyamānena celapaṭikaṁ akkamitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.12
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū dhotapādakaṁ akkamituṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.14
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dhotapādakaṁ akkamitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:21.4.15
Pali: Dutiyabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā bhaggesu yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena sāvatthi tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena sāvatthi tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.4
Pali: Atha kho visākhā migāramātā ghaṭakañca katakañca sammajjaniñca ādāya yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.5
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnā kho visākhā migāramātā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.6
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhātu me, bhante, bhagavā ghaṭakañca katakañca sammajjaniñca, yaṁ mama assa dīgharattaṁ hitāya sukhāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.7
Pali: Paṭiggahesi bhagavā ghaṭakañca sammajjaniñca. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.8
Pali: Na bhagavā katakaṁ paṭiggahesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.9
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā visākhaṁ migāramātaraṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.10
Pali: Atha kho visākhā migāramātā bhagavatā dhammiyā kathāya sandassitā samādapitā samuttejitā sampahaṁsitā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.11
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.12
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ghaṭakañca sammajjaniñca. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.13
Pali: Na, bhikkhave, katakaṁ paribhuñjitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.14
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.15
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tisso pādaghaṁsaniyo—

pli-tv-kd15:22.1.16
Pali: sakkharaṁ, kathalaṁ, samuddapheṇakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.1
Pali: Atha kho visākhā migāramātā vidhūpanañca tālavaṇṭañca ādāya yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami, upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.2
Pali: Ekamantaṁ nisinnā kho visākhā migāramātā bhagavantaṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.3
Pali: “paṭiggaṇhātu me, bhante, bhagavā vidhūpanañca tālavaṇṭañca, yaṁ mama assa dīgharattaṁ hitāya sukhāyā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.4
Pali: Paṭiggahesi bhagavā vidhūpanañca tālavaṇṭañca. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.5
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā visākhaṁ migāramātaraṁ dhammiyā kathāya sandassesi samādapesi samuttejesi sampahaṁsesi …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.6
Pali: padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.7
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā etasmiṁ nidāne etasmiṁ pakaraṇe dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:22.2.8
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vidhūpanañca tālavaṇṭañcā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa makasabījanī uppannā hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, makasabījanin”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.4
Pali: Cāmaribījanī uppannā hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, cāmaribījanī dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.7
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.8
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tisso bījaniyo—

pli-tv-kd15:23.1.9
Pali: vākamayaṁ, usīramayaṁ, morapiñchamayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa chattaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, chattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū chattappaggahitā āhiṇḍanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro upāsako sambahulehi ājīvakasāvakehi saddhiṁ uyyānaṁ agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.6
Pali: Addasāsuṁ kho te ājīvakasāvakā chabbaggiye bhikkhū dūratova chattappaggahite āgacchante. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.7
Pali: Disvāna taṁ upāsakaṁ etadavocuṁ—

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.8
Pali: “ete kho ayyā tumhākaṁ bhadantā chattappaggahitā āgacchanti, seyyathāpi gaṇakamahāmattā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.9
Pali: “Nāyyā ete bhikkhū, paribbājakā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.10
Pali: “Bhikkhū na bhikkhū”ti abbhutaṁ akaṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.11
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako upagate sañjānitvā ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.12
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā chattappaggahitā āhiṇḍissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.13
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tassa upāsakassa ujjhāyantassa khiyyantassa vipācentassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.14
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.15
Pali: “Saccaṁ kira, bhikkhave …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.16
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.17
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.18
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.19
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, chattaṁ dhāretabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.2.20
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.3.2
Pali: Tassa bhikkhuno vinā chattaṁ na phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.3.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.3.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa chattaṁ dhāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.4.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū—

pli-tv-kd15:23.4.2
Pali: gilānasseva bhagavatā chattaṁ anuññātaṁ no agilānassāti—

pli-tv-kd15:23.4.3
Pali: ārāme ārāmūpacāre chattaṁ dhāretuṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.4.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:23.4.5
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, agilānenapi ārāme ārāmūpacāre chattaṁ dhāretun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu sikkāya pattaṁ uṭṭitvā daṇḍe ālaggetvā vikāle aññatarena gāmadvārena atikkamati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.2
Pali: Manussā—

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.3
Pali: “esayyo coro gacchati, asissa vijjotalatī”ti anupatitvā gahetvā sañjānitvā muñciṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.4
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.5
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso, daṇḍasikkaṁ dhāresī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.6
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.7
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.8
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu daṇḍasikkaṁ dhāressasī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.9
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.10
Pali: “saccaṁ, bhagavā”ti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.11
Pali: vigarahitvā …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.12
Pali: dhammiṁ kathaṁ katvā bhikkhū āmantesi—

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.13
Pali: “na, bhikkhave, daṇḍasikkā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.1.14
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti, na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasammutiṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.4
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.5
Pali: Tena gilānena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.6
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, gilāno; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.7
Pali: na sakkomi vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.8
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ daṇḍasammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.9
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.10
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.11
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.12
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.13
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno, na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.14
Pali: So saṅghaṁ daṇḍasammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.15
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasammutiṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.16
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.17
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.18
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno, na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.19
Pali: So saṅghaṁ daṇḍasammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.20
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasammutiṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasammutiyā dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.22
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.23
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasammuti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.2.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa bhikkhuno sikkāsammutiṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.4
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.5
Pali: Tena gilānena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.6
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, gilāno; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.7
Pali: na sakkomi vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.8
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ sikkāsammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.9
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.10
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.11
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.12
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.13
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.14
Pali: So saṅghaṁ sikkāsammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.15
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sikkāsammutiṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.16
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.17
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.18
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.19
Pali: So saṅghaṁ sikkāsammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.20
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sikkāsammutiṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.21
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sikkāsammutiyā dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.22
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.23
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sikkāsammuti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.24
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.25
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti, na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.26
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.27
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gilānassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ dātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.28
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, dātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.29
Pali: Tena gilānena bhikkhunā saṅghaṁ upasaṅkamitvā ekaṁsaṁ uttarāsaṅgaṁ karitvā vuḍḍhānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ pāde vanditvā ukkuṭikaṁ nisīditvā añjaliṁ paggahetvā evamassa vacanīyo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.30
Pali: ‘ahaṁ, bhante, gilāno; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.31
Pali: na sakkomi vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.32
Pali: na sakkomi vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.33
Pali: Sohaṁ, bhante, saṅghaṁ daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ yācāmī’ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.34
Pali: Dutiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.35
Pali: Tatiyampi yācitabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.36
Pali: Byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.37
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.38
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno, na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.39
Pali: So saṅghaṁ daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.40
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ dadeyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.41
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.42
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.43
Pali: Ayaṁ itthannāmo bhikkhu gilāno na sakkoti vinā daṇḍena āhiṇḍituṁ, na sakkoti vinā sikkāya pattaṁ pariharituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.44
Pali: So saṅghaṁ daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ yācati. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.45
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasikkāsammutiṁ deti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.46
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasikkāsammutiyā dānaṁ, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.47
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.48
Pali: Dinnā saṅghena itthannāmassa bhikkhuno daṇḍasikkāsammuti. 

pli-tv-kd15:24.3.49
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu romanthako hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.2
Pali: So romanthitvā romanthitvā ajjhoharati. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.3
Pali: Bhikkhū ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.4
Pali: “vikālāyaṁ bhikkhu bhojanaṁ bhuñjatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.6
Pali: “Eso, bhikkhave, bhikkhu aciraṅgoyoniyā cuto. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.7
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, romanthakassa romanthanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.8
Pali: Na ca, bhikkhave, bahimukhadvāraṁ nīharitvā ajjhoharitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:25.1.9
Pali: Yo ajjhohareyya, yathādhammo kāretabbo”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa pūgassa saṅghabhattaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.2
Pali: Bhattagge bahusitthāni pakiriyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.4
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā odane diyyamāne na sakkaccaṁ paṭiggahessanti, ekamekaṁ sitthaṁ kammasatena niṭṭhāyatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.5
Pali: Assosuṁ kho bhikkhū tesaṁ manussānaṁ ujjhāyantānaṁ khiyyantānaṁ vipācentānaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.6
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.7
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, yaṁ diyyamānaṁ patati, taṁ sāmaṁ gahetvā paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:26.1.8
Pali: Pariccattaṁ taṁ, bhikkhave, dāyakehī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu dīghehi nakhehi piṇḍāya carati. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.2
Pali: Aññatarā itthī passitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ etadavoca—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.3
Pali: “ehi, bhante, methunaṁ dhammaṁ paṭisevā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.4
Pali: “Alaṁ, bhagini, netaṁ kappatī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.5
Pali: “Sace kho tvaṁ, bhante, nappaṭisevissasi, idānāhaṁ attano nakhehi gattāni vilikhitvā kuppaṁ karissāmi—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.6
Pali: ayaṁ maṁ bhikkhu vippakarotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.7
Pali: “Pajānāhi tvaṁ, bhaginī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.8
Pali: Atha kho sā itthī attano nakhehi gattāni vilikhitvā kuppaṁ akāsi—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.9
Pali: “ayaṁ maṁ bhikkhu vippakarotī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.10
Pali: Manussā upadhāvitvā taṁ bhikkhuṁ aggahesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.11
Pali: Addasāsuṁ kho te manussā tassā itthiyā nakhe chavimpi lohitampi. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.12
Pali: Disvāna—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.13
Pali: “imissāyeva itthiyā idaṁ kammaṁ, akārako bhikkhū”ti—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.14
Pali: taṁ bhikkhuṁ muñciṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.15
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.16
Pali: “Kiṁ pana tvaṁ, āvuso, dīghe nakhe dhāresī”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.17
Pali: “Evamāvuso”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.18
Pali: Ye te bhikkhū appicchā …pe… te ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.19
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhikkhu dīghe nakhe dhāressasī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.20
Pali: Atha kho te bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.21
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, dīghā nakhā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.1.22
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū nakhenapi nakhaṁ chindanti, mukhenapi nakhaṁ chindanti, kuṭṭepi ghaṁsanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.2
Pali: Aṅguliyo dukkhā honti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.4
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, nakhacchedanan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.5
Pali: Salohitaṁ nakhaṁ chindanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.6
Pali: Aṅguliyo dukkhā honti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.7
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, maṁsappamāṇena nakhaṁ chinditun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.8
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū vīsatimaṭṭhaṁ kārāpenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.9
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.10
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, vīsatimaṭṭhaṁ kārāpetabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.13
Pali: Yo kārāpeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.2.14
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, malamattaṁ apakaḍḍhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhūnaṁ kesā dīghā honti.

pli-tv-kd15:27.3.4
Pali: “Ussahanti, bhagavā”ti.

pli-tv-kd15:27.4.1

pli-tv-kd15:27.4.21

Pali: Bhesajjaṁ na santiṭṭhati.

pli-tv-kd15:27.4.24
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ābādhappaccayā sambādhe lomaṁ saṁharāpetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:27.5.1

pli-tv-kd15:27.6.1

pli-tv-kd15:27.6.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhimayaṁ dantamayaṁ visāṇamayaṁ naḷamayaṁ veḷumayaṁ kaṭṭhamayaṁ jatumayaṁ phalamayaṁ lohamayaṁ saṅkhanābhimayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū bahuṁ lohabhaṇḍaṁ kaṁsabhaṇḍaṁ sannicayaṁ karonti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.2
Pali: Manussā vihāracārikaṁ āhiṇḍantā passitvā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma samaṇā sakyaputtiyā bahuṁ lohabhaṇḍaṁ kaṁsabhaṇḍaṁ sannicayaṁ karissanti, seyyathāpi kaṁsapattharikā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, bahuṁ lohabhaṇḍaṁ kaṁsabhaṇḍaṁ sannicayo kātabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.1.6
Pali: Yo kareyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū añjanimpi añjanisalākampi kaṇṇamalaharaṇimpi bandhanamattampi kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, añjaniṁ añjanisalākaṁ kaṇṇamalaharaṇiṁ bandhanamattan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū saṅghāṭipallatthikāya nisīdanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.5
Pali: Saṅghāṭiyā pattā lujjanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.7
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, saṅghāṭipallatthikāya nisīditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.8
Pali: Yo nisīdeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.9
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu gilāno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.10
Pali: Tassa vinā āyogena na phāsu hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, āyogan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.13
Pali: Atha kho bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.14
Pali: “kathaṁ nu kho āyogo kātabbo”ti? 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.15
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:28.2.16
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tantakaṁ vemaṁ kavaṭaṁ salākaṁ sabbaṁ tantabhaṇḍakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññataro bhikkhu akāyabandhano gāmaṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.2
Pali: Tassa rathikāya antaravāsako pabhassittha. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.3
Pali: Manussā ukkuṭṭhimakaṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.4
Pali: So bhikkhu maṅku ahosi. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.5
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.6
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.7
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, akāyabandhanena gāmo pavisitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.8
Pali: Yo paviseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.1.9
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kāyabandhanan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvacāni kāyabandhanāni dhārenti—

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.2
Pali: kalābukaṁ, deḍḍubhakaṁ, murajaṁ, maddavīṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.3
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.4
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.6
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāvacāni kāyabandhanāni dhāretabbāni—

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.7
Pali: kalābukaṁ, deḍḍubhakaṁ, murajaṁ, maddavīṇaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.8
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.9
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dve kāyabandhanāni—

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.10
Pali: paṭṭikaṁ, sūkarantakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.11
Pali: Kāyabandhanassa dasā jīranti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.12
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, murajaṁ maddavīṇan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.13
Pali: Kāyabandhanassa anto jīrati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.14
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, sobhaṇaṁ guṇakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.15
Pali: Kāyabandhanassa pavananto jīrati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.16
Pali: “anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vidhan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.17
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvace vidhe dhārenti sovaṇṇamayaṁ rūpiyamayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.18
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.19

Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāvacā vidhā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.22
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.23
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhimayaṁ …pe… 

pli-tv-kd15:29.2.24
Pali: saṅkhanābhimayaṁ suttamayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena āyasmā ānando lahukā saṅghāṭiyo pārupitvā gāmaṁ piṇḍāya pāvisi. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.2
Pali: Vātamaṇḍalikāya saṅghāṭiyo ukkhipiyiṁsu. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.3
Pali: Atha kho āyasmā ānando ārāmaṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.4
Pali: Bhikkhū bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.5
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gaṇṭhikaṁ pāsakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū uccāvacā gaṇṭhikāyo dhārenti sovaṇṇamayaṁ rūpiyamayaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.7
Pali: Manussā ujjhāyanti khiyyanti vipācenti—

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.8
Pali: “seyyathāpi gihī kāmabhogino”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.10
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, uccāvacā gaṇṭhikā dhāretabbā. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.11
Pali: Yo dhāreyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.12
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhimayaṁ dantamayaṁ visāṇamayaṁ naḷamayaṁ veḷumayaṁ kaṭṭhamayaṁ jatumayaṁ phalamayaṁ lohamayaṁ saṅkhanābhimayaṁ suttamayan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū gaṇṭhikampi pāsakampi cīvare appenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.14
Pali: Cīvaraṁ jīrati. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.15
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gaṇṭhikaphalakaṁ pāsakaphalakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.17
Pali: Gaṇṭhikaphalakampi pāsakaphalakampi ante appenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.18
Pali: Koṭṭo vivariyati. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.19
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.20
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, gaṇṭhikaphalakaṁ ante appetuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd15:29.3.21
Pali: pāsakaphalakaṁ sattaṅgulaṁ vā aṭṭhaṅgulaṁ vā ogāhetvā appetun”ti.

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū dantakaṭṭhaṁ na khādanti. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.2
Pali: Mukhaṁ duggandhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.4
Pali: “Pañcime, bhikkhave, ādīnavā dantakaṭṭhassa akhādane. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.5
Pali: Acakkhussaṁ, mukhaṁ duggandhaṁ hoti, rasaharaṇiyo na visujjhanti, pittaṁ semhaṁ bhattaṁ pariyonandhati, bhattamassa nacchādeti—

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.6
Pali: ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā dantakaṭṭhassa akhādane. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.7
Pali: Pañcime, bhikkhave, ānisaṁsā dantakaṭṭhassa khādane. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.8
Pali: Cakkhussaṁ, mukhaṁ na duggandhaṁ hoti, rasaharaṇiyo visujjhanti, pittaṁ semhaṁ bhattaṁ na pariyonandhati, bhattamassa chādeti—

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.9
Pali: ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā dantakaṭṭhassa khādane. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.1.10
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, dantakaṭṭhan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū dīghāni dantakaṭṭhāni khādanti, teheva sāmaṇeraṁ ākoṭenti. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, dīghaṁ dantakaṭṭhaṁ khāditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.4
Pali: Yo khādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.5
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, aṭṭhaṅgulaparamaṁ dantakaṭṭhaṁ, na ca tena sāmaṇero ākoṭetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.6
Pali: Yo ākoṭeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno atimaṭāhakaṁ dantakaṭṭhaṁ khādantassa kaṇṭhe vilaggaṁ hoti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, atimaṭāhakaṁ dantakaṭṭhaṁ khāditabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd15:31.2.10
Pali: Yo khādeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, caturaṅgulapacchimaṁ dantakaṭṭhan”ti.

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū rukkhaṁ abhiruhanti, rukkhā rukkhaṁ saṅkamanti.

Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ.

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.6
Pali: Yo abhiruheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena aññatarassa bhikkhuno kosalesu janapade sāvatthiṁ gacchantassa antarāmagge hatthī pariyuṭṭhāti. 

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.8
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu rukkhamūlaṁ upadhāvitvā kukkuccāyanto rukkhaṁ na abhiruhi. 

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.9
Pali: So hatthī aññena agamāsi. 

pli-tv-kd15:32.2.10
Pali: Atha kho so bhikkhu sāvatthiṁ gantvā bhikkhūnaṁ etamatthaṁ ārocesi.
