pli-tv-kd16:17.1.49

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.59

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.60

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.61

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.62
Pali: Na dhūmakālikampi pariyositaṁ vihāraṁ navakammaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.63
Pali: Yo dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.1.64
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, akataṁ vā vippakataṁ vā navakammaṁ dātuṁ, khuddake vihāre kammaṁ oloketvā chappañcavassikaṁ navakammaṁ dātuṁ, aḍḍhayoge kammaṁ oloketvā sattaṭṭhavassikaṁ navakammaṁ dātuṁ, mahallake vihāre pāsāde vā kammaṁ oloketvā dasadvādasavassikaṁ navakammaṁ dātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū sabbe vihāre navakammaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.3
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, sabbe vihāre navakammaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.4
Pali: Yo dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.5
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū ekassa dve denti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.6
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.7
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, ekassa dve dātabbā. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.8
Pali: Yo dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.9
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū navakammaṁ gahetvā aññaṁ vāsenti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.11
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, navakammaṁ gahetvā añño vāsetabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.12
Pali: Yo vāseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū navakammaṁ gahetvā saṅghikaṁ paṭibāhenti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.15
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, navakammaṁ gahetvā saṅghikaṁ paṭibāhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.16
Pali: Yo paṭibāheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.17
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, ekaṁ varaseyyaṁ gahetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.18
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū nissīme ṭhitassa navakammaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.19
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.20
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, nissīme ṭhitassa navakammaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.21
Pali: Yo dadeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.22
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū navakammaṁ gahetvā sabbakālaṁ paṭibāhanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.23
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.24
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, navakammaṁ gahetvā sabbakālaṁ paṭibāhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.25
Pali: Yo paṭibāheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.2.26
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, vassānaṁ temāsaṁ paṭibāhituṁ, utukālaṁ pana na paṭibāhitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū navakammaṁ gahetvā pakkamantipi, vibbhamantipi, kālampi karonti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.2
Pali: sāmaṇerāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.3
Pali: sikkhaṁ paccakkhātakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.4
Pali: antimavatthuṁ ajjhāpannakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.5
Pali: ummattakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.6
Pali: khittacittāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.7
Pali: vedanāṭṭāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.8
Pali: āpattiyā adassane ukkhittakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.9
Pali: āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.10
Pali: pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.11
Pali: paṇḍakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.12
Pali: theyyasaṁvāsakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.13
Pali: titthiyapakkantakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.14
Pali: tiracchānagatāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.15
Pali: mātughātakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.16
Pali: pitughātakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.17
Pali: arahantaghātakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.18
Pali: bhikkhunidūsakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.19
Pali: saṅghabhedakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.20
Pali: lohituppādakāpi paṭijānanti; 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.21
Pali: ubhatobyañjanakāpi paṭijānanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.22
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.23
Pali: “Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā pakkamati—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.24
Pali: mā saṅghassa hāyīti aññassa dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.25
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā vibbhamati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.26
Pali: kālaṁ karoti, sāmaṇero paṭijānāti, sikkhaṁ paccakkhātako paṭijānāti, antimavatthuṁ ajjhāpannako paṭijānāti, ummattako paṭijānāti, khittacitto paṭijānāti, vedanāṭṭo paṭijānāti, āpattiyā adassane ukkhittako paṭijānāti, āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittako paṭijānāti, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittako paṭijānāti, paṇḍako paṭijānāti, theyyasaṁvāsako paṭijānāti, titthiyapakkantako paṭijānāti, tiracchānagato paṭijānāti, mātughātako paṭijānāti, pitughātako paṭijānāti, arahantaghātako paṭijānāti, bhikkhunidūsako paṭijānāti, saṅghabhedako paṭijānāti, lohituppādako paṭijānāti, ubhatobyañjanako paṭijānāti—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.27
Pali: mā saṅghassa hāyīti aññassa dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.28
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā vippakate pakkamati—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.29
Pali: mā saṅghassa hāyīti aññassa dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.30
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā vippakate vibbhamati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.31
Pali: ubhatobyañjanako paṭijānāti—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.32
Pali: mā saṅghassa hāyīti aññassa dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.33
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā pariyosite pakkamati—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.34
Pali: tassevetaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.35
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā pariyosite vibbhamati …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.36
Pali: kālaṁ karoti, sāmaṇero paṭijānāti, sikkhaṁ paccakkhātako paṭijānāti, antimavatthuṁ ajjhāpannako paṭijānāti—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.37
Pali: saṅgho sāmī. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.38
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā pariyosite ummattako paṭijānāti, khittacitto paṭijānāti, vedanāṭṭo paṭijānāti, āpattiyā adassane ukkhittako paṭijānāti, āpattiyā appaṭikamme ukkhittako paṭijānāti, pāpikāya diṭṭhiyā appaṭinissagge ukkhittako paṭijānāti—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.39
Pali: tassevetaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.40
Pali: Idha pana, bhikkhave, bhikkhu navakammaṁ gahetvā pariyosite paṇḍako paṭijānāti, theyyasaṁvāsako paṭijānāti, titthiyapakkantako paṭijānāti, tiracchānagato paṭijānāti, mātughātako paṭijānāti, pitughātako paṭijānāti, arahantaghātako paṭijānāti, bhikkhunidūsako paṭijānāti, saṅghabhedako paṭijānāti, lohituppādako paṭijānāti, ubhatobyañjanako paṭijānāti—

pli-tv-kd16:17.3.41
Pali: saṅgho sāmī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.0
Pali: 3.4. Aññatraparibhogapaṭikkhepādi 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū aññatarassa upāsakassa vihāraparibhogaṁ senāsanaṁ aññatra paribhuñjanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.2
Pali: Atha kho so upāsako ujjhāyati khiyyati vipāceti—

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.3
Pali: “kathañhi nāma bhadantā aññatra paribhogaṁ aññatra paribhuñjissantī”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.4
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.5
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, aññatra paribhogo aññatra paribhuñjitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.6
Pali: Yo paribhuñjeyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū uposathaggampi sannisajjampi harituṁ kukkuccāyantā chamāya nisīdanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.8
Pali: Gattānipi cīvarānipi paṁsukitāni honti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.10
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, tāvakālikaṁ haritun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa mahāvihāro undriyati. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.12
Pali: Bhikkhū kukkuccāyantā senāsanaṁ nātiharanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:18.1.14
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, guttatthāya haritun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa senāsanaparikkhāriko mahaggho kambalo uppanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, phātikammatthāya parivattetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa senāsanaparikkhārikaṁ mahagghaṁ dussaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.5
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.6
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, phātikammatthāya parivattetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa acchacammaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pādapuñchaniṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.10
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa cakkalikaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.11
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.12
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pādapuñchaniṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.13
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa coḷakaṁ uppannaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.14
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:19.1.15
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pādapuñchaniṁ kātun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū adhotehi pādehi senāsanaṁ akkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.2
Pali: Senāsanaṁ dussati. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.4
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, adhotehi pādehi senāsanaṁ akkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.5
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.6
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū allehi pādehi senāsanaṁ akkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.7
Pali: Senāsanaṁ dussati. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.9
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, allehi pādehi senāsanaṁ akkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.10
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.11
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū saupāhanā senāsanaṁ akkamanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.12
Pali: Senāsanaṁ dussati. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.13
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.14
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, saupāhanena senāsanaṁ akkamitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.1.15
Pali: Yo akkameyya, āpatti dukkaṭassā”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū parikammakatāya bhūmiyā niṭṭhubhanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.2
Pali: Vaṇṇo dussati. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.3
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.4
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, parikammakatāya bhūmiyā niṭṭhubhitabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.5
Pali: Yo niṭṭhubheyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.6
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, kheḷamallakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.7
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena mañcapādāpi pīṭhapādāpi parikammakataṁ bhūmiṁ vilikhanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.8
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.9
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, coḷakena paliveṭhetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.10
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū parikammakataṁ bhittiṁ apassenti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.11
Pali: Vaṇṇo dussati. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.12
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.13
Pali: “Na, bhikkhave, parikammakatā bhitti apassetabbā. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.14
Pali: Yo apasseyya, āpatti dukkaṭassa. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.15
Pali: Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, apassenaphalakan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.16
Pali: Apassenaphalakaṁ heṭṭhato bhūmiṁ vilikhati, uparito bhittiñca. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.17
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.18
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, heṭṭhato ca uparito ca coḷakena paliveṭhetun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.19
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena bhikkhū dhotapādakā nipajjituṁ kukkuccāyanti. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.20
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:20.2.21
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, paccattharitvā nipajjitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.0
Pali: 3.5. Saṅghabhattādianujānana 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.1
Pali: Atha kho bhagavā āḷaviyaṁ yathābhirantaṁ viharitvā yena rājagahaṁ tena cārikaṁ pakkāmi. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.2
Pali: Anupubbena cārikaṁ caramāno yena rājagahaṁ tadavasari. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.3
Pali: Tatra sudaṁ bhagavā rājagahe viharati veḷuvane kalandakanivāpe. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.4
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena rājagahaṁ dubbhikkhaṁ hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.5
Pali: Manussā na sakkonti saṅghabhattaṁ kātuṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.6
Pali: icchanti uddesabhattaṁ nimantanaṁ salākabhattaṁ pakkhikaṁ uposathikaṁ pāṭipadikaṁ kātuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.7
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.8
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, saṅghabhattaṁ uddesabhattaṁ nimantanaṁ salākabhattaṁ pakkhikaṁ uposathikaṁ pāṭipadikan”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.9.0
Pali: 3.6. Bhattuddesakasammuti 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.9.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena chabbaggiyā bhikkhū attano varabhattāni gahetvā lāmakāni bhattāni bhikkhūnaṁ denti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.10
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.11
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ bhattuddesakaṁ sammannituṁ—

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.12
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, uddiṭṭhānuddiṭṭhañca jāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.13
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.14
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.15
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.16
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ bhattuddesakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.17
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.18
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.19
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ bhattuddesakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.20
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno bhattuddesakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.21
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.22
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu bhattuddesako. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.23
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.24
Pali: Atha kho bhattuddesakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ etadahosi—

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.25
Pali: “kathaṁ nu kho bhattaṁ uddisitabban”ti? 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.26
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.1.27
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, salākāya vā paṭṭikāya vā upanibandhitvā opuñjitvā bhattaṁ uddisitun”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.0
Pali: 3.7. Senāsanapaññāpakādisammuti 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa senāsanapaññāpako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.2
Pali: bhaṇḍāgāriko na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.3
Pali: cīvarappaṭiggāhako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.4
Pali: cīvarabhājako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.5
Pali: yāgubhājako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.6
Pali: phalabhājako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.7
Pali: khajjakabhājako na hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.8
Pali: Khajjakaṁ abhājiyamānaṁ nassati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.9
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.10
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ khajjakabhājakaṁ sammannituṁ—

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.11
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, bhājitābhājitañca jāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.12
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.13
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.14
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.15
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ khajjakabhājakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.16
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.17
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.18
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ khajjakabhājakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.19
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno khajjakabhājakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.20

pli-tv-kd16:21.2.22
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.0
Pali: 3.8. Appamattakavissajjakasammuti 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa bhaṇḍāgāre appamattako parikkhāro uppanno hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.2
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.3
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ appamattakavissajjakaṁ sammannituṁ—

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.4
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, vissajjitāvissajjitañca jāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.5
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.6
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.7
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.8
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ appamattakavissajjakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.9
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.10
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.11
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ appamattakavissajjakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.12
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno appamattakavissajjakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.13
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.14
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu appamattakavissajjako. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.15
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.16
Pali: Tena appamattakavissajjakena bhikkhunā ekā sūci dātabbā, satthakaṁ dātabbaṁ, upāhanā dātabbā, kāyabandhanaṁ dātabbaṁ, aṁsabaddhako dātabbo, parissāvanaṁ dātabbaṁ, dhammakaraṇo dātabbo, kusi dātabbā, aḍḍhakusi dātabbā, maṇḍalaṁ dātabbaṁ, aḍḍhamaṇḍalaṁ dātabbaṁ, anuvāto dātabbo, paribhaṇḍaṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.17
Pali: Sace hoti saṅghassa sappi vā telaṁ vā madhu vā phāṇitaṁ vā, sakiṁ paṭisāyituṁ dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.18
Pali: Sace punapi attho hoti, punapi dātabbaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.19.0
Pali: 3.9. Sāṭiyaggāhāpakādisammuti 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.19.1
Pali: Tena kho pana samayena saṅghassa sāṭiyaggāhāpako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.20
Pali: pattaggāhāpako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.21
Pali: ārāmikapesako na hoti …pe… 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.22
Pali: sāmaṇerapesako na hoti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.23
Pali: Sāmaṇerā apesiyamānā kammaṁ na karonti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.24
Pali: Bhagavato etamatthaṁ ārocesuṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.25
Pali: “Anujānāmi, bhikkhave, pañcahaṅgehi samannāgataṁ bhikkhuṁ sāmaṇerapesakaṁ sammannituṁ—

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.26
Pali: yo na chandāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na dosāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na mohāgatiṁ gaccheyya, na bhayāgatiṁ gaccheyya, pesitāpesitañca jāneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.27
Pali: Evañca pana, bhikkhave, sammannitabbo. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.28
Pali: Paṭhamaṁ bhikkhu yācitabbo, yācitvā byattena bhikkhunā paṭibalena saṅgho ñāpetabbo—

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.29
Pali: ‘Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.30
Pali: Yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṁ, saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ sāmaṇerapesakaṁ sammanneyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.31
Pali: Esā ñatti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.32
Pali: Suṇātu me, bhante, saṅgho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.33
Pali: Saṅgho itthannāmaṁ bhikkhuṁ sāmaṇerapesakaṁ sammannati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.34
Pali: Yassāyasmato khamati itthannāmassa bhikkhuno sāmaṇerapesakassa sammuti, so tuṇhassa; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.35
Pali: yassa nakkhamati, so bhāseyya. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.36
Pali: Sammato saṅghena itthannāmo bhikkhu sāmaṇerapesako. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.37
Pali: Khamati saṅghassa, tasmā tuṇhī, evametaṁ dhārayāmī’”ti. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.38
Pali: Tatiyabhāṇavāro niṭṭhito. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.39
Pali: Senāsanakkhandhako chaṭṭho. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.40
Pali: Tassuddānaṁ 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.41
Pali: Vihāraṁ buddhaseṭṭhena, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.42
Pali: apaññattaṁ tadā ahu; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.43
Pali: Tahaṁ tahaṁ nikkhamanti, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.44
Pali: vāsā te jinasāvakā. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.45
Pali: Seṭṭhī gahapati disvā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.46
Pali: bhikkhūnaṁ idamabravi; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.47
Pali: Kārāpeyyaṁ vaseyyātha, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.48
Pali: paṭipucchiṁsu nāyakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.49
Pali: Vihāraṁ aḍḍhayogañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.50
Pali: pāsādaṁ hammiyaṁ guhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.51
Pali: Pañcaleṇaṁ anuññāsi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.52
Pali: vihāre seṭṭhi kārayi. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.53
Pali: Jano vihāraṁ kāreti, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.54
Pali: akavāṭaṁ asaṁvutaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.55
Pali: Kavāṭaṁ piṭṭhasaṅghāṭaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.56
Pali: udukkhalañca uttari. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.57
Pali: Āviñchanacchiddaṁ rajjuṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.58
Pali: vaṭṭiñca kapisīsakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.59
Pali: Sūcighaṭitāḷacchiddaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.60
Pali: lohakaṭṭhavisāṇakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.61
Pali: Yantakaṁ sūcikañceva, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.62
Pali: chadanaṁ ullittāvalittaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.63
Pali: Vedijālasalākañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.64
Pali: cakkali santharena ca. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.65
Pali: Miḍḍhi bidalamañcañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.66
Pali: sosānikamasārako; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.67
Pali: Bundikuḷirapādañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.68
Pali: āhaccāsandi uccake. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.69
Pali: Sattaṅgo ca bhaddapīṭhaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.70
Pali: pīṭhakeḷakapādakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.71
Pali: Āmalāphalakā kocchā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.72
Pali: palālapīṭhameva ca. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.73
Pali: Uccāhipaṭipādakā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.74
Pali: aṭṭhaṅguli ca pādakā; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.75
Pali: Suttaṁ aṭṭhapadaṁ coḷaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.76
Pali: tūlikaṁ aḍḍhakāyikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.77
Pali: Giraggo bhisiyo cāpi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.78
Pali: dussaṁ senāsanampi ca; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.79
Pali: Onaddhaṁ heṭṭhā patati, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.80
Pali: uppāṭetvā haranti ca. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.81
Pali: Bhattiñca hatthabhattiñca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.82
Pali: anuññāsi tathāgato; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.83
Pali: Titthiyā vihāre cāpi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.84
Pali: thusaṁ saṇhañca mattikā. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.85
Pali: Ikkāsaṁ pāṇikaṁ kuṇḍaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.86
Pali: sāsapaṁ sitthatelakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.87
Pali: Ussanne paccuddharituṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.88
Pali: pharusaṁ gaṇḍumattikaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.89
Pali: Ikkāsaṁ paṭibhānañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.90
Pali: nīcā cayo ca āruhaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.91
Pali: Paripatanti āḷakā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.92
Pali: aḍḍhakuṭṭaṁ tayo puna. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.93
Pali: Khuddake kuṭṭapādo ca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.94
Pali: ovassati saraṁ khilaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.95
Pali: Cīvaravaṁsaṁ rajjuñca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.96
Pali: āḷindaṁ kiṭikena ca. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.97
Pali: Ālambanaṁ tiṇacuṇṇaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.98
Pali: heṭṭhāmagge nayaṁ kare; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.99
Pali: Ajjhokāse otappati, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.100
Pali: sālaṁ heṭṭhā ca bhājanaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.101
Pali: Vihāro koṭṭhako ceva, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.102
Pali: pariveṇaggisālakaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.103
Pali: Ārāme ca puna koṭṭhe, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.104
Pali: heṭṭhaññeva nayaṁ kare. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.105
Pali: Sudhaṁ anāthapiṇḍi ca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.106
Pali: saddho sītavanaṁ agā; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.107
Pali: Diṭṭhadhammo nimantesi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.108
Pali: saha saṅghena nāyakaṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.109
Pali: Āṇāpesantarāmagge, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.110
Pali: ārāmaṁ kārayī gaṇo; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.111
Pali: Vesāliyaṁ navakammaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.112
Pali: purato ca pariggahi. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.113
Pali: Ko arahati bhattagge, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.114
Pali: tittirañca avandiyā; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.115
Pali: Pariggahitantaragharā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.116
Pali: tūlo sāvatthi osari. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.117
Pali: Patiṭṭhāpesi ārāmaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.118
Pali: bhattagge ca kolāhalaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.119
Pali: Gilānā varaseyyā ca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.120
Pali: lesā sattarasā tahiṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.121
Pali: Kena nu kho kathaṁ nu kho, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.122
Pali: vihāraggena bhājayi; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.123
Pali: Pariveṇaṁ anubhāgañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.124
Pali: akāmā bhāgaṁ no dade. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.125
Pali: Nissīmaṁ sabbakālañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.126
Pali: gāhā senāsane tayo; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.127
Pali: Upanando ca vaṇṇesi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.128
Pali: ṭhitakā samakāsanā. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.129
Pali: Samānāsanikā bhindiṁsu, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.130
Pali: tivaggā ca duvaggikaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.131
Pali: Asamānāsanikā dīghaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.132
Pali: sāḷindaṁ paribhuñjituṁ. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.133
Pali: Ayyikā ca avidūre, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.134
Pali: bhājitañca kīṭāgire;

Pali: Āḷavī piṇḍakakuṭṭehi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.136

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.137

Pali: geruchādanabandhanā;

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.140

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.141
Pali: Osite akataṁ vippaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.142
Pali: khudde chappañcavassikaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.143
Pali: Aḍḍhayoge ca sattaṭṭha, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.144
Pali: mahalle dasa dvādasa. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.145
Pali: Sabbaṁ vihāraṁ ekassa, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.146
Pali: aññaṁ vāsenti saṅghikaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.147
Pali: Nissīmaṁ sabbakālañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.148
Pali: pakkami vibbhamanti ca. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.149
Pali: Kālañca sāmaṇerañca, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.150
Pali: sikkhāpaccakkhaantimaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.151
Pali: Ummattakhittacittā ca,

Pali: vedanāpattidassanā. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.153

Pali: arahantā ca dūsakā. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.157
Pali: Bhedakā lohituppādā, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.158
Pali: ubhato cāpi byañjanakā; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.159
Pali: Mā saṅghassa parihāyi, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.160
Pali: kammaṁ aññassa dātave. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.161
Pali: Vippakate ca aññassa, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.162
Pali: kate tasseva pakkame; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.163
Pali: Vibbhamati kālaṅkato, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.164
Pali: sāmaṇero ca jāyati. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.165
Pali: Paccakkhāto ca sikkhāya, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.166
Pali: antimajjhāpannako yadi; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.167
Pali: Saṅghova sāmiko hoti,

Pali: saṅghova hoti sāmiko. 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.177
Pali: Harantaññatra kukkuccaṁ, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.178
Pali: undriyati ca kambalaṁ; 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.179
Pali: Dussañca cammacakkalī, 

pli-tv-kd16:21.3.180
Pali: coḷakaṁ akkamanti ca.

Pali: Allā upāhanāniṭṭhu,
